Matthew26:65 Koi kras o baro rashai peskro ripen paash, te sikrell lo peskri choli, un penas ap i wawar pralstunende: “Job krell pes har o Dewel. Tumer shunan les. Kek hunte penell menge budeder." 
Matthew26:66 Hoi kamenn tumer leha te krell?” Penan le: “Job hunte well maredo.” 
Matthew26:67 Un palle tchungran le leske an o mui, un dan les ap o shero. Wawar dan les an o mui," 
Matthew26:68 un penan ap leste: “Tu, baro rai, pen menge, koon das tut?”" 
Matthew26:69 O Petro his win glan o kheer beshdo. Un i budepaskretsa was pash leste, un penas ap leste: “Tu hal ninna jek kolendar, kai o Jesuseha dran o them Galilea was.”" 
Matthew26:70 Un job chochras glan kol tsele menshende, kai koi beshdo hi, un penas: “Me haiwau gar, hoi tu peneh.”" 
Matthew26:71 Un job djas win pash o baro wudar glan ko kheer. Kote dikas les i wawar budepaskretsa. Un koja penas ap kolende, kai kote tardo hi: “Kowa hi ninna jek kolendar, kai his o Jesuseha dran Nazaret khetne.”" 
Matthew26:72 Un pale chochras lo, das pes sowel, un penas ap late: “Me prindjrau kau murshes gar.”" 
Matthew26:73 Un pal i tikno tsiro wan kolla pash o Petreste, kai kote tardo hi, un penan ap leste: “Tchatchepah, tu hal ninna jek kolendar. Tiro rakepen phukrell ap tute.”" 
Matthew26:74 Koi tchingras lo, das pes sowel, un penas ap lende: “Me prindjrau kau murshes gar!” Un sik koi pre das o bashno gole." 
Matthew26:75 Un o Petreske wan o Jesuseskre laba an o shero, hoi job leske penas: “O bashno dell gar gole jaake rah, har tu man gar triin kope buchoste dal.” Un o Petro djas dran o baro wudar win, un rowas soreles." 
Matthew27:1 Sik taissarlake wan i tsele bare rashaja un i biboldengre phureder khetne. Un khetne kran le win, te marenn le o Jesuses." 
Matthew27:2 Un jon pandan les, un anan les pash o themeskro rajeste. Leskro lab his Pilato. Job his i Remari. An leskre wasta dan le o Jesuses." 
Matthew27:3 O Judas, ko phukepaskro, har haiwas lo, te kran le win, te well o Jesus maredo, khaitas kowa les. Doleske anas job kol trijanda rupene beme pale pash i bare rashajende un pash i biboldengre phureder." 
Matthew27:4 Un job penas ap lende: “Me anom doosh ap mande. Me phukrom ap koleste, kai kek doosh ap peste anas.” Penan le: “Kowa hi gar maro koowa. Kowa hi tiro koowa.”" 
Matthew27:5 Koi witsras lo kol trijanda rupene beme an o Debleskro baro kheer, nashas lendar, tchiwas i dori trul peskri meen, un tassras pes." 
Matthew27:6 Kol bare rashaja lan kol rupene beme, un penan: “Ap kal lowe hi o rat pre. Mer nai tchiwah kal lowe gar pash o brawlepen an o Debleskro baro kheer. Kowa djal gar pal o biboldengro tchatchepen.”" 
Matthew27:7 Un jon rakran khetne, hoi nai krans le kol lowentsa. Un jon penan: “Mer ginah i kotar them, te nai paskrah kote kolen, kai kek bibolde hi.” Un jon ginan ko kotar them ko romestar, kai krell pirja dran lolo tchik." 
Matthew27:8 Doleske dan le ko kotar them o lab ratli phub. Ninna kau diwes kharell kowa jaake. 
Matthew27:9 Un jaake was kowa tchatcho, hoi o Debleskro rakepaskro Jeremia glan i rah tsiro penas: Jon lan i trijanda rupene beme. Kowa his kol lowe, kai i Israeleskre menshe win kran, te plaissrenn le leske. Kol lowentsa ginan le i kotar them kolestar, kai krell pirja dran lolo tchik, jaake har o Dewel mange kowa penas." 
Matthew27:10  
Matthew27:11 Un o Jesus his glan o themeskro rajeste, o Pilato tardo. Un kowa putchas lestar: “Hal tu o baro rai pral i biboldende?” Koi penas o Jesus: “Awa, hi jaake, har tu penal.”" 
Matthew27:12 Un i bare rashaja un i biboldengre phureder anan doosh ap leste pre. O Jesus penas tchi. 
Matthew27:13 Koi penas o Pilato ap leste: “Shuneh tu gar, hoi jon lauter ap tute pre anenna?”" 
Matthew27:14 O Jesus penas tchi, kek lab. Un o Pilato kras tchatchepah bare jaka." 
Matthew27:15 Ap ko tsiro his jaake, te mukas o themeskro rai ap o Passa jekes dran o stilepen win. Koles nai rodan i bibolde penge win." 
Matthew27:16 An ko bersh his i mursh kote stildo, leskro lab his Barabas. Hakeno djinas, te hi job i tchilatcho mursh." 
Matthew27:17 Un har jon lauter khetne his, putchas o Pilato lendar: “Kones mukap dran o stilepen win: O Barabes? O Jesuses, kai ninna o Kristo kharella?”" 
Matthew27:18 O Pilato djinas mishto, te silwerenn le ap o Jesuseste. Un dran kowa dan le les an leskre wasta." 
Matthew27:19 Har o Pilato ap o tchatchepaskro beshepaskro beshdo his, te rakrell lo o tchatchepen pral leste win, mukas leskri romni leske te penell: “Ko mursh anas kek doosh ap peste. Muk les te djal! Taissar rati his man i tchilatchi suni, un man his bare duka dran leste.”" 
Matthew27:20 I bare rashaja un i biboldengre phureder rakran bud ap kol tsele menshende kote dren, te penenn jon, te well o Barabas dran o stilepen win, un te well o Jesus maredo." 
Matthew27:21 Un o Pilato putchas lendar: “Kones kol dui murshendar mukap dran o stilepen win?” “O Barabes!” penan le. 
Matthew27:22 Koi penas o Pilato ap lende: “Hoi krap o Jesuseha, kai kharella ninna o Kristo?” Penan le halauter: “De les ap o trushel!”" 
Matthew27:23 Putchas lo lendar: “Hawo tchilatcho koowa kras job?” Kote dan le bari gole: “De les ap o trushel!” 
Matthew27:24 Har o Pilato dikas, te nai krell lo tchi, un te wenn le diwjeder, las lo pani, thowas peskre wasta glan i tsele menshende, un penas: “Me anau kek doosh ap mande, te well lo maredo. Koi doosh well ap tumende.”" 
Matthew27:25 Un kol tsele menshe penan: “Koi doosh well ap mende un ap mare tchawende!” 
Matthew27:26 Palle mukas lo o Barabes dran o stilepen win. Un o Jesuses mukas lo i tchupnijah dawa te dell, un das les an i lurdengre wasta, te denn le les ap o trushel." 
Matthew27:27 Palle anan o Pilateskre lurde o Jesuses an o baro kheer o themeskro rajestar. Un jon dan i tsele lurden gole, te wenn le kote khetne." 
Matthew27:28 Un jon riwan leske leskre koola win, un tchiwan leske i loli rajeskri plaashka trujel." 
Matthew27:29 Un jon pandan subjengre kashta khetne, un tchiwan len leske ap o shero, jaake har i baro rai hidjrell shereskro sonakai ap peskro shero. Ninna tchiwan le leske i kasht an leskro tchatcho wast. Un jon mukan pen glan leste ap i tchanga te perell, un kran jaake, har te mangans le i baro rajes an. Jon san pral leste, un penan: “Sharedo wess tu, tu baro rai pral i bibolde!”" 
Matthew27:30 Un jon tchungran ap leste, lan leske o kasht dran o wast, un dan les leske ap o shero." 
Matthew27:31 Har jon san pral leste, riwan le leske koi loli plaashka pale win, un riwan leske leskre koola pale an. Un jon anan les win, te denn le les ap o trushel." 
Matthew27:32 Har jon dran o foro win djan, dikan le i murshes dran o foro Kirene. Leskro lab his Simon. Koles tapran le i sorjah, un kran, te hidjrell lo o Jesuseskro trushel." 
Matthew27:33 Un har jon ap ko kotar them wan, hoi kharella Golgata, – kowa kharella Muleskro Shero," 
Matthew27:34 – dan le les mool te pijell, kai tchomone dren hi, hoi kharella Galle. Har job kowa haiwas, kamas lo gar te pijell." 
Matthew27:35 Un jon dan les ap o trushel. Un palle khelan le pral leskre koola, te dikenn le, hoi hakeno lella." 
Matthew27:36 Un jon beshan pen kote tele, un dan ap leste jak." 
Matthew27:37 Ap o trushel pral leskro shero tchiwan le i kotar kasht, kai tchinlo hi, hoske job hunte meras. Un koi pre his tchinlo: Kawa hi o Jesus, o baro rai pral i biboldende." 
Matthew27:38 Leha dan le dui marepangren ap o trushel. Ko jekeskro trushel his tchatches lestar, ko wawareskro trushel his serwes lestar." 
Matthew27:39 Un kolla, kai kote pashel wan, sikran i gushteha ap o Jesuseste, un praassan les." 
Matthew27:40 Un jon penan ap o Jesuseste: “Tu kamal o Debleskro baro kheer tele te phagell, un an triin diwessa pale pre te tchiwell. Tu te hal o Debleskro tchawo, kre tuke, hoi kral i wawarenge un ab kau trushelestar tele!”" 
Matthew27:41 Un ninna i bare rashaja, i biboldengre tchatchepangre un phureder san pral leste, un penan:" 
Matthew27:42 “Wawaren las job dran o merepen win. Pes kokres nai lell lo gar dran o merepen win. Te hi lo o baro rai pral o Israel, palle well lo kanna o trushelestar tele. Palle patsah ap leste." 
Matthew27:43 Job patsas o Debles, un penas: Me hom o Debleskro tchawo. Te kamell o Dewel les o djijestar, mu well lo, un lell les kanna kau trushelestar tele!”" 
Matthew27:44 Ninna kol dui marepangre praassan les, kolla kai langs leste ap pengro trushel dino wan." 
Matthew27:45 His deesh-te-dujenge, koi was o diwes kalo har i rat an o tselo them. Un kowa atchas jaake bis trinenge." 
Matthew27:46 Un har trinenge his, das o Jesus bari gole: Eli, Eli, lema sabachtani? Kowa kharella: Miro Dewel, miro Dewel, hoske mukal man tu?" 
Matthew27:47 Un kolendar, kai kote tardo his, un kowa shunan, penan: “Kawa dell ap o Elija gole.”" 
Matthew27:48 Un jek kol lurdendar anas sik tchomone har i kotar than, kras les pherdo shutli mool, tchiwas les ap i kasht, un das les o Jesuses te pijell." 
Matthew27:49 Wawar penan: “Muk les, dikas, te well o Elija, un lell les tele.”" 
Matthew27:50 O Jesus das pale bari gole, un meras." 
Matthew27:51 Un ko wudar an o Debleskro baro kheer, hoi his kerdo dran kutch pesso than, kowa djas paash an dui kotja fun pral bis tele. Un i phub was trisslemen. Un i bare barra phagan an kotja." 
Matthew27:52 I mulengre khera phagan pre. Un bud kolendar, kai ap o Debles patsan un meran, wan djido," 
Matthew27:53 un djan dran pengre mulengre khera win. Pal kowa, har o Jesus ninna i mulendar djido was, djan le an o Debleskro foro Jerusalem. Un bud menshe dikan len kote." 
Matthew27:54 Ko pralstuno lurdo un kol wawar, kai khetne leha ap o Jesuseste jak dan, kolla dikan, te was i phub trisslemen, un hoi lauter koi djas. Koi tapras len i bari daar. Un jon penan: “Kau mursh his tchatchepah o Debleskro tchawo.”" 
Matthew27:55 Bud djuwja his i kotar krik tardo un dikan kowa lauter. Kolla wan o Jesuseha dran o them Galilea, te denn le les chapen un pipen." 
Matthew27:56 Mashkral lende his i Maria Magdalena, un koi Maria, kai hi o Jakobeskri un o Josefeskri dai. Un o Zebedeskri romni, lakre tchawe his o Jakobo un o Johanni, joi his ninna kote pash lende." 
Matthew27:57 Har i rat was, was i brawelo mursh dran o foro Arimatia. Leskro lab his Josef. Kowa patsas ninna ap o Jesuseste." 
Matthew27:58 Job djas pash o Pilateste un mangas les, te dell lo les o mulo Jesuses. Un o Pilato penas i lurdenge, te denn le les leste." 
Matthew27:59 Un o Josef las o mulo Jesuses, tchiwas les an i djudji plachta," 
Matthew27:60 un tchiwas les an peskro newo mulengro kheer, hoi job das peske an i baro bar. Palle tchiwas job i baro bar glan o wudar an ko mulengro kheer, un djas peske." 
Matthew27:61 Kote his ninna i Maria Magdalena un i wawar Maria. Kolla beshan wergel ko mulengro kheer. 
Matthew27:62 O wawar diwes his o Debleskro diwes. Un i bare rashaja un i Farisarja wan pash o Pilateste khetne," 
Matthew27:63 un penan ap leste: “Rai, menge djas an maro shero trujel, te penas ko chocheno, har job djiwas: Pal triin diwessa krell o Dewel man djido." 
Matthew27:64 Dran kowa pen tire lurdenge, te denn le kol triin diwessa ap ko mulengro kheer jak! Jaake te nai tchorenn leskre mala les gar, un te penenn le i menshenge gar: Job stas i mulendar pre. Kowa wals i bareder chochepen har lauter kowa, hoi job penas.”" 
Matthew27:65 Koi penas o Pilato ap lende: “Ake, lenn lurden tumentsa un denn jak ap ko mulengro kheer, jaake har tumer patsenn, te hunte well kowa!”" 
Matthew27:66 Un jon djan pash o mulengro kheer, un kran i sikepen ap ko bar, te dikenn le, te las jek o bar krik. Un kol lurde dan jak ap ko mulengro kheer." 
Matthew28:1 O Debleskro diwes djas trujel. O wawar diwes, taissarlake, har o kham pre djala, djas i Maria Magdalena, un koi wawar Maria pash o mulengro kheer." 
Matthew28:2 Ap jek kopo was i phub soreles trisslemen. Un o Debleskro bolepaskro was dran o bolepen, tchiwas ko baro bar glan o mulengro kheer ap i rig, un beshas pes koi pre." 
Matthew28:3 Leskro mui chatchas har i soreli momeli. Un leskro ripen his parno har i gib. 
Matthew28:4 Kol lurde, kai kote jak dan, tapran sawi daar, te peran le ap i phub, un atchan kote tchiddo, har te wans le mulo." 
Matthew28:5 Un o bolepaskro penas ap kol djuwjende: “Ma darenn! Me djinau, te rodenn tumer o Jesuses, kai ap o trushel dino was." 
Matthew28:6 Job hi gar kate. O Dewel kras les i mulendar djido, jaake har job penas. Awenn un dikenn, kai job tchiddo his!" 
Matthew28:7 Djan sik pash leskre malende un penenn lenge: O Dewel kras les djido! Shunenn, job djal glan tumende an o them Galilea. Un kote dikenn tumer les pale. Ma bistrenn, hoi me tumenge penom!”" 
Matthew28:8 Un jon djan sik krik. Lengro dji his pherdo daar un bacht. Un jon nashan, te penenn le o Jesuseskre malenge kowa lauter." 
Matthew28:9 Ap o drom was o Jesus pash lende un penas: “Latcho diwes!” Un jon djan pash leste, peran glan leste tele, un tapran leskre pire." 
Matthew28:10 Koi penas o Jesus ap lende: “Ma darenn! Djan pash mire phralende un penenn lenge, te djan le an o them Galilea! Un kote dikenn le man pale.”" 
Matthew28:11 Har i djuwja ap o drom his, djan ninna kol lurdendar, kai ap o mulengro kheer jak dan, an o foro. Un kolla penan i bare rashajenge lauter, hoi koi djas." 
Matthew28:12 Un i bare rashaja dan i biboldengre phureden khetne gole, un kran lentsa win, te denn le kol lurden bud lowe." 
Matthew28:13 Un jon penan ap kol lurdende: “Penenn i menshenge: Leskre mala tchoran les an i rat, har mer sowam." 
Matthew28:14 O themeskro rai, te shunell lo kowa, palle penah mer leske, te anan tumer an ko koowa kek doosh ap tumende. Jaake hunte trashenn tumer gar lestar.”" 
Matthew28:15 Un kol lurde lan kol lowe, un kran kowa jaake, har i pralstune lenge penan. Un ko rakepen djal gomme kau diwes mashkral i biboldende trujel." 
Matthew28:16 O Jesuseskre deesh-te-jek mala djan an o them Galilea, ap koi berga, kai o Jesus penas, te wenn le kote." 
Matthew28:17 Un har jon les dikan kote tardo, peran le glan leste tele, ninna te patsan gar lauter, te hi job tchatchepah o Jesus." 
Matthew28:18 Un o Jesus djas pash lende un penas ap lende: “O baro Dewel das man i soor pral o bolepen un pral i phub. 
Matthew28:19 Doleske djan pash i menshende an hake themma, un penenn lenge mire laba, te patsenn le ap mande! Taufrenn len ap o lab o dadestar, o tchawestar un o Debleskro Ducho!" 
Matthew28:20 Penenn lenge, te rikrenn le ap lauter, hoi me tumenge penom! Tchatchepah, me hom pash tumende hako diwes jaake rah, har i phub koi hi.”" 
Mark1:1 Kowa hi o latcho lab o Jesus Kristestar. Job hi o Debleskro tchawo. 
Mark1:2 Kowa was jaake har o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Jesaja, glan i rah tsiro an peskro liil tchinas. O Dewel penas ap peskro tchaweste: Shun, me, o Dewel, bitchrau i murshes glan tute ap o drom, te krell lo tuke i drom, te nai wess pash i menshende." 
Mark1:3 Koi hi jek an o mulo them, kai dell gole: Krenn maro Debleske o drom, te nai well lo pash i menshende! Lenn halauter krik, hoi o Debleske an o drom tchiddo hi!" 
Mark1:4 Kowa his o Johanni, kowa, kai taufras i menshen. Job his an o mulo them, un penas i menshenge: “Mukenn tumaro tchilatcho drom! Djan ap o Debleskro drom! Un mukenn tumen te taufrell! Un o Dewel lell tumari doosh tumendar krik!”" 
Mark1:5 Un bud menshe djan pash leste. Jon wan dran o tselo them Judea un dran o foro Jerusalem. Un jon penan o tchilatcho koowa, hoi jon kran. Un o Johanni taufras len an o pani Jordan." 
Mark1:5 Un bud menshe djan pash leste. Jon wan dran o tselo them Judea un dran o foro Jerusalem. Un jon penan o tchilatcho koowa, hoi jon kran. Un o Johanni taufras len an o pani Jordan." 
Mark1:6 O Johanneskri plaashka his dran viechengre balla. Un i ledertikri dori his trul leste. Un leskro chapen his gwin un stepangre. 
Mark1:7 Un job penas i menshenge: “Koi wella i mursh pal mande, kowa hi sorleder har me. Me hom gar moldo, te tchiwap man glan leste tele, te krap leskre kircha pre." 
Mark1:8 Me tchiwom tumen an o pani, te well diklo, kai mukan tumaro phuro djipen. Kowa, kai well pal mande, tchiwell o Debleskro Ducho ap tumende.”" 
Mark1:9 His an kol diwessa, kai was o Jesus dran o foro Nazaret, hoi an o them Galilea tchiddo hi, un mukas pes o Johannestar an o pani Jordan te taufrell." 
Mark1:10 Un har o Jesus pes dran o pani hadas, dikas lo, kai djas o bolepen pre, un o Debleskro Ducho was har i parno tchirklo ap leste tele." 
Mark1:11 Un i rakepen dran o bolepen penas: “Tu hal miro tchawo, koles me kamau. Pral tute hom bachtelo.”" 
Mark1:12 Un sik pal kowa anas les o Debleskro Ducho an o mulo them. 
Mark1:13 Un kote atchas lo star-deesh diwessa. Un o beng kamas les o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell. Kote his ninna diwje vieche. Un i bolepangre wan un his leske koi. 
Mark1:14 Har o Johanni stildo was, djas o Jesus an o them Galilea, un sikras i menshende o Debleskro drom." 
Mark1:15 Un job penas: “O tsiro was, kai lell o Dewel i menshen dran o tchilatchepen win. Mukenn tumaro phuro djipen! Un djan ap o Debleskro drom! Un patsenn ap kau latcho lab!”" 
Mark1:16 Har o Jesus pash o baro pani an o them Galilea djas, dikas lo o Simones un leskro phrales, o Andreas. Kolla his matchepangre, un witsran pengre matchengre gone an o pani, te taprenn le matchen." 
Mark1:17 Un o Jesus penas ap lende: “Awenn mantsa! Me krau tumendar menshen, kai anenn wawaren pash mande.”" 
Mark1:18 Koi pre mukan le pengre matchengre gone un djan leha. 
Mark1:19 Un o Jesus djas dureder, un dikas o Jakobes un leskro phrales, o Johanni. Lengro dad hi o Zebedeo. Jon his an o bero beshdo un kran i matchengre gone tseles." 
Mark1:20 Har job len dikas, das lo len gole. Un jon mukan pengro dades, o Zebedeo, an o bero, khetne kolentsa, kai budran leske, un djan o Jesuseha." 
Mark1:21 Un jon djan an o foro Kapernaum. Ap o Debleskro diwes djas o Jesus an i biboldengri kangri un sikras i menshende o Debleskro drom. 
Mark1:22 Un jon kran bare jaka pral kowa, hoi job lenge penas. Job rakras bari sorjah un gar jaake har i biboldengre tchatchepangre rakrenna." 
Mark1:23 An koi kangri his ninna i mursh, kai his an leste i beng. Un kowa das gole:" 
Mark1:24 “Hoi kameh tu mendar, Jesus dran Nazaret? Wal tu, te maress men? Me djinau, koon tu hal: Tu weh o Deblestar.”" 
Mark1:25 Un o Jesus das les trad un penas ap leste: “Ma rake un dja dran leste win!” 
Mark1:26 Un ko beng, kai an ko mursheste his, tserdas kau murshes kate un kote, das soreles gole, un djas dran leste win." 
Mark1:27 Un lenge atchas o rakepen krik. Un jon putchan mank pende: “Hoi hi kowa? I newo drom sikrell lo men i bari sorjah. Les hi ninna penepaske pral i benga. Un jon shunenn ap leste, un wenn dran i menshende win.”" 
Mark1:28 Un an i tikno tsiro shunas hakeno lestar an kau tselo them Galilea. 
Mark1:29 Har jon dran i biboldengri kangri win wan, djan le an ko kheer, kai o Simon un o Andreas djiwenn. Ninna o Jakobo un o Johanni djan lentsa." 
Mark1:30 Un i dai o Simoneskri romjatar his tchiddo ap o tchiben, un lakro shero his tato. Un jon penan o Jesuseske latar." 
Mark1:31 Un job was pash late, tapras lat pash o wast un kras, te stell li pale pre. Un o nasslepen djas latar. Un joi anas lenge i chapen." 
Mark1:32 Ap i rati, har o kham tele djas, anan jon pash leste i tsele nasselen un kolen, kai his benga an lende." 
Mark1:33 Un i tsele menshe dran o foro wan khetne glan o wudar. 
Mark1:34 Un job kras bud nasselen sasto, un las bud nasslepen lendar. Ninna bud bengen tradas lo win un mukas len gar rakrell. Jon djinan, koon job hi. Doleske mukas o Jesus len gar te rakrell." 
Mark1:35 Un taissarlake, glan o diwes, stas lo pre, un djas kote, kai lo kokres hi. Un kote rakras lo o Debleha." 
Mark1:36 Un o Simon un kolla, kai pash leste his, nashan leske sik palla." 
Mark1:37 Un har hatsan le les, penan le leske: “Hakeno rodell tut.”" 
Mark1:38 Penas lo ap lende: “Mer djas ninna an i wawar forja, te penap kote i menshenge o Debleskro lab. Doleske wom kai, te penap kowa lenge.”" 
Mark1:39 Un job djas an o tselo them Galilea trujel, un rakras an i biboldengre kangria, un tradas i bengen dran i menshende win." 
Mark1:40 I mursh was pash o Jesuseste. Koles his i djungelo nasslepen, kai leskro mass tele merella. Job peras glan leste tele, un mangas lestar: “Te kameh tu, nai kreh man sasto.”" 
Mark1:41 Un o Jesuses khaitas kowa, un job tchiwas peskro wast ap leste, un penas ap leste: “Me kamau, te wess sasto.”" 
Mark1:42 Un har job kowa penas, djas ko nasslepen lestar, un job was sasto." 
Mark1:43 Un o Jesus bitchras les pestar un penas soreles ap leste: 
Mark1:44 “Shun, pen kekeske, hoi me krom tuke! Dja pash o rashajeste un sike leste, kai tu sasto wal! Un an kowa glan o Debleste, hoi o Mose penas, te wess erligo kerdo. Kre kowa, te djinenn i menshe, kai tu sasto wal.”" 
Mark1:45 Un ko mursh djas peske, un rakras bud pral kowa, hoi o Jesus leske kras. Un bud shunan kowa, jaake, te nai djas o Jesus buder gar an i forja dren, har job kamas. Un job his win, kote, kai kek menshe djiwan. Un kote wan le pash leste dran i tsele gaba un forja." 
Mark2:1 Pal i tikno tsiro djas o Jesus pale an o foro Kapernaum. Un bud shunan, kai job an o kheer his." 
Mark2:2 Koi wan jaake bud menshe an o kheer un glan o wudar khetne, te nai djas buder kek an o kheer dren. Un o Jesus penas lenge o Debleskro lab." 
Mark2:3 Koi anan le jekes ap o tchiben, kai nai nashell gar. Star mursha hidjran les." 
Mark2:4 Kolla anan les nashte gar pash o Jesuseste, jaake bud menshe his trul leste. Koi djan jon ap o kheer pral pre, lan barra win, un mukan ko tchiben o nassleha glan o Jesuseste tele." 
Mark2:5 Har o Jesus lengro patsepen dikas, penas lo ap koleste, kai nai nashell gar: “Miro tchawo, me lau tiri doosh tutar.”" 
Mark2:6 Koi his ninna biboldengre tchatchepangre beshdo. Kolla penan an pengre djia: 
Mark2:7 “Har nai penell job kowa? Job krell pes har o Dewel! O Dewel kokres nai lell i doosh i menshendar!” 
Mark2:8 O Jesus haiwas, hoi an lengro shero trujel djas un penas ap lende: “Hoske djal kowa an tumaro shero trujel?" 
Mark2:9 Hi kowa phareder, te penap ap leste: Me lau tiri doosh tutar, har te penap: Ste pre, le tiro tchiben un dja khere?" 
Mark2:10 Me kamau, te djinenn tumer: O Menshengro Tchawes hi i soor ap kai phub, te nai lell lo i doosh i menshendar krik.” Palle penas lo ap koleste, kai nasselo hi:" 
Mark2:11 “Ste pre, le tiro tchiben un dja khere!”" 
Mark2:12 Un job stas pre, las peskro tchiben un djas win. Un lauter dikan les, un kran bare jaka. Jon sharan o Debles, un penan: “An maro tselo djipen dikam sawo koowa gar.”" 
Mark2:13 O Jesus djas pale win pash o baro pani. Un bud menshe wan pash leste. Un job sikras len o Debleskro drom. 
Mark2:14 Un har job jaake kote djas, dikas lo i murshes, kowa kharas Levi. Leskro dad hi o Alfeo. O Levi his pash ko kheer beshdo, kai las job lowe i Remarjenge dren. Penell o Jesus ap leste: “Am, dja mantsa!” Un job stas pre, un djas leha." 
Mark2:15 Un o Jesus djas an leskro kheer un beshas pes tele. Un bud menshe djan leha. Bud his kolendar, kai lenn i biboldendar lowe i Remarjenge dren, un kolendar, kai tchilatcho koowa kran un doleske pale-tchiddo his. Un jon beshan pen tele o Jesuseha un leskre malentsa, te chan le." 
Mark2:16 Mank i Farisarja his sawe, kai tchatchepangre hi. Har jon dikan, kai job kolentsa chal, penan le ap leskre malende: “Hoske chal job kolentsa, kai lenn i biboldendar lowe i Remarjenge dren, un kol wawarentsa, kai hi ninna pale-tchiddo?”" 
Mark2:17 Har o Jesus kowa shunas, penas job ap lende: “Kolla, kai sasto hi, djan gar pash o dramaskro. Kolla, kai nasselo hi, djan pash leste. Me wom gar, te dap kolen pash mande gole, kai ap o tchatcho drom hi. Na-a! Me wom, te dap kolen pash mande gole, kai djan ap o tchilatcho drom.”" 
Mark2:18 His i diwes, kai chan o Johanneskre mala un i Farisarja tchi, te mangenn le o Debles an. Koi wan mursha pash o Jesuseste, un penan ap leste: “Kolla, kai shunenn ap o Johanneste, ninna kolla, kai shunenn ap i Farisarja, chan i tsiro tchi, te mangenn le o Debles an. Hoske krenn tire mala kowa gar?”" 
Mark2:19 Penell o Jesus ap lende: “Jaake rah, har o bijabeskro ap i bijab hi, chan un pijenn leskre mala, kai leha ap i bijab hi." 
Mark2:20 Ko tsiro wella, kai o bijabeskro lendar krik lino wella. Ap ko tsiro chan le un pijenn le tchi, te mangenn le o Debles an." 
Mark2:21 Kek siwell i newo kotar than ap i phuro ripen. Pash o thopen well o newo kotar tikneder un tserdell pes pale tele, un o phuro ripen djal budeder paash." 
Mark2:22 Un kek tchorell newi mool an i phure moljakre gone. I newi mool krell i phure moljakre gone paash. Un koi mool nashell win, un kol moljakre gone djan paash. I newi mool well tchoredo an newe moljakre gone!”" 
Mark2:23 Ap jek Debleskro diwes djas o Jesus ap i kotar them, kai djob baro was. Un leskre mala lan o djob an i wasta, te chan le." 
Mark2:24 Un kol Farisarja penan ap leste: “Hoske krenn tire mala ap o Debleskro diwes sawo koowa, hoi hi gar pal maro tchatchepen?”" 
Mark2:25 Penas lo ap lende: “Hoi kras o baro rai David peskre malentsa, har jon bokan? Djinenn tumer gar, hoi an o Debleskro lab tchinlo hi?" 
Mark2:26 An ko tsiro, kai o Abjatar o baro rashai his, djas o David an o Debleskro kheer un chas o Debleskre mare, hoi kote tchiddo his. Pal i biboldengro tchatchepen his kol mare i rashajenge kokres koi. O David chas len, un das ninna kolen, kai pash leste his.”" 
Mark2:27 Un o Jesus penas ap lende: “O Debleskro diwes hi i menshenge koi. O mensho was gar kerdo, te hi lo o Debleskro diweske koi." 
Mark2:28 Jaake hom me, o Mensheskro Tchawo, ninna o rai pral o Debleskro diwes.”" 
Mark3:1 Un o Jesus djas pale an i biboldengri kangri. Koi his i mursh, koles his i bango wast." 
Mark3:2 Un jon dikan ap leste, un putchan pendar: “Krell lo kanna kau murshes ap o Debleskro diwes sasto?” Jon rodan tchomone, te nai anenn le les glan i tchatchepangre." 
Mark3:3 Un job penas ap kol mursheste, koles i bango wast hi: “Ste pre un am kai!”" 
Mark3:4 Palle penas lo ap lende: “Hoi kras mer pal maro tchatchepen ap o Debleskro diwes? Hi gar feteder te kras mer latcho koowa har tchilatcho koowa? Hi gar feteder te kras mer i nasselen sasto, har te mukas mer len te merell?” Jon penan tchi." 
Mark3:5 Kowa dukas les, kai lengro dji har i bar his. Un job dikas chojemen ap lende un penas ap ko mursheste: “Sike tiro wast!” Un job sikras peskro wast. Un ko wast was sasto." 
Mark3:6 Un kol Farisarja djan win, un djan pash kolende, kai shunenn ap o Herodeste, un rakran lentsa, har jon nai marenn les." 
Mark3:7 O Jesus un leskre mala djan penge pash o baro pani. Un bud menshe dran o them Galilea djan leske palla. Ninna bud wawar djan pash leste, kai shunan, hoi job lauter kras. Kolla wan dran o them Judea, un dran o foro Jerusalem, un dran o them Idumea un dran o them ap i wawar rig o panjestar Jordan, un dran ko them, kai i forja Tirus un Sidon tchiddo hi." 
Mark3:7 O Jesus un leskre mala djan penge pash o baro pani. Un bud menshe dran o them Galilea djan leske palla. Ninna bud wawar djan pash leste, kai shunan, hoi job lauter kras. Kolla wan dran o them Judea, un dran o foro Jerusalem, un dran o them Idumea un dran o them ap i wawar rig o panjestar Jordan, un dran ko them, kai i forja Tirus un Sidon tchiddo hi." 
Mark3:8  
Mark3:9 Un o Jesus kras bud menshen sasto. Doleske wan lauter, kai nasselo hi, pash leste. Un hakeno kamas les an-taprell, te well lo sasto. Koi penas o Jesus ap peskre malende, te anenn le leske i tikno bero, kai job nai pre djala, te well lo gar paash stakedo." 
Mark3:10  
Mark3:11 Un har kol menshe, kai benga an lende his, les dikan, peran jon glan leste tele, un dan gole: “Tu hal o Debleskro tchawo!”" 
Mark3:12 Un job penas soreles ap lende, te penenn le kowa kekeske." 
Mark3:13 O Jesus djas ap i berga, un das kolen pash peste gole, kai job win rodas. Un kolla wan pash leste." 
Mark3:14 Job rodas deesh-te-dujen lendar win, te wenn le leskre bitchepangre. “Me rodom tumen win, te atchenn pash mande,” penas lo. “Me bitchrau tumen pash i menshende, te penenn lenge o Debleskro lab." 
Mark3:15 Un tumen well i soor, te tradenn i bengen win.”" 
Mark3:16 Un kol deesh-te-dui his: o Simon, koles das job ko lab Petro," 
Mark3:17 un o Jakobo un leskro phraal o Johanni. Lengro dad hi o Zebedeo. Kolen das lo ko lab Boanerges. Kowa kharella Mursha pherdo choli. 
Mark3:18 Mank kol deesh-te-dujende his ninna o Andreas, un o Filipo, un o Bartolomeo, un o Mateo, un o Thomas, un o Jakobo, koleskro dad hi o Alfeo, un o Tadeo, un o Simon, kai his kol menshendar, kai kharenna Zelotarja," 
Mark3:19 un o Judas Iskariot, ko phukepaskro." 
Mark3:20 O Jesus djas an i kheer. Koi wan pale bud menshe khetne, jaake, kai his len kek tsiro, te chan le." 
Mark3:21 Un har leskre menshe kowa shunan, penan le: “Job hi dinelo!” Un jon kaman les te taprell." 
Mark3:22 Un i biboldengre tchatchepangre, kai wan dran o foro Jerusalem tele, penan: “O pralstuno beng hi an leste!” Un jon penan ninna: “O pralstuno beng das les i soor, te nai tradell job i bengen win.”" 
Mark3:23 Un o Jesus kharas len khetne, un rakras ap lende laba, kai i khatedo tchatchepen dren hi. Un job penas: Har nai tradell o beng o benges win?" 
Mark3:24 Te kurenn pen i bare raja an jek them, palle djal ko them paash." 
Mark3:25 Un an jek kheer nai well gar dujen penepaske. Kowa djal gar. 
Mark3:26 Te tchingrell jek beng i wawar bengeha, palle nashrell job peskri soor un job djal paash." 
Mark3:27 Kek nai djal an i kheer, kai i sorelo mursh djiwella, un tchorell leskro koowa. Job hunte pandell ko sorelo murshes. Palle nai randell lo leskro tselo brawlepen." 
Mark3:28 Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Hako tchilatcho koowa, hoi i menshe kran, nai bistrell o Dewel. Ninna te penenn le djungele laba pral leste, nai bistrell lo kowa." 
Mark3:29 Koon pral o Debleskro Ducho djungele laba rakrella, kolestar well koi doosh gar krik lino. Leskri doosh atchella hako tsiro." 
Mark3:30 Kowa penas lo lenge, har jon penan: “An leste hi i beng!”" 
Mark3:31 Koi was o Jesuseskri dai un leskre phrala. Jon his win tardo un bitchran jekes pash leste, te kharell lo les." 
Mark3:32 Bud menshe his trul leste beshdo. Un leske was penlo: “Dik, tiri dai, tire phrala un tire phenja hi win tardo, un kamenn tuha te rakrell.”" 
Mark3:33 Koi penas job: “Me kamau tumen te sikrell, koon miri dai hi un mire phrala.”" 
Mark3:34 Un job dikas trujel ap kolende, kai his trul leste beshdo, un penas: “Dikenn, koja hi miri dai, un kolla hi mire phrala." 
Mark3:35 Kowa, kai krell, hoi o Dewel kamella, kowa hi miro phraal, miri pheen, un miri dai.”" 
Mark4:1 Un pale djas o Jesus pash o baro pani, un penas i menshenge o Debleskro lab. Un pash leste wan jaake bud menshe khetne, te hunte djas job an i bero, hoi an o pani tchiddo his. Un job beshas pes kote, un kol tsele menshe his pash o pani tardo." 
Mark4:2 Un job rakras ap lende bud sawe laba, kai hi i khatedo tchatchepen dren. Un job penas ap lende:" 
Mark4:3 Shunenn, i hacho djas win, te witsrell lo o tikno djob ap peskro kotar phub, te well ko djob baro." 
Mark4:4 Un har job o tikno djob ap i phub witsras, peran tikne kotja ap o drom. Koi wan i tchirkle un chan len pre." 
Mark4:5 Wawar djob peras ap i barra. Koi his gar bud phub. Dran kowa was ko djob sik dran i phub win. 
Mark4:6 Har kanna o kham pre djas, was ko djob, kai gar dur an i phub his, chatchedo un meras tele." 
Mark4:7 Wawar tikno djob peras tel i subjengre burra, un kol burra wan baro un tassran les, jaake, kai was ko djob gar baro." 
Mark4:8 Wawar tikno djob peras ap i latchi phub, djas pre un was baro. Kowa was trijanda kope jaake bud. Wawar tikno djob was shob-deesh kope jaake bud. Un wawar tikno djob was sheel kope jaake bud." 
Mark4:9 Un job penas: Mukenn kowa an tumaro shero trujel te djal! 
Mark4:10 Har his o Jesus kokres peskre deesh-te-dujentsa un wawarentsa peskre malendar, putchan le lestar, hoi job kol labentsa kamell te sikrell." 
Mark4:11 Koi penas lo ap lende: O Dewel mukell tumen te haiwell, har kote djal, kai dell lo menshen pash peste gole, te djan le ap leskro drom. Kol wawar, kai win hi, ap kolende rakrau sawe labentsa, kai i khatedo tchatchepen dren hi," 
Mark4:12 te nai dikenn le kowa pengre jakentsa, un haiwenn les gar, un te nai shunenn le les, un haiwenn les gar, te wenn le gar pash o Debleste, te lell lo lengri doosh lendar." 
Mark4:13 Palle penas lo ap lende: Te haiwenn tumer kal laba gar, har kamenn tumer kol tsele wawar laba te haiwell?" 
Mark4:14 Ko hacho hi har i mensho, kai penell i menshenge o Debleskro lab." 
Mark4:15 Ko drom hi har o dji kol menshendar, kai shunenn ko lab. Palle well sik o beng, un lell ko lab lendar krik, kai lenge penlo was." 
Mark4:16 Ko kotar phub, kai pherde barra hi, hi har o dji kol menshendar, kai shunenn ko lab, un lenn les i bachtjatar sik pre," 
Mark4:17 un bistrenn les ninna pale sik. Jon mukenn les gar an pengro dji soreles te well. Te well i pharo tsiro ap lende, un te wenn le mange palla lino, palle witsrenn le pengro patsepen ap i rig." 
Mark4:18 Wawar menshe hi har ko kotar phub, kai o djob tel i subjengre burra peras. Kal menshe shunan ko lab." 
Mark4:19 Palle dikenn le ap i phubjakro koowa. Jon kamenn brawelo te well, un o brawlepen krell len gar bachtelo. Un len hi bok pal bud wawar koowa. Un kowa lauter tassrell ko lab, hoi shunan le. Un ko lab nai rakrell buder gar an lengro dji." 
Mark4:20 Koi latchi phub hi har o dji kol menshendar, kai shunenn ko lab un krenn kowa, hoi ko lab lenge penella. Pash kolende hi ko lab har o djob, hoi baro was. Un pash jekeste was lo trijanda kope jaake bud, un pash i wawareste was lo shob-deesh kope jaake bud, un pale pash i wawareste was lo sheel kope jaake bud." 
Mark4:21 O Jesus penas ap peskre malende: Kek chatchell i momeli an, te tchiwell lo lat tel i piri, witar gar tel o tchiben. Na-a, job tchiwell lat ap i momelengri, kai i momeli diklo wella." 
Mark4:22 Well i tsiro, kai djinenn i menshe kowa, hoi djinenn le kanna gomme gar. Well i tsiro, kai haiwenn le kowa, hoi haiwenn le kanna gomme gar." 
Mark4:23 Mukenn kowa an tumaro shero trujel te djal! 
Mark4:24 Un job penas ap lende: Denn garda ap kowa, hoi tumer shunenna! Te shunenn gar mishto, hoi penau, haiwenn kowa gar. Te shunenn mishto, haiwenn kowa ninna mishto. Un o Dewel krell tumaro dji pre, te haiwenn gomme feteder." 
Mark4:25 Koon kowa, hoi job haiwas, an peskro dji rikrella, kowa haiwell bud un budeder. Koon kowa gar an peskro dji rikrella, kolestar well ninna kowa lino, hoi les hi." 
Mark4:26 Un o Jesus penas: Te kharell o Dewel menshen pash peste, te djan le ap leskro drom, hi kowa jaake, har te tchiwell i hacho tikno djob ap i phub." 
Mark4:27 Haki rati tchiwell lo pes tele, un taissarlake stell lo pale pre. Un ko tikno djob djal pre un well baro, un ko mursh djinell gar, har kowa lauter djala." 
Mark4:28 I phub krell pestar, te well lauter baro. O senlepen well win, palle baro un bareder, un well pherdo tikno djob." 
Mark4:29 Ap ko tsiro kai hi ko djob pesso, bitchrell o hacho peskre budepangren, te tchinenn le o djob tele. O tsiro was, te anenn le o djob dren." 
Mark4:30 Palle penas o Jesus ap lende: Me penau tumenge kanna, har kowa hi, te dell o Dewel i menshen pash peste gole, te djan le ap leskro drom." 
Mark4:31 Kowa hi jaake har i djob dran i senftikro ruk. Te well lo an i phub witsedo, hi lo tikneder har ko tselo wawar djob ap i phub." 
Mark4:32 Hi lo an i phub, djal lo pre un well bareder har o tselo wawar senlepen. Dran ko tikno djob well i ruk jaake baro, te nai djiwenn i tchirkle ap leste, kote, kai o kham gar jaake tato hi." 
Mark4:33 Un o Jesus penas lenge bud sawe laba, kai i khatedo tchatchepen dren hi. Job penas lenge o Debleskro lab jaake, har jon nai haiwan kowa." 
Mark4:34 Hako kopo, kai job lenge o Debleskro lab penas, rakras lo sawe labentsa, kai i khatedo tchatchepen dren hi. Job te his pengre malentsa kokres, palle penas lo lenge, hoi kol laba kamenn te sikrell." 
Mark4:35 Un ap ko diwes ap i rati penas o Jesus ap peskre malende: “Uleras wergel!” 
Mark4:36 Un jon mukan kol menshen te djal, un djan an ko bero, kai o Jesus hi, un lan les lentsa. Wawar bere his ninna koi un uleran lentsa." 
Mark4:37 Koi phurdas i baro diwjo ducho pral o baro pani. Un o pani was diwjo un djas pre te tele. Un bud pani was an o bero dren, jaake bud, te was o bero pherdo pani." 
Mark4:38 Un o Jesus his pal an o bero, un sowas ap i pernitsa. Un jon djangran les pre, un penan ap leste: “Sikepaskro, putcheh tu gar koi pal, kai mer tassah?”" 
Mark4:39 Un job stas pre, un das ko sorelo ducho trad, un penas ap ko baro pani: “Atch! Muk tele!” Un ko sorelo ducho phurdas buder gar, un o baro pani das buder kek gole." 
Mark4:40 Un job penas ap lende: “Hoske trashenn tumer jaake? Hi tumen kek patsepen?” 
Mark4:41 Un kolen was i bari traash, un jon penan mank pende: “Koon hi ko mursh? Ninna o sorelo ducho un o baro pani shunenn ap leste.”" 
Mark5:1 Un jon wan ap o wawar panjeskri rig an o them Gerasa. 
Mark5:2 Un har o Jesus dran o bero djas, nashas i mursh pash leste. Kowa was dran i mulengre khera. Les his i beng an peste," 
Mark5:3 un djiwas an kol mulengre khera. Un kek nashte pandas les, witar gar i sasterne shellentsa." 
Mark5:4 Bud kope pandan le leskre wasta un pire i sasterne shellentsa, un job kras len paash un phagas len pestar tele. Un kek nashte was rai pral leste." 
Mark5:5 Hako tsiro ap o diwes un an i rati, his job an i mulengre khera un ap i berge, un das bari gole, un das pes i barrentsa." 
Mark5:6 Har job o Jesuses dur glan peste dikas, nashas lo pash leste un witsras pes glan leste ap i phub." 
Mark5:7 Un o Jesus penas ap o bengeste: “Tu beng, dja win dran kau mursheste!” Koi das job bari gole: “Jesus, tu tchawo o baro Deblestar, hoi kameh tu mandar? Me mangau tut pash o Debleste: Ma duke man gar!”" 
Mark5:8  
Mark5:9 Un o Jesus putchas lestar: “Har khareh tu?” Koi penas lo: “Mer ham bud. Doleske kharau Legioni.” 
Mark5:10 Un job mangas o Jesusestar, te tradell lo len gar dran ko them win." 
Mark5:11 Koi his pash i berga bud bale, hoi kote chan." 
Mark5:12 Un kol benga mangan lestar: “Muk men an kol balende dren te djal!” 
Mark5:13 Un job mukas len an lende dren te djal. Koi wan kol benga dran o mursheste win, un djan an kol balende. Un kol tsele bale wan diwjo un nashan i berga tele, un stan an o baro pani, un tassan. Kolla his nai dui serja bale." 
Mark5:14 Un kolla, kai dan garda ap i balende, nashan penge, un penan kowa i menshenge an i forja un an i gaba. Un kol menshe kaman te dikell, hoi kote djas, un wan pash o Jesuseste," 
Mark5:15 un dikan koles kote beshdo, kolestar kol bud benga win wan. Job his an-rido un buder gar diwjo. Har jon kowa dikan, was i traash ap lende." 
Mark5:16 Un kolla, kai lauter dikan, penan lenge, hoi koleha djas, un hoi kol balentsa djas." 
Mark5:17 Un jon mangan o Jesusestar, te djal lo dran lengro them win." 
Mark5:18 Un har job an o bero djas, mangas lestar ko mursh, kai his i benga an leste, te atchell lo nai pash leste." 
Mark5:19 O Jesus kamas gar, te djas job leha, un penas ap leste: “Dja khere pash tire menshende! Pen lenge lauter, hoi o Dewel tuke kras un har latcho job ap tute his!”" 
Mark5:20 Un kau mursh djas peske, un djas an ko them trujel, kai i deesh forja tchiddo hi, un penas i menshenge, hawo baro koowa o Jesus ap leste kras. Un hakeno kras bare jaka." 
Mark5:21 Har o Jesus an o bero pale wergel uleras, wan kote bud menshe pash leste khetne. Un job his gomme pash o baro pani," 
Mark5:22 koi was i pralstuno pral i biboldengri kangri. Leskro lab his Jairo. Har dikas lo o Jesuses, peras lo glan leste tele," 
Mark5:23 un mangas les o tselo djijeha un penas: “Miri tchai hi ap o merepen tchiddo. Am un tchip tire wasta ap late, te well li sasto, un te djiwell li!”" 
Mark5:24 Un job djas leha. Un bud menshe djan leske palla un his trul leste. 
Mark5:25 Mank lende his i djuwel. Kolat his i ratlo nasslepen. Deesh-te-dui bersha his li nasseli," 
Mark5:26 un das lauter, hoi lat his, i dramangrende. Un kek nashte kras lat sasto. Joi was gomme nassleder." 
Mark5:27 Har joi o Jesusestar shunas, was li mashkral i menshende pal leste, un tapras ap leskro ripen." 
Mark5:28 Joi penas peske: “Te taprau kokres ap leskro ripen, wau sasto.”" 
Mark5:29 Un ap jek kopo djas kau nasslepen latar. Un joi haiwas, kai hi li sasto." 
Mark5:30 Un o Jesus haiwas pestar, kai djas i soor lestar win, un rissras pes trujel, un penas ap i menshende: “Koon tapras ap miro ripen?”" 
Mark5:31 Un leskre mala penan ap leste: “Tu dikeh, har bud menshe trul tute hi, un koi putcheh tu: Koon tapras ap miro ripen?”" 
Mark5:32 Job dikas pes trujel pal kolate, kai kras kowa." 
Mark5:33 Koi djuwel kai djinas, hoi lake djas, trashas un trissas. Un joi was pash leste, un peras glan leste tele ap i phub, un penas leske o tselo tchatchepen." 
Mark5:34 Job penas ap late: “Romnija, tiro patsepen kras tut sasto. Dja mo Debleha! Tiro nasslepen well buder gar pale.”" 
Mark5:35 Har job jaake rakras, wan mursha dran o kheer kolestar, kai o pralstuno pral i biboldengri kangri hi, un penan leske: “Tiri tchai meras. Tu hunte mangess o rajes buder gar.”" 
Mark5:36 O Jesus shunas kal laba, un penas ap kol pralstuneste: “Ma traash, pats!”" 
Mark5:37 Un o Jesus mukas kokres o Petres, un o Jakobes, un koleskro phrales, o Johanni, leha te djal." 
Mark5:38 Un jon wan an o kheer kol pralstunestar. Un job dikas kote bud menshen, kai nashan kate un kote un rowan un dan bari gole." 
Mark5:39 Un job djas dren, un penas ap lende: “Hoske denn tumer gole un rowenna? Koi tchai meras gar, joi sowella.”" 
Mark5:40 Un jon san pral leste. O Jesus tradas len lauteren win, un las kol tchakro dades un lakri dai peha, ninna kolen, kai pash leste his, un djas dren, kai koi tchai tchiddo his." 
Mark5:41 Un job tapras kol tchat pash o wast, un penas ap late an peskro rakepen: “Talita kumi!” Kowa kharella: Tchai, me penau tuke, ste pre!" 
Mark5:42 Un sik stas koi tchai pre, un djas trujel. Joi his deesh-te-dui bersha phuro. Un lenge atchas o rakepen pral kowa krik." 
Mark5:43 Un job penas lenge soreles: “Ma penenn kowa kekeske!” Un palle penas lo: “Denn lat te chal!” 
Mark6:1 O Jesus djas dran ko foro win un was an peskro dadeskro foro. Un leskre mala djan leha. 
Mark6:2 Ap o Debleskro diwes djas lo an i biboldengri kangri un sikras i menshende o Debleskro drom. Un bud menshe, kai shunan les, kran bare jaka pral kowa, hoi job penas. Jon penan: “Koon penas leske kowa lauter? Koon das les sawo goswepen? Kai well leskri bari soor, te nai krell lo sawo baro koowa?”" 
Mark6:3 “Hi kowa gar ko mursh, kai budrell i kashtentsa? Hi leskri dai gar i Maria? Hi leskre phrala gar o Jakobo, o Josef, o Simon, un o Judas? Un ninna leskre phenja djiwenn pash mende.” Un jon choiran pen pral leste." 
Mark6:4 O Jesus penas ap lende: “Kek Debleskro rakepaskro well kote sharedo, kai job khere hi, witar gar pash peskre menshende un an peskro kheer. An i wawar forja un gaba well lo sharedo.”" 
Mark6:5 Un kote nashte kras job kek baro koowa an o Debleskri soor, kokres i nasslenge tchiwas job i wasta pre un kras len sasto, un kolla his gar bud nassele." 
Mark6:6 Un job nai haiwas gar, hoske i menshen kote kek patsepen his. Palle djas lo an kol gaba trujel, un sikras i menshende o Debleskro drom." 
Mark6:7 O Jesus das kol deesh-te-dujen pash peste gole, te bitchrell lo len win, dui te dui. Job das len i soor pral i benga, te nai tradenn le len i menshendar win." 
Mark6:8 Un job penas lenge soreles: “Lenn tchi tumentsa ap o drom, kokres i kasht un kircha. Lenn kek maro, kek possita, kek lowe, witar gar i duito gad!”" 
Mark6:9  
Mark6:10 Un job penas ap lende: “Kote, kai tumer an i kheer dren djana, kote atchenn jaake rah har atchenn an ko foro." 
Mark6:11 Kote, kai lenn le tumen gar an pengro kheer dren, un kamenn gar ap tumende te shunell, kote djan dureder, un denn koi tchik tumare pirendar tele! Kowa sikrell kol menshende, kai jon tchilatcho hi.”" 
Mark6:12 Un kol deesh-te-dui djan trujel, un penan i menshenge: “Mukenn tumaro tchilatcho drom, un djan ap o Debleskro drom!”" 
Mark6:13 Un jon tradan bud bengen i menshendar win, un makan bud nasselen o djeteha dren, un kran len sasto." 
Mark6:14 Ninna o baro rai, o Herodes, shunas o Jesusestar. An o tselo them rakran le lestar. I menshe penan: “O Johanni, kowa, kai i menshen taufras, stas i mulendar pre. Doleske hi les i soor, te krell lo sawo baro koowa.”" 
Mark6:15 Wawar penan: “Kowa hi o Elija.” Un pale wawar penan: “Kowa hi i Debleskro rakepaskro har kol wawar Debleskre rakepangre.” 
Mark6:16 Har kowa o Herodes shunas, penas lo: “Kowa hi o Johanni, kai mukom leske o shero tele te dell. Kowa stas i mulendar pre.”" 
Mark6:17 Kowa was jaake: Glan ko tsiro las o Herodes koi romjat peskro phralestar Filip. Lakro lab his Herodia. Un o Johanni penas leske: “Kowa hi gar mishto, kai tu lal tiro phraleskri romjat.” Har o Herodes kowa shunas, penas lo ap peskre lurdende, te taprenn le o Johanni, un te witsrenn le les an o stilepen." 
Mark6:18  
Mark6:19 Un i Herodia his chojedo ap o Johanneste un kamas les te marell, un joi kras les nashte gar." 
Mark6:20 O Herodes trashas o Johannestar. Job djinas, kai o Johanni i Debleskro mursh hi, kai djas o tchatcho drom. Doleske das lo garda ap leste un rikras les an o stilepen. Job kamas o Johanneskro rakepen. Hako kopo, kai job les shunas, djinas lo buder gar, hoi te krell lo un te penell lo." 
Mark6:21 Koi was i diwes, kai hi mishto i Herodiake. O Herodes was i bersh phureder un mukas i baro chapen te krell. Pash ko chapen wan i pralstune pral peskro them, ninna i pralstune lurde. Un i brawele dran o them Galilea his ninna koi." 
Mark6:22 Koi was i Herodiakri tchai pash lende un khelas glan lende. Lakro khelepen his shukar an i jaka o rajestar Herodes un an i jaka kolendar, kai pash leste beshdo hi un chan. Koi penas o Herodes ap koi tchate: “Tu nai mangeh mandar, hoi tu kameh. Me dau kowa tute!”" 
Mark6:23 Un job das pes sowel: “Hoi tu mandar ninna mangeh, kowa dau tut, ninna te mangeh mandar o paash miro themestar un brawlepen.”" 
Mark6:24 Un koi tchai djas win pash peskri date, un putchas latar: “Hoi mangap lestar?” Koja penas: “O shero o Johannestar, kowa kai taufras i menshen.”" 
Mark6:25 Koi djas li sik dren pash o Herodeste, un mangas lestar: “Me kamau, te dess man kanna ap i tcharo o shero o Johannestar, kowa, kai taufras i menshen.”" 
Mark6:26 Har o Herodes kowa shunas, dukas leskro dji. Ninna te khaitas les kowa, kamas lo peskro lab te rikrell, hoi job glan kolende das, kai pash leste trul i chapaskri beshdo his un shunan, har job pes sowel das." 
Mark6:27 Doleske bitchras lo i lurdes pash o Johanneste, te dell lo leskro shero tele. Kowa djas an o stilepen, un das leske o shero tele," 
Mark6:28 hidjras ko shero ap i tcharo, un das les kol tchate. Un koi tchai das les peskri date." 
Mark6:29 Un har shunan o Johanneskre mala kowa, wan le, lan o mules lentsa, un paskran les." 
Mark6:30 Un kol deesh-te-dui, kai o Jesus pash i menshende bitchras, kolla wan pale, un penan o Jesuseske lauter, hoi jon kran un penan." 
Mark6:31 Kote his jaake bud menshe, kai wan un djan, te his len kek tsiro, te chan le. Un job penas ap lende: “Awenn, djas kote, kai kokres ham, te lenn tumer newi soor!”" 
Mark6:32 Un jon uleran an o bero kote, kai jon kokres hi." 
Mark6:33 Har kol menshe dikan, kai jon uleran penge, nashan le dran i tsele forja kote khetne, kai o Jesus peskre malentsa djas. Un jon his glan lende koi." 
Mark6:34 Un o Jesus djas dran o bero win, un dikas kol bud menshen. Kolla khaitan les. Jon his har bakre, kai hi len kek bakrengro, kai dell garda ap lende. Un job rakras lentsa i rah tsiro." 
Mark6:35 Ap i rati wan leskre mala pash leste, un penan: “Kate, kai mer ham, della tchi te chal, un i rati wella." 
Mark6:36 Bitche kal menshen tutar, te djan le pash i hachende un an i gaba, te ginenn le penge maro!”" 
Mark6:37 Koi penas lo ap lende: “Denn tumer len te chal!” Penan le: “Kameh, te las dui-sheel rupene beme, te ginas maro un das len te chal?”" 
Mark6:38 Penas lo: “Kitse mare hi tumen? Djan koi un dikenn!” Un har jon kowa djinan, penan le leske: “Pantch mare un dui matche.”" 
Mark6:39 Un o Jesus penas lenge, te beshenn le pen lauter kate te kote an o senlepen khetne." 
Mark6:40 Un jon beshan pen kate te kote khetne, jaake te his kate sheel beshdo, un kote his paash-sheel beshdo." 
Mark6:41 Un job las kol pantch mare un kol dui matche an i wasta, dikas pre ap o bolepen, parkras pes pash o Debleste, un phagas kol mare an kotja. Palle das lo len peskre malende, te denn le kowa i menshende. Un kol dui matche das lo ninna i tsele menshende." 
Mark6:42 Un jon chan lauter un wan tchalo. 
Mark6:43 Palle hadan le kol kotja pre, hoi atchan pral. Koi wan deesh-te-dui marengre gone pherdo lendar. Un jon hadan ninna kol matchendar pre, hoi pral atchan." 
Mark6:44 Un kolla, kai chan kol mare, kolla his pantch serja mursha." 
Mark6:45 Un sik pral kowa tradas o Jesus peskre malen, te djan le an o bero, te ulerenn le glan leste wergel ap i wawar rig pash o foro Betsaida. Job atchas pash i menshende, te bitchrell lo len khere." 
Mark6:46 Har job bitchras len pestar, djas lo ap i berga, te rakrell lo o Debleha." 
Mark6:47 Ap i rati his ko bero mashkral ap o baro pani. Un job his ap o them kokres. 
Mark6:48 Un i sorelo ducho phurdas pral o baro pani, un das ap lende. Un job dikas, har jon pen tele maran an o bero, te wenn le pash o them. Sik taissarlake, his jaake starenge, was lo pash lende, un djas ap o baro pani, un kamas langs lende te djal." 
Mark6:49 Jon lauter dikan les, un i daar tapras len. Jon patsan, kai hi job i mulo, un dan gole i darjatar. Sik penas lo ap lende: “Ma darenn! Me hom. Lauter hi mishto!”" 
Mark6:50  
Mark6:51 Un job was pash lende an o bero, un o sorelo ducho mukas tele. Un lenge atchas o rakepen krik." 
Mark6:52 Ninna te dikan le, hoi job kol pantch marentsa kras, haiwan le gar, hawi soor les hi. Lengro dji his har bar." 
Mark6:53 Un jon uleran wergel pral o pani un djan ap o them pash o foro Genezaret. 
Mark6:54 Un har jon dran o bero stan, prindjran les i menshe sik," 
Mark6:55 un nashan an o tselo them trujel, un hidjran kol nasselen ap i tchibja kote, kai jon shunan, te hi lo." 
Mark6:56 Un kote, kai job djas, an i gaba, an i forja, un ap o them, tchiwan le i nasselen kote, kai i menshe khetne wenna, un mangan lestar, te mukell lo len i kotar leskro ripen an-taprell. Un hakeno, kai ap leskro ripen tapras, was sasto." 
Mark7:1 Jek diwes wan i Farisarja un biboldengre tchatchepangre dran o foro Jerusalem khetne pash o Jesuseste. 
Mark7:2 Un jon dikan, har mank leskre malende sawe hi, kai thowan gar pengre wasta glan o chapen." 
Mark7:3 Kol Farisarja, ninna i tsele wawar bibolde, thowenn pengre wasta glan o chapen. Un jaake rikrenn le kowa, hoi lengre phure lenge penan." 
Mark7:4 Te wenn jon dran o foro an lengro kheer pale, thowenn le pen, un palle nai chan le. Un jon rikrenn pen ap bud wawar koowa, un thowenn i khore, i pirja un i sasterne tchare jaake, har lengre phure lenge penan." 
Mark7:5 Koi putchan lestar kol Farisarja un kol biboldengre tchatchepangre: “Hoske djiwenn tire mala gar pal kowa, hoi mare phure menge penan? Hoske chan le o maro i tchikle wastentsa?”" 
Mark7:6 Penas lo ap lende: “Tumer rakrenn dui tchipjentsa. O Debleskro rakepaskro, o Jesaja, penas o tchatchepen pral tumende, har job tchinas: Jaake penell o Dewel: Kal menshe sharenn man pengre muja. Lengre djia hi dur krik mandar." 
Mark7:7 Jon te mangenn man an, hi kowa mange tchi moldo. Jon penenn i menshenge menshengre laba un gar miro lab." 
Mark7:8 Tumer krenn, hoi i menshe tumenge penan un gar, hoi o Dewel tumenge penas.”" 
Mark7:9 Un pale penas lo ap lende: “Tumer haiwenn mishto o Debleskre laba ap i rig te tchiwell, te nai krenn kowa, hoi tumare phure tumenge penan." 
Mark7:10 O Mose penas: Dik ap tiro dadeste un ap tiri date, te djal lenge mishto! Un ninna penas o Mose: Koon ap peskro dadeste un ap peskri date i bibacht anella, kowa hunte merella!" 
Mark7:11 Tumer penenna: Te penell jek ap peskro dadeste un ap peskri date: Korban, kowa kharella: Me dau kowa o Debleste, hoi hunte doms tute," 
Mark7:12 palle hunte krell job buder tchi peskro dadeske un peskri dake. 
Mark7:13 Un jaake tchiwenn tumer o Debleskro lab ap i rig, un krenn kowa, hoi tumare phure tumenge penan. Un bud sau koowa krenn tumer.”" 
Mark7:14 Un o Jesus das pale i menshen pash peste gole, un penas ap lende: “Shunenn un haiwenn mishto, hoi me tumenge penau!" 
Mark7:15 Tchi, hoi an o mensheskro mui dren wella, krell les pale-tchiddo. Kowa, hoi dran leskro dji win wella, kowa krell les pale-tchiddo." 
Mark7:16 Shunenn mishto, hoi me tumenge penau!”" 
Mark7:17 Pale mukas lo kol menshen, un djas an o kheer. Kote putchan leskre mala lestar, hoi job kol labentsa kamas te penell." 
Mark7:18 Un job penas ap lende: “Haiwan tumer witar gar? Haiwan tumer gar, kai lauter, hoi an o mensheskro mui dren wella, kowa nashte krell les gar pale-tchiddo." 
Mark7:19 Ko chapen djal gar an leskro dji. Ko djal an leskro per, un well pale win.” Un kol labentsa penas o Jesus lenge, kai kek chapen pale-tchiddo hi." 
Mark7:20 Un job penas: “O tchilatchepen, hoi dran o mensheste win wella, kowa krell les pale-tchiddo." 
Mark7:21 Dran o menshengro dji well o tchilatcho koowa, hoi an leskro shero trujel djal. Dran o dji well, te krell lo djungelo bipandlo koowa, te tchorell lo, te dell lo i wawares mulo." 
Mark7:22 Te chochell i mursh peskri romjat i wawar djuwjah, un te chochell i djuwel peskro romes i wawar mursheha, well kowa dran lengre djia. Dran o dji well ninna i bok pal i lowe, o chochepen, wi-ladjedo koowa un dinlepen. Dran o dji well ninna, te dikell jek tchilatche jakentsa ap kowa, hoi o wawares hi, te hi lo midjak ap o wawareste, te rakrell lo djungeles pral o wawareste, te hadell lo pes pral o wawareste." 
Mark7:23 Ko tselo tchilatchepen well dran o mensheskro dji, un krell o menshes pale-tchiddo.”" 
Mark7:24 Un o Jesus stas pre un djas dureder, un was an ko them pash o foro Tirus. Kote djas lo an i kheer. Un job kamas, te djinell kek, kai job hi. Un ninna kote nai atchas lo gar khatedo." 
Mark7:25 I djuwel shunas lestar. Kaja his kek biboldetsa. Joi his dran o them Siro-Fenicia. Kolakri tchat his i beng an late. Un koi djuwel was pash leste, un witsras pes glan leste ap i phub, un mangas lestar, te tradell lo ko beng dran lakri tchate win." 
Mark7:26  
Mark7:27 O Jesus penas ap late: “Muk o maro i tchawenge! Jon te hi tchalo, nai chan i wawar. Kowa hi gar mishto, te lell jek o maro i tchawendar krik un witsrell les glan i djuklende.”" 
Mark7:28 Penas li ap leste: “Tiro hi tchatcho, miro rai. Ninna i djukle tel i chapaskri chan i tikne kotja, hoi mukenn i tchawe ap i phub te perell.”" 
Mark7:29 Penas lo ap late: “Hawo baro lab! Doleske penau tuke: Dja khere! Ko beng djas dran tiri tchate win.” 
Mark7:30 Un joi djas an peskro kheer un hatsas lakri tchat ap o tchiben tchiddo, un ko beng his dran late win." 
Mark7:31 Un o Jesus djas win dran o them pash o foro Tirus, un djas an o them pash o foro Sidon, un dureder pash o baro pani an o them Galilea. Un job was mashkral an ko them, kai hi kol deesh forja tchiddo." 
Mark7:32 Un jon anan jekes pash leste, kowa nai shunas gar un rakras gar. Un jon mangan o Jesusestar, te tchiwell lo peskro wast ap leste." 
Mark7:33 Un job las kol murshes ap i rig, krik kol bud menshendar, un tchiwas peskre gushte an leskre kanda, un tchiwas tchunger ap leskro tchip." 
Mark7:34 Palle dikas lo pre ap o bolepen, las i baro ducho, un penas ap leste: Effata! Kowa kharella: Kre tut pre!" 
Mark7:35 Un ap jek kopo kran pen leskre kanda pre. Un leskro tchip his buder gar pandlo, un job rakras nai mishto." 
Mark7:36 Un o Jesus penas kolenge, kai kote his, te penenn le kekeske, hoi job kras. Budeder te penas job, te penenn le tchi i menshenge, budeder rakran jon koi pral." 
Mark7:37 Un kolenge, kai kowa shunan, atchas o rakepen krik, un jon penan: “O Jesus kras lauter mishto. Kolen, kai nashte shunenn gar, krell lo, te shunenn le. Un kolen, kai rakrenn nashte gar, krell lo, te rakrenn le.”" 
Mark8:1 An kol diwessa his ninna pale bud menshe pash o Jesuseste. Har kolen buder tchi te chal his, das o Jesus peskre malen pash peste gole, un penas ap lende:" 
Mark8:2 “Man khaitenn kal menshe. Triin diwessa hi le kate pash mande, un len hi tchi te chal." 
Mark8:3 Me te bitchrau len bokles khere, palle perenn le ap o drom khetne. Mank lende hi sawe, kolen hi i dur drom.”" 
Mark8:4 Leskre mala penan ap leste: “Kai hatsas mer maro kate an kau mulo them, te kras len tchalo?”" 
Mark8:5 “Kitse mare hi tumen?” putchas lo. “Efta,” penan le." 
Mark8:6 Job penas i menshenge, te beshenn pen le ap i phub. Un job las kol efta mare, parkras pes pash o Debleste, un phagas len an kotja. Un job das len peskre malende, te denn le len i menshende. Un jon kran kowa." 
Mark8:7 Un len his ninna tikne matche. Un o Jesus parkras pes pash o Debleste un das len peskre malende, te denn le kolen ninna i menshende te chal." 
Mark8:8 Un jon chan un wan tchalo. Koi his nai star serja menshe. Un pal o chapen hadan le kol kotja maro pre, hoi pral atchan. Kolla his efta marengre gone pherdo. Palle mukas lo len khere te djal," 
Mark8:9  
Mark8:10 djas peskre malentsa an o bero un was an ko them, kai Dalmanuta tchiddo hi." 
Mark8:11 Un i Farisarja wan win pash leste, te rakrenn le leha. Jon kaman te taprenn le les leskre labentsa un penan ap leste: “Kre menge i baro koowa, hoi sikrell men, te well tiri soor o Deblestar!”" 
Mark8:12 Job las i baro ducho un penas: “Hoske kamenn kol menshe, kai djiwenna kau diwes, i baro Debleskro koowa te dikell? Me penau tumenge o tchatchepen: Jon dikenna kek sawo koowa.”" 
Mark8:13 Un job mukas len, djas pale an o bero, un uleras wergel." 
Mark8:14 Un o Jesuseskre mala bistran, te lenn le maro lentsa. Len his jek maro kokres an o bero." 
Mark8:15 Un o Jesus penas soreles ap lende: “Denn jak! O shutlo jarro hi gar mishto, hoi well i Farisarendar un o Herodestar!”" 
Mark8:16 Har jon kowa shunan, penan le penge: “Mer lam kek maro. Doleske penas lo kowa menge.”" 
Mark8:17 Un o Jesus haiwas kowa, un penas ap lende: “Hoske rakrenn tumer pral kowa, kai hi tumen kek maro? Dikenn un haiwenn tumer gomme gar? Hi tumen i dji har i bar an tumende?" 
Mark8:18 Tumen hi jaka, un dikenn tchi. Un tumen hi kanna, un shunenn tchi. Djinenn tumer buder gar," 
Mark8:19 har me kol pantch mare phagom, un kol pantch serja menshende dom? Kitse marengre gone pherdo kotja, hoi pral atchan, hadan tumer pre?” Penan le: “Deesh-te-dui.”" 
Mark8:20 Penas lo: “Un har me phagom kol efta mare kol star serja menshenge? Kitse marengre gone pherdo kotja, hoi pral atchan, hadan tumer kote pre?” Penan le: “Efta.”" 
Mark8:21 Un job penas ap lende: “Haiwenn tumer gomme gar?” 
Mark8:22 O Jesus un peskre mala wan an o gab Betsaida. Koi anan le i murshes pash leste, kai dikas nai gar. Un jon mangan o Jesusestar, te tchiwell lo peskro wast ap leste." 
Mark8:23 Un job las koles, kai dikas nai gar, pash o wast, un anas les win glan o gab. Palle tchiwas lo tchunger ap leskre jaka, tchiwas peskre wasta ap leste, un putchas lestar: “Dikeh tu tchomone?”" 
Mark8:24 Un job dikas pre un penas: “Me dikau i menshen, har te wenn le ruka, kai nashenn trujel.”" 
Mark8:25 Pale tchiwas o Jesus peskre wasta ap leskre jaka. Un kau kopo dikas ko mursh pre un his sasto. Job dikas lauter mishto. 
Mark8:26 Un o Jesus bitchras les khere un penas: “Ma dja dren an o gab!” 
Mark8:27 Un o Jesus djas peskre malentsa dureder un was an kol gaba pash o foro Cesarea Filipi. Ap o drom putchas lo peskre malendar: “Hoi penenn i menshe, koon me hom?”" 
Mark8:28 Un jon penan ap leste: “Hi menshe koi, kai penenn, tu hal o Johanni, kowa, kai taufras i menshen. Wawar penenna, tu hal o Elija. Un pale wawar penenna, tu hal i Debleskro rakepaskro, kai glan i rah tsiro djiwas.”" 
Mark8:29 Koi putchas lo lendar: “Un tumer, hoi penenn tumer, koon me hom?” Koi penas o Petro ap leste: “Tu hal o Kristo, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job. ”" 
Mark8:30 Un job das len trad, te penenn le kowa kekeske." 
Mark8:31 Un o Jesus penas peskre malenge: “O Mensheskro Tchawo hunte lell bud duka ap peste. Un i biboldengre phureder un tchatchepangre un i bare rashaja tchiwenn les ap i rig. Un job hunte well maredo. Un pal triin diwessa stell lo pale i mulendar pre.” 
Mark8:32 Un kowa lauter penas lo lenge, un rikras tchi pale. Koi las les o Petro ap i rig, un tchingras ap leste." 
Mark8:33 Un o Jesus rissras pes trujel, dikas ap peskre malende, un das o Petres trad un penas: “Dja tuke, tu beng! Tu kameh gar, hoi o Dewel kamella, na-a, tu kameh, hoi i menshe kamenna.”" 
Mark8:34 Palle das o Jesus kol bud menshen pash peste gole, ninna peskre malen, un penas ap lende: Koon ap miro drom mantsa djala, kowa hunte bistrell, hoi leske kokres mishto hi, un lell peskro trushel ap peste, un djal mantsa." 
Mark8:35 Koon kamell peskro djipen te rikrell, kowa nashrell les. Koon ap miro drom mantsa djala un i menshenge miro lab penella, un well doleske mulo dino, kowa lell o djipen pale." 
Mark8:36 I mensheske wals kowa gar mishto, te lals lo o tselo brawlepen ap kai phub, un nashrals peskro djipen." 
Mark8:37 I mensho nai dell tchi o Debleste, te lell lo ko djipen pale." 
Mark8:38 I menshe an kau tsiro hi tchilatcho un mukan o Debles. Kowa, kai ladjell pes mange un mire labenge glan kolende, koleske ladjau me ninna, te wau me, o Mensheskro Tchawo, pale ap i phub. Ap ko diwes hi man o railepen, hoi das man miro dad an o bolepen. Un mantsa wenna o Debleskre bolepangre." 
Mark9:1 Un o Jesus penas ap lende: “Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Mashkral tumende hi sawe menshe, kai merenna gar, bis te dikan le, kai was kowa bari sorjah, kones o Dewel win rodas, te well lo baro rai.”" 
Mark9:2 Un pal shob diwessa las o Jesus o Petres peha, ninna o Jakobes un o Johannes, un anas len ap i bari berga. Kek wawar djas lentsa. Un glan lengre jaka las lo i bolepaskro railepen." 
Mark9:3 Un leskre koola wan railes bijalo, jaake bijalo, har kek ap i phub nai thowell len bijalo." 
Mark9:4 Un ap jek kopo dikan le o Elijas un o Moses, kai rakran o Jesuseha." 
Mark9:5 Un o Petro penas ap o Jesuseste: “Rai, hi mishto, te ham kate. Muk men triin tikne khera te krell, jek tuke, jek o Moseske, un jek o Elijeske.”" 
Mark9:6 Job djinas gar, hoi rakrell lo koi. I bari traash tapran len." 
Mark9:7 Koi was i wolka pral lende tele. Un jon shunan i rakepen dran i wolka: “Kawa hi miro tchawo, koles kamau o djijestar. Shunenn ap leste!”" 
Mark9:8 Un ap jek kopo, har jon trul pende dikan, dikan le buder kekes har o Jesuses kokres." 
Mark9:9 Har jon pale i berga tele djan, penas o Jesus lenge soreles, te penenn le kekeske, hoi jon dikan, jaake rah har o Mensheskro Tchawo gar i mulendar pre stas." 
Mark9:10 Un jon rikran ko lab pash pende un putchan mank pende jek o wawarestar: “Hoi hi kowa, te penell job, kai stell lo i mulendar pre?”" 
Mark9:11 Un jon putchan lestar: “Hoske penenn mare tchatchepangre, kai glan ko tsiro hunte well o Elija?”" 
Mark9:12 Koi penas lo ap lende: “Tchatchepah, o Elija well un anell o Debleskre menshen pale khetne. Hoske hi tchinlo pral o Menshengro Tchaweste, kai hunte wenn bud duka ap leste un kai i menshe rikrenn tchi lestar?" 
Mark9:13 Me penau tumenge: O Elija was, un jon kran leha, hoi jon kaman, jaake har lestar tchinlo hi.”" 
Mark9:14 Un jon wan pash pengre wawar malende, un dikan bud menshen trul lende, ninna biboldengre tchatchepangre, kai rakran lentsa." 
Mark9:15 Un har kol bud menshe o Jesuses dikan, kran le bare jaka. Jon nashan pash leste un penan: “Latcho diwes!”" 
Mark9:16 Un o Jesus putchas lendar: “Hoi rakrenn tumer lentsa?” 
Mark9:17 Koi penas jek kolendar, kai kote tardo hi, ap leste: “Rai, me anom miro tchawes kate pash tute. Koles hi i beng an leste. Kowa krella, kai rakrell lo nashte gar." 
Mark9:18 Un te taprell lo les, witsrell lo les ap i phub. Un les hi tchunger glan o mui, un dandrell i danda khetne, un well har mulo. Un me rakrom tire malentsa, te tradenn le o benges lestar win, un jon haiwan les gar.”" 
Mark9:19 Koi penas o Jesus ap lende: “Hawe menshe han tumer, kai hi tumen kek patsepen! Har rah hunte atchap pash tumende? Har rah rikrap me pash tumende win? Anenn les kate pash mande!”" 
Mark9:20 Un jon anan o tchawes pash leste. Har dikas o beng o Jesuses, tserdas lo o tchawes kai te koi. Un o tchawo peras ap i phub, rissras pes trujel ap haki rig. Un i tchunger his glan leskro mui." 
Mark9:21 Koi putchas o Jesus o tchaweskro dadestar: “Har rah hi les kowa?” Kowa penas: “Jaake rah, har job djiwella." 
Mark9:22 Bud kope witsras lo les an i jag un an o pani, te marell lo les. Tu te haiweh tchomone, palle ab menge latches un kre les sasto!”" 
Mark9:23 O Jesus penas ap leste: “Tu peneh: Te haiweh tu! Me penau tuke: Lauter djal koleske, kai patsella.”" 
Mark9:24 Koi das o tchaweskro dad gole: “Me patsau. Miro patsepen hi gar baro. Kre, te patsap budeder!”" 
Mark9:25 Un o Jesus dikas, kai nashan bud menshe pash leste khetne. Koi das lo ko benges trad, un penas ap leste: “Tu beng, kai rakreh un shuneh nashte gar, me penau tuke: Dja win lestar, un dja buder gar an leste dren!”" 
Mark9:26 Koi das job gole, un tserdas les soreles kai te koi, un djas lestar win. Un ko tchawo his kote tchiddo, har te well lo mulo. Koi penan kol menshe, kai kote tardo hi: “Job meras.”" 
Mark9:27 O Jesus tapras les pash o wast, un mukas les pre te stell. Un job stas pre." 
Mark9:28 Har o Jesus khere was, un jon kokres his, putchan leskre mala lestar: “Hoske tradam mer ko benges nashte gar win?”" 
Mark9:29 Un job penas: “Tumer hunte mangenn kowa o Deblestar. Te mangenn lestar gar, nai tradenn tumer sawe bengen gar win dran i menshende.”" 
Mark9:30 Un jon djan dureder, un djan an o them Galilea. Un o Jesus kamas gar, te djinell jek, kai jon hi." 
Mark9:31 Un job penas peskre malenge: “O Mensheskro Tchawo well an i menshengre wasta dino, un jon marenn les. Un ap o triinto diwes pal leskro merepen, stell job pale i mulendar pre.”" 
Mark9:32 Un jon haiwan kol laba gar un trashan, te putchenn le lestar." 
Mark9:33 Un jon wan an o foro Kapernaum. Har o Jesus khere his, putchas lo lendar: “Hoi tchingran tumer ap o drom?”" 
Mark9:34 Un jon penan tchi. His jaake, ap o drom rakran le mank pende, koon lendar o pralstuno hi." 
Mark9:35 Koi beshas lo pes, un das kol deesh-te-dujen gole, un penas ap lende: “Jek te kamell o pralstuno te well, hunte well kowa o tikneder lauterendar. Un job hunte budrell i wawarenge.”" 
Mark9:36 Un job las i tikno tchawes pash o wast, anas les glan lende, las les an i mussi, un penas ap lende:" 
Mark9:37 “Kowa, kai lell sawo tchawes pash peste pre an miro lab, kowa lell man pash peste pre. Un koon man pre lella, kowa lell o koles pre, kai bitchras man.”" 
Mark9:38 Koi penas o Johanni ap leste: “Rai, mer dikam i murshes. Kowa tradas bengen win an tiro lab. Job his kek mendar. Doleske penam leske: Ma kre kowa buder gar!”" 
Mark9:39 Penas o Jesus ap lende: Mukenn les! Kowa, kai sawo baro koowa krella an miro lab, kowa nai rakrell gar sik koi pal djungeles pral mande." 
Mark9:40 Koon krell menge gar tchilatcho koowa, kowa hi ap mari rig." 
Mark9:41 Kowa hi o tchatchepen, hoi me tumenge penau: Koon dell tumen i tcharo pani te pijell, un krell kowa doleske, kai han mire mala, koles dell o Dewel ko latchepen pale, hoi job kras." 
Mark9:42 Kowa, kai anell jekes kal tiknendar, kai patsenn ap mande, miro dromestar tele, koleske wals feteder, te well leske i baro bar trul i meen pandlo, un te well lo witsedo an o baro pani." 
Mark9:43 Te kamell tiro wast, te kress o tchilatcho koowa, de les tele! Hi tuke feteder, te nashress tu jek wast, un djiweh hako tsiro pash o Debleste, har te djas tu dui wastentsa an o bengeskri jag, hoi hako tsireske chatchella." 
Mark9:44  
Mark9:45 Te kamell tut tiro piro ap i tchilatcho drom te anell, de les tele! Hi tuke feteder, te nashress tu jek piro, un djiweh hako tsiro pash o Debleste, har te wess dui pirentsa an o bengeskri jag witsedo." 
Mark9:46  
Mark9:47 Un te kamell tiro jak tchomone te dikell, hoi anell tut ap i tchilatcho drom, palle tchin les win! Hi tuke feteder, te nashress jek jak un djah pash o Debleste an o bolepen, har te wess dui jakentsa an o bengeskri jag witsedo," 
Mark9:48 kai i kirme gar merenna, un i jag gar win djala." 
Mark9:49 Hakeno, kai djal mantsa, hunte djiwell peskro tselo djipen o Debleske. Kowa hi jaake har pash i bakro, hoi o Debleske maredo un chatchedo wella. Kowa well tseles chatchedo. Un ap ko chapen, hoi anenn le o Debleske, hunte tchiwan le loon pre. Kowa sikrell: Ko chapen hi o Debleske." 
Mark9:50 O loon hi mishto. Te nashras o loon peskri soor, hi lo buder gar mishto. Un tu nai kreh buder tchi, te well lo pale londo. Djiwenn tumaro tselo djipen o Debleske, un tchingrenn tumen gar!" 
Mark10:1 Un o Jesus djas dureder un was an ko them Judea un an o them ap i wawar rig o panjestar Jordan. Un pale nashan bud menshe pash leste khetne. Un jaake har job bud kope kras, kras lo kote ninna, un penas lenge o Debleskro lab." 
Mark10:1 Un o Jesus djas dureder un was an ko them Judea un an o them ap i wawar rig o panjestar Jordan. Un pale nashan bud menshe pash leste khetne. Un jaake har job bud kope kras, kras lo kote ninna, un penas lenge o Debleskro lab." 
Mark10:2 Un i Farisarja wan pash leste, un kaman les leskre labentsa te taprell. Un jon putchan lestar: “Nai mukell i mursh peskri romjat pal maro tchatchepen?”" 
Mark10:3 Penas lo lenge: “Hoi penas o Mose tumenge?” 
Mark10:4 Penan le: “O Mose penas, te tchinell o rom i liil, kai tchinlo hi, kai job mukas lat. Un palle nai mukell lo lat. ”" 
Mark10:5 O Jesus penas ap lende: “Tumaro dji hi har bar. Doleske tchinas o Mose, kai nai mukenn tumer tumari romjat." 
Mark10:6 Kowa his gar jaake, har o Dewel lauter kras. Ap ko tsiro kras lo o murshes un i djuwjat." 
Mark10:7 Doleske mukell o mursh peskro dades un peskri dat, te djiwell lo peskri romjah khetne. Un kol dui wenna har jek." 
Mark10:8 Jaake hi le har jek un buder gar dui. 
Mark10:9 Un kowa, hoi o Dewel khetne anas, kowa hunte krell i mensho gar paash!”" 
Mark10:10 Un khere putchan leskre mala lestar pale pral kowa. 
Mark10:11 Un job penas ap lende: “Koon peskri romjat mukella un romedinerell i wawar djuwjat, kowa chochell peskri ersti romjat un anell doosh ap peste." 
Mark10:12 Un te mukell i djuwel peskro romes, un romedinerell i wawares, chochell li peskro ersto romes un anell doosh ap peste.”" 
Mark10:13 Un jon anan tchawen pash leste, te tchiwell lo peskre wasta ap lende. Leskre mala tchingran ap kolende, kai anan len pash leste." 
Mark10:14 Har o Jesus kowa dikas, was lo chojedo, un penas ap lende: “Mukenn kol tchawen pash mande te well! Ma rikrenn len pale! Sawe har jon, kolen das o Dewel gole, te djiwenn le khetne leha an o bolepen." 
Mark10:15 Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Koon gar ap mande patsella har kal tchawe, kowa nai well gar ap o Debleskro drom.”" 
Mark10:16 Un job las len an i mussi, tchiwas i wasta ap lende, un rakras o Debleskri bacht pral lende win." 
Mark10:17 Har djas o Jesus dureder ap o drom, nashas jek pash leste, peras glan leste tele ap i phub, un putchas lestar: “Latcho sikepaskro, hoi hunte krap, te dell man o Dewel o djipen, hoi gar pre-herella?”" 
Mark10:18 Penas o Jesus ap leste: “Hoske peneh tu Latcho sikepaskro ap mande? Kek mensho hi latcho. O Dewel kokres hi latcho. 
Mark10:19 Tu djineh, kai o Dewel penas: De kekes mulo! Romeha, ma choche tiri romjat i wawar djuwjah! Romnija, ma choche tiro romes i wawar mursheha! Ma tchore! Ma pen chochepen pral i wawarende! Ma rande tchi i wawarestar! Dik ap tiro dadeste un ap tiri date, te djal lenge mishto!”" 
Mark10:20 Penas ko mursh ap o Jesuseste: “Me krom kowa lauter fun tiknes pre.” 
Mark10:21 Un o Jesus dikas kamles ap leste un penas: “Jek hunte kress tu budeder. Bike lauter, hoi tut hi, un de kol lowe i tchorwelende! Palle hi tut i brawlepen an o bolepen. Un dja mantsa!”" 
Mark10:22 Kol murshes his bud brawlepen. Har job kowa shunas, dukras les kowa. Un job djas bibachteles peske." 
Mark10:23 Un o Jesus dikas trul peste un penas ap peskre malende: “Har pharo hi i brawelenge, te wenn le ap o Debleskro drom!”" 
Mark10:24 Pral kal laba atchas o Jesuseskre malenge o rakepen krik. Koi penas o Jesus pale ap lende: “Mire tchawe, har pharo hi i menshenge, te wenn le ap o Debleskro drom!" 
Mark10:25 Hi gar jaake pharo, te djal i baro viecho an i subjakro kand dren, har te well i brawelo ap o Debleskro drom.”" 
Mark10:26 Jon kran gomme bareder jaka un penan mank pende: “Te hi kowa jaake, koon nai lell o Debleskro djipen?”" 
Mark10:27 Koi dikas o Jesus ap lende un penas: “Kowa, hoi nashte krenn i menshe gar, kowa nai krell o Dewel. O Dewel nai krell halauter.”" 
Mark10:28 Koi penas o Petro ap o Jesuseste: “Djineh, mer mukam lauter, un djam tuha.”" 
Mark10:29 Un o Jesus penas: “Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Hakeno, kai mukell mange un mire labenge peskro kheer, peskre phralen, peskre phenjen, peskri dat, peskro dades, peskre tchawen, peskro kotar phub," 
Mark10:30 kowa lell sheel kope jaake bud pale. Kanna, an kau tsiro lell lo khera un phralen un phenjen un daja un tchawen, un i kotar phub. Ninna well lo palla lino. An ko tsiro, hoi wella, lell lo o djipen, hoi gar pre-herella." 
Mark10:31 Un bud, kai kanna glan tardo hi, kolla hi ap ko diwes palla tardo. Un bud, kai kanna palla tardo hi, kolla hi ap ko diwes glan tardo.”" 
Mark10:32 Jon his ap o drom an o foro Jerusalem. Un o Jesus djas glan peskre malende. Kolla his dareno. Un kol wawar, kai djan lenge palla, trashan. Un job las pale kol deesh-te-dujen pash peste, un penas lenge, hoi leha djala:" 
Mark10:33 “Shunenn, mer djah kanna an o foro Jerusalem. Kote denn le o Menshengro Tchawes an i wasta kol bare rashajendar un tchatchepangre murshendar. Kolla krenn win, te well lo maredo. Un jon denn les an i wasta kolendar, kai kek bibolde hi." 
Mark10:34 Kolla praassenn les, tchungrenn ap leste, denn les i tchupnijah, un marenn les. Pal triin diwessa stell lo pale i mulendar pre.”" 
Mark10:35 Koi djan o Jakobo un o Johanni, – lengro dad hi o Zebedeo, – pash o Jesuseste un penan ap leste: “Rai, mer kamah, te kress menge kowa, hoi mer tutar mangah.”" 
Mark10:36 Penas lo ap lende: “Hoi kamenn tumer, te krap tumenge?”" 
Mark10:37 Koi penan le ap leste: “Ap ko diwes, kai tu hal o rai pral i tsele menshende, muk men te beshas ap tiri rig: jek ap tiri tchatchi rig un ko wawar ap tiri serwi rig.”" 
Mark10:38 Koi penas o Jesus ap lende: “Tumer djinenn gar, hoi tumer mangenna mandar. Nai lenn tumer kol duka ap tumende, hoi me hunte lap ap mande? Nai djan tumer jaake an o merepen, har me djau?”" 
Mark10:39 Penan le: “Awa, kowa nai krah mer.” Penas o Jesus ap lende: “Tumer hunte lenna bud duka ap tumende, jaake har me hunte lap len ap mande. Un tumer hunte djan an o merepen, jaake har me hunte djap." 
Mark10:40 Ninna te hi jaake, nai penap tumenge gar, koon beshell ap miri tchatchi rig un ap miri serwi rig. Kowa hi gar an miro wast. O Dewel rodas kolen win, kai ap miri rig beshenna.”" 
Mark10:41 Un har kol deesh kowa shunan, wan le chojemen ap kol dujende, ap o Jakobeste un o Johanneste." 
Mark10:42 Koi das len o Jesus pash peste gole, un penas ap lende: “Tumer djinenna, i bare rajen hi penepaske pral i menshende an lengre themma. Un i pralstune rikrenn pengre menshen sorjah tele." 
Mark10:43 Mank tumende hunte well kowa gar jaake! Koon tumendar kamell, te well lo baro, kowa hunte well tumaro budepaskro." 
Mark10:44 Un koon tumendar kamell o pralstuno te well, kowa hunte well hakeneskro budepaskro." 
Mark10:45 Ninna o Mensheskro Tchawo was gar ap i phub, te budrenn i menshe leske. Na-a, job was ap i phub, te well lo lenge koi, un te merell lo lenge. Un jaake plaissrell lo peskro djipah, te lell lo bud menshen dran o tchilatchepen un o merepen win.”" 
Mark10:46 Un jon wan an o foro Jericho. Un har job peskre malentsa un bud wawar menshentsa dran o foro Jericho win djas, his i mangepaskro pash o drom beshdo. Kowa his korelo. Leskro lab his Bartimeo. Leskro dad his o Timeo." 
Mark10:47 Un har job shunas, kai kowa o Jesus dran o foro Nazaret hi, kai well kate, das lo gole: “Jesus, tu Davideskro tchawo, kre tiro dji mange pre!”" 
Mark10:48 Un bud tchingran ap leste, un penan: “Atch! Muk!” Koi das job budeder gole: “Tu Davideskro tchawo, kre tiro dji mange pre!”" 
Mark10:49 Un o Jesus atchas tardo un penas: “Denn les gole, te well lo kai!” Un jon dan les gole un penan ap leste: “Ma traash! Ste pre! Job dell tut gole!”" 
Mark10:50 Un job witsras peskri plaashka pestar, stas sik pre, un was pash o Jesuseste." 
Mark10:51 Un o Jesus penas ap leste: “Hoi kameh, te krap tuke?” Ko korelo penas ap leste: “Mo rai, te dikap nai pale.”" 
Mark10:52 Penas o Jesus ap leste: “Dja koi! Tiro patsepen kras tut sasto.” Un ap jek kopo dikas job nai pale, un djas leha ap o drom." 
Mark11:1 Un jon wan pash i gaba Betfage un Betani, kai hi gar dur glan o foro. Kol gaba hi tchiddo pash koi djeteskri berga. Un kote penas o Jesus ap dujende peskre malendar:" 
Mark11:2 “Djan an o gab koi wergel! Un har tumer dren wenna, hatsenn i terni esla pandlo, ap kolate his gomme kek beshdo. Pandenn lat tele, un anenn lat pash mande!" 
Mark11:3 Un te penell jek ap tumende: Hoske krenn tumer kowa? palle penenn ap leste: Hi maro rajeske, te beshell job ap late. Un job bitchrell lat sik pale pale.”" 
Mark11:4 Un jon djan kote un hatsan koi terni esla win ap o drom pandlo ap i wudar. Un jon pandan lat tele. 
Mark11:5 His menshe kote tardo, kolla penan ap lende: “Hoi krenn tumer koi? Hoske pandenn tumer koi esla tele?”" 
Mark11:6 Un jon penan kol laba ap lende, hoi o Jesus lenge penas. Un kol wawar mukan len koi esla te lell." 
Mark11:7 Koi anan le koi esla pash o Jesuseste, un tchiwan pengre koola ap late. Un o Jesus beshas pes pral pre." 
Mark11:8 Un bud menshe tchiwan pengre koola ap o drom. Wawar tchinan senele kashta i rukendar tele, un tchiwan len ap o drom." 
Mark11:9 Un kolla, kai djan glan leste un kolla, kai djan pal leste, dan gole: “Sharas o Debles! Sharedo well kowa, koles o Dewel bitchras." 
Mark11:10 Sharas o baro rajes, ko tchawes maro dadestar David, kai wella an peskri soor! Sharas o Debles an o bolepen!”" 
Mark11:11 Un o Jesus djas dren an o foro Jerusalem, an o Debleskro baro kheer. Un kote dikas lo pes trujel. An i rati djas lo win an o gab Betani peskre deesh-te-dui malentsa." 
Mark11:12 Un o wawar diwes, har o Jesus dran o gab Betani djas, las lo bok." 
Mark11:13 Un job dikas dur glan peste i faigetikro ruk. Ap leste his patria. Un job djas kote, te hatsell lo faige ap ko ruk. Un har job kote was, hatsas lo tchi har i patria kokres. His gar ko tsiro, kai i faige baro wenna." 
Mark11:14 Un job penas ap ko ruk: “Kek chal tutar buder – an kek tsiro!” Un leskre mala shunan kowa. 
Mark11:15 Un jon wan an o foro Jerusalem. Un o Jesus djas an o Debleskro baro kheer. Un job tradas kolen win, kai kote bikran un ginan, un witsras i lowengre stamja kolendar trujel, kai i menshenge lowe paran. Ninna i stamja kolendar, kai parne tchirkle bikran, witsras lo trujel." 
Mark11:16 Un job mukas gar, te hidjrell jek tchomone an o Debleskro baro kheer trujel." 
Mark11:17 Un job penas lenge, hoi an o Debleskro lab tchinlo hi, un penas: O Dewel penella: Miro kheer te well i kheer, kai i tsele menshe ap i phub nai wenna, te sharenn le man, un te mangenn le man an. Tumer kran lestar i kheer, kai i menshe chochenna un randenna." 
Mark11:18 Un kowa shunan i bare rashaja un i biboldengre tchatchepangre. Un jon dikan, har kran i tsele menshe bare jaka pral leskro rakepen. Doleske daran le lestar un rodan, har te nai marenn le les." 
Mark11:19 Un ap i rati djas lo peskre malentsa win glan o foro. 
Mark11:20 Un har jon taissarlake pash ko faigetikro ruk wan, dikan le, kai ko tselo ruk tele meras." 
Mark11:21 Un o Petreske wan o Jesuseskre laba pale an shero, un job penas ap leste: “Sikepaskro, dik, ko ruk, hoi tu praassal, ko meras.”" 
Mark11:22 Un o Jesus penas ap lende: “Patsenn ap o Debleste! 
Mark11:23 Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Te penell jek ap kai berga ‘hade tut, un witse tut an o baro pani’, un patsell soreles an peskro dji, te djal kowa, hoi job penell, palle well kowa ninna." 
Mark11:24 Doleske penau tumenge: Lauter, hoi tumer o Deblestar mangenna, patsenn, te lan les, palle lenn tumer kowa ninna."
