Mark11:25 Un te han tumer tardo un mangenn tchomone o Deblestar, bistrenn ko tchilatcho koowa, hoi i wawar ap tumende kras, te bistrell tumaro dad an o bolepen ninna ko tchilatcho koowa, hoi tumer kran." 
Mark11:26 Tumer te bistrenn gar ko tchilatcho koowa, hoi i wawar ap tumende kras, palle bistrell tumaro dad an o bolepen witar gar ko tchilatcho koowa, hoi tumer kran.”" 
Mark11:27 Un jon wan pale an o foro Jerusalem. Un har job an o Debleskro baro kheer trujel djas, wan i bare rashaja, i biboldengre tchatchepangre un phureder pash leste," 
Mark11:28 un putchan lestar: “Koon penas tuke, te kress kowa lauter? Koon bitchras tut?”" 
Mark11:29 Penas o Jesus ap lende: “Me kamau tumendar ninna tchomone te putchell. Tumer te penenn les mange, palle penau me tumenge ninna, koon man bitchras, te krap me kowa lauter." 
Mark11:30 Koon bitchras o Johannes, te taufras job i menshen? Bitchras o Dewel les? Bitchran i menshe les? Penenn les mange!”" 
Mark11:31 Un jon rakran mank pende, un penan: “Mer te penah leske: O Dewel bitchras les, palle penell lo menge: Hoske patsan tumer les gar?" 
Mark11:32 Witar gar nai penah mer: I menshe bitchran les.” Jon trashan kol bud menshendar. Kolla patsan, te hi o Johanni tchatchepah i Debleskro rakepaskro." 
Mark11:33 Un jon penan ap o Jesuseste: “Mer djinah les gar.” Koi penas job ap lende: “Jaake penau tumenge witar gar, koon man bitchras, te krap me kowa.”" 
Mark12:1 Un o Jesus penas lenge laba, kai i khatedo tchatchepen dren hi. Un job penas: His i mursh, koles his i kotar them. Kote tchiwas lo drakengre ruka an i phub. Trul ko kotar them tchiwas lo barra. Un kote kras lo ninna i platsa an i phub, kai nai stakrenn le ap i drake, te well i mool win. Mashkral kol ruka kras lo i kheer, kai kowa beshdo hi, kai dell garda ap i drake. Palle patsas lo ko kotar phub ap i hachende, te budrenn le kote leske. Un job djas peske an i wawar them." 
Mark12:2 Har ko tsiro was, te anenn le i drake dren, bitchras lo peskro budepaskres pash i hachende, te lell lo lendar kol drake, hoi leske hi." 
Mark12:3 Un i hache dan les kek drake. Jon tapran les, dan les dawa un bitchran les krik." 
Mark12:4 Un ko mursh bitchras pale i wawar budepaskres pash lende. Un koles dan jon ap o shero, un praassan les." 
Mark12:5 Un job bitchras i wawares, koles maran jon. Un bud wawaren bitchras lo pash lende. Bud lendar dan jon, kol wawaren maran le." 
Mark12:6 Les his jek wawar, leskro tchawo, koles kamell job o djijestar. Koi penas ko mursh peske: Miro tchawestar darenn le. Un jaake bitchras lo pal kol tsele wawarende peskro tchawes pash lende." 
Mark12:7 Kol hache rakran mashkral pende: Kowa hi leskro tchawo, kai lauter lella pal peskro dadeskro merepen. Awenn, maras les, te well kau kotar them menge, hoi leske hunte wals!" 
Mark12:8 Un jon tapran les, maran les, un witsran les win glan ko drakengro them." 
Mark12:9 Hoi krell kanna ko rai pral ko drakengro them? Job wella, un marell kol hachen, un dell ko drakengro them i wawaren." 
Mark12:10 Djinenn tumer gar, hoi an o Debleskro lab tchinlo hi? Kote hi tardo: His i bar, kai i budepangre lestar penan: Kowa hi tchi moldo. Ko bar las o Dewel un tchiwas les jaake an o kheer, te rikrell lo ko tselo kheer khetne." 
Mark12:11 O Dewel kras kowa, un kowa hi i baro koowa menge." 
Mark12:12 Un jon haiwan, te rakras o Jesus lendar, un kaman les te taprell. Un har trashan le i menshendar, tapran le les gar, un djan krik." 
Mark12:13 I Farisarja kran pen khetne kolentsa, kai shunenn ap o Herodes, un bitchran murshen pash o Jesuseste, te taprenn le les an peskro rakepen." 
Mark12:14 Un jon wan pash leste, un penan: “Sikepaskro, mer djinah, tu peneh o tchatchepen, un rakreh kekeske pal o mui, ninna te hi les bud penepaske. Awa, tu sikreh mishto i menshende o Debleskro drom. Pen menge, hi mishto pal maro tchatchepen, te das mer o themeskre lowe o baro rajeste an o foro Rom? Plaissras len? Plaissras len gar?”" 
Mark12:15 Job haiwas, te rakran le dui tchipjentsa, un penas ap lende: “Hoske kamenn tumer man mire labentsa te taprell? Anenn mange i rupeni bema, te dikap lat!”" 
Mark12:16 Un jon anan jek. Koi penas job: “Koneskro shero un lab hi ap kai bema?” Penan le: “O shero un o lab o baro rajestar an o foro Rom.” 
Mark12:17 Un o Jesus penas ap lende: “Jaake denn leste, hoi leskro hi, un denn o Debleste, hoi leskro hi!” Un jon kran bare jaka pral leste." 
Mark12:18 Palle wan i Sadduzarja pash leste. Jon hi kolla, kai penenna: I mule wenna buder gar djido. Kolla putchan lestar:" 
Mark12:19 “Sikepaskro, o Mose tchinas an peskre lila: Te merell i rom, kai romedino hi, un les hi kek tchawe, palle hunte romedinerell lat leskro phraal, te well leskro phraleske tchawen boldo." 
Mark12:20 Koi his efta phrala. Un o phureder las i romjat, un meras. Les his kek tchawe." 
Mark12:21 Un ko duito las lat un meras ninna. Un les his witar kek tchawe. Un ko triinto phraleske djas kowa ninna jaake. 
Mark12:22 Un hake efta murshen his kek tchawe. Palle meras ninna koi romni. 
Mark12:23 Kanna putchah tutar: Ap ko tsiro, kai krell o Dewel i mulen djido, koneskri romni hi li? Hake efta his lah romedino.”" 
Mark12:24 Koi penas o Jesus ap lende: “Tumer prindjrenn gar o Debleskro lab, un o Debleskri soor witar gar. Doleske haiwan tumer tchi." 
Mark12:25 Kol mulen, kai o Dewel djido krella, romedinerenn buder gar un wenna gar romedino. Jon hi har i bolepangre an o bolepen." 
Mark12:26 Djinenn tumer gar, har an o Moseskro liil tardo hi, te wenn i mule pale djido. O Dewel penas ap o Moseste, har his job tardo pash o bur, hoi chatchas: Me hom o Abrahameskro Dewel un o Isaakeskro Dewel un o Jakobeskro Dewel." 
Mark12:27 Un me penau tumenge: Job hi gar o Dewel kolenge, kai mulo hi. Na-a, job hi o Dewel kol djidenge. Tumer haiwan tchi!”" 
Mark12:28 Jek biboldengro tchatchepaskro his koi pashel un shunas, har kol Sadduzarja leha rakran. Har job dikas, kai das o Jesus lenge i mishto lab pale, was lo pash leste un putchas lestar: “Kol tsele laba, kai penenna, hoi o Dewel mendar kamella, hawo lab hi o bareder lendar?”" 
Mark12:29 Penas o Jesus leske: “O bareder lab hi kowa: Shun tu, Israel! Maro Dewel hi o rai, hi kek wawar." 
Mark12:30 Tu kamess tiro Debles o tselo djijestar an tiro tselo djipen, an lauter, hoi tu kreh un djineh." 
Mark12:31 O duito Debleskro lab hi kowa: Te wess jaake latches ap koleste, kai pash tute hi, har hal latches ap tute kokres. Kek wawar lab, hoi penell, hoi o Dewel mendar kamella, hi bareder har kolla dui.”" 
Mark12:32 Un ko biboldengro tchatchepaskro penas ap leste: “Sikepaskro, tu rakral tchatchepah mishto. Hi jek Dewel kokres un kek wawar." 
Mark12:33 Te kamah mer les o tselo djijeha, an lauter hoi krah un djinah, un te ham jaake latcho ap koleste, kai pash mende hi, har ham latcho ap mende kokres, palle hi kowa feteder, har i tsele bakre un grumja, hoi mer marah un chatchrah o Debleske.”" 
Mark12:34 Har o Jesus dikas, kai job mishto rakras, penas lo ap leste: “Tu hal gar dur o Debleskro dromestar.” Un jon trashan, te putchenn le lestar budeder." 
Mark12:35 Un har o Jesus an o Debleskro baro kheer i menshenge o Debleskro lab penas, putchas lo i menshendar: Hoske penenn kol biboldengre tchatchepangre, kai ko baro rai, koles o Dewel bitchrell, o Davideskro tchawo hi?" 
Mark12:36 O David penas lestar, har o Debleskro Ducho ap leste was: O Dewel penas ap miro rajeste: Besh tut ap miri tchatchi rig, bis te tchiwau kolen tel tire pire, kai hi chojedo ap tute." 
Mark12:37 Koi penell o David mo rai ap leste. Har well lo nai leskro tchawo? Un i tsele menshe kaman, te shunenn le o Jesuseskro rakepen." 
Mark12:38 Un job rakras ap lende un penas: Denn jak ap tumende! Kowa, hoi kol biboldengre tchatchepangre krenna, hi gar mishto. Len hi lengste koola ap lende, te sikrenn le, te hi le o Debleskre menshe. Te djan le an o foro, kamenn le, te penenn i menshe “Latcho diwes, mo rai” ap lende." 
Mark12:39 An i biboldengre kangria kamenn le ap i pralstune beshepangre te beshenn. Un pash i baro chapen kamenn le ap i feteder beshepangre te beshenn. 
Mark12:40 Jon lenn i khera kol djuwjendar krik, kolengre romma meran. Jon rakrenn o Debleha i rah tsiro, te dikenn i menshe, har patslo jon hi. Ap ko diwes, kai rakrell o Dewel o tchatchepen pral lende win, lenn le i sorleder phagi har kol wawar." 
Mark12:41 An o Debleskro baro kheer his i lowengri piri tardo, kai i menshe lowe o Debleske dren tchiwan. Un o Jesus beshas pes pashel un dikas, har kol menshe lowe dren tchiwan. Un bud brawele tchiwan bud dren." 
Mark12:42 Koi was i tchorweli djuwel, kolakro rom meras. Joi tchiwas dui tikne kotja dren. Kowa his jaake bud har jek bema." 
Mark12:43 Koi das job peskre malen pash peste gole, un penas ap lende: “Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Koi romni das budeder o Debleske, har kol tsele wawar, kai tchiwan lowe dren." 
Mark12:44 Kol tsele wawar dan lowe dran pengro brawlepen. Kai tchorweli romni das halauter, hoi lat his, halauter, hoi lat his djipaske.”" 
Mark13:1 Har o Jesus dran o Debleskro baro kheer win djas, penas jek peskre malendar ap leste: “Sikepaskro, dik, sawe bare barra un sawe shukar khera!”" 
Mark13:2 Penas o Jesus ap leste: “Kal bare khera, hoi tu dikeh, djan paash. Kek bar atchell ap o wawareste!”" 
Mark13:3 Un job djas ap o djeteskri berga, hoi hi wergel o Debleskro baro kherestar, un beshas pes kote. Un har jon kokres his, putchan lestar o Petro, un o Jakobo, un o Johanni, un o Andreas:" 
Mark13:4 “Pen menge, kaana well kowa? Har nai dikas mer, kai kowa lauter glan o wudar tardo hi, hoi wella?”" 
Mark13:5 Un o Jesus penas ap lende: Denn jak! Ma mukenn tumen kekestar o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell! 
Mark13:6 Koi wenna bud mursha, kai penenna: Me hom o Kristo, ko baro rai, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job. Un bud menshe patsenn ap lengro chochepen." 
Mark13:7 An ko tsiro hi kurepen an kol themma, kai hi dur tumendar un ninna an kol themma, kai hi gar dur tumendar. Tumer te shunenn kowa, ma trashenn! Kowa hunte well jaake. Ko tsiro, kai i phub paash djala, well gar jaake sik." 
Mark13:8 I pralstune pral bare themma kurenn pen i wawar pralstunentsa. Un i menshe dran jek them marenn i menshen an i wawar them. Un kate un kote well i phub trisslemen. Bud menshen hi gar doha te chal. Kowa lauter wella jaake pral i phub, har i duka wenna pral i djuwjate, kai lell i ternepen." 
Mark13:9 Denn jak ap tumende! Tumer wenn glan i tchatchepangre anlo, un chan dawa an i biboldengre kangria. Tumer patsenn ap mande. Doleske anenn le tumen glan i pralstune un glan i bare rajende, te rakrenn jon i phagi win pral tumende. Te han glan lende tardo, palle nai rakrenn tumer mandar, te shunenn jon pral mande o tchatchepen." 
Mark13:10 Glan ko tsiro, kai i phub paash djala, hunte well o latcho lab mandar penlo an i tsele themma." 
Mark13:11 Te taprenn le tumen, te anenn le tumen glan i tchatchepangre, ma darenn, hoi hunte penenna! Ap ko diwes, kai han glan lende tardo, sikrell o Dewel tumen, hoi te penenn lenge. Kowa rakrenna! Ma bistrenn, tumer han gar kolla, kai rakrenna. Kowa hi o Debleskro Ducho, kai dran tumende rakrella." 
Mark13:12 An kol diwessa phukrell o phraal ap peskro phraleste, te well job maredo. Un ninna o dad krell kowa peskro tchaweha. Un i tchawe hadenn pen pral pengre dadende un pral pengre dajende, un denn len an i wasta kolendar, kai marenn len." 
Mark13:13 Tumer patsenn ap mande. Doleske wenn i tsele menshe chojedo ap tumende. Kowa, kai atchell soreles tardo an o patsepen, jaake rah, har job djiwella, kowa lell o Debleskro djipen." 
Mark13:14 An o Debleskro lab hi tchinlo pral koi djungeli tchilatchi figura. Koon kawa drawerella, kamaus, te haiwell lo les ninna. Ap ko diwes, kai dikenn tumer koi djungeli tchilatchi figura kote tardo, kai hunte well li gar tardo, palle hunte nashenn kolla, kai hi an o them Judea, sik ap i berge!" 
Mark13:14 An o Debleskro lab hi tchinlo pral koi djungeli tchilatchi figura. Koon kawa drawerella, kamaus, te haiwell lo les ninna. Ap ko diwes, kai dikenn tumer koi djungeli tchilatchi figura kote tardo, kai hunte well li gar tardo, palle hunte nashenn kolla, kai hi an o them Judea, sik ap i berge!" 
Mark13:15 Kowa, kai hi pral ap o kheer, hunte djal buder gar an peskro kheer dren, te lell lo peske tchomone." 
Mark13:16 Un kowa, kai budrell ap i kotar phub, kowa hunte djal buder gar khere, te lell lo peskri baja." 
Mark13:17 Koi bibacht hi bari kol djuwjenge, kai hi an wawar koowa, ninna kol djuwjenge, kai hi len i ternepen." 
Mark13:18 Mangenn o Deblestar, te well kowa lauter gar an o wend." 
Mark13:19 Kowa, hoi an kol diwessa pral i menshende wella, hi djungleder har ko tselo tchilatcho koowa, hoi ap i menshende was jaake rah, har o Dewel i phub kras. Un ko tsiro, hoi well pal kowa, well witar gar jaake tchilatcho." 
Mark13:20 Te krals o Dewel ko tchilatcho tsiro gar tikneder, wals kek mensho dran o tchilatcho tsiro win. Kolen, kai o Dewel peske win rodas, kolenge kras lo o tchilatcho tsiro tikneder." 
Mark13:21 Te penell jek ap tumende: Dikenn, kate hi o Kristo! – palle patsenn les gar! Un te penell i wawar: Ake, kote hi lo! – palle patsenn les witar gar!" 
Mark13:22 Chochene mursha wenna un penenna ap tumende: Me hom o Kristo. Un i chochene rakepangre penenna: Me wom o Deblestar bitchedo. Un jon krenna baro un sorelo koowa, hoi i mensho nashte krell gar dran peskri soor. Te djals kowa, anans le kolen o Debleskro dromestar tele, kolen o Dewel peske win rodas." 
Mark13:23 Denn jak ap tumende! Me penom tumenge kowa lauter, te djinenn les ap ko tsiro, kai kowa wella." 
Mark13:24 An kol diwessa pal ko tchilatcho tsiro, well o kham kalo har i rat, un o moonto dikell kek buder." 
Mark13:25 Un i bare momlia ap o bolepen perenn tele. Un o bolepaskri soor perell khetne. 
Mark13:26 Palle dikenn le o Menshengro Tchawes, har well lo an i wolke bari sorjah un railepen." 
Mark13:27 Palle bitchrell lo i bolepangren pral i tseli phub, te anenn le dran hako them kolen khetne, kai len o Dewel peske win rodas." 
Mark13:28 Me kamau te sikrap tumende tchomone. Dikenn ap o faigetikro ruk! Te wenn leskre kashta senelo, un i patria wenn dran lende win, palle djinenn tumer, te well sik o nijal." 
Mark13:29 Jaake hi kowa ninna koleha, pral kowa rakrom. Te dikenn tumer, har kowa lauter wella, palle djinenn tumer, kai job glan o wudar tardo hi." 
Mark13:30 Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Kol menshe, kai an ko tsiro djiwenna, dikenna kowa lauter pengre jakentsa." 
Mark13:31 O bolepen un i phub atchenna gar. Mire laba atchenna hako tsiro. 
Mark13:32 Kek djinell ko diwes un ko tsiro, kai kowa lauter wella. I bolepangre an o bolepen djinenn les gar, witar gar o Debleskro tchawo. Miro dad an o bolepen kokres djinell les." 
Mark13:33 Denn jak! Rikrenn tumare jaka pre! Tumer djinenn gar, kaana hi ko tsiro kai." 
Mark13:34 Kowa hi jaake har pash i mursheste, kai djas ap o them. Job mukas peskro kheer un das peskre budepangren lauter an o wast, hakeneste das lo leskri budi. Un penas ap koleste, kai pash o wudar beshdo hi: De garda ap miro kheer! Ma sob!" 
Mark13:35 Jaake penau tumenge: Rikrenn tumare jaka pre! Tumer djinenn gar o tsiro, kai o rai pral o kheer pale wella. Job nai well ap i rati, nai well mashkral an i rati, nai well ap ko tsiro, kai dell o bashno gole, nai well taissarlake." 
Mark13:36 Jaake denn garda, te hatsell lo tumen gar ap o sopen, te well lo ap jek kopo." 
Mark13:37 Kowa, hoi me tumenge penaua, ko penau lauterenge: Denn jak un sowenn gar!" 
Mark14:1 His dui diwessa glan kol bare diwessa, kai kharenna Passa un glan kol diwessa, kai chan i bibolde kek shutlo maro. Un kol bare rashaja un kol biboldengre tchatchepangre rodan i latcho tsiro, te taprenn le o Jesuses tchorchanes, te marenn le les." 
Mark14:2 Jon penan mashkral pende: “Mer taprah les gar ap o Passa, te wenn i menshe gar diwjo un chojedo ap mende.”" 
Mark14:3 Un o Jesus his an o gab Betani, an o Simoneskro kheer. Kowa hi ko Simon, kai his les i djungelo nasslepen ap peskro mass. Har o Jesus kote chas, was i djuwel pash leste. Kolat his i tushni an o wast. Koi his djudjo un kutch djet dren, kerdo dran ko kasht, hoi kharella Narde. Un joi phagas koi tushni pre, un tchoras ko djet ap leskro shero, te makell li les dren." 
Mark14:4 Mank kolende, kai koi pashel his, his sawe, kai choiran pen un penan mashkral pende: “Hoske tchoras li ko djet tchitcheske win?" 
Mark14:5 Te bikrams ko djet, lams budeder har triin-sheel rupene beme. Un kol lowe nai dams mer i tchorwelende.” Un jon tchingran ap late." 
Mark14:6 Penas o Jesus ap lende: “Mukenn lat! Hoske tchingrenn tumer ap late? Hoi joi mange kras, his mishto." 
Mark14:7 I tchorwele hi hako tsiro pash tumende. Un te kamenn tumer, nai krenn tumer lenge latcho koowa. Me hom gar hako tsiro pash tumende." 
Mark14:8 Koja kras, hoi nai kras li, un makas man kanna dren ko diweske, kai wau paskedo." 
Mark14:9 Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Ap i tseli phub, kai penenn le o latcho lab mandar i menshenge, koi well ninna penlo, hoi koi djuwel mange kras. Joi wella gar bistedo.”" 
Mark14:10 O Judas Iskariot, jek kol deesh-te-dujendar, djas pash kol bare rashajende, te phukrell lo ap o Jesuseste." 
Mark14:11 Har jon kowa shunan, his le bachtelo, un penan: “Mer dah tut lowe!” Un job rodas i latcho tsiro, te dell lo les an lengre wasta." 
Mark14:12 His jek diwes glan kol diwessa, kai chan i bibolde o maro, kai kek shutlo jarro dren hi. Ap ko diwes marenn le i bakren, te chan le len ap ko baro diwes Passa. Koi penan o Jesuseskre mala ap leste: “Kai djas mer, te kras o chapen tuke?”" 
Mark14:13 Un job bitchras dui peskre malendar un penas ap lende: “Djan an o foro. Koi dikenn tumer i murshes, ko hidjrell i khoro pani. Djan leske palla!" 
Mark14:14 An ko kheer, kai job dren djal, penenn o rajeske an ko kheer: Maro sikepaskro putchell tutar: Kai hi koi isema, kai nai chau me o bakro mire malentsa?" 
Mark14:15 Un job sikrell tumende i bari isema pral an ko kheer. Kote hi beshepangre un lauter hoi men hunte well. Kote krenn menge o chapen!” 
Mark14:16 Un kol mala djan koi, un wan an ko foro un hatsan kowa jaake, har job lenge penas. Un jon kran o chapen." 
Mark14:17 Un ap i rati was job kol deesh-te-dujentsa. 
Mark14:18 Un har jon pash i chapaskri beshdo his un chan, penas o Jesus: “Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Jek tumendar, kai chal mantsa, kowa phukrella ap mande.”" 
Mark14:19 Ko dukas len. Un jon putchan lestar, jek pal o wawar: “Hom me kowa?”" 
Mark14:20 Koi penas job ap lende: “Kowa hi jek kol deesh-te-dujendar, kai tchiwell peskro kotar maro mantsa an jek tcharo." 
Mark14:21 O Mensheskro Tchawo hunte merella jaake, har hi lestar tchinlo an o Debleskro lab. Hawi bibacht well ap koleste, kai ap leste phukrella! Koleske wals feteder, te wals lo gar boldo.”" 
Mark14:22 Har jon chan, las o Jesus o maro, parkras pes pash o Debleste, phagas ko maro, das les peskre malende, un penas: “Lenn ko maro un chan les! Kau maro hi miro mass!”" 
Mark14:23 Palle las lo o khoro, parkras pes pash o Debleste, das len o khoro, un jon pijan halauter lestar." 
Mark14:24 Un job penas ap lende: “Kai mool hi miro rat, hoi me ratau budenge. Jaake krau i drom, kai o Dewel un i menshe mala wenna." 
Mark14:25 Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Me pijau buder gar i mool, bis te well ko diwes, kai hi o Dewel o rai pral halauter. Palle pijau newi mool pash leste an o bolepen.”" 
Mark14:26 Palle giwan le o Debleske i gili, un djan win pash o djeteskri berga." 
Mark14:27 Un o Jesus penas ap lende: “Tumer halauter mukenn man. Hi tchinlo an o Debleskro lab: O Dewel penas: Me dau o bakrengro rajes. Un i bakre nashenn penge. 
Mark14:28 Pal kowa krell o Dewel man i mulendar djido. Un te djan tumer an o them Galilea, palle djau glan tumende.”" 
Mark14:29 O Petro penas ap leste: “Ninna te nashenn halauter tutar krik, me mukau tut gar.”" 
Mark14:30 Penell o Jesus ap leste: “Tchatchepah, me penau tuke: Kai rati dell o bashno gar o duito kopo gole jaake rah, har tu gar triin kope penal, te prindjreh man gar.”" 
Mark14:31 Penell o Petro soreles: “Ninna te hunte meroms tuha, doms tut gar buchoste.” Ninna kol tsele wawar penan kowa." 
Mark14:32 Un jon wan an i baar, koi kharas Getsemani. Un o Jesus penas ap peskre malende: “Beshenn tumen kate jaake rah, har rakrau o Debleha.”" 
Mark14:33 Un job las o Petres peha, ninna o Jakobes un o Johannes. Un i bari daar was ap leste, un job trissas." 
Mark14:34 Un job penas ap lende: “Miro dji rowella un dukell, har te merap. Atchenn kate un sowenn gar!”" 
Mark14:35 Un job djas i kotar drom dureder, witsras pes ap i phub un mangas o Debles, te well ko pharo tsiro gar ap leste." 
Mark14:36 Un o Jesus mangas o Debles: “Tata, halauter nai kreh tu. Muk, te wenn kol duka gar ap mande! Ninna te mangau tut kowa, ma kre, hoi me kamau! Kre jaake, har tu kameh!”" 
Mark14:37 Un job djas pale pash peskre malende un dikas, har sowan le, un penas ap o Petreste: “Simon, soweh tu? Nai rikreh tu gar tire jaka i tikno tsiro pre?" 
Mark14:38 Ma sowenn dren! Mangenn o Deblestar, te perenn gar miro dromestar tele! Tumen kokres hi kek soor, te atchenn pash mande, ninna te kamell kowa tumaro dji.”" 
Mark14:39 Un job djas pale koi, mangas o Debles un penas kol emlige laba." 
Mark14:40 Palle djas lo pale pash lende un dikas, te sowenn le. Jon rikran nai lengre jaka gar pre. Un jon djinan gar, hoi te penenn le ap leste." 
Mark14:41 Un job was o triinto kopo un penas ap lende: “Kamenn tumer dureder sowell un kate tchiddo atchell? Kanna hi doha! O tsiro hi kai, kai denn le o Menshengro Tchawes an i wasta i tchilatche menshendar." 
Mark14:42 Stenn pre! Djas menge! Dikenn, ko phukepaskro wella.”" 
Mark14:43 Un har job jaake rakras, was o Judas, ko jek kol deesh-te-dujendar. Pash leste his bud wawar mursha. Len his chare un kashta an i wasta. Kolen bitchran i bare rashaja, un i biboldengre tchatchepangre un phureder." 
Mark14:44 O Judas, ko phukepaskro, kras lentsa win: “Koles, kai tchumrau, kowa hi lo. Koles taprenn, anenn les krik un denn garda ap leste!”" 
Mark14:45 Un o Judas was pash leste, un penas: “Mo rai!” un tchumras les." 
Mark14:46 Un kolla tapran les, un rikran les." 
Mark14:47 Un jek kolendar, kai koi pashel tardo hi, las peskro charo, un das jek klisteske o kand tele. Kowa his i klisto, kai budrell o baro rashajeske." 
Mark14:48 Un o Jesus penas ap lende: “Tumer wan i charentsa un i kashtentsa pash mande, har te woms i marepaskro." 
Mark14:49 Hako diwes homs pash tumende an o Debleskro baro kheer un sikrom i menshende o Debleskro drom. Un tumer tapran man gar. Kau koowa well jaake, te well tchatcho, hoi o Debleskre rakepangre glan i rah tsiro an pengre lila tchinan.”" 
Mark14:50 Har peskre mala kowa shunan, mukan le les lauter un nashan penge." 
Mark14:51 I terno mursh djas o Jesuseske palla. Koles his kokres i laintikro kotar trul peste. Un jon tapran pal leste. 
Mark14:52 Koi mukas lo ko laintikro kotar an lengre wasta, un nashas nanges lendar." 
Mark14:53 Un jon anan o Jesuses pash o baro rashajeste. Un i tsele bare rashaja un i biboldengre phureder un tchatchepangre wan khetne. 
Mark14:54 Dur pal leste djas o Petro leske palla, un was glan o shukar kheer o baro rashajestar. Un job djas an o baro wudar dren un beshas pes pash i lurdende pash i jag un tatsras pes." 
Mark14:55 Un i bare rashaja un i tsele pralstune bibolde rodan tchomone, hoi anenn le nai ap o Jesuseste, te nai marenn le les. Un jon hatsan tchi." 
Mark14:56 Bud anan ap leste chochepen pre. Un har jek rakras jaake un o wawar jaake, rakran le gar dran jek mui." 
Mark14:57 Palle stan mursha pre un anan chochepen ap leste pre un penan: 
Mark14:58 “Mer shunam, har job penas: Me phagau kau Debleskro baro kheer tele, hoi i menshe pengre wastentsa kran. Un an triin diwessa krau i wawar Debleskro baro kheer, hoi kek menshe pengre wastentsa kran.”" 
Mark14:59 Ninna kowa, hoi kolla penan, rakran le gar dran jek mui." 
Mark14:60 Un o baro rashai stas pre, djas mashkral lende, un putchas o Jesusestar: “Peneh tu tchi ap kowa, hoi jon ap tute pre anan?”" 
Mark14:61 Un o Jesus penas tchi. Pale putchas o baro rashai lestar: “Hal tu ko baro rai, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job? Hal tu o tchawo o baro Deblestar?”" 
Mark14:62 “Me hom kowa,” penas o Jesus, “un ko diwes wella, kai dikenn tumer o Menshengro Tchawes, har hi lo beshdo ap i tchatchi rig o sorelo Deblestar, un har well lo an i wolke dran o bolepen.”" 
Mark14:63 Koi kras o baro rashai peskre koola paash, te sikrell lo peskri choli, un penas ap i wawar pralstunende: “Kek hunte penell menge budeder." 
Mark14:64 Tumer shunan: Job krell pes har o Dewel. Hoi kamenn tumer leha te krell?” Un jon penan halauter: “Job hunte well maredo!” 
Mark14:65 Koi wan mursha un tchungran leske an o mui, pandan leske tchomone trul leskre jaka, dan les un penan ap leste: “Pen menge, koon das tut?” Un i lurde dan les an o mui." 
Mark14:66 O Petro his glan o kheer beshdo. Koi was i budepaskretsa o baro rashajestar. 
Mark14:67 Un har dikas li o Petres, har tatsras pes lo pash i jag, dikas li ap leste, un penas: “Tu hals ninna o Jesuseha dran Nazaret khetne!”" 
Mark14:68 Un o Petro penas: “Na-a, kowa hi gar tchatcho! Me djinau gar un haiwau gar, hoi tu peneh!” Un job djas win pash o baro wudar glan ko kheer. Un o bashno das gole." 
Mark14:69 Un koi budepaskretsa dikas les, un penas pale ap kolende, kai koi pashel tardo his: “Kawa hi jek kolendar!”" 
Mark14:70 Un job penas pale: “Na-a, me hom kek lendar!” Pal i tikno tsiro penan kolla, kai kote tardo hi, pale ap o Petreste: “Tchatchepah, tu hal ninna jek kolendar. Tu hal dran o them Galilea.”" 
Mark14:71 Koi tchingras lo, das pes sowel, un penas ap lende: “Me prindjrau ko murshes gar, kolestar rakrenna!”" 
Mark14:72 Un sik koi pre das o bashno o duito kopo gole. Un o Petreske wan o Jesuseskre laba an o shero, hoi job leske penas: “O bashno dell gar o duito kopo gole jaake rah, har tu gar triin kope penal, te prindjreh man gar.” Kowa djas an leskro dji, un job rowas." 
Mark15:1 Sik taissarlake wan i bare rashaja un i biboldengre phureder un tchatchepangre khetne i tsele pralstune biboldentsa. Un jon rakran khetne, hoi te krenn le o Jesuseha. Un jon pandan les, anan les pash o Pilateste un dan les an leskre wasta." 
Mark15:2 Un o Pilato putchas lestar: “Hal tu o baro rai pral i biboldende?” Penas job ap leste: “Awa, hi jaake, har tu penal.”" 
Mark15:3 Un kol bare rashaja anan bud doosh ap leste pre. 
Mark15:4 Un o Pilato putchas lestar pale: “Hoske peneh tu tchi? Shun, har bud doosh anenn le ap tute pre!”" 
Mark15:5 O Jesus penas buder tchi, jaake te kras o Pilato bare jaka." 
Mark15:6 Ap ko tsiro his jaake, te mukas o Pilato hako bersh ap kol diwessa, kai kharenna Passa, jekes dran o stilepen win. Koles nai rodan i bibolde win." 
Mark15:7 Koi his jek, ko kharas Barabas. Kowa his stildo kolentsa, kai kran i baro tchingepen, kai wan i menshe diwjo. Koi pashel maran le jekes." 
Mark15:8 Un i bibolde djan pash o Pilateste, un mangan lestar, te krell lo jaake, har job ap hako Passa krella." 
Mark15:9 Un o Pilato putchas lendar: “Kamenn tumer, te mukap o rajes pral i biboldende win?”" 
Mark15:10 O Pilato djinas, te silwerenn i bare rashaja ap o Jesuseste. Un doleske dan le les an leskre wasta." 
Mark15:11 Koi kran kol bare rashaja i menshen diwjo, te penenn le o Pilateske: “Mer kamah feteder, te mukess o Barabes win!”" 
Mark15:12 O Pilato putchas pale lendar: “Hoi kamenn tumer, te krap me koleha, koles tumer kharenna Baro rai pral i biboldende?”" 
Mark15:13 Un jon dan pale gole: “De les ap o trushel!” 
Mark15:14 Koi putchas o Pilato lendar: “Hawo tchilatcho koowa kras job?” Koi dan le sorleder gole: “De les ap o trushel!” 
Mark15:15 O Pilato kamas kowa te krell, hoi kol bud menshe lestar kaman un mukas o Barabes dran o stilepen win. Un o Jesuses mukas lo i tchupnijah dawa te dell, un das les an i lurdengre wasta, te denn le les ap o trushel." 
Mark15:16 Kol lurde anan les an o baro kheer o themeskro rajestar, un dan i tsele lurden khetne gole." 
Mark15:17 Un jon tchiwan leske i loli rajeskri plaashka trujel, pandan subjengre kashta khetne, un tchiwan len ap leskro shero, jaake har i baro rai hidjrell shereskro sonakai ap leskro shero." 
Mark15:18 Un jon penan ap leste: “Mer sharah tut, tu baro rai pral i biboldende!”" 
Mark15:19 Un jon dan les i kashteha ap o shero, tchungran ap leste, un mukan pen glan leste ap i phub te perell, un kran jaake, har te mangans le i baro rajes an." 
Mark15:20 Un har jon san pral leste, riwan le leske koi loli plaashka pale win, un riwan leske leskre koola pale an. Un jon anan les win, te denn le les ap o trushel." 
Mark15:21 Ap o drom tapran le i murshes i sorjah, te hidjrell lo o Jesuseskro trushel. Leskro lab hi Simon, un job his dran ko foro Kirene. Leskre tchawe hi o Alexandro un o Rufo. O Simon budras win ap i kotar phub un his ap o drom pale." 
Mark15:22 Un jon anan o Jesuses ap ko kotar them, hoi kharell an o biboldengro rakepen Golgata, ko kharella Muleskro Shero." 
Mark15:23 Un jon dan les mool te pijell. An koi mool his i drab dren, ko kharell Myrrhe. Un job pijas gar." 
Mark15:24 Un jon dan les ap o trushel. Un palle khelan le pral leskre koola, te dikenn le, hoi hakeno lella." 
Mark15:25 His taissarlake enjenge, kai dan le les ap o trushel." 
Mark15:26 Un pral leste ap i kasht his tchinlo, hoske job hunte meras. Koi pre his tchinlo: O baro rai pral i biboldende." 
Mark15:27 Khetne leha dan le dui marepangren ap o trushel. Ko jekeskro trushel his tchatches lestar, ko wawareskro trushel his serwes lestar." 
Mark15:28  
Mark15:29 Un kolla, kai kote pashel wan, sikran i gushteha ap leste, un praassan les, un penan: “Tu kamal o Debleskro baro kheer tele te phagell, un an triin diwessa pale pre te tchiwell." 
Mark15:30 Kanna, kre tuke, hoi i wawarenge kral, un ab o trushelestar tele!”" 
Mark15:31 Ninna kol bare rashaja un kol biboldengre tchatchepangre san pral leste, un jon penan jek ap o wawareste: “Wawaren las job dran o merepen win. Pes kokres nai lell lo gar dran o merepen win." 
Mark15:32 Te hi lo ko baro rai, koles o Dewel bitchras, ko baro rai pral o Israel, palle nai djals job o trushelestar tele, te dikas mer kowa un te nai patsas ap leste.” Un kolla dui, kai wan langs leste ap pengro trushel dino, praassan les ninna." 
Mark15:33 His deesh-te-dujenge, koi was o diwes kalo har i rati an o tselo them. Un kowa atchas jaake bis pash trinenge." 
Mark15:34 Un har trinenge his, das o Jesus bari gole: Eloi, Eloi, lema sabachtani? Kowa kharella: Miro Dewel, miro Dewel, hoske mukal man tu?" 
Mark15:35 Un kolendar, kai kote tardo his un kowa shunan, penan: “Shunenn, kawa dell ap o Elija gole.”" 
Mark15:36 Un jek nashas, las tchomone har i kotar than, kras les pherdo shutli mool, tchiwas les ap i kasht, un das les o Jesuseste te pijell, un penas: “Muk les, dikas, te well o Elija, un lell les tele!”" 
Mark15:37 Un o Jesus das bari gole, un meras." 
Mark15:38 Un ko wudar an o Debleskro baro kheer, hoi his kerdo dran kutch pesso than, kowa djas paash an dui kotja fun pral bis tele." 
Mark15:39 Ko pralstuno lurdo, kai glan o Jesuseste tardo his, dikas, har o Jesus meras. Un job penas: “Tchatchepah, kau mursh his o Debleskro tchawo!”" 
Mark15:40 His ninna djuwja i kotar krik tardo, kai dikan kowa lauter. Mashkral lende his i Maria dran o gab Magdala, i Salome un i Maria, kolakre tchawe o tikno Jakobo un o Joses hi." 
Mark15:41 Kolla his leha, har job an o them Galilea his, un dan leske chapen un pipen. Un bud wawar djuwja his koi, kolla, kai leha khetne an o foro Jerusalem djan." 
Mark15:42 Har i rati was glan o Debleskro diwes," 
Mark15:43 was o Josef. Kowa his dran o foro Arimatia, un his jek kol pralstune biboldendar, kolen penepaske his. Un job dikas ninna ap o Debleste, te well ko tsiro, kai hakeno dikell, kai o Dewel o baro rai hi. O Josef las pes khetne, djas pash o Pilateste, un mangas lestar, te dell lo les o mulo Jesuses." 
Mark15:44 O Pilato kras bare jaka, har job shunas, kai o Jesus jaake sik meras. Job das ko pralstuno lurdes gole un putchas lestar, har rah job mulo hi." 
Mark15:45 Un har job kowa o pralstuno lurdestar shunas, penas lo o Josefeske, te nai lell lo o mulo Jesuses." 
Mark15:46 O Josef ginas i plachta, las o Jesuses o trushelestar tele, tchiwas les an koi plachta, un paskras les an i mulengro kheer, hoi his dren dino an i baro bar. Kote glan tchiwas lo i baro bar." 
Mark15:47 I Maria dran o gab Magdala un i Maria, koi dai o Josestar, dikan, kai o Jesus tchiddo was." 
Mark16:1 Har o Debleskro diwes trujel his, djan i Maria dran Magdala un i Maria, koi dai o Jakobestar, un i Salome un ginan djet, hoi sungella mishto, te makenn le les dren." 
Mark16:2 Sik taissarlake pal o Debleskro diwes djan jon pash o mulengro kheer, har o kham pre djas." 
Mark16:3 Un jon rakran mashkral pende: “Koon lell menge ko bar krik, hoi glan o mulengro kheer tardo hi?”" 
Mark16:4 Kowa his i baro bar. Un har jon pash ko mulengro kheer wan, dikan le, kai ko bar krik lino was." 
Mark16:5 Un jon djan an o mulengro kheer dren. Kote dikan le i terno murshes ap i tchatchi rig beshdo, koles his trul peste i lengsto bijalo ripen. Un jon trashan." 
Mark16:6 Job penas ap lende: “Ma trashenn! Tumer rodenn o Jesuses dran Nazaret, kai was ap o trushel dino. Job stas i mulendar pre. Job hi gar kate. Dikenn kote, kai job tchiddo his." 
Mark16:7 Kanna djan pash leskre malende! Penenn lenge un o Petreske, kai djal job glan tumende an o them Galilea! Kote dikenn tumer les, har job les tumenge penas.”" 
Mark16:8 Un jon djan dran ko mulengro kheer win, un nashan penge. Jon trissan i trashatar un penan kekeske tchomone, jaake baro his lengri daar." 
Mark16:9 Har o Jesus i mulendar pre stas, sik taissarlake pal o Debleskro diwes, his i Maria dran Magdala koi ersti, kolatar mukas lo pes te dikell. Joi hi koja, kolatar job glan i tsiro efta bengen win tradas." 
Mark16:10 Un joi djas pash kolende, kai djan o Jesuseha, un kolengro dji kanna dukas, un kai rowan pral leste. Un joi penas lenge, te dikas li les." 
Mark16:11 Un har jon shunan, kai job djiwella, un kai dikas li les, patsan le kowa gar." 
Mark16:12 Pal kowa mukas job pes dui wawar peskre malendar te dikell, kai his ap o drom glan o foro. Pash lende dikas lo wawartchandes win har jon les prindjran." 
Mark16:13 Un kolla dui djan pale, un penan les kol wawar malenge. Kolen patsan le witar gar." 
Mark16:14 Koi pre, har kol deesh-te-jek pash o chapen beshdo his, mukas lo pes lendar te dikell un tchingras ap lende, kai hi lengre djia har barra, un te patsan le gar kolenge, kai les dikan, har job i mulendar pre stas." 
Mark16:15 Un job penas ap lende: “Djan pash i tsele menshende ap i phub un sikrenn hakeneste miro drom!” 
Mark16:16 “Koon patsell ap mande un well taufedo, kowa djal gar nashedo. Koon gar ap mande patsella, kowa djal nashedo!" 
Mark16:17 Kolla, kai patsenn ap mande, krenn baro koowa an o Debleskri soor. An miro lab tradenn le bengen i menshendar win, un rakrenn an wawar rakepen." 
Mark16:18 Jon te lenn sapa an pengre wasta, un te pijenn le i pipen, kai nai merenn le, palle wenn le gar nasselo. Ap i nasslende tchiwenn le i wasta pre. Un kolla wenn sasto.”" 
Mark16:19 Har o rai Jesus jaake lentsa rakras, was lo pral an o bolepen hadedo, un beshas pes ap o Debleskri tchatchi rig." 
Mark16:20 Un jon djan, te penenn le i menshenge o latcho lab o Jesus Kristestar an hake gaba un forja. Un o rai Jesus his pash lende peskri sorjah, un kras baro koowa, kai nai krell kek mensho. Un jaake dikan i menshe, kai leskro lab tchatcho hi." 
Luke1:1 Latcho Theofilo, bud menshe tchinan an i liil, hoi o Dewel mashkral mende kras." 
Luke1:2 Jon tchinan pre, hoi kolla penan, kai kote pashel his un kowa lauter dikan." 
Luke1:3 Un me ninna putchom i menshendar har kowa lauter his, te djinap kowa lauter mishto. Doleske kamau tuke kowa jaake pre te tchinell, har kowa tchatchepah his." 
Luke1:4 Jaake haiweh tu, kai lauter tchatcho hi, hoi penan le tuke." 
Luke1:5 Ap kau tsiro, kai o Herodes o baro rai pral o them Judea his, djiwas i rashai. Kowa his jek kol rashajendar, kai kharan pen pal o rashai Abia. Leskro lab his Zachari. Un leskri romni kharas Elisabet. Joi hi o Aroneskre menshendar" 
Luke1:5 Ap kau tsiro, kai o Herodes o baro rai pral o them Judea his, djiwas i rashai. Kowa his jek kol rashajendar, kai kharan pen pal o rashai Abia. Leskro lab his Zachari. Un leskri romni kharas Elisabet. Joi hi o Aroneskre menshendar" 
Luke1:6 O Zachari un i Elisabet his latcho an o Debleskre jaka. Un jon shunan ap o Debleste, un kran lauter, hoi an o Debleskro lab tchinlo his." 
Luke1:7 Len his kek tchawe. Joi nai las kek. Un jon dui his phuro. 
Luke1:8 His i tsiro, kai budran kol rashaja an o Debleskro baro kheer, kolendar o Zachari jek his. Un har pash lende jaake hi, rodan le les win, te djal job an o Debleskro baro kheer, te chatchrell lo kasht o Debleske, hoi shukar sungella." 
Luke1:9  
Luke1:10 Un ap ko tsiro, har chatchras job ko kasht, hoi shukar sungella, his bud menshe win tardo, un mangan o Debles an." 
Luke1:11 Ap jek kopo his o Debleskro bolepaskro tardo ap i tchatchi rig pash o Debleskro sonakaskro bob, kai o Zachari o kasht chatchrell." 
Luke1:12 Har o Zachari les dikas, las lo traash lestar." 
Luke1:13 Koi penas o bolepaskro ap leste: “Ma traash, Zachari! O Dewel shunas tut, har tu mangal lestar, te well tumen i ternepen. Tiri romni Elisabet lella i mursh tchawes. Un koles dess tu ko lab Johanni." 
Luke1:14 Un tiro dji stella i bachtjatar. Un bud menshe wenna bachteles pral ko ternepen. 
Luke1:15 Un job wella bares glan o Debleskre jaka. Mool un wawar sorelo pipen pijell job gar. Un har job gomme gar boldo hi, hi lo pherdo Debleskro Ducho." 
Luke1:16 Un job anell bud menshen an Israel pash o Debleste. 
Luke1:17 Un job hi pherdo Debleskri soor jaake har o Elija, un job krell i drom pre o Debleske. Un job krella, te lenn i dada pale i dji pengre tchawenge. Un kolla, kai shunan gar ap o Debleste, kolen anell job pale ap o tchatcho drom. Un jaake krell lo, te hi i menshen djia, kai pre hi lengro Debleske.”" 
Luke1:18 O Zachari penas ap o bolepaskro: “Har nai djinau me, kai tiro tchatcho hi? Me hom i phuro mursh. Un miri romni hi ninna phuro.”" 
Luke1:19 O bolepaskro penas ap leste: “Me hom o Gabrijel, un me hom glan o Debleste tardo. O Dewel bitchras man pash tute, te penap tuke kowa." 
Luke1:20 Ap o tchatcho tsiro well kowa jaake, har tuke penom. Tu patsal mire laba gar, un doleske lell o Dewel tiro rakepen jaake rah krik, bis te well ko diwes, kai kowa lauter wella.”" 
Luke1:21 Un i menshe dikan ap o wudar an o Debleskro baro kheer, un djinan gar, hoske o Zachari jaake rah an o Debleskro baro kheer atchella." 
Luke1:22 Un har job kote win was, nai rakras lo buder gar. Job hadas peskro wast, te sikrell lo lende, te nai rakrell job buder gar. Koi pre dikan i menshe, kai o Dewel rakras leha an o Debleskro baro kheer." 
Luke1:23 Un har kol diwessa trujel djan, kai job an o Debleskro baro kheer budras, djas lo khere." 
Luke1:24 Un palle was leskri romni Elisabet an wawar koowa, un khatras pes pantch tchon glan i menshengre jaka. Un joi penas:" 
Luke1:25 “O Dewel dikas latches ap mande un kras, te well man i ternepen ap ko tsiro, har job kamas, un las miri ladj mandar krik.”" 
Luke1:26 Ap ko tsiro har i Elisabet o shobto tchon an wawar koowa his, bitchras o Dewel o bolepaskres, o Gabrijeles, pash i terni tchate. Lakro lab his Maria. Joi djiwas an o foro Nazaret. Kowa hi i foro an o them Galilea. Un kolakro pirno kharas Josef. O Josef his o Davideskre menshendar." 
Luke1:27  
Luke1:28 Un o Gabrijel was pash late an o kheer un penas: “Latcho diwes, Maria! O Dewel hi tuha! Job dikas latches ap tute.”" 
Luke1:29 Joi tapras i daar, har job jaake rakras, un penas peske: “Hoi penell job koi?”" 
Luke1:30 Un o bolepaskro penas ap late: “Ma traash, Maria! O Dewel hi tuke latcho." 
Luke1:31 Shun, tu weh an wawar koowa, un leh i tchawes. Koles dess tu o lab Jesus." 
Luke1:32 Kowa well i baro rai. Job well kharedo Debleskro tchawo. Un o Dewel krell lestar i baro rai pral Israel, jaake har jek leskre phurendar, o David, o baro rai his." 
Luke1:33 Un job atchell baro rai pral o Jakobeskre menshende hako tsiro. Un les hi penepaske pral lauter un hakeneste. Kowa atchell jaake hako tsireske.” 
Luke1:34 Koi penas i Maria ap o bolepaskro: “Har djal kowa? Man hi kek mursh.” 
Luke1:35 O bolepaskro penas ap late: “O Debleskro Ducho un leskri soor well pral tute. Doleske well o ternepen o Deblestar un well Debleskro tchawo kharedo. 
Luke1:36 Shun, i Elisabet, kai tire menshendar hi, hi an wawar koowa an o shobto tchon. Joi hi phuri un latar well penlo, kai lell li nai kek tchawe." 
Luke1:37 O Dewel nai krell halauter.” 
Luke1:38 Koi penas i Maria: “Me kamau o Debleske koi te well. Lauter te well jaake, har tu penal.” Koi djas job peske." 
Luke1:39 Pal i tikno tsiro djas i Maria jaake sik har djala an i foro an o pralstuno them Judea. 
Luke1:39 Pal i tikno tsiro djas i Maria jaake sik har djala an i foro an o pralstuno them Judea. 
Luke1:40 Un joi djas an o Zachareskro kheer, un penas: “Latcho diwes, Elisabet!”" 
Luke1:41 Har i Elisabet kowa shunas, stas o ternepen an late. Un i Elisabet was pherdo Debleskro Ducho," 
Luke1:42 un das bares gole: “Sharedi weh tu mashkral i tsele djuwjende, un sharedo well o ternepen an tute!" 
Luke1:43 Har djal kowa, te well koi dai miro rajestar pash mande?" 
Luke1:44 Har me tut shunom, stas o ternepen i bachtjatar an mande." 
Luke1:45 Bachteli hal tu! Tu patsal, te well kowa jaake, hoi o Dewel tuke penas.”" 
Luke1:46 Un i Maria penas: “Me sharau mo Debles. 
Luke1:47 Un miro dji dell gole i bachtjatar pral mo Debleste. Job hi ap miri rig. 
Luke1:48 Me hom gar moldo, te dikas o Dewel jaake latches ap mande. Un kanna sharenn man i tsele menshe. Un lengre tchawe penenna mandar, kai o Dewel man bachteles kras." 
Luke1:49 Baro koowa kras job ap mande. Les hi i tseli soor, un leskro lab hi bareder har hako wawar lab." 
Luke1:50 Job kras peskro dji pre kol phurenge un kolengre tchawenge, lauterenge, kai shunenn ap leste, un darenn lestar." 
Luke1:51 Un job hadas peskri soreli mussi, un tradas kolen krik, kai kran pen kokres bares." 
Luke1:52 Job las i soor i bare rajendar krik, te well len buder tchi penepaske, un hadas i tiknen, te wenn le baro." 
Luke1:53 Kolen, kai bok his, das job te chal. Un kol brawelen bitchras lo krik. Un jon nai lan tchi peha." 
Luke1:54 Un job bistras gar peskro budepaskres, o Israel, un kras peskro dji leske pre," 
Luke1:55 jaake har penas lo mare phurenge, o Abrahameske un leskre tchawenge, te well lo lenge latcho hako tsireske.”" 
Luke1:56 I Maria atchas triin tchon pash i Elisabet. Un palle djas li khere. 
Luke1:57 Un ko tsiro was, kai las i Elisabet i ternepen. Un kowa his i tchawo." 
Luke1:58 Lakre menshe un kolla, kai djiwan trul late, shunan kowa, un wan bachteles lah pral ko baro latchepen, hoi o Dewel kras ap late." 
Luke1:59 Pal ochta diwessa wan le, te tchinenn le o ternepen ap o mass. Un jon kaman les ko lab Zachari te dell, jaake har leskro dad kharella." 
Luke1:60 Leskri dai penas: “Na-a! Job hunte lell ko lab Johanni.” 
Luke1:61 Penan le ap late: “Kek tire menshendar kharell jaake.” 
Luke1:62 Un jon sikran i wastentsa ap leskro dad, te penell kowa, har ko ternepen hunte kharell." 
Luke1:63 Un job kamas, te anenn le leske tchomone, kai nai tchinas job pre. Un job tchinas: “Job kharell Johanni.” Koi kran lauter bare jaka." 
Luke1:64 Ap jek kopo nai rakras o Zachari pale, un sharas o Debles." 
Luke1:65 Un i traash was ap lauterende, kai trul lende djiwan. Un i tsele menshe, hoi an o pralstuno them Judea djiwan, rakran pral kowa." 
Luke1:65 Un i traash was ap lauterende, kai trul lende djiwan. Un i tsele menshe, hoi an o pralstuno them Judea djiwan, rakran pral kowa." 
Luke1:66 Un lauterenge djas kowa an o dji, kai kowa shunan. Un jon penan: “Hoi well dran kau ternepen?” Un lauter patsan, kai o Debleskri soor ap o tchaweste tchiddo hi." 
Luke1:67 Un leskro dad Zachari was pherdo Debleskro Ducho, un penas kolla laba, hoi o Dewel an leste tchiwas:" 
Luke1:68 “Sharas o baro Debles! Job hi o Israeleskro Dewel! Job was pash mende, un las men dran mari bibacht win." 
Luke1:69 Job bitchras menge jek soreles, te lell job men dran o tchilatchepen win. Un kawa wella o Davideskre menshendar." 
Luke1:70 Glan i rah tsiro penan i Debleskre rakepangre," 
Luke1:71 te lell men o Dewel dran i wasta kolendar win, kai kamenn men te marell, awa, te lell lo men dran i wasta kolendar win, kai men gar kamenna." 
Luke1:72 Les his i baro dji mare phurenge un bistras gar kowa, hoi job lentsa an o phuro tsiro win kras un peskro wast pre das." 
Luke1:73 Glan maro dadeste, o Abrahameste, das job pes sowel," 
Luke1:74 te lell lo men dran i tchilatche wasta win, te budrah nai leske, un trashah buder gar," 
Luke1:75 jaake te djiwas mer leske i djudjo un latcho djijeha jaake rah, har djiwah." 
Luke1:76 Un tu miro tchawo, tu weh ninna i Debleskro rakepaskro. Un tu djah glan o Debleste, un kreh leske i drom pre, te well lo nai pash i menshende." 
Luke1:77 Leskre menshende sikreh tu, har nai well lengri doosh krik lino, jaake te djan le gar nashedo." 
Luke1:78 Maro Debles hi i baro dji menge. Leskro kamlepen well pash mende. Kowa hi har o kham, hoi djal pre ap o bolepen," 
Luke1:79 un well diklo kolendar, kai hi len traash o merepastar. Kai bari momeli anell men ap o drom, kai wella o Debleskri bacht ap mende.”" 
Luke1:80 O Johanni was baro, un haiwas hako diwes feteder, hoi o Dewel kamella. Un job djiwas an o mulo them jaake rah, bis te was ko diwes, kai job glan i menshende an Israel rakras." 
Luke2:1 Ap ko tsiro mukas o baro rai Augusto an o foro Rom te penell: “Tchinenn i laba i tsele menshendar an mire themma pre!” 
Luke2:2 Kowa his o ersto kopo, kai tchinan le i laba i tsele menshendar an i liil dren. Un kowa his ap ko tsiro, kai o Kwirinio o pralstuno his pral o them Syria." 
Luke2:3 Un halauter djan an pengre forja un gaba, kai lengre phure boldo wan, te mukenn le pengre laba pre te tchinell." 
Luke2:4 Un o Josef djas peskri pirnjah, i Maria, dran o foro Nazaret, hoi an o them Galilea tchiddo hi. Un jon djan an o foro Betlehem an o them Judea, te mukenn le kote pengre laba pre te tchinell. An ko foro his o baro rai David glan i rah tsiro boldo. Un o Josef his o Davideskre menshendar. I Maria his ap ko tsiro an wawar koowa." 
Luke2:4 Un o Josef djas peskri pirnjah, i Maria, dran o foro Nazaret, hoi an o them Galilea tchiddo hi. Un jon djan an o foro Betlehem an o them Judea, te mukenn le kote pengre laba pre te tchinell. An ko foro his o baro rai David glan i rah tsiro boldo. Un o Josef his o Davideskre menshendar. I Maria his ap ko tsiro an wawar koowa." 
Luke2:5  
Luke2:6 Har jon an kau foro wan, was i Mariake ko tsiro, te lell li o tchawes." 
Luke2:7 Un lat was i tchawo. Un joi tchiwas pherne trul leste, un tchiwas les kote dren, kai o chapen i viechenge dren tchiddo wella. An i kertchima his lenge kek tchiben." 
Luke2:8 Glan o foro Betlehem dan i bakrengre jak ap pengre bakre an koi rat. 
Luke2:9 Ap jek kopo his glan lende o Debleskro bolepaskro tardo. Un o Debleskro railepen his trul lende. Un i bari daar was ap lende. 
Luke2:10 Un o bolepaskro penas ap lende: “Ma darenn! I bari bacht well ap tumende, un ap i tsele menshende." 
Luke2:11 Kau diwes was tumenge an o foro Betlehem kowa boldo, kai lell tumen dran o tchilatchepen win. Job hi ko baro rai, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job." 
Luke2:12 Un ap kowa dikenn tumer, koon o ternepen hi: Job hi pandlo an i pherne, un kote dren tchiddo, kai o chapen i viechenge dren tchiddo wella.”" 
Luke2:13 Ap jek kopo his pash ko bolepaskro bud wawar bolepangre. Un jon sharan o Debles, un penan:" 
Luke2:14 “Baro hi o Debleskro railepen an o bolepen! O Debleskri bacht well ap i phub. Job dikell latches ap i menshende.” 
Luke2:15 Un palle djan i tsele Debleskre bolepangre pale an o bolepen. Un i bakrengre penan jek ap o wawareste: “Awenn, djas an o foro Betlehem, te dikas, hoi o Dewel menge penas!”" 
Luke2:16 Un i bakrengre nashan sik an o foro, un hatsan i Mariat un o Josefes. Un o ternepen his koi dren tchiddo, kai o chapen i viechenge dren tchiddo wella." 
Luke2:17 Har jon kowa dikan, penan le lauterenge ko lab, hoi lenge o bolepaskro pral kau ternepen penas." 
Luke2:18 Un lauter kran bare jaka, har jon shunan, hoi i bakrengre lenge penan." 
Luke2:19 I Maria rikras kol tsele laba an peskro dji un mukas len an lakro shero trujel te djal. 
Luke2:20 Un i bakrengre djan pale pash pengre bakre. Un jon sharan o Debles o tselo djijestar pral kowa, hoi jon shunan un dikan. Lauter kowa his jaake, har o bolepaskro lenge penas." 
Luke2:21 Har ochta diwessa trujel his, un o ternepen ap o mass tchinlo was, dan le les o lab Jesus. Kau lab penas o bolepaskro i Mariake, har joi gomme gar an wawar koowa his." 
Luke2:22 Star-deesh diwessa his i Maria pale-tchiddo, jaake har o Mose kowa an peskro liil tchinas. Pal kowa anan o Josef un i Maria kol ternepas an o Debleskro baro kheer an o foro Jerusalem, te denn le les an o Debleskro wast." 
Luke2:23 An o Moseskre lila hi ninna tchinlo: O phureder tchawo, kai boldo wella, hi o Debleske." 
Luke2:24 Un o Josef un i Maria anan dui parne tchirkle glan o Debleste, jaake har kowa an i Moseskre lila tchinlo hi, te well i djuwel pale erligo." 
Luke2:25 Ap ko tsiro djiwas an o foro Jerusalem i mursh. Leskro lab his Simeon. Kowa patsas ap o Debleste, un djiwas jaake, har o Dewel kowa kamas. Un job dikas ap ko tsiro, kai lell o Dewel i bibacht i Israeleskre menshendar krik. O Simeon his pherdo Debleskro Ducho." 
Luke2:26 Un o Debleskro Ducho penas leske, te merell job gar, bis te dikas lo ko baro rajes, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job." 
Luke2:27 Un ap ko diwes, kai anan o Josef un i Maria pengro tchawes, o Jesuses, an o Debleskro baro kheer, te denn le les an o Debleskro wast, har kowa pal o biboldengro tchatchepen jaake his, koi anas o Debleskro Ducho o Simeones ninna an o Debleskro baro kheer." 
Luke2:28 Un o Simeon las o tchawes ap i mussi, sharas o Debles, un penas:" 
Luke2:29 “Miro Dewel, miro rai, kanna nai merau me an o latchepen, jaake har tu penal." 
Luke2:30 Me dikom koles, kai tu bitchral, te lell lo i menshen dran o tchilatchepen win." 
Luke2:31 Un tu bitchral les i tsele menshenge ap i phub. 
Luke2:32 Job hi har i momeli, te sikrell lo kolen tiro drom, kai prindjrenn tut gar. Koleske sharenn jon i menshen an Israel.”" 
Luke2:33 Un o Jesuseskro dad un leskri dai kran bare jaka pral kowa, hoi o Simeon pral pengro tchaweste Jesus penas." 
Luke2:34 Un o Simeon rakras o Debleskri bacht pral lende win un penas ap i Mariate: “Pral kau tchaweste choirenn pen bud menshe an o them Israel. Ap leste sikrell pes, koon djal ap o Debleskro drom, un koon perell o Debleskro dromestar tele." 
Luke2:35 Jaake well diklo, hoi bud menshenge an o shero trujel djala. Un tire duka, Maria, pral tiro tchaweste wenn jaake, har te dell jek i charo an tiro dji.”" 
Luke2:36 An o foro Jerusalem djiwas i phuri Debleskri rakepaskretsa. Joi kharas Hanna. Lakro dad his o Penuel. Job hi kol menshendar, kai wenna pal o Asser. Efta bersha his i Hanna romedino." 
Luke2:37 Palle meras lakro rom. Un kanna his li ochta-deesh-te-star bersha phuro. Un joi his o tselo diwes un i tseli rati an o Debleskro baro kheer, te mangell li o Debles an. Un bud kope chas un pijas li tchi o Debleske." 
Luke2:38 Ap ko tsiro har i Maria un o Josef pengro tchaweha an o Debleskro baro kheer his, was li ninna kote pash lende. Un joi sharas o Debles o tselo djijeha pral ko tchaweste, un rakras kolestar ap lauterende, kai dikan ap ko tsiro, kai lell o Dewel i menshen an o foro Jerusalem dran o tchilatchepen win." 
Luke2:39 Un har i Maria un o Josef lauter jaake kran, har an o Debleskro lab tchinlo his, djan le pale an pengro foro Nazaret, hoi an o them Galilea hi." 
Luke2:40 Ko ternepen was baro un sorelo, un pherdo goswepen. Un hakeno dikas, kai o Dewel pash leste hi." 
Luke2:41 Hako bersh, har wan kol bare diwessa, kai kharenna Passa, djan i Maria un o Josef an o foro Jerusalem. Un har o Jesus deesh-te-dui bersha phuro his, lan jon les peha." 
Luke2:42  
Luke2:43 Har kol bare diwessa trujel his, un jon pale khere djan, atchas ko tchawo Jesus an o foro Jerusalem. Un leskro dad un leskri dai djinan kowa gar." 
Luke2:44 Jon patsan, kai job mashkral kol wawar menshende hi. Doleske rodan jon les jek diwes mashkral pengre menshende, un mashkral kol wawarende, kai his lentsa khetne ap o drom." 
Luke2:45 Un jon hatsan les gar. Koi djan jon pale an o foro Jerusalem, un rodan les kote." 
Luke2:46 Pal triin diwessa hatsan le les an o Debleskro baro kheer. Un job his beshdo mashkral i sikepangre. Un job shunas, hoi jon rakran, un job putchas bud lendar." 
Luke2:47 Lauter, hoi shunan, hoi job lenge penas, kran bare jaka, jaake gosewo his kau tchawo." 
Luke2:48 Un har leskro dad un leskri dai les kote dikan, atchas lenge o rakepen krik. Un leskri dai penas ap leste: “Tchawa, hoske kreh tu mentsa sawo koowa? Me un tiro dad, har rodam tut, hams i darjatar mulo.”" 
Luke2:49 Koi penas lo ap lende: “Hoske rodan tumer man? Djinenn tumer gar, te krap me kowa, hoi miro dad mandar kamella?”" 
Luke2:50 Jon haiwan gar, hoi job lenge kamas te penell." 
Luke2:51 Palle djas lo lentsa pale an o foro Nazaret, un kras lauter, hoi jon penan leske. Leskri dai rikras kol tsele laba, hoi o Jesus penas, an peskro dji." 
Luke2:52 Job was gosweder un phureder. Un o Dewel un i menshe dikan latches ap leste. 
Luke3:1 His ap ko tsiro, kai o Tiberio an o foro Rom deesh-te-pantch bersha baro rai his. Un o Pontio Pilato his o rai pral o them Judea. Un o Herodes his o rai pral o them Galilea. Un peskro phraal Filipo his o rai pral i themma Iturea un Trakonitis. Un o Lisanio his o rai pral o them Abilene." 
Luke3:1 His ap ko tsiro, kai o Tiberio an o foro Rom deesh-te-pantch bersha baro rai his. Un o Pontio Pilato his o rai pral o them Judea. Un o Herodes his o rai pral o them Galilea. Un peskro phraal Filipo his o rai pral i themma Iturea un Trakonitis. Un o Lisanio his o rai pral o them Abilene." 
Luke3:2 Un o Hannas un o Kajafas his bare rashaja. Ap ko tsiro rakras o Dewel an o mulo them ap o Johanneste. Koleskro dad his o Zachari. 
Luke3:3 Un o Johanni djas an o them pash o pani Jordan trujel, un penas i menshenge: “Mukenn tumaro tchilatcho drom! Un djan ap o Debleskro drom! Un mukenn tumen te taufrell! Un o Dewel lell tumari doosh tumendar krik.”" 
Luke3:4 Jaake tchinas o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Jesaja: Jek dell gole an o mulo them: Krenn maro Debleske o drom, te nai well lo pash i menshende! Lenn halauter krik, hoi o Debleske an o drom tchiddo hi!" 
Luke3:5 Krenn, te well haki berga tikneder! Un hadenn ko them, hoi mank i berge tchiddo hi! O bango drom te well buder gar bango! Un o djungelo drom te well mishto kerdo." 
Luke3:6 Palle dikell hakeno, har o Dewel i menshen dran o tchilatchepen win lella." 
Luke3:7 Bud menshe djan pash o Johanneste, te mukan le pen lestar te taufrell. Job penas lenge: “Tumer han sapa! Tumer nai nashenn gar glan o Debleskri choli krik, hoi wella pral i menshende." 
Luke3:8 Sikrenn i menshende, te djan tumer ap o Debleskro drom, un buder gar ap o tchilatcho drom! Ma penenn, kai o Abraham tumaro dad hi! Kowa anell tumen gar dureder. Me penau tumenge: O Dewel nai krell dran kal barra o Abrahameskre tchawen." 
Luke3:9 Tumer han har ruka, kai o tower pashel tchiddo hi, te wenn le tele dino. Hako ruk, kai well kek latcho koowa baro pre, well tele dino, un an i jag witsedo.”" 
Luke3:10 Un i menshe putchan o Johannestar: “Hoi te kras mer?” 
Luke3:11 “Te hi jekes dui gada,” penas lo, “mu dell lo jek gad koleste, kones kek hi. Un kones chapen hi, kowa dell koleste i paash, kones tchi hi.”" 
Luke3:12 Koi wan ninna bibolde pash leste, te mukenn le pen lestar te taufrell. Kolla his mursha, kai lenn kol themeskre lowe i Remarjenge dren. Jon putchan lestar: “Sikepaskro, hoi te kras mer?”" 
Luke3:13 Penas o Johanni ap lende: “Ma lenn gar budeder lowe dren, har win kerdo hi!”" 
Luke3:14 Ninna i lurde putchan lestar: “Har hi mentsa? Hoi te kras mer?” Lenge penas lo: “Ma krenn kekeske tchilatcho koowa, un lenn kekestar lowe i sorjah! Kol lowe, hoi plaissrenn i pralstune tumenge, kol lowe mukenn tumenge doha te well!”" 
Luke3:15 I menshe dikan, kai o Dewel o Johannes bitchras, un jon putchan pendar: “Hi job ko baro rai, kolestar o Dewel glan i rah tsiro penas, te well job?”" 
Luke3:16 Koi penas o Johanni ap lauterende: “Me tchiwau tumen an o pani. Jek wella, kowa hi sorleder har me. Me hom gar moldo, te krap leskre kircha pre. Job tchiwell o Debleskro Ducho ap tumende, un krell tumen djudjo, har i jag o saster djudjo krella." 
Luke3:17 Job hi har i hacho, kai rikrell i witsepaskri an peskro wast, te witsrell lo o djob pral, jaake te perell o phuss tele ap i phub. Peskro djob anell lo an peskro djobeskro kheer dren. Un o phuss chatchrell lo an i jag, hoi chatchella hako tsiro.”" 
Luke3:18 Kol labentsa, ninna bud wawar labentsa rakras o Johanni i menshenge an o dji, un sikras lende o Debleskro drom." 
Luke3:19 Un o Herodes, ko baro rai pral o them Galilea, las peskro phraleskri romjat, i Herodia, un kras wawar tchilatcho koowa. Un o Johanni penas leske: “Kowa hi tchilatcho, hoi tu kral.”" 
Luke3:20 Har o Herodes kowa shunas, tchiwas lo o Johannes an o stilepen, un anas jaake wawar doosh ap peste." 
Luke3:21 Ap ko tsiro, kai taufras o Johanni kol tsele menshen, was ninna o Jesus pash leste, un mukas pes lestar te taufrell. Un har o Jesus o Debles an-mangas, djas o bolepen pre." 
Luke3:22 Un o Debleskro Ducho was har i parno tchirklo ap leste tele. Un i rakepen dran o bolepen penas: “Tu hal miro tchawo, koles me kamau. Pral tute hom bachtelo.”" 
Luke3:23 O Jesus nai his jaake trijanda bersha phuro, har job i menshenge o Debleskro lab penas. I menshe patsan, kai o Josef leskro dad hi. O Josefeskro dad his o Eli." 
Luke3:24 Koleskre phure his jek pal o wawar: o Matat, o Levi, o Melki, o Jannai, o Josef," 
Luke3:25 o Matatias, o Amos, o Nahum, o Hesli, o Naggai," 
Luke3:26 o Mahat, o Matatias, o Shimi, o Josech, o Joda," 
Luke3:27 o Johanan, o Resa, o Serubbabel, o Shealtijel, o Neri," 
Luke3:28 o Melki, o Addi, o Kosam, o Elmadam, o Er," 
Luke3:29 o Josua, o Elijeser, o Jorim, o Matat, o Levi," 
Luke3:30 o Simeon, o Juda, o Josef, o Jonam, o Eljakim," 
Luke3:31 o Melea, o Menna, o Mattata, o Natan, o David," 
Luke3:32 o Isai, o Obed, o Boas, o Salmon, o Nason," 
Luke3:33 o Amminadab, o Admin, o Arni, o Esrom, o Perez, o Juda," 
Luke3:34 o Jakob, o Isaak, o Abraham, o Terach, o Nahor," 
Luke3:35 o Serug, o Regu, o Peleg, o Eber, o Shelach," 
Luke3:36 o Kainan, o Arpachsad, o Sem, o Noah, o Lamech," 
Luke3:37 o Metuselach, o Henoch, o Jered, o Mahalalel, o Kenan," 
Luke3:38 o Enosh, o Set, o Adam. Kowa was o Deblestar." 
Luke4:1 Un o Jesus his pherdo Debleskro Ducho. Un job mukas o them pash o pani Jordan. Un o Debleskro Ducho anas les an o mulo them. 
Luke4:2 Kote atchas lo star-deesh diwessa. Un o beng was pash leste, te anell lo les o Debleskro dromestar tele. An kol diwessa chas o Jesus tchi. Un har kol diwessa trujel his, his les bok." 
Luke4:3 Un o beng penas ap leste: “Te hal tu o Debleskro tchawo, pen ap ko bar, te well lestar i kotar maro!”" 
Luke4:4 Koi penas o Jesus: “An o Debleskro lab hi tchinlo: O maro kokres rikrell i menshes gar djido.” 
Luke4:5 Palle anas les o beng ap i berga, un sikras leste ap jek kopo i tsele themma ap i phub." 
Luke4:6 Un o beng penas leske: “Kol tsele themma un lengro brawlepen kamau me tute te dell. Kawa lauter hi miro, un me dau kowa koneste me kamau." 
Luke4:7 Tu te mangeh man an, palle dau me lauter tute.”" 
Luke4:8 Koi penas o Jesus: “An o Debleskro lab hi tchinlo: Tu mangess o Debles an, – job hi tiro rai, – un wess leske kokres koi!”" 
Luke4:9 Pal kowa anas les o beng an o foro Jerusalem, un tchiwas les ap o Debleskro baro kheer pral pre, un penas ap leste: “Te hal tu o Debleskro tchawo, muk tut tele te perell!" 
Luke4:10 An o Debleskro lab hi tchinlo: O Dewel penas ap pengre bolepangre, te denn le jak ap tute." 
Luke4:11 Un jon hidjrenn tut pengre wastentsa, te dukress tire pire gar ap i barra!”" 
Luke4:12 Koi penas o Jesus ap o bengeste: “O Debleskro lab penella: Rike o Debles gar dineleske, te sikrell lo tut, har sorelo job hi!”" 
Luke4:13 Har o beng dikas, kai o Jesus gar kras, hoi job kamas, mukas job lestar i tsiro tele." 
Luke4:14 Un o Jesus djas pale an o them Galilea. Un o Debleskri soor his an leste. Un an i tsele gaba un forja, kai kote his, shunan le lestar." 
Luke4:15 Un job djas an i biboldengre kangria un sikras i menshende o Debleskro drom. Un hakeno sharas les. 
Luke4:16 Un job was an o foro Nazaret, kai job baro was. Ap o Debleskro diwes djas lo an i biboldengri kangri, har job kowa hako Debleskro diwes kras. Un job stas pre, te drawerell lo an o Debleskro lab." 
Luke4:17 Koi dan le les ko liil, hoi o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Jesaja, tchinas. Un job kras kau liil pre, un kote hatsas lo kol laba:" 
Luke4:18 O Debleskro Ducho hi ap mande. Job rodas man win, te penap i tchorwelenge o Debleskro latcho lab. Un job bitchras man, te penap kolenge, hoi stilde hi, te wenn le dran lengro stilepen win, un kolenge, kai korelo hi, te dikenn le pale, un kolenge, kai pale-tchiddo hi, te wenn le pale erligo," 
Luke4:19 un te penap i menshenge: Kawa hi ko bersh, kai o Dewel i menshen bachteles krella." 
Luke4:20 Un o Jesus kras kau liil pandlo, un das les pale, un beshas pes. Un i tsele menshe an i biboldengri kangri dikan ap leste." 
Luke4:21 Un job penas ap lende: “Kau diwes nai dikenn tumer, te hi kau lab o tchatchepen.”" 
Luke4:22 Lauter rakran lestar mishto, un leskro rakepen his lenge pherdo latchepen. Un jon kran bare jaka. Un jon penan: “Hi kawa gar o Josefeskro tchawo?”" 
Luke4:23 O Jesus penas: “Tchatchepah, tumer penenna: Dramaskro, kre tut kokres sasto! Tu kral sau baro koowa an o foro Kapernaum. Kre kowa kate ninna!" 
Luke4:24 Kawa penau me tumenge: Kek Debleskro rakepaskro well kote sharedo, kai job khere hi." 
Luke4:25 Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Ap ko tsiro, kai o Debleskro rakepaskro Elija djiwas, djiwan bud djuwja, kolengre mursha mulo hi, an o them Israel. Ap ko tsiro das triin-te-paash bersha kek brishin. Un i bari bok was an o tselo them." 
Luke4:26 Pash kol djuwjende was o Elija gar bitchedo. Job was bitchedo pash jek djuwjate an o foro Sarepta, an o them Sidon, kolakro rom mulo hi." 
Luke4:27 Dikenn ninna ap ko tsiro, kai o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Elisa, djiwas. An ko tsiro his bud menshen an o them Israel i djungelo nasslepen ap pengro mass. Kekes lendar kras o Elisa sasto. Kokres o Naaman dran o them Syria kras job sasto.”" 
Luke4:28 Un lauter kolla, kai an i biboldengri kangri his, wan chojedo ap o Jesuseste, har jon kowa lestar shunan." 
Luke4:29 Jon stan pre, un tradan les dran o foro win, anan les pral ap i berga, kai lengro foro pre tardo hi, te witsrenn le les tele." 
Luke4:30 Job rissras pes trujel un djas mashkral lende pale, un djas peske." 
Luke4:31 Un job djas an o foro Kapernaum an o them Galilea. Un hako Debleskro diwes penas lo kote i menshenge o Debleskro lab. 
Luke4:32 Un job rakras jaake bari sorjah, te kran le bare jaka pral kowa, hoi job lenge penas." 
Luke4:33 Koi his i mursh an i biboldengri kangri, kai his i beng an leste. Un kowa das bari gole:" 
Luke4:34 “Ah! Hoi kameh tu mendar, Jesus dran Nazaret? Wal tu, te maress men? Me djinau, koon tu hal: Tu hal o Debleskro mursh, koles o Dewel bitchras.”" 
Luke4:35 Un o Jesus das les trad, un penas soreles ap leste: “Ma rake un dja dran leste win!” Un ko beng, kai an ko mursheste hi, witsras ko murshes mashkral i menshende ap i phub, djas dran leste win, un dukras les gar." 
Luke4:36 Un halauter kran bare jaka. Un jon rakran jek o wawareha, un penan: “Hawe sorele laba! Job rakrell sorele labentsa ap i bengende, un jon djan dran i menshende win.”" 
Luke4:37 Un an hake gaba un forja, kai kote his, shunan le lestar." 
Luke4:38 Un har job dran i biboldengri kangri was, djas lo an o Simoneskro kheer. Un i dai o Simoneskri romjatar his ap o tchiben tchiddo, un lakro shero his tato. Un jon mangan lestar, te krell lo lat sasto." 
Luke4:39 Un job djas pash late, un penas ap ko nasslepen: “Dja tuke!” Un ko nasslepen djas latar. Un joi stas sik pre, un anas lenge i chapen." 
Luke4:40 Un o kham djas tele. Un bud menshe anan i nasselen pash leste. Kolen his bud nasslepen. Un o Jesus tchiwas peskre wasta ap hakeneste lendar, un kras len sasto." 
Luke4:41 Un dran bud menshende, kai his benga an lende, djan i benga win. Un har jon win wan, dan le gole: “Tu hal o Debleskro tchawo.” Un o Jesus das len trad, un mukas len gar te rakrell. I benga djinan, kai job ko baro rai hi, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job." 
Luke4:42 Un o wawar diwes taissarlake, djas o Jesus dran o kheer win, un djas kote, kai job kokres hi. Un bud menshe rodan les, un djan pash leste. Un jon kaman les te rikrell, te djal lo gar peske lendar." 
Luke4:43 Un har jon hatsan les, penas lo ap lende: “Me hunte djap ninna an i wawar forja, te penap i menshenge o Debleskro lab, te hi o tsiro kanna kai, kai o Dewel kamell len dran o tchilatchepen te lell, un kamell lengro rai te well. Un me wom bitchedo, te penap kowa.”" 
Luke4:44 Un o Jesus djas an o them Judea un rakras kote an i biboldengre kangria. 
Luke4:44 Un o Jesus djas an o them Judea un rakras kote an i biboldengre kangria. 
Luke5:1 His i diwes, kai o Jesus pash o baro pani Genezaret tardo his. Un bud menshe kaman te shunell o Debleskro lab." 
Luke5:2 Un job dikas dui bere pash o pani tchiddo. I matchepangre djan dran lende win, te thowenn le pengre matchengre gone." 
Luke5:3 Koi djas lo ap ko bero, hoi o Simoneske hi, un mangas les, te ulerell lo i tikno kotar ap o pani win. Un job beshas pes an ko bero, un penas i menshenge o Debleskro lab." 
Luke5:4 Un pal kowa penas lo ap o Simoneste: “An ko bero dureder ap o pani, un witsrenn tumare matchengre gone win, te taprenn tumer i matche!”" 
Luke5:5 Penas o Simon: “Sikepaskro, mer budram i tseli rat, un tapram tchi. Tu te peneh les mange, palle witsrau i matchengre gone pale win.”" 
Luke5:6 Un har jon kowa kran, tapran jon jaake bud matche, te kaman i matchengre gone paash te djal." 
Luke5:7 Un jon dan i wawar matchepangren gole, te tserdenn jon lentsa khetne i matchengre gone dran o pani win. Un jon wan, un khetne kran le kol dui bere jaake pherdo matche, te djan i bere paash tele." 
Luke5:8 Har o Simon Petro kowa dikas, peras lo glan o Jesuseste tele ap i phub, un penas: “Dja tuke mandar, miro rai! Me hom i mursh, ap kaleste doosh hi.”" 
Luke5:9 Har job dikas, te tapran le jaake bud matche, was i bari traash pral leste, un ap kolende, kai pash leste his," 
Luke5:10 ninna ap o Jakobo un ap o Johanni, kolengro dad hi o Zebedeo. Kol dui budran o Simoneha khetne. Un o Jesus penas ap o Simoneste: “Ma traash! Me krau tutar jekes, kai anell menshen pash mande.”" 
Luke5:11 Un jon anan kol bere ap o them, un mukan lauter tchiddo, un djan leha." 
Luke5:12 An jek foro his i mursh, koles his i djungelo nasslepen, kai leskro mass ap leste tele merella. Job dikas o Jesuses, un witsras pes glan leste tele ap i phub, un mangas lestar: “Rai, te kameh tu, nai kreh tu man sasto.”" 
Luke5:13 Un o Jesus tchiwas peskro wast ap leste, un penas: “Me kamau, te wess sasto.” Un ap jek kopo djas o nasslepen lestar." 
Luke5:14 Un o Jesus penas leske: “De jak, te peness kekeske, hoi me tuke krom! Dja pash o rashajeste un sike leste, kai tiro nasslepen tutar djas. Un an kowa glan o Debleste, hoi o Mose penas, te djinenn i menshe, kai tu sasto wal!”" 
Luke5:15 Un bud un budeder menshe shunan o Jesusestar. Un bud wan khetne, te shunenn le les, un te wenn le lestar sasto kerdo." 
Luke5:16 O Jesus tserdas pes lendar pale, un djas an o mulo them, un rakras kote o Debleha." 
Luke5:17 His i diwes, kai job i menshenge o Debleskro lab penas. Un bud Farisarja un biboldengre tchatchepangre his mashkral lende beshdo. Jon wan dran i themma Galilea un Judea, un dran o foro Jerusalem. Un o Jesus kras i menshen sasto an o Debleskri soor." 
Luke5:17 His i diwes, kai job i menshenge o Debleskro lab penas. Un bud Farisarja un biboldengre tchatchepangre his mashkral lende beshdo. Jon wan dran i themma Galilea un Judea, un dran o foro Jerusalem. Un o Jesus kras i menshen sasto an o Debleskri soor." 
Luke5:18 Koi wan mursha un anan i murshes ap o tchiben. Kowa nashte nashas gar. Jon kaman les an o kheer te anell, kai o Jesus hi, un glan leste te tchiwell." 
Luke5:19 An kau kheer his jaake bud menshe, te nashte anan le kol nasseles gar dren. Koi djan jon ap o kheer pral pre, lan barra win, un mukan ko tchiben mashkral i menshende glan o Jesuseste tele." 
Luke5:20 Un o Jesus dikas lengro patsepen, un penas ap ko mursheste, kai nasselo hi: “Tchawa, me lau tiri doosh tutar.”" 
Luke5:21 Un i biboldengre tchatchepangre un i Farisarja penan jek ap o wawareste: “Koon hi kau mursh, kai krell pes har o Dewel? O Dewel kokres nai lell i doosh i menshendar.”" 
Luke5:22 Un o Jesus haiwas, hoi jon mashkral pende jaake penan. Un job penas ap lende: “Hoske djal kowa an tumaro shero trujel?" 
Luke5:23 Hi kowa phareder, te penap: Me lau tiri doosh tutar krik, har te penap ap leste: Ste pre, le tiro tchiben un dja trujel?" 
Luke5:24 Kanna sikrau tumen, te hi o Menshengro Tchawes koi soor ap i phub, te nai lell lo i doosh i menshendar krik.” Palle penas o Jesus ap ko mursheste, kai nai nashell gar: “Ste pre, le tiro tchiben un dja khere!”" 
Luke5:25 Un kowa stas sik glan lauterende pre, las peskro tchiben, un djas khere un sharas o Debles." 
Luke5:26 Un kolla, kai dikan kowa, kran bare jaka, un sharan o Debles. Un i bari traash was ap lende, un jon penan: “Mer dikam kau diwes i baro koowa.”" 
Luke5:27 Koi pal djas o Jesus dran ko foro win. Un job dikas i murshes pash ko kheer beshdo, kai job i biboldendar lowe i Remarjengre rajenge dren las. Leskro lab hi Levi. Un o Jesus djas pash leste un penas: “Am, dja mantsa!”" 
Luke5:28 Un job stas pre, un mukas lauter tchiddo, un djas leha." 
Luke5:29 Un o Levi kras o Jesuseske an peskro kheer i baro chapen. Un bud kolendar, kai lan i biboldendar lowe i Remarjengre rajenge dren, chan lentsa khetne. Un ninna wawar menshe his koi." 
Luke5:30 Un i Farisarja un i biboldengre tchatchepangre his chojemen ap o Jesuseste. Un jon penan ap leskre malende: “Hoske chan tumer kolentsa, kai lenna lowe i Remarjenge dren, un kol wawarentsa, kai ninna tchilatcho koowa kran un doleske pale-tchiddo hi?”" 
Luke5:31 Koi penas o Jesus: “Kolla, kai sasto hi, djan gar pash o dramaskro. Kolla, kai nasselo hi, djan pash leste." 
Luke5:32 Me wom gar, te dap ap kolende gole, kai ap o tchatcho drom hi. Na-a! Me wom, te dap kolen gole, kai djan ap o tchilatcho drom, te mukenn le pengro tchilatcho drom, un djan ap o Debleskro drom.”" 
Luke5:33 Jon penan ap o Jesuseste: “O Johanneskre mala chan un pijenn bud kope tchi, te mangenn le o Debles. Un ninna kolla, kai shunenn ap i Farisarja, krenn kowa jaake. Hoske chan un pijenn tire mala?”" 
Luke5:34 Penas o Jesus ap lende: “Jaake rah har o bijabeskro ap i bijab hi, denn tumer chapen kolende, kai ap i bijab hi. Tumer mukenn len gar te bokell." 
Luke5:35 I tsiro wella, kai o bijabeskro lendar krik lino wella. Ap ko tsiro chan un pijenn le tchi.”" 
Luke5:36 Un job penas lenge laba, kai i khatedo tchatchepen dren hi, un penas: “Kek tchinell i kotar dran i newo ripen win, un siwell les ap i phuro ripen. Kowa krell o newo un o phuro ripen paash." 
Luke5:37 Un kek tchorell i newi mool an phure moljakre gone. I newi mool krell i phure moljakre gone paash. Un i mool nashella win. Un i gone hi ninna paash. 
Luke5:38 I newi mool well tchoredo an i newe moljakre gone. 
Luke5:39 Un kek, kai phuri mool pijas, kamell i newi mool te pijell. Job penella: Koi phuri mool hi latcheder.”" 
Luke6:1 Ap o Debleskro diwes djas o Jesus ap i kotar them, kai o djob bares was. Un leskre mala lan ko djob an i wasta, un kran ko djob pre, te chan le." 
Luke6:2 Kote his ninna Farisarja, kai penan ap lende: “Hoske krenn tumer ap o Debleskro diwes kowa, hoi hi gar pal o biboldengro tchatchepen?”" 
Luke6:3 Penas o Jesus: “Draweran tumer gar an o Debleskro lab, hoi kras o David un leskre mala, har jon bokan?" 
Luke6:4 Job djas an o Debleskro kheer un las kol mare, kai kote tchiddo hi, un chas len peskre malentsa? Pal i biboldengro tchatchepen his i mare i rashajenge kokres koi.”" 
Luke6:5 Un o Jesus penas: “Me, o Mensheskro Tchawo, hom ninna o rai pral o Debleskro diwes.”" 
Luke6:6 Un ap i wawar Debleskro diwes djas o Jesus an i biboldengri kangri, te penell lo kote i menshenge o Debleskro lab. Un job dikas kote i murshes, koleskro tchatcho wast his bango." 
Luke6:7 I biboldengre tchatchepangre un i Farisarja dikan ap o Jesuseste, un putchan pendar: “Krell lo kau murshes ap o Debleskro diwes sasto?” Jon kaman tchomone ap leste pre te anell, te anenn le les nai glan i tchatchepangre." 
Luke6:8 O Jesus haiwas, hoi an lengro shero trujel djas. Un job penas ap ko mursheste, koles i bango wast hi: “Ste pre un am kai!” Un job stas pre, un djas pash leste." 
Luke6:9 Penas o Jesus ap lende: “Me putchau tumendar: Nai krah mer latcho koowa ap o Debleskro diwes pal maro tchatchepen? Nai krah mer i menshen sasto ap o Debleskro diwes? Nai mukah mer len te merell?” 
Luke6:10 Un job dikas ap kolende, kai trul leste tardo his, un penas ap kau mursheste: “Sike tiro wast!” Un job sikras peskro wast, un ko wast was sasto." 
Luke6:11 Koi wan jon chojedo ap o Jesuseste, un rakran khetne, hoi jon o Jesuseha nai krans." 
Luke6:12 His i diwes, kai djas o Jesus ap i berga, te rakrell lo o Debleha. Un job atchas i tseli rat un rakras leha." 
Luke6:13 Har diwes was, das lo peskre malende gole, un rodas deesh-te-dujen lendar win, te wenn le leskre bitchepangre." 
Luke6:14 Un kolla his: O Simon, – koleste das job ninna o lab Petro, un leskro phraal Andreas, o Jakobo, un o Johanni, o Filipo, o Bartolomeo," 
Luke6:15 o Mateo, o Thomas, o Jakobo, koleskro dad hi o Alfeo, un o Simon, kai hi kol menshendar, kai kharenna Zelotarja" 
Luke6:16 un o Judas Iskariot, ko phukepaskro." 
Luke6:17 Pal kowa djas o Jesus lentsa i berga tele. Un jon wan ap i buchlo kotar them. Koi his bud kolendar khetne, kai leske palla djan, un ap leste shunan. Ninna bud wawar menshe his kote. Un kolla wan dran o tselo them Judea un dran o foro Jerusalem, ninna dran o them, kai i forja Tirus un Sidon tchiddo hi." 
Luke6:17 Pal kowa djas o Jesus lentsa i berga tele. Un jon wan ap i buchlo kotar them. Koi his bud kolendar khetne, kai leske palla djan, un ap leste shunan. Ninna bud wawar menshe his kote. Un kolla wan dran o tselo them Judea un dran o foro Jerusalem, ninna dran o them, kai i forja Tirus un Sidon tchiddo hi." 
Luke6:18 Kolla wan lauter, te shunenn le o Jesuses te rakrell, un kaman sasto te well. Ninna lauter kolla wan sasto, kai his i beng an lende." 
Luke6:19 I tsele menshe kaman les an te taprell. I bari soor was dran leste, un kras lauteren sasto." 
Luke6:20 Un o Jesus dikas ap peskre malende un penas: Bachtele han tumer tchorwele! Tumer djiwenna o Debleha khetne an o bolepen un lenn leskro brawlepen. 
Luke6:21 Bachtele han tumer, kai kanna bokenna. Tumer wenna tchalo. Bachtele han tumer, kai kanna rowenna. Tumer san pale." 
Luke6:22 Bachtele han tumer, te wenn i menshe chojedo ap tumende, un tchiwenn tumen pale, un praassenn tumen, un rakrenn tchilatches pral tumende, un kowa lauter krenn le doleske, te patsenn tumer ap o Menshengro Tchaweste!" 
Luke6:23 Awenn bachteles ap ko diwes, un khelenn i bachtjatar! O Dewel dell tumen i baro brawlepen an o bolepen. Kowa, hoi i menshe kanna tumentsa krenna, kowa kran ninna lengre phure ap o Debleskre rakepangre an o phuro tsiro." 
Luke6:24 Bibacht well ap tumende, kai kanna brawelo han. Tumer lenna tchi buder." 
Luke6:25 Bibacht well ap tumende, kai kanna tchalo han. Tumer bokenna. Bibacht well ap tumende, kai kanna sana. Tumer rowenna, un denn gole." 
Luke6:26 Bibacht well ap tumende, te rakrenn i tsele menshe tumendar latches. Kolengre phure rakran ninna latches pral i chochene rakepangre, kai penan, te wan le o Deblestar, un wan gar lestar." 
Luke6:27 Tumer, kai man shunenna, tumenge penaua: Awenn latches kolenge, kai hi tchilatcho ap tumende! Krenn kolenge latchepen, kai hi chojedo ap tumende!" 
Luke6:28 Penenn kolenge latche laba, kai tumen koshenna! Mangenn o Debles kolenge, kai dukrenn tumen!" 
Luke6:29 Kowa, kai das tut ap jek tcham, koleske rike i wawar tcham ninna koi, te dell lo tut! Te lell jek tutar tiri plaashka, de les ninna tiro gad!" 
Luke6:30 De hakenes, kai tutar mangella! Un te lell jek tutar tchomone, hoi tiro hi, ma mang les pale!" 
Luke6:31 Lauter, hoi tumer kamenna, te krenn i menshe tumenge, kowa krenn tumer lenge ninna!" 
Luke6:32 Te wenn tumer latches kolenge, kai hi latches ap tumende, patsenn tumer, kai sharell tumen o Dewel? Na-a! Ninna i tchilatche hi latches ap pengre malende." 
Luke6:33 Te krenna tumer kolenge latchepen, kai tumenge latchepen kran, patsenn tumer, kai sharell tumen o Dewel? Na-a! Ninna i tchilatche krenn kolenge latchepen, kai lenge latchepen kran." 
Luke6:34 Tumer te patsenn tumare lowe win ap kolende, kai denn tumen kol lowe pale, patsenn tumer, kai sharell tumen o Dewel? Na-a, ninna i tchilatche patsenn pengre lowe kolenge win, kai denn len kol lowe pale." 
Luke6:35 Me penau tumenge: Awenn latches kolenge, kai hi tchilatcho ap tumende! Krenn kolenge latchepen! Patsenn tumare lowe win ap kolende, kai tumer gar djinenna, te lenn tumer lendar tchomone pale! Te krenna tumer kowa lauter, palle dell o Dewel tumen peskro brawlepen an o bolepen, un tumer wenn o baro Debleskre tchawe. O Dewel hi ninna latches ap kol menshende, kai tchilatche hi, un kai parkrenn pen gar pash leste." 
Luke6:36 Tumen hunte well hakeneske i baro dji, jaake har o Debles hakeneske i baro dji hi." 
Luke6:37 Ma sikrenn ap o wawareskri doosh! Un o Dewel dikell gar ap tumari doosh. Ma penenn: Kowa hunte lell i phagi! Un o Dewel dell tumen kek phagi. Bistrenn ko tchilatchepen, hoi i wawar menshe ap tumende kran. Un o Dewel bistrell ko tchilatchepen, hoi tumer kran." 
Luke6:38 Denn i menshen latcho koowa! Un o Dewel dell tumen latcho koowa! Awa, job dell tumen jaake bud, te hi tumen budeder har doha. Job dell tumen jaake bud, te nai lenn kowa gar lauter. Doleske penau tumenge: Tumer te denn bud, palle dell o Dewel tumen bud. Tumer te denn gar bud, palle dell o Dewel tumen gar bud." 
Luke6:39 Un o Jesus penas lenge laba, kai i khatedo tchatchepen dren hi, un penas: Te lell jek korelo i wawar koreles ap o wast, palle perenn jon hake dui." 
Luke6:40 Jek, kai djal an o sikepaskro kheer, djinell gar budeder har o sikepaskro. Job te djinell bud, palle hi lo jaake gosewo har peskro sikepaskro." 
Luke6:41 Hoske kameh tu i tikno kasht dran tiro phraleskro jak win tserdell, un dikeh gar o baro kasht an tiro jak?" 
Luke6:42 Tu peneh ap leste: Miro phraal, am kai! Me kamau ko tikno kasht dran tiro jak win tserdell. Un tu dikeh gar o baro kasht an tiro jak. Tu chocheno! Tu kreh, har te wals tu latcheder har job. Le ko baro kasht dran tiro jak win, palle nai leh tu ko tikno kasht dran tiro phraleskro jak win!" 
Luke6:43 Kek latcho phabjengro ruk hidjrella djungele phabja. Un kek nasselo ruk hidjrella latcho koowa. 
Luke6:44 Tu prindjreh nai o ruk ap kowa, hoi ap leste baro wella. Ap i subjengro ruk wenna kek faige baro. Witar gar wenna drake baro ap subjengre burra." 
Luke6:45 Dran i latcho mensheskro dji well latcho koowa. Dran i tchilatcho dji well tchilatcho koowa. I mensho penell kowa, hoi an leskro dji dren hi." 
Luke6:46 Hoske penenn tumer: Rai, rai! ap mande un krenn gar, hoi me tumenge penaua?" 
Luke6:47 Koon well pash mande, un shunell mire laba, un krell, hoi me penaua," 
Luke6:48 kowa hi har i mensho, kai kras peske i kheer. Job hadas i phub win, bis te was lo ap i sorelo baro bar. Kote tchiwas job peskro kheer pre. Un o baro pani was, un kamas ko kheer paash te krell. Un kowa djas gar. Ko kheer his ap o sorelo bar tardo." 
Luke6:49 Koon shunell mire laba, un krell kowa gar, hoi me penaua, hi har i mensho, kai kras peskro kheer ap i tchik, un gar ap i sorelo baro bar. Un o baro pani was, un o tselo kheer peras khetne. Un i bibacht his baro." 
Luke7:1 Un pal ko rakepen djas lo an o foro Kapernaum.
