Luke18:13 Ko pale-tchiddo atchas palla tardo, un hadas gar peskro shero pre. Un job das ap peskro betch, te sikrell lo, kai leskro tchilatcho koowa khaitas les, un penas: Miro Dewel, me hom i tchilatcho mursh. Dik ap mande un ab mange latcho!”" 
Luke18:14 Un o Jesus penas: “Me penau tumenge: O Dewel dikas ap kaleste, un his leske latcho un gar ko wawareske. Kowa, kai pes bares krella, koles sharell o Dewel gar. Un kowa, kai pes gar bares krella, koles krell o Dewel bares.”" 
Luke18:15 Un i menshe anan tchawen pash leste, te tchiwell lo peskre wasta ap lende. Har peskre mala kowa dikan, tchingran le ap kol menshende." 
Luke18:16 Koi das o Jesus peskre malen gole, un penas ap lende: “Mukenn kol tchawen pash mande te well! Ma rikrenn len pale! Sawe har jon, kolen das o Dewel gole, te djiwenn le khetne leha an o bolepen." 
Luke18:17 Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Koon gar ap mande patsella har kol tchawe, kowa nai well gar ap o Debleskro drom.”" 
Luke18:18 Koi putchas lestar i pralstuno: “Latcho sikepaskro, hoi hunte krap, te dell man o Dewel o djipen, hoi gar pre-herella?”" 
Luke18:19 Penas o Jesus ap leste: “Hoske peneh tu: Latcho sikepaskro! ap mande? Kek mensho hi latcho. O Dewel kokres hi latcho. 
Luke18:20 Tu prindjreh kol deesh Debleskre laba: Romeha, ma choche tiri romjat i wawar djuwjah! Romnija, ma choche tiro romes i wawar mursheha! Ma mare kekes! Ma tchore! Ma pen chochepen pral jekeste! Dik ap tiro dadeste un ap tiri date, te djal lenge mishto!”" 
Luke18:21 Koi penas job: “Me krom kowa lauter jaake rah, har me djiwau.”" 
Luke18:22 Har o Jesus kowa shunas, penas lo ap leste: “Jek hunte kress tu budeder. Bike lauter, hoi tut hi, un de kol lowe i tchorwelende! Palle hi tut i brawlepen an o bolepen. Un am un dja mantsa!”" 
Luke18:23 Har o pralstuno kowa shunas, dukas les kowa an o dji. Les hi bud brawlepen." 
Luke18:24 Un o Jesus dikas, kai kol laba les dukan. Un job penas: “Har pharo hi i brawelenge, te wenn le ap o Debleskro drom." 
Luke18:25 Hi gar jaake pharo, te djal i baro viecho an i subjakro kand dren, har te well i brawelo ap o Debleskro drom.”" 
Luke18:26 Penan kolla, kai pash leste tardo hi, ap leste: “Te hi kowa jaake, koon nai lell o Debleskro djipen?”" 
Luke18:27 Penas lo: “Kowa hoi i menshe nai krenn gar, kowa nai krell o Dewel.”" 
Luke18:28 Koi penas o Petro: “Mer mukam lauter tchiddo un djam tuha.” 
Luke18:29 Penas o Jesus ap lende: “Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Hakeno, kai mukell peskro kheer, peskri romjat, phralen, tchawen, dades un dat, te nai budrell lo feteder o Debleske," 
Luke18:30 kowa lell an kau tsiro lauter bud kope pale. Un an ko tsiro, kai wella, dell o Dewel les o djipen, hoi gar pre-herella.”" 
Luke18:31 Un o Jesus las i deesh-te-dui ap i rig un penas lenge: “Shunenn! Mer djah kanna an o foro Jerusalem. Kote well lauter tchatcho, hoi o Debleskre rakepangre pral o Menshengro Tchaweste tchinan:" 
Luke18:32 Jon denn les an i wasta kolendar, kai kek bibolde hi. Un kolla praassenn les, denn les dawa un tchungrenn ap leste." 
Luke18:33 Jon denn les i tchupnijah, un marenn les. Un pal triin diwessa krell o Dewel les djido.”" 
Luke18:34 Leskre mala haiwan kek lab. Kowa, hoi job lenge kal labentsa kamas te penell, djas gar an lengro shero dren. Un jon djinan gar, pral hoi job rakras." 
Luke18:35 Un o Jesus djas pash o foro Jericho. Un i korelo, his pash o drom beshdo, un mangas lowe i menshendar." 
Luke18:36 Un job shunas bud menshen, kai djan ap ko drom. Koi putchas lo lendar: “Hoi djal kote?”" 
Luke18:37 Koi penan le: “O Jesus dran Nazaret djal kote.” 
Luke18:38 Koi das lo gole: “Jesus, tu Davideskro tchawo, kre tiro dji mange pre!”" 
Luke18:39 Un kolla, kai djan glan o Jesuseste ap o drom, tchingran ap ko mursheste un penan: “Muk tele un atch!” Job das budeder gole: “Jesus, Davideskro tchawo, kre tiro dji mange pre!”" 
Luke18:40 Un o Jesus atchas tardo, un penas: “Anenn les pash mande!” Un har ko mursh pash leste was, putchas o Jesus lestar:" 
Luke18:41 “Hoi kameh tu, te krap tuke?” Penas kowa: “Rai, me kamau te dikell.”" 
Luke18:42 Penas o Jesus: “Palle dik! Tiro patsepen kras tut sasto.” 
Luke18:43 Un job dikas nai pale, djas o Jesuseha, un sharas o Debles. Un halauter, kai kowa dikan, sharan o Debles ninna." 
Luke19:1 Un o Jesus djas an o foro Jericho. 
Luke19:2 Kote his i biboldo, ko his i pralstuno pral kolende, kai lenna i biboldendar lowe i Remarjenge dren. Leskro lab his Zacheo." 
Luke19:3 Job kamas o Jesuses te dikell, un nai dikas les gar. Job his tikno, un bud menshe his trul o Jesuseste." 
Luke19:4 Doleske nashas lo glan i menshende, un djas ap i ruk, te dikell lo feteder." 
Luke19:5 Un o Jesus was koi un dikas pre, un penas ap leste: “Zacheo, am sik koi tele! Kau diwes hunte wap me an tiro kheer.”" 
Luke19:6 Un o Zacheo was sik o rukestar tele, un las o Jesuses an peskro kheer dren, un his bachtelo." 
Luke19:7 Har jon kowa dikan, his jon chojemen un penan: “Pash i pale-tchiddo djal job an o kheer.”" 
Luke19:8 O Zacheo his koi tardo un penas ap o Jesuseste: “Mo rai, me dau i tchorwelende i paash lauterestar, hoi man hi. Un te chochrom jekes, dau les kanna star kope jaake bud pale.”" 
Luke19:9 Penas o Jesus ap leste: “Kau diwes las o Dewel i menshen an kau kheer dran o tchilatchepen win. Ninna kawa rom hi o Abrahameskro tchawo. 
Luke19:10 O Mensheskro Tchawo was, te rodell lo kolen, kai nashedo hi, un te anell lo kolen ap o Debleskro drom, kai ap o tchilatcho drom hi.”" 
Luke19:11 O Jesus his gar dur o forestar Jerusalem, un i menshe patsan, kai ko tsiro kanna kai hi, kai o Dewel sikrella, te hi lo o rai pral i tseli phub. Koi penas o Jesus lenge laba, kai i khatedo tchatchepen dren hi," 
Luke19:12 un penas: “I pralstuno kamas te well lo baro rai pral peskro them. Doleske djas lo pash koleste, kai hi o wast pral bud themma, te krell kowa les baro rai. Un pal kowa kamas lo an peskro them pale te djal." 
Luke19:13 Un job das deesh peskre budepangren gole, das hakeneste i sheel rupene beme, un penas: Budrenn kol lowentsa jaake rah har me gar kai hom. Un job djas peske." 
Luke19:14 I menshe an peskro them his chojedo ap leste un bitchran murshen leske palla, te penenn le leske: Mer kamah gar, te wess tu baro rai pral mende!" 
Luke19:15 Ko mursh was baro rai, un was an peskro them pale. Koi das lo kol budepangren gole, kolen job kol lowe das. Un job kamas dikell, hoi jon kol lowentsa kran." 
Luke19:16 I budepaskro was pash leste un penas: Mo rai, me budrom kol lowentsa, hoi tu man dal. Un kanna hi man deesh kope jaake bud." 
Luke19:17 Penas lo ap koleste: Kowa kral tu mishto. Tu hal o latcho budepaskro. Me tchiwom i tikno koowa an tire wasta, un tu kral i bari budi koleha. Doleske kamau, te wess tu o pralstuno pral deesh forja." 
Luke19:18 Ko duito was pash ko rajeste, un penas: Mo rai, me budrom kol lowentsa, hoi tu man dal. Un kanna hi man pantch kope jaake bud." 
Luke19:19 Ap koleste penas lo ninna: Tu weh o pralstuno pral pantch forja. 
Luke19:20 Ko triinto was un penas: Mo rai, ake, tire sheel rupene beme. Me khatrom len an i diklo." 
Luke19:21 Me darom tutar. Tut hi i dji dran bar. Tu leh, kai dal tchi. Un hoi i wawar ap i kotar phub tchiwas, leh tu lestar krik, te was kowa bares." 
Luke19:22 Ap koleste penas o rai: Tu moleh tchi. Tu hal i tchilatcho budepaskro. Tu djinal, kai hi man i dji dran bar, un kai lau, kai dom tchi, un hoi me gar an i phub tchiwom, te well kowa baro." 
Luke19:23 Hoske anal tu mire lowe gar pash kolende, kai i lowe win patsenna? Un te woms me pale, loms budeder lowe pale, har tu len dal." 
Luke19:24 Un job penas ap kolende, kai koi pashel tardo hi: Lenn kol sheel rupene beme lestar krik, un denn kol lowe koleste, kai hi les deesh kope budeder!" 
Luke19:25 Un jon penan ap o rajeste: Rai, koles hi deesh kope jaake bud!" 
Luke19:26 Koi penas o rai: Kones bud hi, kowa lell budeder. Un kowa, kai hi les gar bud, kolestar well kowa ninna krik lino." 
Luke19:27 Un job penas dureder: Anenn kolen glan mande, kai hi chojedo ap mande, un kai kaman gar, te wap baro rai pral lende, un denn len glan mire jaka temerl!”" 
Luke19:28 Har o Jesus kowa penas, djas lo glan lende ap o drom, kai djal an o foro Jerusalem." 
Luke19:29 Un job was pash kol gaba Betfage un Betani. Kal gaba his ap koi berga tchiddo, hoi kharella djeteskri berga. Un job bitchras dui peskre malendar glan-wi un penas lenge:" 
Luke19:30 “Djan an o gab koi wergel. Kote hatsenn tumer i terni esla pandlo, ap koleste his gomme kek beshdo. Pandenn lat tele, un anenn lat pash mande!" 
Luke19:31 Un te putchell jek tumendar: Hoske pandenn lat tele? penenn leske: Hi maro rajeske, te beshell job ap late.”" 
Luke19:32 Un kol dui djan an ko gab, un lauter his jaake, har o Jesus lenge penas." 
Luke19:33 Har jon koja terni esla tele pandan, putchas lendar ko mursh, koleske koi esla his: “Hoske pandenn tumer koi terni esla tele?”" 
Luke19:34 Un jon penan leske: “Hi maro rajeske, te beshell job ap late.”" 
Luke19:35 Koi anan jon koi esla pash o Jesuseste, un tchiwan pengre koola ap late. Un o Jesus beshas pes pral pre." 
Luke19:36 Ap o drom, har job an o foro Jerusalem klissas, tchiwan i menshe pengre koola ap o drom, te nashte klissas job pral wergel." 
Luke19:37 Har jon kote wan, kai djal o drom o djeteskri berga tele, dan leskre mala bari gole i bachtjatar, un sharan o Debles pral ko baro koowa, hoi job mashkral lende kras." 
Luke19:38 Un jon penan: “Sharas ko baro rajes, koles o Dewel bitchras. O Debleskri bacht well pash mende! Baro hi o Debleskro railepen an o bolepen!”" 
Luke19:39 Koi his ninna Farisarja mashkral i menshende ap o drom. Kolla penan: “Rai, pen ap tire malende, te mukenn le tele!”" 
Luke19:40 Penas o Jesus ap lende: “Me penau tumenge: Jon te rikrenn pengre muja, palle denn i barra gole.”" 
Luke19:41 Un har o Jesus pash o foro Jerusalem was, rowas lo pral i menshende an kau foro," 
Luke19:42 un penas: “Bachtelo wans tumer, te djinans tumer kau diwes, koon anell tumenge o Debleskri bacht! Tumer han korelo. Tumer dikenn les gar." 
Luke19:43 Ko bibachtelo diwes wella, kai lurde wenna dran i wawar themma. Jon tchiwenn bare barra trul tumaro foro, te wenn tumer buder gar win." 
Luke19:44 Un jon marenn tumare menshen, un denn tumare tchawen an ko foro mulo. Mo Dewel kamas tumen peskro latchepen te sikrell. Un tumer kaman gar te krenn tumaro dji leske pre. Doleske atchell kek bar ap ko wawar an kau foro.”" 
Luke19:45 Un o Jesus djas an o Debleskro baro kheer un tradas kol bikepangren win," 
Luke19:46 un penas lenge: “An o Debleskro lab hi tchinlo: O Dewel penella: Miro kheer te well i kheer, kai sharenn man i menshe un mangenn man an. Tumer kran lestar i kheer, kai i menshe chochenna un randenna.”" 
Luke19:47 Hako diwes djas o Jesus an o Debleskro baro kheer un sikras i menshende o Debleskro drom. I bare rashaja, i biboldengre tchatchepangre un i wawar pralstune rodan i drom, te marenn le les." 
Luke19:48 Jon djinan gar, har nai tapran le les. Bud menshe his trul leste, un kaman hako lab te shunell, hoi job penas." 
Luke20:1 His i diwes, kai penas o Jesus i menshenge o Debleskro lab an o Debleskro baro kheer. Un i bare rashaja un i biboldengre tchatchepangre un phureder wan pash leste," 
Luke20:2 un penan ap leste: “Pen menge, koon penas tuke, te kress tu kowa lauter? Koon bitchras tut?”" 
Luke20:3 Penas lo: “Kanna kamau tumendar ninna tchomone te putchell pral o Johanni, kowa, kai i menshen taufras:" 
Luke20:4 Bitchras o Dewel o Johannes, te taufrell lo i menshen? Bitchran i menshe les? Penenn les mange!”" 
Luke20:5 Un jon tchingran mashkral pende un penan: “Te penah mer leske: O Dewel bitchras o Johannes, palle penell lo menge: Hoske patsan tumer les gar?" 
Luke20:6 Te penah mer leske: I menshe bitchran les, witsrenn le barrentsa ap mende, te marenn le men. Jon patsenn soreles, te hi lo i Debleskro rakepaskro.”" 
Luke20:7 Un jon penan o Jesuseske: “Mer djinah les gar.” 
Luke20:8 Penas o Jesus lenge: “Jaake penau tumenge witar gar, koon man bitchras, te krap me kowa.”" 
Luke20:9 Un o Jesus penas i menshenge laba, kai i khatedo tchatchepen dren hi, un penas: “His i mursh. Koles his i kotar them. Kote tchiwas lo drakengre ruka an i phub, un patsas kau them ap i hachende, te budrenn le kote leske. Un job djas peske an i wawar them i rah tsireske." 
Luke20:10 Har ko tsiro was, te anenn le i drake dren, bitchras job i budepaskres pash i hachende, te lell lo lendar kol drake, hoi leske hi. I hache dan les kek drake. Jon dan les dawa un bitchran les krik." 
Luke20:11 Koi bitchras ko mursh i wawar budepaskres pash lende. I hache dan les kek drake. Jon dan les ninna dawa, praassan les, un bitchran les krik." 
Luke20:12 O mursh bitchras i triinto budepaskres. I hache dan les ninna ratlo, un witsran les win." 
Luke20:13 Kanna penas o rai pral o drakengro them ap peste: Hoi krap? Me bitchrau miro tchawes, koles, kai me kamau o tselo djijeha. Koles witsrenn jon gar win." 
Luke20:14 Har i hache les dikan, penan le mashkral pende: Kowa hi leskro tchawo, kai lauter lella pal peskro dadeskro merepen. Maras les, palle hi ko them maro!" 
Luke20:15 Un jon witsran les dran ko drakengro them win, un maran les. Hoi krell kanna ko rai pral ko drakengro them i hachentsa?" 
Luke20:16 Job wella, un marell kol hachen, un dell ko drakengro them i wawaren.” Har kolla kowa shunan, kai trul o Jesuseste tardo his, penan le: “Kowa wella gar jaake!”" 
Luke20:17 Un o Jesus dikas ap lende, un penas: “Hi tchinlo an o Debleskro lab: His i bar, kai i budepangre lestar penan: Kowa hi tchi moldo. Ko bar las o Dewel un tchiwas les jaake an o kheer, te rikrell lo ko tselo kheer khetne." 
Luke20:18 Koon ap kau bar perella, kowa merella. Ap koneste kau bar perella, koles dell ko bar khetne.”" 
Luke20:19 Un i biboldengre tchatchepangre un i bare rashaja haiwan, kai rakras o Jesus lendar. Un jon kaman te taprenn le les sik pal leskro rakepen, te tchiwenn le les an o stilepen. Jon trashan i menshendar. Doleske tapran le les gar." 
Luke20:20 Jon lan o Jesuses an o jak. Un jon bitchran murshen, kai kran, har te wans le latcho. Un kolla putchan bud koowa lestar, te dikenn le, hoi job penals, jaake te nai taprenn le les an leskro rakepen, un te nai denn le les an i Remarjengre wasta." 
Luke20:21 Un jaake penan le ap leste: “Sikepaskro, mer djinah, te dareh tu kekestar. Un tu peneh o tchatchepen i menshenge an o mui. Un tu sikreh lende o Debleskro drom." 
Luke20:22 Pen menge: Hi mishto pal maro tchatchepen, te das mer o themeskre lowe o baro rajeste an o foro Rom?”" 
Luke20:23 O Jesus djinas, kai jon gosewo hi, un job penas ap lende:" 
Luke20:24 “Denn man i rupeni bema. Koneskro shero un lab hi ap kai bema?” Penan le: “O shero o baro rajestar an o foro Rom!” 
Luke20:25 Penas lo lenge: “Jaake denn leste, hoi leskro hi, un denn o Debleste, hoi leskro hi!”" 
Luke20:26 Un kote glan i menshende nai tapran le les gar an leskro rakepen, un kran bare jaka pral kowa, hoi job penas, un djinan buder gar, hoi te penenn le." 
Luke20:27 Koi wan kol rashaja pash leste, kai ninna kharenna Sadduzarja. Kolla patsenn gar, kai o Dewel i mulen djido krella. Kolla putchan lestar:" 
Luke20:28 “Sikepaskro, o Mose tchinas: Te merell tiro phraal, kai romedino hi, un les hi kek tchawe, palle romedineress tu leskri romjat, te well tiro phraleske i ternepen boldo." 
Luke20:29 Koi his kanna efta phrala. Ko phureder romedineras i djuwjat. Un job meras, un les his kek tchawe." 
Luke20:30 Un ko duito romedineras lat un job meras. Un les his kek tchawe. 
Luke20:31 Un ko triinto romedineras lat un meras. Un les his kek tchawe. Un kol wawar lauter, jek pal o wawar, romedineran lat ninna. Un jon meran lauter. Un lauteren his kek tchawe." 
Luke20:32 Pal lende meras ninna koi romni. 
Luke20:33 Kanna putchah mer tutar: Ap ko tsiro, kai krell o Dewel i mulen djido, koneskri romni hi li? Hake efta his lah romedino.”" 
Luke20:34 Penas o Jesus lenge: “I menshe ap kai phub romedinerenna un mukenn pen te romedinerell. 
Luke20:35 Kol mulen, kai o Dewel djido krella, te djiwenn le pash leste, kolla romedinerenn buder gar un wenna gar romedino." 
Luke20:36 Jon merenn buder gar, un hi har i bolepangre. Jon stan i mulendar pre. Doleske hi le o Debleskre tchawe." 
Luke20:37 Ninna o Mose tchinas, kai o Dewel i mulen djido krella. Har o Mose glan o bur tardo his, hoi chatchas, penas lo ap o Debleste: Tu hal o Abrahameskro Dewel, un o Isaakeskro Dewel, un o Jakobeskro Dewel." 
Luke20:38 Un me penau tumenge: Job hi gar o Dewel kolenge, kai mulo hi. Job hi o Dewel kol djidenge. Kalla lauter djiwenn leske.”" 
Luke20:39 Koi penan i biboldengre tchatchepangre: “Rai, kowa hi tchatcho, hoi tu penal.”" 
Luke20:40 Un jon trashan, te putchenn le lestar budeder." 
Luke20:41 Koi penas o Jesus ap lende: “Har nai penenn jon, kai o baro rai, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well lo, o Davideskro tchawo hi?" 
Luke20:42 O David tchinas an peskre gilja: O Dewel penas ap miro rajeste: Besh tut ap miri tchatchi rig," 
Luke20:43 te tchiwap kolen tel tire pire, kai hi chojedo ap tute!" 
Luke20:44 Kate penell o David Rai ap leste. Har well lo nai leskro tchawo?” 
Luke20:45 Har i tsele menshe shunan, hoi o Jesus rakras, penas job ap peskre malende:" 
Luke20:46 “Denn jak! Kowa, hoi kol biboldengre tchatchepangre krenna, hi gar mishto. Len hi lengste koola ap lende, te sikrenn le, te hi le o Debleskre menshe. Te djan le an o foro, kamenn le, te penenn i menshe Latcho diwes, mo rai! ap lende. Ninna kamenn le ap i pralstune beshepangre te beshell an i biboldengri kangri un ap i feteder beshepangre pash i baro chapen." 
Luke20:47 Jon lenn i khera kol djuwjendar krik, kolengre romma mulo hi. Te mangenn le o Debles, palle rakrenn le leha i rah tsiro, te dikenn i menshe, har patslo jon hi. O Dewel rakrell i phagi pral lende win, un jon lenna i bareder phagi har i wawar.”" 
Luke21:1 Un o Jesus dikas pre un dikas, har i brawele pengre lowe an i lowengri piri an o Debleskro baro kheer dren tchiwan." 
Luke21:2 Un job dikas kote ninna i tchorweli romni, kai hi lat buder kek romes. Joi das dui tikne kotja lowe o Debleste." 
Luke21:3 Koi penas o Jesus: “Me penau tumenge: Koi romni das budeder har kol tsele wawar, kai brawelo hi." 
Luke21:4 Kol wawar dan lowe dran pengro brawlepen. Kai tchorweli romni das halauter, hoi lat hi djipaske.”" 
Luke21:5 Un i menshe, kai trul leste tardo his, penan: “Dik, o Debleskro baro kheer! Hawe shukar barra un kutch koowa jon o Debleske anan.” Koi penas o Jesus:" 
Luke21:6 “Ko tsiro wella, kai halauter, hoi tumer kate dikenna, paash djala. Kek bar atchell ap i wawareste.”" 
Luke21:7 Koi putchan jon lestar: “Sikepaskro, kaana wella kowa? Har nai dikas mer, kai hi ko tsiro kai?”" 
Luke21:8 Penas lo: “Denn jak! Mukenn tumen kekestar o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell! Koi wenna bud mursha, kai penenna: Me hom o Kristo, ko baro rai, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job! Un jon penenn ninna: O tsiro hi kai! Me penau tumenge: Ma nashenn lenge palla!" 
Luke21:9 An ko tsiro della bud baro kurepen, un i menshe hadenn pen pral pengre themeskre rajende. Ma trashenn! Ko hunte well jaake. Ko tsiro, kai i phub paash djala, well gar jaake sik.”" 
Luke21:10 Palle penas lo ap lende: “Ko tsiro wella, kai kurenn pen i pralstune pral bare themma wawar pralstunentsa. Un i menshe dran jek them marenn kolen an i wawar them." 
Luke21:11 Un kai te koi well i phub soreles trisslemen. An bud themma hi i menshen gar doha te chal, un baro nasslepen well ap lende. Un jon dikenn i baro koowa ap o bolepen, hoi krell lenge bari daar." 
Luke21:12 Glan ko tsiro, kai kowa lauter wella, lenn jon tumen palla, un taprenn tumen. Jon anenn tumen glan i tchatchepangre an i biboldengre kangria un witsrenn tumen an o stilepen. Tumer patsenn ap mande. Doleske anenn le tumen glan i bare rajende un glan i pralstunende, te rakrenn jon i phagi win pral tumende." 
Luke21:13 Jon te krenn kowa lauter tumentsa, palle rakrenn nai mandar." 
Luke21:14 Ma mukenn kowa an tumaro shero trujel te djal, hoi tumer hunte penenn kol rajenge!" 
Luke21:15 Me dau tumen ko goswepen, un penau tumenge, hoi tumer hunte penenn. Un palle djinenn le buder gar, hoi te penenn le." 
Luke21:16 Un tumaro dad un tumari dai, tumare phrala un phenja, un tumare wawar menshe phukrenn ap tumende, ninna tumare mala. Un mank tumende hi sawe, kai wenn maredo." 
Luke21:17 Hakeno hi chojedo ap tumende doleske, kai patsenn tumer ap mande." 
Luke21:18 Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Kek bal ap tumaro shero djal nashedo." 
Luke21:19 Atchenn soreles an o patsepen, un tumer lenn ko tchatcho djipen!”" 
Luke21:20 “Te dikenn tumer, kai bud lurde trul o foro Jerusalem tardo hi, palle djinenn tumer, kai jon ko foro paash krenna." 
Luke21:21 Palle hunte nashenn i tsele menshe dran o them Judea pral an i berge. Un koon an o foro hi, hunte djal jaake sik har djala dran win. Un koon win ap o them hi, hunte djal gar an o foro dren." 
Luke21:21 Palle hunte nashenn i tsele menshe dran o them Judea pral an i berge. Un koon an o foro hi, hunte djal jaake sik har djala dran win. Un koon win ap o them hi, hunte djal gar an o foro dren." 
Luke21:22 An kol diwessa well o Debleskri choli ap i menshende tele. Palle well lauter tchatcho, hoi an o Debleskro lab tchinlo hi." 
Luke21:23 Koi bibacht hi bari kol djuwjenge, kai hi an wawar koowa, ninna kolenge, kai hi len i ternepen. O Debleskri choli well pral i tsele menshende an kau them. Un len hi i pharo tsiro." 
Luke21:24 Bud wenna maredo o chareha. Wawar wenna pandlo un wenna an i wawar themma anlo. Un o foro Jerusalem well kol menshendar khetne stakedo, kai wenna dran wawar themma. Kowa djal jaake rah, har o Dewel mukell len kowa te krell.”" 
Luke21:25 “Ap o kham un ap o moonto un ap i bolepangre momlia dikenn tumer baro koowa. Pral i menshende an bud themma well i bari traash, te dikenn le, har well o baro pani diwjo un hadell pes pral un dell bari gole." 
Luke21:26 I tsele menshe ap i phub hi paash-mulo i trashatar pral kowa, hoi lauter ap lende wella. I bolepaskri soor perell khetne." 
Luke21:27 Un palle dikenn i tsele menshe o Menshengro Tchawes, har well lo ap i wolka bari sorjah un railepen." 
Luke21:28 Te dikenn tumer, har kowa lauter wella, awenn soreles un trashenn gar! I tsiro hi palle koi, kai o Dewel lell tumen dran o tchilatchepen un dran o merepen win.”" 
Luke21:29 Un o Jesus penas lenge sawe laba, kai i khatedo tchatchepen dren hi, un penas: “Dikenn ap o faigetikro ruk un ap i wawar ruka!" 
Luke21:30 Te wenn i ruka senelo, palle djinenn tumer, te well sik o nijal." 
Luke21:31 Jaake hi kowa ninna koleha, pral kowa rakrom. Te dikenn tumer, har kowa lauter wella, palle djinenn, te well ko tsiro sik, kai o Dewel peskre menshen dran o tchilatchepen win lella, un job o rai pral i tseli phub hi." 
Luke21:32 Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Kol menshe, kai an ko tsiro djiwenna, dikenn kowa lauter pengre jakentsa." 
Luke21:33 O bolepen un i phub atchenna gar. Mire laba atchenn hako tsiro.” 
Luke21:34 “Denn garda, te well tumaro dji gar pherdo phubjakro koowa, jaake te bistrenn o Debles! Pijenn tumen gar mato! Ma darenn tumaro djipaske! Denn jak, te well ko diwes gar ap jek kopo ap tumende jaake, te han tumer tapedo!" 
Luke21:35 Djinenn! Ko diwes well pral lauterende, kai djiwenna ap i phub." 
Luke21:36 Denn jak hako tsiro! Mangenn o Deblestar, te wenn tumer sorelo an o patsepen tardo, un wenn mishto win dran ko tchilatcho tsiro, hoi wella! Jaake hunte trashenn tumer gar o Menshengro Tchawestar, te well lo pale.”" 
Luke21:37 Hako diwes rakras o Jesus an o Debleskro baro kheer. I rati djas job pash koi berga, hoi kharella djeteskri berga, un atchas koi." 
Luke21:38 Taissarlake wan bud menshe an o Debleskro baro kheer, te shunenn jon, hoi o Jesus penella." 
Luke22:1 His glan kol diwessa, kai i bibolde kek maro chan, kai shutlo jarro dren hi. Kol diwessa kharenna Passa." 
Luke22:2 Un i bare rashaja un i biboldengre tchatchepangre rodan i drom, har jon nai marenn o Jesuses. Jon kaman les gar glan kol bud menshende te taprell. Kolendar daran le." 
Luke22:3 Koi djas o beng an o Judas Iskariot dren. Kowa his jek kol deesh-te-dujendar. 
Luke22:4 O Judas djas pash kol bare rashajende un pash i pralstune lurdende, un rakras kolentsa, har job nai phukrell ap leste." 
Luke22:5 Un jon his bachtelo pral kowa, un kaman les lowe te dell, te nai taprenn le o Jesuses." 
Luke22:6 “Mishto” penas o Judas, un rodas i latcho tsiro, te dell lo les an lengre wasta, jaake te djinenn i menshe kowa gar." 
Luke22:7 His an kol diwessa, kai i bibolde ko maro chana, kai kek shutlo jarro dren hi. Un ko diwes was, kai hunte marenn le i bakro hako khereske." 
Luke22:8 Koi bitchras o Jesus o Petres un o Johannes an o foro Jerusalem, un penas: “Djan an ko foro un krenn o chapen menge!”" 
Luke22:9 Un jon putchan lestar: “Kai kameh tu, te kras o chapen?”" 
Luke22:10 Penas lo ap lende: “Shunenn, te wenn tumer an o foro, palle dikenn tumer i murshes. Kowa hidjrell i khoro pani. Djan koleste palla an ko kheer, kai job dren djala!" 
Luke22:11 Kote penenn o rajeske an ko kheer: Maro sikepaskro putchell tutar: Kai hi koi isema, kai nai chau me ko bakro mire malentsa?" 
Luke22:12 Un job sikrell tumende i bari isema, pral an ko kheer. Kote hi beshepangre tardo. Kote krenn o chapen!”" 
Luke22:13 Un jon djan kote, un hatsan lauter jaake, har o Jesus lenge penas. Un jon kran o chapen." 
Luke22:14 Har ko tchatcho tsiro was, beshas job pes tele. Un kol deesh-te-dui bitchepangre beshan pen leha." 
Luke22:15 Un job penas ap lende: “Kawa chapen kamom me o tselo djijestar te chap tumentsa glan ko tsiro, kai me hunte lap bud duka ap mande." 
Luke22:16 Me penau tumenge: Me chau kau chapen buder gar jaake rah, bis te well ko tsiro, kai kowa tchatcho was, hoi kau chapen sikrella. Palle chau les tumentsa pash o Debleste an o bolepen.”" 
Luke22:17 Un o Jesus las o khoro, parkras pes pash o Debleste, un penas ap lende: “Ake, lenn un pijenn halauter kai mool!" 
Luke22:18 Me penau tumenge: Me pijau buder gar i mool jaake rah, bis te well ko diwes, kai hi o Dewel o rai pral halauter.”" 
Luke22:19 Un job las i kotar maro, parkras pes pash o Debleste, phagas ko maro, das kowa lende, un penas ap lende: “Ake, chan! Kau maro hi miro mass. Me dau man tumenge. Te hom buder gar koi, krenn kowa pale un pale, te well tumenge an tumaro shero, hoi me krom tumenge!”" 
Luke22:20 Pal o chapen las lo o khoro un penas: “Kai mool an kau khoro hi miro rat, hoi tumenge ratau. Jaake krau i newo drom, kai o Dewel un i menshe mala wenna.”" 
Luke22:21 Palle penas o Jesus: “O phukepaskro hi mantsa ap kaja chapaskri beshdo. 
Luke22:22 Me, o Mensheskro Tchawo, hunte merap. Ninna te hi mange glan diklo, te djap kau drom, hawi bibacht well ap koleste, kai ap mande phukrella!”" 
Luke22:23 Un jek putchas i wawarestar: “Koon hi kowa mendar, kai krell kowa?”" 
Luke22:24 Un o Jesuseskre mala tchingran pen, koon lendar o bareder hi." 
Luke22:25 Un o Jesus penas ap lende: “I bare rajen ap kai phub hi penepaske pral i menshende an pengre themma. Kolla hunte shunenn ap lende un hunte budrenn lenge. Un kol pralstune kamenn, te penenn i menshe lenge, har latche mursha jon hi." 
Luke22:26 Me penau tumenge: Ma krenn kowa jaake har kolla! O bareder mashkral tumende hunte well jaake har o tikneder tumendar. Un kowa, kai kamell o pralstuno te well, hunte well o telstuno, kai budrell i wawarenge." 
Luke22:27 Koon kol dujendar hi bareder: Kowa, kai pash i chapaskri beshdo hi? Kowa, kai tchiwell o chapen ap i chapaskri? Tchatchepah, kowa, kai pash i chapaskri beshdo hi! Un me hom mashkral tumende har jek, kai tumenge budrella." 
Luke22:28 Tumer rikran pash mande win an kol diwessa, har i menshe miro djipen phares kran." 
Luke22:29 Un me kamau, te wenn tumer mantsa khetne raja, jaake har miro dad an o bolepen kamella, te wap o baro rai pral i menshende." 
Luke22:30 Un tumer chana un pijenna mantsa kote, kai me o baro rai hom, un han beshdo ap rajeskre beshepangre, un penenn o tchatchepen win pral i tsele menshende, kai wenna o deesh-te-dui Israeleskre tchawendar.”" 
Luke22:31 “Simon, Simon, shun, hoi me tuke penau: O beng las tumen an o jak un kamas te dikell, har sorelo tumaro patsepen hi." 
Luke22:32 Me mangom tuke pash mo Debleste, te djas tu gar o Debleskro dromestar tele. Un te djah tu pale ap o tchatcho drom, kre tire phralen soreles an o patsepen!”" 
Luke22:33 Penas o Petro: “Rai, me djoms tuha an o stilepen un an o merepen.”" 
Luke22:34 Penas o Jesus ap leste: “Petro, me penau tuke, kai rati dell o bashno gar gole jaake rah, har tu gar triin kope penal, te prindjreh man gar.”" 
Luke22:35 Un job penas ap peskre malende: “Har me tumen ap o drom bitchrom, his tumen kek lowe, witar kek gono un kek kircha pash tumende. His tumen bok? His tumen trush?” Penan le: “Na-a, gar jek kopo!”" 
Luke22:36 Penas lo: “Kanna lenn lowe tumentsa! Lenn ninna i gono peha, kai tchiwenn tumer tumare koola dren! Un bikrenn tumari plaashka, te ginenn tumenge i charo!" 
Luke22:37 Me penau tumenge: Hi tchinlo pral mande an o Debleskro lab: Jon penenn lestar, te hi lo jek lendar, kai tchilatcho hi. Tchatchepah, lauter, hoi pral mande tchinlo was, wella tchatcho.”" 
Luke22:38 Penan leskre mala ap leste: “Rai, kate hi dui chare.” Penas lo: “Kanna hi doha!”" 
Luke22:39 Un o Jesus djas pash i djeteskri berga, jaake har job kowa bud kope kras. Un peskre mala djan leha." 
Luke22:40 Un har jon pash i djeteskri berga wan, penas lo ap lende: “Mangenn o Deblestar, te nai anell tumen tchi o Debleskro dromestar tele!”" 
Luke22:41 Un o Jesus kokres djas i tikno kotar dureder, un witsras pes ap i tchanga," 
Luke22:42 un mangas o Debles: “Tata, te kameh tu, muk kek duka ap mande te well! Kre gar, har me kamau. Kre jaake, har tu kameh!”" 
Luke22:43 Un i Debleskro bolepaskro was pash leste dran o bolepen un das les soor. 
Luke22:44 Un o Jesus mangas o Debles sorleder, un rat nashas leskro sherestar tele ap i phub, jaake soreles was i daar ap leste." 
Luke22:45 Un palle stas lo pre un djas pash peskre malende. Jon wan khino un sowan, jaake bibachtelo hi le. Har job dikas, te sowan le," 
Luke22:46 penas lo ap lende: “Hoske sowenn tumer? Stenn pre un mangenn o Deblestar, te nai anell tumen tchi o Debleskro dromestar tele!”" 
Luke22:47 Har o Jesus jaake rakras, koi wan bud menshe. Glan kol menshende djas o Judas. Kowa his jek o Jesuseskre deesh-te-dui malendar. Job djas pash o Jesuseste, un kamas les i tchum te dell." 
Luke22:48 O Jesus penas ap leste: “Judas, kameh tu ap o Menshengro Tchaweste phukrell un deh les i tchum?”" 
Luke22:49 Har o Jesuseskre mala, kai trul leste tardo his, dikan, hoi koi djas, putchan jon lestar: “Rai, das mer i chareha ap lende pre?”" 
Luke22:50 Un jek lendar las o charo, un das i klisteske o tchatcho kand tele. Kowa his i klisto, kai budrell o baro rashajeske." 
Luke22:51 Koi penas o Jesus: “Muk tele! Kanna hi doha!” Un job tchiwas peskro wast ap o kand ko murshestar, un kras les sasto." 
Luke22:52 Un o Jesus penas ap i bare rashajende un ap i pralstunende pral o Debleskro baro kheer un ap i biboldengre phureder, kai pash leste wan: “Tumer wan charentsa un kashtentsa pash mande, har te woms i marepaskro." 
Luke22:53 Hako diwes homs pash tumende an o Debleskro baro kheer, un tumer tapran man gar. Kanna hi tumaro tsiro. Kanna hi o benges penepaske.”" 
Luke22:54 Un jon pandan les un anan les an o baro rajeskro kheer. O Petro djas lenge palla, un atchas i kotar pal lende." 
Luke22:55 Pash ko kheer kran i lurde i jag, un beshan pen lauter khetne. Un o Petro beshas pes pash lende." 
Luke22:56 Un i budepaskretsa his pash i jag beshdo, dikas les un penas: “Kowa his ninna pash o Jesuseste.”" 
Luke22:57 O Petro das buchoste un penas: “Romnija, me prindjrau les gar.”" 
Luke22:58 I tikno tsiro koi pre dikas i wawar ap leste, un penas: “Tu hal ninna jek kolendar.” Un o Petro penas: “Romeha, me hom gar jek lendar.”" 
Luke22:59 Un i tsiro koi pre penas pale i wawar: “Tchatchepah, ko mursh his ninna pash leste. Job hi dran o them Galilea.”" 
Luke22:60 Koi penas o Petro: “Romeha, me djinau gar, hoi tu peneh.” Un har job kowa penas, das o bashno gole." 
Luke22:61 Un o Jesus rissras pes trujel, un dikas o Petres an i jaka. Un o Petreske wan kolla laba an o shero, hoi o Jesus ap leste penas: “O bashno dell gar gole jaake rah, har tu gar triin kope penal, te prindjreh man gar.”" 
Luke22:62 Un o Petro djas win, un rowas soreles." 
Luke22:63 Kol mursha, kai dan garda ap o Jesuseste, san pral leste, un dan les dawa." 
Luke22:64 Un jon pandan leskre jaka, un penan: “Pen menge, koon das tut!”" 
Luke22:65 Un jon praassan les. 
Luke22:66 Un har o diwes was, mukan i biboldengre phureder, i bare rashaja un i tchatchepangre o Jesuses pash pende te anell." 
Luke22:67 Un penan ap leste: “Hal tu o Kristo, ko baro rai, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job? Pen menge!” Penas lo: “Me te penau les tumenge, patsenn tumer man gar." 
Luke22:68 Un te putchau tumendar tchomone, penenn tumer tchi." 
Luke22:69 Ko tsiro well sik, kai me, o Mensheskro Tchawo, hom beshdo ap i tchatchi rig o sorelo Deblestar.”" 
Luke22:70 Penan jon: “Hal tu o Debleskro tchawo?” Penas job: “Awa, hi jaake har tumer penan. Me hom kowa.”" 
Luke22:71 Penan le mashkral pende: “Menge hi kanna doha. Mer shunam dran leskro mui, hoi job penas. Kek hunte penell menge budeder.”" 
Luke23:1 Un lauter stan pre, un anan o Jesuses pash o Pilateste." 
Luke23:2 Un jon anan bud koowa ap leste pre, un penan: “Kau mursh kras mare menshen diwjo. Job penas, te das mer o baro rajeste an o foro Rom buder kek lowe. Un job penas ninna, kai hi lo o Kristo, ko baro rai, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job.”" 
Luke23:3 Koi putchas o Pilato lestar: “Hal tu o baro rai pral i biboldende?” Penas lo: “Awa, hi jaake har tu penal.”" 
Luke23:4 Koi penas o Pilato ap kol bare rashajende un ap kol wawar menshende, kai kote tardo hi: “Me hatsom kek doosh ap leste.”" 
Luke23:5 Jon mukan gar tele, te anenn le tchilatcho koowa ap o Jesuseste, un penan: “Job kras i menshen diwjo an o them Galilea, un an o tselo them Judea, un an o foro Jerusalem ninna.”" 
Luke23:5 Jon mukan gar tele, te anenn le tchilatcho koowa ap o Jesuseste, un penan: “Job kras i menshen diwjo an o them Galilea, un an o tselo them Judea, un an o foro Jerusalem ninna.”" 
Luke23:6 Har o Pilato kowa shunas, putchas job: “Hi kau mursh dran o them Galilea?”" 
Luke23:7 Un har job shunas, kai o Jesus dran o them Galilea hi, kai o Herodes o baro rai hi, mukas lo o Jesuses pash koleste te anell. O Herodes his an ko tsiro ninna an o foro Jerusalem." 
Luke23:8 Un o Herodes his bachtelo, har job o Jesuses dikas. Job shunas lestar un kamas les i rah tsiro te dikell. Job kamas, te krell o Jesus leske i baro koowa, hoi kek wawar nai krella." 
Luke23:9 Kanna, har o Jesus glan leste tardo hi, putchas job o Jesusestar bud koowa. O Jesus penas tchi pale." 
Luke23:10 I bare rashaja un i biboldengre tchatchepangre his koi pashel tardo, un anan bud tchilatcho koowa ap o Jesuseste." 
Luke23:11 Un o Herodes un leskre lurde san pral leste, riwan leske i rajeskri plaashka an, un mukan les pale pash o Pilateste te anell." 
Luke23:12 Un ap ko diwes wan o Herodes un o Pilato mala. Glan ko diwes his jon chojedo jek ap i wawareste. 
Luke23:13 O Pilato das i bare rashajen, i pralstune bibolden, un i tsele menshen khetne gole," 
Luke23:14 un penas ap lende: “Tumer anan kau murshes pash mande, un penan mange, te krell lo i menshen diwjo. Me kamom lestar te shunell, hoi job koi pre penella, un hatsom kek doosh ap leste, hoi tumer ap leste pre anan." 
Luke23:15 Un o Herodes hatsas witar kek doosh ap leste. Doleske bitchras job les pale pash mende. Un kanna shunenn, hoi me tumenge penau: Kawa mursh kras tchi, te hunte well lo maredo." 
Luke23:16 Me mukau les dawa te dell, un mukau les te djal.”" 
Luke23:17  
Luke23:18 Koi dan i tsele menshe gole: “Mare les, un de men o Barabes!”" 
Luke23:19 O Barabas his i stildo. Job kras an o foro Jerusalem i baro tchingepen, un das i murshes temerl." 
Luke23:20 O Pilato kamas o Jesuses te djal mukell. Un job das gole, te kamell lo o Jesuses te djal mukell." 
Luke23:21 I menshe dan pale gole: “De les ap o trushel! Ap o trushel leha!” 
Luke23:22 Un o Pilato putchas lendar o triinto kopo: “Hawo tchilatcho koowa kras job? Jaake har me kowa dikau, kras job tchi, te hunte well job maredo. Me dau les dawa, un mukau les te djal.”" 
Luke23:23 Jon dan sorleder gole, te well lo ap o trushel dino. Un har jon gar tele mukan, shunas o Pilato ap lende un penas:" 
Luke23:24 “Me krau, hoi tumer kamenna.” Un job penas i lurdenge, te denn le les ap o trushel, te merell lo kote." 
Luke23:25 Un o Pilato mukas koles dran o stilepen win te djal, kai kras i baro tchingepen an o foro un maras jekes. O Jesuses das job an lengre wasta." 
Luke23:26 Un har jon o Jesuses krik anan, te well job ap o trushel dino, tapran le i murshes ap o drom. Kowa budras win ap i kotar phub un his kanna ap o drom khere. Leskro lab hi Simon, un job his dran ko foro Kirene. Ap koleste tchiwan jon o trushel, te hidjrell lo kowa o Jesuseske palla." 
Luke23:27 Un bud mursha un djuwja djan o Jesuseske palla ap o drom. Kolla dan bari gole un rowan. 
Luke23:28 Un o Jesus rissras pes trujel un penas ap lende: “Djuwjale dran o foro Jerusalem, rowenn gar pral mande! Rowenn pral tumende un pral tumare tchawende!" 
Luke23:29 Ko tsiro wella, kai i menshe penenna: Bachtele hi kol djuwja, kai lan kek ternepen." 
Luke23:30 Ap ko tsiro penenn le ap i berge: Perenn pral mende! 
Luke23:31 Te krenn jon kawa i senelo kashteha, hoi krenn jon palle i phuro kashteha?”" 
Luke23:32 Ninna dui tchilatche mursha wan o Jesuseha glan o foro anlo, te wenn le kote ap o trushel dino." 
Luke23:33 Har jon lauter ap ko kotar them wan, hoi kharella Muleskro Shero, dan jon o Jesuses ap o trushel, un kol dui tchilatche murshen ninna. Ko jekeskro trushel his tchatches lestar, ko wawareskro trushel his serwes lestar." 
Luke23:34 Koi penas o Jesus: “Miro dad, le i doosh kolendar krik, kai man ap o trushel dan! Jon djinenn gar, hoi jon kran.” Un i lurde khelan pral leskre koola, te dikenn le, hoi hakeno lella." 
Luke23:35 Un i menshe, kai koi pashel tardo his, dikan kowa lauter, hoi o Jesuseha djas. Kol pralstune bibolde, kai kote tardo hi, san pral leste, un penan: “Wawaren las job dran o merepen win. Te hi lo tchatchepah o Kristo, ko baro rai, kones o Dewel win rodas, te well lo pash mende, palle nai djals job o trushelestar tele.”" 
Luke23:36 Un ninna kol lurde san pral leste, un dan les shutli mool te pijell." 
Luke23:37 Un jon penan ap leste: “Tu te hal o baro rai pral i biboldende, ab o trushelestar tele!”" 
Luke23:38 Un pral leste ap i kasht his tchinlo: Kowa hi i o baro rai pral i biboldende. 
Luke23:39 Jek kol tchilatche murshendar, kai ap o trushel dino his, praassas o Jesuses, un penas: “Te hal tu ko Kristo, ab o trushelestar tele, un le men ninna tele!”" 
Luke23:40 Ko wawar tchingras ap leste un penas: “Muk tele! Dareh tu gar o Deblestar, kanna kai hal ap o trushel?" 
Luke23:41 Kawa hi mari phagi koleske, hoi kram. Mer anah tchatchepah doosh ap mende. Kawa mursh kras kek tchilatchepen.”" 
Luke23:42 Un job penas ap o Jesuseste: “Jesus, ma biste man, te hal tu kote, kai tu o baro rai hal!”" 
Luke23:43 Un o Jesus penas ap leste: “Tchatchepah, me penau tuke: Kau diwes hal tu mantsa an o Debleskri shukar baar.”" 
Luke23:44 His nai deesh-te-dujenge, koi was o diwes kalo har i rati an o tselo them. Un kowa atchas jaake bis trinenge." 
Luke23:45 Un o wudar an o Debleskro baro kheer, kai his kerdo dran kutch pesso than, koja djas an dui kotja mashkral paash." 
Luke23:46 Un o Jesus das bari gole: “Miro dad, an tire wasta tchiwau me miro djipen!” Un palle meras lo." 
Luke23:47 Har ko pralstuno lurdo dikas, hoi koi djas, sharas lo o Debles un penas: “Tchatchepah, kawa his i latcho mursh.”" 
Luke23:48 Kol menshenge, kai kote wan un lauter dikan, djas kowa jaake phares an o dji, te dan pen jon ap o betch, un djan penge le." 
Luke23:49 Un o Jesuseskre mala un kol djuwja, kai wan leha dran o them Galilea, kolla his i kotar krik tardo un dikan kowa lauter." 
Luke23:50 Koi was i mursh, ko kharella Josef. Kowa his tchatcho un latcho. Job his jek kol pralstune biboldendar," 
Luke23:51 un kamas gar, te well o Jesus ap o trushel dino. Job his dran i biboldengro foro Arimatia. Un job dikas ap o Debleste, te well ko tsiro, kai hakeno dikell, kai o Dewel o baro rai hi." 
Luke23:52 Job djas pash o Pilateste un mangas lestar, te denn le les o mulo Jesuses." 
Luke23:53 Un o Josef las o Jesuses o trushelestar tele, un tchiwas les an i laintikro kotar, un tchiwas les an i mulengro kheer, kowa his an i baro bar dino. Kote his gomme kek mensho dren tchiddo." 
Luke23:54 Kowa his glan o Debleskro diwes, har o kham tele djas." 
Luke23:55 Kol djuwja, kai wan o Jesuseha dran o them Galilea, kolla djan o Josefeske palla, un dikan, har tchiwas lo o mulo Jesuses an i mulengro kheer." 
Luke23:56 Un jon djan an o foro pale, un kran kutch djet, hoi mishto sungella, te makenn le les dren. Ap o Debleskro diwes kran le kek budi, jaake har kowa pash i biboldende hi." 
Luke24:1 Sik taissarlake, pal o Debleskro diwes, lan le kutch djet, hoi jon kokres kran, un djan pash ko mulengro kheer." 
Luke24:2 Kote dikan le, kai ko baro bar buder gar glan o mulengro kheer tchiddo hi." 
Luke24:3 Un jon djan dren, un hatsan gar o mulo trupo o rajestar Jesus." 
Luke24:4 Har jon koi tardo his, un djinan gar, hoi te krenn le, his kote ap jek kopo dui mursha tardo. Un lengre ripja his railes bijalo." 
Luke24:5 Un i traash was ap i djuwjende. Un darjatar dikan le ap i phub. Kol dui mursha penan ap lende: “Hoske rodenn tumer kol djides pash i mulende? 
Luke24:6 Job hi gar kai. O Dewel kras les i mulendar djido. Bistran tumer kowa, hoi job tumenge penas, har job an o them Galilea his?" 
Luke24:7 Job penas tumenge: O Mensheskro Tchawo hunte well an i tchilatche wasta dino, un ap o trushel dino. Un pal triin diwessa stell lo i mulendar pre.”" 
Luke24:8 Un kol laba wan pale an lengro shero. 
Luke24:9 Koi djan jon krik dran ko mulengro kheer, un djan pale an o foro, un penan kowa lauter o Jesuseskre deesh-te-jek malenge, un ninna kol tsele wawarenge, kai pash lende hi." 
Luke24:10 Kol djuwja his i Maria Magdalena, i Joanna un i Maria, ko Jakobeskri dai un wawar." 
Luke24:11 Un kowa, hoi i djuwja penan, his i murshenge dinelo rakepen. Un jon patsan kol djuwjen gar." 
Luke24:12 O Petro stas pre, un djas pash ko mulengro kheer, dikas dren, hatsas kol laintikre kotja ap i rig tchiddo, un djas peske. Job djinas gar, hoi te penell lo." 
Luke24:13 Ap kau diwes djan dui o Jesuseskre malendar an ko gab Emmaus. Kowa his deesh-te-dui kilometarja glan o foro Jerusalem. 
Luke24:14 Ap o drom rakran le pral lauter, hoi an o foro Jerusalem djas." 
Luke24:15 Har jon jaake rakran, was o Jesus pash lende, un djas lentsa." 
Luke24:16 Jon prindjran les gar, har te wans lengre jaka pandlo." 
Luke24:17 Koi putchas lo lendar: “Pral hawo koowa rakrenn tumer?” Koi was lenge ropaske, un jon atchan tardo." 
Luke24:18 Un ko jek, kai kharella Kleopas, penas ap leste: “Djineh tu gar, hoi an kal diwessa an o foro Jerusalem lauter djas? Halauter djinenn kowa. Hal tu i wi-themari un djineh kowa gar?”" 
Luke24:19 Un o Jesus penas: “Hoi djas?” Un jon penan: “Kowa, hoi kran le o Jesuseha dran Nazaret. Job his o Debleskro rakepaskro, ap koleste o Debleskri soor his. O Dewel bitchras les. Kowa dikas hakeno ap kowa, hoi job penas un kras." 
Luke24:20 Mare bare rashaja un pralstune rakran i phagi pral leste win, te well lo ap o trushel dino. Un jon dan les ap o trushel." 
Luke24:21 Mer patsam, kai o Dewel bitchras les, te lell job i Israeleskre menshen dran i Remarjengre wasta win. Kowa djas lauter glan triin diwessa." 
Luke24:22 Un kau diwes penan menge i djuwja tchomone, kai atchas menge o rakepen krik. Kol djuwja his taissarlake pash o mulengro kheer," 
Luke24:23 un hatsan o mulo Jesuses gar. Jon wan pale pash mende, un penan: Mer dikam bolepangren, un kolla penan: O Jesus djiwella!" 
Luke24:24 Mursha mendar djan pash ko mulengro kheer, un lauter his jaake, har kolla djuwja kowa penan. Les dikan jon gar.”" 
Luke24:25 Koi penas o Jesus ap lende: “Tumer haiwan tchi. An tumaro dji djal tchi dren. Hoske patsenn tumer kowa gar, hoi o Debleskre rakepangre glan i rah tsiro penan?" 
Luke24:26 Kolla penan: O Kristo, ko baro rai, kones o Dewel bitchras, hunte las duka ap peste, te djas lo an peskro railepen.”" 
Luke24:27 Palle penas o Jesus lenge, hoi o Mose un i tsele Debleskre rakepangre pral leste tchinan." 
Luke24:28 Un jaake wan le pash o gab Emmaus, un o Jesus kras jaake, har te kamell lo dureder te djal." 
Luke24:29 Jon rikran les pale, un penan ap leste: “Atch pash mende! I rati wella, un well tamlo.” Koi djas job lentsa an o kheer," 
Luke24:30 un beshas pes te chal lo lentsa, las o maro, parkras pes pash o Debleste, phagas ko maro an kotja, un das kowa lende." 
Luke24:31 Koi haiwan le, kowa hi o Jesus. Un ap jek kopo dikan le les buder gar." 
Luke24:32 Un jon penan mashkral pende: “Djas kowa gar an maro dji, har job ap o drom mentsa rakras, un menge penas, hoi an o Debleskro lab pral leste tchinlo hi?”" 
Luke24:33 Un jon stan pre, un jaake sik har djala, djan le pale an o foro Jerusalem. Kote his kol deesh-te-jek un kol wawar o Jesuseskre malendar khetne." 
Luke24:34 Un kolla, kai kote khetne hi, penan lenge: “O Dewel kras tchatchepah o Jesuses djido, un o Simon dikas les.”" 
Luke24:35 Koi ginan kol dui lenge dren, hoi lenge ap o drom djas, un har jon les prindjran, har job o maro phagas." 
Luke24:36 Har jon kowa penan, his ap jek kopo o Jesus mashkral lende tardo, un penas ap lende: “O Debleskri bacht tumenge!”" 
Luke24:37 Jon patsan, kai dikenn le i mules. Un i daar was ap lende." 
Luke24:38 Koi penas lo ap lende: “Hoi dikenn tumer jaake darenes? Hoske putchenn tumen an tumaro shero, koon me hom?" 
Luke24:39 Dikenn mire wasta un mire herja! Me hom les. Taprenn man an, un haiwenn: Kek mules hi mass un kokale ap peste, har tumer les pash mande dikenna!”" 
Luke24:40 Un har job kowa penas, sikras job lende peskre wasta un pire." 
Luke24:41 Jon nashte patsan gar, kai hi o Jesus glan lende tardo, jaake bachtelo his le. Har djinan le gar, hoi te penenn le, putchas lo lendar: “Hi tumen tchomone te chal?”" 
Luke24:42 Koi dan le les i kotar peklo matcho. 
Luke24:43 Job las kowa un chas les glan lende. 
Luke24:44 Un job penas: “Har me pash tumende homs, penom me ap tumende: Halauter hunte well tchatcho, hoi o Mose tchinas, un hoi o Debleskre rakepangre pral mande penan, un hoi an o Debleskre gilja tchinlo hi.”" 
Luke24:45 Un palle das lo len goswepen, te haiwenn le o Debleskro lab," 
Luke24:46 un penas ap lende: “Jaake hi tchinlo an o Debleskro lab: O Kristo, ko baro rai, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job, kowa hunte lell duka ap peste, un pal triin diwessa stell lo i mulendar pre." 
Luke24:47 Un an peskro lab hunte well i menshenge an hake themma penlo, te mukenn le pengro tchilatcho drom, un djan ap o Debleskro drom, jaake kai lell o Dewel lengri doosh lendar krik. Penenn kowa i menshenge an o foro Jerusalem, un palle an i wawar themma!" 
Luke24:48 Tumer dikan kowa lauter, un hunte penenn kowa i menshenge dureder!" 
Luke24:49 Un me bitchrau tumenge koles, kolestar miro dad penas, te well job pash tumende. Atchenn an o foro Jerusalem jaake rah, bis te lan i soor dran o bolepen!”" 
Luke24:50 Un job djas pash o gab Betani peskre malentsa. Koi hadas lo peskre wasta un penas: “O Dewel atchell tumentsa!” 
Luke24:51 Un har job jaake rakras, djas lo lendar un was pral an o bolepen hadedo." 
Luke24:52 Un jon sharan les, un djan bachteles pale an o foro Jerusalem." 
Luke24:53 Un hako tsiro djan le an o Debleskro baro kheer, un sharan o Debles." 
John1:1 Har o bolepen un i phub gar koi his, his o Lab koi. Kowa, kai hi o Lab, his pash o Debleste. Un job his o Dewel." 
John1:2 Job his pash o Debleste, har o bolepen un i phub gar koi his." 
John1:3 Khetne leha kras o Dewel o bolepen un i phub. Tchi hi koi, hoi gar leha kerdo was." 
John1:4 An leste his o djipen. Un ko djipen his i bari momeli i menshenge. 
John1:5 Koi momeli chatchella an i rat. Un i rat nai kras koi momeli gar win. 
John1:6 Koi was i mursh, ko was o Deblestar bitchedo. Leskro lab his Johanni." 
John1:7 Job was, te penell lo hakeneske, koon koi bari momeli hi, te patsenn halauter ap koi momeli." 
John1:8 Job his gar koi momeli. Job was, te penell lo, koon koi momeli hi." 
John1:9 Koi tchatchi momeli was ap i phub, te chatchell li hakeneske." 
John1:10 Kowa, kai hi o Lab, his ap i phub, un i phub was leha kerdo. Un i menshe ap i phub prindjran les gar." 
John1:11 Job was an peskro them, un leskre menshe lan les gar pre." 
John1:12 Halauter kolla, kai lan les pre un ap leste patsan, kolen das job i soor, te wenn jon o Debleskre tchawe." 
John1:13 Kowa wan le gar, har jon boldo wan. O newo djipen was gar dran o menshengro kamlepen. Na-a, o newo djipen lan le kokres o Deblestar." 
John1:14 Ko lab was i mensho, un djiwas pash mende. Un mer dikam leskro railepen un leskri soor, kai o Dewel peskro tchawes das. Kowa his pherdo latchepen un tchatchepen." 
John1:15 O Johanni rakras lestar, un das gole: “Job hi kowa, kolestar penom: Kowa, kai pal mande wella, hi pral mande. Job his glan mande koi.”" 
John1:16 Mer halauter lam pale un pale bud latchepen lestar, kai les jaake bud hi." 
John1:17 O Mose das men kol laba, kai penenna, har mer djiwas. O Jesus Kristo anas menge o Debleskro latchepen un tchatchepen." 
John1:18 Kek mensho dikas o Debles. O Debleskro tchawo kokres sikras men, koon o Dewel hi. Job hi jek o Debleha." 
John1:19 Har bitchran i pralstune bibolde dran o foro Jerusalem i rashajen un i Levitarjen pash o Johanneste, te putchenn le lestar: “Koon hal tu?” penas job glan i tsele menshende, kai kote tardo hi: “Tchatchepah, me hom gar o Kristo.”" 
John1:20  
John1:21 “Koon hal tu?” kaman jon te djinell. “Hal tu o Elija?” putchan le lestar. “Na-a,” penas lo, “kowa hom me gar!” “Hal tu o Debleskro rakepaskro, kolestar penlo was, te well job? putchan le lestar.” “Na-a,” penas job." 
John1:22 Jon penan ap leste: “Pen menge, koon tu hal, te penas mer kowa kolenge, kai bitchran men. Hoi peneh tu tchatchepah, koon tu hal?”" 
John1:23 Job penas: “Me hom kowa, kai dell gole an o mulo them: Lenn halauter krik, hoi o Debleske an o drom tchiddo hi. Jaake penas kowa o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Jesaja, glan i rah tsiro.”" 
John1:24 Kolla, kai wan pash o Johanneste, his i Farisarendar bitchedo." 
John1:25 Jon putchan lestar: “Te hal tu gar o Kristo, witar gar o Elija, un witar gar ko Debleskro rakepaskro, kolestar penlo was, te well job, hoske taufreh tu i menshen?”" 
John1:26 Penas o Johanni lenge: “Me taufrau len an o pani. Mashkral tumende hi jek, koles prindjrenn tumer gar." 
John1:27 Kowa well pal mande. Me hom gar mishto doha, te krap leskre kircha pre.”" 
John1:28 Har o Johanni kowa rakras, his job an o foro Betani ap i wawar rig o panjestar Jordan, kote, kai taufras lo i menshen." 
John1:29 Ap o wawar diwes dikas o Johanni, kai o Jesus pash leste wella. Un o Johanni penas: “Dikenn, kawa hi o Debleskro bakro, kai lell i menshengri doosh ap peste." 
John1:30 Kawa hi ko mursh, kai penom lestar: Pal mande wella i mursh, ko his pral mande. Job his koi, har me gar koi homs." 
John1:31 Me djinom gar, koon kowa hi. Me wom, te taufrap i menshen an Israel an o pani, te sikrap nai len, koon job hi.”" 
John1:32 Un o Johanni penas: “Tchatchepah, me dikom o Debleskro Ducho har i parno tchirklo, kai was dran o bolepen pral tele, un atchas ap leste." 
John1:33 Un me prindjrom les gar. Kowa, kai bitchras man, te taufrap i menshen an o pani, kowa penas ap mande: Tu dikeh, har well o Debleskro Ducho ap i mursheste un atchell ap leste. Kowa hi ko mursh, kai dell i menshen o Debleskro Ducho." 
John1:34 Me dikom kowa halauter. Doleske nai penau me ninna: Kau mursh hi o Debleskro tchawo.” 
John1:35 O wawar diwes his o Johanni pale koi tardo. Dui leskre malendar his pash leste. 
John1:36 Un har job dikas, kai o Jesus koi djal, penas lo: “Dikenn, kawa hi o Debleskro bakro!”" 
John1:37 Har kol dui kowa shunan, djan le o Jesuseske palla." 
John1:38 Un o Jesus rissras pes trujel, un dikas len. Un job putchas lendar: “Hoi rodenn tumer?” Penan jon: “Sikepaskro, kai chah un soweh tu?”" 
John1:39 “Awenn un dikenn!” penas job. Koi djan kol dui leha, un dikan, kai job chala un sowella. His deshenge. Un jon atchan ko diwes pash leste." 
John1:40 Jek kol dujendar, kai shunan, hoi o Johanni penas, un o Jesuseha djan, his o Andreas. Leskro phraal his o Simon Petro." 
John1:41 Kowa hatsas peskro phrales Simon, un penas ap leste: “Mer hatsam ko baro rajes, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job.” Kowa kharella ap grichtikes Kristo." 
John1:42 Un o Andreas anas peskro phrales pash o Jesuseste. Har o Jesus koles dikas, penas lo: “Tu hal o Simon, ko Johanneskro tchawo. Tu khareh kanna Kefas.” Ko kharella baro bar." 
John1:43 O wawar diwes kamas o Jesus an o them Galilea te djal. Ap o drom tapras lo o Filipo, un penas ap leste: “Dja mantsa!”" 
John1:44 O Filipo his dran o foro Betsaida. Ninna o Andreas un o Petro his dran ko foro. 
John1:45 O Filipo hatsas o Natanael un penas ap leste: “Mer hatsam koles, pral koleste o Mose an peskre lila tchinas. Ninna o Debleskre rakepangre tchinan pral leste. Job kharella Jesus un hi dran o foro Nazaret. Leskro dad hi o Josef.”" 
John1:46 Un o Natanael penas ap leste: “Dran Nazaret nai well tchi, hoi mishto hi.” “Am un dik!” penas o Filipo." 
John1:47 Har o Jesus dikas, kai o Natanael was, penas job: “Dikenn, koi well i tchatcho Israelitari. Un kek chochepen hi an leste.”" 
John1:48 “Har nai djineh tu, koon me hom?” putchas o Natanael lestar. Penas o Jesus: “Har tu tel o faigetikro ruk hals, dikom me tut, glan ko tsiro, kai o Filipo das tut gole.”" 
John1:49 “Sikepaskro,” penas o Natanael, “tu hal o Debleskro tchawo. Tu hal o baro rai pral Israel.”" 
John1:50 Penas o Jesus ap leste: “Me penom tuke: Me dikom tut tel ko ruk. Doleske patseh tu. Tu dikeh bareder koowa, har kawa." 
John1:51 Kowa hi tchatcho, hoi me tumenge penau: Tumer dikenn har o bolepen pre djala. Un o Debleskre bolepangre djan pral un wenn pale tele ap o Menshengro Tchaweste.”" 
John2:1 Pal dui diwessa kran le i bijab an o gab Kana an o them Galilea. O Jesuseskri dai his koi. 
John2:2 Kol bijabengre mangan o Jesuses ninna ap ko bijab te well peskre malentsa, un jaake his lo lentsa ninna ap ko bijab." 
John2:3 Har len kek mool buder his, penas o Jesuseskri dai ap peskro tchaweste: “Len hi buder kek mool.”" 
John2:4 “Romnija,” penas o Jesus, “hoi me hunte krap, hi miro koowa un gar tiro koowa. O tsiro hi mange kanna gar koi.”" 
John2:5 Leskri dai penas ap i budepangre: “Krenn kowa, hoi job tumenge penella!”" 
John2:6 An ko kheer his shob panjeskre khore dran bar. I bibolde hunte thowan pengre wasta kote, jaake har kowa pash i bibolde hi. An hako khoro djas sheel-te-biish litarja dren." 
John2:7 O Jesus penas ap lende: “Tchorenn pani an kol khore!” Un jon kran len jaake pherdo, kai djas buder tchi dren." 
John2:8 Un job penas pale ap lende: “Lenn dran kol khore un anenn kowa o rajeske pral o pipen!” Un jon anan les pash leste. 
John2:9 O rai pral o pipen djinas gar, kai koi mool was. I budepangre kokres, kai tchoran o pani an kol khore, djinan kowa. Har job koi mool pijas, hoi pani his, das lo o pirnes pash peste gole," 
John2:10 un penas ap leste: “Hakeno dell i latchi mool glan i wawar mool. Un te hi le mato, dell lo len koi mool, kai gar jaake latcho hi. Tu rikral koi latchi mool pale.”" 
John2:11 Kowa his o ersto kopo, kai kras o Jesus i baro koowa an o Debleskri soor. Kowa kras lo an o gab Kana an o them Galilea. Kote sikras job peskro railepen un peskri soor. Un leskre mala patsan ap leste." 
John2:12 Pal kowa djas lo peskri dah, peskre phralentsa un peskre malentsa an o foro Kapernaum. Koi atchan le gar rah." 
John2:13 Glan kol biboldengre bare diwessa, kai kharenna Passa, djas o Jesus an o foro Jerusalem." 
John2:14 Koi dikas job an o Debleskro baro kheer i bikepangren, kai grumjen, bakren un parne tchirklen bikrenna. Un kolla, kai parenn i lowe trujel, his ninna koi." 
John2:15 Koi kras job dran shelle i tchupni, un tradas len lengre bakrentsa un grumjentsa dran o Debleskro baro kheer win. Un kolenge, kai parenn i lowe trujel, witsras lo lengre lowe ap i phub. Un lengre stamja tchiwras lo trujel." 
John2:16 Ap kolende, kai bikrenn parne tchirklen, penas job: “Hidjenn len win un krenn dran miro dadeskro kheer kek bikepaskro kheer!”" 
John2:17 Koi was o Jesuseskre malenge an o shero, hoi an o Debleskro lab tchinlo hi: Miro kamlepen tiro khereske chal man pre har i jag." 
John2:18 Kol pralstune bibolde putchan lestar: “Hawo baro koowa kreh tu menge an o Debleskri soor, te djinas mer, kai tut o tchatchepen hi, te kress kowa?”" 
John2:19 Penas o Jesus ap lende: “Phagenn kau Debleskro kheer tele! Me krau an triin diwessa i newo kheer.” 
John2:20 Penan jon: “An star-deesh-te-shob (46) bersha kran le o Debleskro baro kheer. Un tu kameh kowa te krell an triin diwessa?” 
John2:21 Har rakras o Jesus pral o Debleskro kheer, rakras lo pral peste kokres." 
John2:22 Pal i tsiro, har o Jesus i mulendar pre stas, wan leskre malenge kol laba pale an o shero, hoi o Jesus penas. Un jon patsan, kai kowa lauter tchatcho hi, hoi an o Debleskro lab tchinlo hi, un hoi o Jesus penas." 
John2:23 An kol bare diwessa, kai kharenna Passa, patsan bud menshe an o foro Jerusalem ap o Jesuseste, har dikan le ko baro koowa, hoi kras lo an o Debleskri soor." 
John2:24 O Jesus das kek patsepen ap lende. Job prindjras lauteren. 
John2:25 Job djinas, har i menshe hi. Leske hunte penell kek, hoi an o mensheskro dji hi." 
John3:1 Koi his i Farisari. Leskro lab his Nikodemus. Job his i pralstuno biboldo. 
John3:2 Kowa was an i rat pash o Jesuseste, un penas: “Rai, mer djinah, kai tu hal i sikepaskro. O Dewel bitchras tut pash mende. Kek nai krell kowa, hoi tu kreh an o Debleskri soor. Ap kowa dikah mer, kai hi o Dewel tuha.”" 
John3:3 Penas o Jesus ap leste: “Tchatchepah, me penau tuke: Kowa, kai well gar o Deblestar newes boldo, nai djiwell gar leha khetne.”" 
John3:4 Putchas o Nikodemus lestar: “Har nai well jek pale newes boldo, te hi lo phuro? Nai djal lo pale an peskro dakro per, un well o duito kopo boldo?”" 
John3:5 Penas o Jesus ap leste: “Tchatchepah, me penau tuke: Te well jek gar newes boldo dran o pani un dran o Debleskro Ducho, nai djiwell lo gar khetne o Debleha." 
John3:6 Koon i menshestar boldo wella, hi i mensheskro tchawo. Koon dran o Debleskro Ducho boldo wella, hi i Debleskro tchawo." 
John3:7 Kre kek bare jaka, te penau tuke: Tumer hunte wenn o Deblestar newes boldo!" 
John3:8 O sorelo ducho, hoi phurdell pral i phub, djal, kai kamell lo. Tu shuneh les. Kai job wella, un kai job djala, djineh tu gar. Jaake hi pash koleste, kai wella dran Debleskro Ducho boldo.”" 
John3:9 “Har djal kowa nai?” putchas o Nikodemus. 
John3:10 O Jesus putchas lestar: “Tu hal i sikepaskro an o them Israel un djineh kowa gar? 
John3:11 Tchatchepah, me penau tuke: Mer rakrah pral kowa, hoi prindjrah. Hoi mer dikam, kowa penah mer nai ninna. Tumer patsenn gar, hoi mer tumenge penah." 
John3:12 Te rakrau pral i phubjakro koowa, un tumer patsenn man gar, har nai patsenn tumer man, te rakrau pral o Debleskro koowa?" 
John3:13 Me, o Mensheskro Tchawo kokres, nai penau, hoi an o bolepen hi. Me wom dran o bolepen." 
John3:14 Tu djineh, kai o Mose an o mulo them i sap ap i kasht pre bladas. Hakeno, koon dikas ap ko sap, atchas djido. Jaake hunte well o Mensheskro Tchawo ap o kasht bladedo," 
John3:15 te lell hakeno, kai patsell ap leste, ko djipen, hoi gar pre-herella." 
John3:16 O Dewel kamas i menshen jaake bud, te das lo lenge peskro jek tchawes. Les his kek wawar. Hakeno, koon patsell ap leste, djal gar nashedo. Job lell ko djipen, hoi gar pre-herella." 
John3:17 O Dewel bitchras peskro tchawes gar ap i phub, te anell job o Debleskri choli pral i menshende. Job was, te lell lo len dran o tchilatchepen un o merepen win." 
John3:18 Koon ap leste patsella, pral koleste well kek phagi wi-rakedo. Koon gar ap leste patsella, pral koleste hi i phagi wi-rakedo doleske, kai patsas lo gar ap o Debleskro tchaweste." 
John3:19 O Debleskri bari momeli was ap kai phub. Un kol menshe, kai krenn o tchilatchepen, kaman o tamlepen budeder har koi momeli. Doleske hi i phagi pral lende wi-rakedo." 
John3:20 Kolla, kai o tchilatcho koowa krenna, kamenna gar koi momeli. Jon atchenn penge an o tamlepen, jaake kai dikenn i wawar gar, hawo tchilatcho koowa jon krenna." 
John3:21 Koon o tchatchepen krella, kowa well pash i momeli. Ap koleste dikenn le, kai job djiwella, har o Dewel kamella.”" 
John3:22 Pal kowa djas o Jesus peskre malentsa an ko them Judea, un atchas i tsiro kote, un taufras i menshen." 
John3:22 Pal kowa djas o Jesus peskre malentsa an ko them Judea, un atchas i tsiro kote, un taufras i menshen." 
John3:23 Ninna o Johanni taufras i menshen pash o gab Ainon, hoi his pash o foro Salim tchiddo. Koi his bud pani. I menshe wan pash leste, un mukan pen lestar te taufrell." 
John3:24 Ap ko tsiro his o Johanni gar stildo. 
John3:25 Jek diwes tchingras i biboldo kolentsa, kai djan o Johanneske palla, pral kowa, har kolla, kai pal o biboldengro tchatchepen pale-tchiddo hi, nai wenn pale erligo." 
John3:26 Un jon djan pash o Johanneste, un penan leske: “Sikepaskro, ko mursh, kai his pash tute ap o wawar panjeskri rig, pral koleste rakral, un bud menshe shunan kowa, kowa hi kate, un taufrell i menshen. Un hakeno djal pash leste.”" 
John3:27 Koi penas o Johanni ap lende: “Kek nai lell tchomone, te das les o Dewel kowa gar." 
John3:28 Tumer halauter shunan, kai penom, kai hom me gar ko baro rai, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job. O Dewel bitchras man glan koleste." 
John3:29 Koles, kai i pirni hi, ko hi ninna o pirno. Un o maal ko pirnestar, kai pashel tardo hi, un shunell o pirneskro gole, hi bachtelo pral kowa. Kai bacht hi man kanna." 
John3:30 Me hunte wap tikno un tikneder. Un job hunte well baro un bareder. 
John3:31 Kowa, kai was o Deblestar, hi o rai pral lauter. Kowa, kai well i phubjatar, rakrell pral kowa, hoi ap i phub djala. Kowa, kai was dran o bolepen, hi o rai pral halauter," 
John3:32 un rakrell nai pral kowa, hoi job dikas un shunas. Kek patsell leske." 
John3:33 Koon patsell ap leste, kowa sikrell jaake, kai halauter tchatcho hi, hoi o Dewel penella." 
John3:34 Koles, kai o Dewel pash mende bitchras, kowa rakrell o Debleskre laba. O Dewel dell an leste peskro tselo Debleskro Ducho, un rikrell tchi pale." 
John3:35 O dad kamell o tchawes, un das halauter an leskro wast." 
John3:36 Koon ap o tchaweste patsella, koles hi ko djipen, hoi gar pre-herella. Koon ap o tchaweste gar patsella, koles well ko tchatcho djipen gar. O Debleskri choli atchell pral leste.”" 
John4:1 I Farisarja shunan, kai bud menshe djan o Jesuseske palla. Jon shunan ninna, kai job taufras budeder menshe har o Johanni." 
John4:2 His gar o Jesus, kai taufras len. Kowa kran leskre mala." 
John4:3 Har o Jesus shunas, hoi pral leste rakedo was, djas lo dran o them Judea win, un kamas pale an o them Galilea te djal." 
John4:3 Har o Jesus shunas, hoi pral leste rakedo was, djas lo dran o them Judea win, un kamas pale an o them Galilea te djal." 
John4:4 Job hunte djas pral ko them Samaria, te well lo an o them Galilea." 
John4:5 Jaake was lo pash ko foro Sichar an o them Samaria. Ko foro his pash ko kotar phub tchiddo, hoi o Jakob peskro tchaweste Josef das." 
John4:6 Koi his o Jakobeskro pani. O Jesus was khino ap ko dur drom un beshas pes pash ko pani. His deesh-te-dujenge. 
John4:7 Koi was i djuwel pash ko pani, te lell li pani. Koja his i Samaritetsa. O Jesus penas ap late: “De man te pijell!”" 
John4:8 Leskre mala his gar koi. Jon his an o foro, te ginenn le tchomone te chal." 
John4:9 Koi djuwel penas ap leste: “Tu hal i biboldo. Me hom i Samaritetsa. Har nai mangeh tu mandar pani, te dap tut te pijell? I bibolde chan gar khetne i Samaritentsa.”" 
John4:10 Penas o Jesus ap late: “Te djinals tu, hoi o Dewel kamell tut te dell, un koon tutar ko pani mangella, mangals tu mandar, te dap tut o pani. Un me doms tut o pani, hoi dell o djipen.”" 
John4:11 “Romeha,” penas koi djuwel, “tut hi tchi, kai leh ko pani nai win. Un ko pani hi tel an i phub. Kai kameh tu ko pani, hoi dell o djipen, te lell?" 
John4:12 Hal tu bareder har o Jakob, maro kutch dad, kowa, kai hadas i phub kate win, te well kau pani win. Job un peskre tchawe un vieche pijan dran kau pani.”" 
John4:13 Penas o Jesus: “Hakeno, kai pijell kau pani, lell pale trush." 
John4:14 Koon ko pani pijella, hoi me les dau, kowa lell an peskro tselo djipen buder kek trush. Ko pani, hoi me les dau, well an leste i djido pani, hoi dell les o djipen, hoi gar pre-herella.”" 
John4:15 “Romeha, de man ko pani!” penas koi djuwel, “te well man buder kek trush, te wap buder gar kai, te lap kau pani.”" 
John4:16 “Dja khere!” penas o Jesus, “de tiro romes gole, un am leha pale kai!”" 
John4:17 “Man hi kek rom,” penas koi djuwel. Penas o Jesus ap late: “Tiro hi tchatcho, te peneh tu: Man hi kek rom." 
John4:18 Pantch romma his tut. Un kowa, kai tut kanna hi, kowa hi gar tiro rom. Koi penal tu o tchatchepen.”" 
John4:19 Penas koi djuwel: “Romeha, me dikau, tu hal i Debleskro rakepaskro." 
John4:20 Mare phure mangan o Debles ap kai berga an. Tumer bibolde penenn menge: Halauter hunte mangenn o Debles an o foro Jerusalem an!” 
John4:21 Penas o Jesus: “Romnija, pats man, ko tsiro wella, kai mangenn tumer o Debles gar ap kai berga an, witar gar an o foro Jerusalem." 
John4:22 Tumer djinenn gar, kones tumer an-mangenna. Mer djinah, kones mer an-mangah. I biboldendar wella kowa, kai lell i menshen dran o tchilatchepen un o merepen win." 
John4:23 Ko tsiro wella, un hi kanna kai, koi della menshe, kai mangenn o dades an o tchatchepen an. Kal menshen hunte well o Debleskro Ducho. O dad rodell kolen, kai mangenn les jaake an." 
John4:24 O Dewel hi kek mensho, – job hi i ducho. Un kolla, kai mangenn les an, kolen hunte well o Debleskro Ducho. Kowa sikrell len, har te mangenn le les tchatchepah an.”" 
John4:25 Penas i djuwel: “Me djinau, kai well ko baro rai, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job, kai kharell ninna o Kristo. Te well job pash mende, penell lo menge halauter.”" 
John4:26 Penas o Jesus: “Me hom kowa. Tu rakreh leha.” 
John4:27 Koi wan leskre mala pale dran o foro. Har jon dikan, kai job i djuwjah rakras, kran le bare jaka. Kek putchas lestar: Hoi kameh tu latar? Un kek putchas lestar witar gar: Hoske rakreh tu lah?" 
John4:28 Kanna mukas koi djuwel ko panjeskro khoro tardo un djas pale an ko foro un penas i menshenge: 
John4:29 “Awenn un dikenn! Me taprom i murshes, kowa djinas halauter pral mande. Nai hi job ko Kristo?”" 
John4:30 Koi djan kol menshe dran o foro pash o Jesuseste, te dikenn le les." 
John4:31 Har i djuwel an o foro his, penan leskre mala ap leste: “Sikepaskro, cha tchomone!”" 
John4:32 Penas o Jesus ap lende: “Man hi i chapen, kowa prindjrenn tumer gar.”" 
John4:33 Koi putchan leskre mala mashkral pende: “Anas leske jek tchomone chapaske?” 
John4:34 Penas o Jesus lenge: “Me djiwau kolestar, te krap, hoi o Dewel mandar kamella. Un leskri budi krau jaake rah, har job kamella. Doleske bitchras man lo ap i phub." 
John4:35 Tumer penenna: An star tchon anenn le o djob dren. Krenn tumare jaka pre, un dikenn tumen trujel: O tsiro hi kanna kai. Kanna well o djob dren anlo." 
John4:36 Kanna anenn i budepangre kolen khetne, kai lenn o djipen, hoi gar pre-herella. Un lengri budi well plaissedo. Jaake hi hake dui bachtelo: Kowa, kai o tikno djob an i phub witsras, un kowa, kai anell o djob dren." 
John4:37 Ko lab hi tchatcho: Jek witsrell o tikno djob an i phub. Un i wawar anell ko djob dren. 
John4:38 Me bitchrom tumen, te anenn tumer kote o djob dren, kai i wawar maran pen tele, te witsran le ko tikno djob an i phub. Un tumer nai anenn kanna o djob dren.”" 
John4:39 Bud kol menshendar dran o foro Sichar patsan ap o Jesuseste doleske, kai koi djuwel lenge penas: “Halauter, hoi me krom, penas job mange.”" 
John4:40 Har i Samaritarja pash o Jesuseste wan, mangan le les, te atchell lo i tsiro pash lende. Un job atchas dui diwessa pash lende." 
John4:41 Jaake shunan bud menshe, hoi job penas, un patsan ap leste." 
John4:42 Jon penan koi djuwjake: “Kanna patsah mer ap leste, un gar kokres, hoi tu menge lestar penal. Mer shunam les, un djinah kanna, kai job kowa hi, kai lell i menshen dran o tchilatchepen un o merepen win.”" 
John4:43 Pal kol dui diwessa djas o Jesus dureder un was an o them Galilea. 
John4:44 Job penas jek kopo: I Debleskro rakepaskro well gar sharedo kote, kai job khere hi." 
John4:45 Har job an o them Galilea was, lan kol menshe les kamles pre. Ap ko tsiro, har o Jesus an o foro Jerusalem his, his jon ninna kote un dikan lauter, hoi job kras an kol diwessa, kai Passa kharenna. Doleske lan le les kanna kamles pash pende pre." 
John4:46 Un o Jesus was pale an ko gab Kana. Kowa his o gab an o them Galilea, kai kras lo i mool dran o pani. An o foro Kapernaum djiwas i pralstuno, kai budras o baro rajeske pral ko them. Koleskro tchawo his nasselo." 
John4:47 Har job shunas, kai o Jesus pale dran o them Judea an o them Galilea was, djas job pash leste, un mangas lestar: “Am tele an o foro Kapernaum! Un kre miro tchawes sasto, kai ap o merepen tchiddo hi!”" 
John4:47 Har job shunas, kai o Jesus pale dran o them Judea an o them Galilea was, djas job pash leste, un mangas lestar: “Am tele an o foro Kapernaum! Un kre miro tchawes sasto, kai ap o merepen tchiddo hi!”" 
John4:48 O Jesus penas ap leste: “Te dikenn tumer gar bud Debleskro koowa, kai kek mensho nai krella, patsenn tumer gar.”" 
John4:49 Ko pralstuno penas pale ap leste: “Miro rai, am tele! Miro tchawo merella.”" 
John4:50 “Dja khere,” penas o Jesus, “tiro tchawo djiwella!” Ko mursh patsas kowa, hoi o Jesus leske penas un djas khere." 
John4:51 Job his gomme gar khere, koi wan leskre budepangre pash leste, un penan: “Tiro tchawo djiwella un hi sasto.”" 
John4:52 Koi putchas job lendar pal ko tsiro, kai o tchaweha feteder was. Koi penan le: “Taissar, har eftenge his, djas o nasslepen lestar.”" 
John4:53 Kanna djinas ko dad, kai kowa ko tsiro his, kai o Jesus ap leste penas: “Tiro tchawo djiwella.” Un job patsas peskre tsele menshentsa ap o Jesuseste." 
John4:54 Kau duito baro koowa kras o Jesus an o Debleskri soor, har job dran o them Judea an o them Galilea was." 
John4:54 Kau duito baro koowa kras o Jesus an o Debleskri soor, har job dran o them Judea an o them Galilea was." 
John5:1 Pal kowa his i baro Debleskro diwes i biboldenge. Un o Jesus djas an o foro Jerusalem. 
John5:2 An o foro Jerusalem his i pani pash ko foreskro wudar, kai kharella bakrengro wudar. Ko pani kharella ap hebretikes Betesda. Kote his i thopaskro kheer, kai pantch bare iseme dren his, kai pre his." 
John5:3 Kote his bud nassele tchiddo: Sawe, kai nai dikan gar, un sawe, kai nai nashan gar, un bange." 
John5:4  
John5:5 Mashkral kolende his i mursh, kai his triin-deesh-te-ochta (38) bersha nasselo." 
John5:6 O Jesus dikas les koi tchiddo, un djinas, kai his job i rah tsiro nasselo. “Kameh tu sasto te well?” putchas lo lestar." 
John5:7 “Rai,” penas ko nasselo, “man hi kek, kai anell man an kau pani, te well djipen dren un djal pre un tele. Un te kamau me an ko pani dren te djal, hi i wawar sikeder glan mande an o pani.”" 
John5:8 Penas o Jesus ap leste: “Ste pre! Le tiro tchiben un dja!” 
John5:9 Har o Jesus kowa penas, was ko mursh sasto, las peskro tchiben un djas trujel. Ko diwes his i Debleskro diwes." 
John5:10 Dran kowa penan kol pralstune bibolde ap koleste, kai sasto was: “Kau diwes hi o Debleskro diwes. Kau diwes hidjress tu tiro tchiben gar!”" 
John5:11 Penas job ap lende: “Kowa, kai kras man sasto, penas ap mande: Le tiro tchiben un dja!”" 
John5:12 “Un koon hi ko mursh,” putchan jon, “kai penas ap tute: Le tiro tchiben un dja?”" 
John5:13 Kowa, kai sasto was, djinas les gar. O Jesus mukas ko thopaskro kheer, har dikas lo kol bud menshen koi." 
John5:14 Pal i tsiro tapras o Jesus ko murshes pale an o Debleskro baro kheer. “Tu hal kanna sasto,” penas lo ap leste, “kre kek tchilatcho koowa buder, te well gar budeder ap tute har ko nasslepen!”" 
John5:15 Koi djas ko mursh pash kol pralstune biboldende un penas: “Kowa his o Jesus, kai kras man sasto.”" 
John5:16 Pal kowa lan i bibolde o Jesuses palla. Jon his chojedo, te kras job i nasseles ap o Debleskro diwes sasto." 
John5:17 O Jesus penas lenge: “Miro dad budrell o tselo tsiro. Jaake krau me kowa ninna.” 
John5:18 Doleske kaman kol bibolde gomme budeder, te marenn le les. O Jesus kras gar kokres i nasseles ap o Debleskro diwes sasto. Job penas ninna, kai o Dewel leskro dad hi, un kras pes jaake har o Dewel." 
John5:19 O Jesus penas ap lende: “Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: O tchawo nai krell tchi pestar. Job dikell, hoi o dad krella. Un kowa, hoi krell o dad, kowa krell ninna o tchawo." 
John5:20 O dad kamell o tchawes un sikrell leste halauter, hoi job krella. Ninna wawar bareder koowa sikrell lo leste, jaake kai krenn tumer bare jaka." 
John5:21 Har o dad i mulen pre djangrella, un dell len o newo djipen, jaake nai dell ninna o tchawo o newo djipen, kones job kamella." 
John5:22 O dad rakrell pral kekeste i phagi win. Kowa das lo an peskro tchaweskro wast, te well leskro tchawo o tchatchepaskro rai pral lauterende," 
John5:23 te sharenn le halauter o tchawes, jaake har sharenn le o dades. Koon o tchawes gar sharella, kowa sharella witar gar o dades, kai bitchras o tchawes." 
John5:24 Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Koon miro lab shunella, un patsell ap koleste, kai man bitchras, koles hi ko djipen, hoi gar pre-herella. Pral leste well kek phagi wi-rakedo. Job mukas ko merepen pal peste, un djas an o djipen." 
John5:25 Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Ko tsiro wella un hi kanna kai, kai i mule shunenn i gole o Debleskro tchawestar. Un kolla, kai shunenn, kai dell job gole, kolla djiwenna." 
John5:26 An o dadeste hi o djipen. Kowa das lo ninna peskro tchaweste, te well an leste ko djipen." 
John5:27 Job hi o Mensheskro Tchawo. Un o Dewel das an leskro wast, te rakrell lo i phagi win pral i menshende." 
John5:28 Ma krenn bare jaka, te penau tumenge: Ko tsiro wella, kai i tsele mule shunenna, te kharell lo len." 
John5:29 Un jon wenn dran i mulengre khera win. Kolla, kai latcho koowa kran, wenn djides kerdo, te lenn le ko djipen, hoi gar pre-herella. Un kolla, kai tchilatcho koowa kran, wenn djido kerdo, te lenn le i phagi." 
John5:30 Mandar nai krau me tchi. Me rakrau o tchatchepen win, jaake har o Dewel mange penella. Kowa, hoi rakrau pral i mensheste win, hi tchatcho. Me krau gar, hoi me kamau. Me krau halauter, hoi kowa kamella, kai bitchras man.”" 
John5:31 “Me te penoms kokres pral mande win, wals kowa tchi moldo." 
John5:32 Man hi jek, kai penell tumenge, koon me hom. Kowa, hoi job penell pral mande, kowa hi tchatcho." 
John5:33 Tumer bitchran murshen pash o Johanneste, te shunenn lestar pral mande. Un job penas pral mande o tchatchepen." 
John5:34 Man hunte well kek mensho, kai penell pral mande win. Hi tumenge, kai rakrom pral kowa, hoi o Johanni pral mande penas, te patsenn tumer un wenn dran o tchilatchepen un o merepen win lino." 
John5:35 O Johanni his i momeli, kai chatchas. Un i tikno tsiro hans tumer bachtelo pral kowa, hoi job penas un kras." 
John5:36 Man hi tchomone, hoi penell tumenge feteder o tchatchepen pral mande win har o Johanni. Kowa hi ko koowa, hoi krau, kolestar o dad mange penas, te krap kowa. Kowa sikrella, kai o dad bitchras man." 
John5:37 Ninna miro dad, kai bitchras man, penas tumenge, koon me hom. Tumer shunan les gar, witar gar dikan les tumer." 
John5:38 Tumer patsenn gar an tumare djia, hoi job penas. Doleske patsenn tumer gar, kai me kowa hom, kones o Dewel bitchras." 
John5:39 Tumer rodenn o djipen an o Debleskro lab un patsenn, kai hatsenn kote ko djipen, hoi gar pre-herella. Un tchatchepah, o Debleskro lab rakrell mandar." 
John5:40 Pash mande kamenn tumer gar te well, te lenn ko djipen, hoi gar pre-herella." 
John5:41 Hi mange tchi moldo, te wap sharedo i menshendar." 
John5:42 Me prindjrau tumen un djinau, kai hi gar o Debleskro kamlepen an tumende." 
John5:43 Miro dad bitchras man pash tumende. Tumer lan man gar pre. Te well i wawar, koles kek bitchras, koles lenn tumer pre." 
John5:44 Har nai patsenn tumer mange? Tumer rodenna, te well jek i wawarestar sharedo. Te wenn tumer o Deblestar sharedo, kowa hi tumenge tchi moldo." 
John5:45 Ma patsenn, kai me phukrau ap tumende pash miro dadeste. Koi hi i wawar, kai phukrell ap tumende: O Mose, kolestar patsenn tumer, kai hi lo ap tumari rig." 
John5:46 Tumer te patsenn tchatchepah, hoi o Mose tumenge penas, patsans tumer ninna ap mande. Job tchinas pral mande." 
John5:47 Tumer te patsenn gar, hoi o Mose tchinas an peskre lila, har nai patsenn tumer, hoi me tumenge penau?”" 
John6:1 Pal i tsiro djas o Jesus ap i wawar rig o baro panjestar Galilea. Ko pani kharella ninna Tiberias. 
John6:2 Bud bud menshe djan leske palla. Jon dikan, hawo baro koowa job an o Debleskri soor kras ap i nasslende." 
John6:3 Khetne peskre malentsa djas o Jesus ap i berga, un beshas pes lentsa tele." 
John6:4 His i tikno tsiro glan i biboldengre bare diwessa, kai kharenna Passa." 
John6:5 Har o Jesus dikas, kai bud bud menshe leske palla djan, putchas lo o Filipestar: “Kai nai ginah mer jaake bud mare, te well i tsele menshen chapaske?”" 
John6:6 Job kamas te dikell, har leskro patsepen hi. Doleske putchas job lestar kowa. O Jesus djinas kokres, hoi job kamas te krell." 
John6:7 O Filipo penas: “Ninna te wals men dui-sheel rupene beme, wals kowa gar doha, te lell hakeno i tikno kotar maro.”" 
John6:8 Jek leskre malendar, o Andreas, ko phraal o Simon Petrestar, penas ap o Jesuseste:" 
John6:9 “Kate hi i tchawo. Koles hi pantch mare un dui matche. Kowa hi tchi jaake bud menshenge.” 
John6:10 O Jesus penas: “Penenn i menshenge, te beshenn pen le!” Koi his bud senlepen. Un jon beshan pen koi. Kolla his nai jaake pantch serja (5.000) mursha." 
John6:11 Un o Jesus las kol mare, parkras pes pash o Debleste un das len i menshende. Kowa kras lo ninna kol matchentsa. Un hakeno las jaake bud, har job kamas." 
John6:12 Har jon halauter tchalo his, penas job ap peskre malende: “Tchiwenn i tsele kotja khetne, hoi pral atchan, te djal kowa gar nashedo!”" 
John6:13 Koi tchiwan leskre mala halauter khetne, hoi pral atchas kol marendar. Koi wan deesh-te-dui marengre gone pherdo kol pantch marendar." 
John6:14 Har kol menshe dikan, hoi o Jesus kras an o Debleskri soor, penan le: “Kowa hi tchatchepah ko Debleskro rakepaskro, kolestar penlo was, kai well lo ap kai phub.”" 
John6:15 O Jesus haiwas, kai kaman jon les te taprell, te krenn le les lengro baro rai. Doleske djas job dureder pral ap koi berga, te well lo peske kokres." 
John6:16 Har i rat was, djan leskre mala tele pash o pani," 
John6:17 djan an i bero, un uleran wergel o pani, te wenn le an o foro Kapernaum. His rati, un o Jesus his gar pash lende." 
John6:18 Koi phurdas i baro sorelo ducho pral o pani. Un o pani was diwjo. 
John6:19 Har leskre mala pantch, shob kilometarja win ap o baro pani his, dikan le o Jesuses: Job djas ap o pani, un was pash o bero. Un jon lan traash." 
John6:20 Job penas: “Me hom! Ma darenn!” 
John6:21 Koi kaman jon les an o bero te lell. Ap jek kopo his le ap i wawar panjeskri rig, kote, kai jon kaman te djal." 
John6:22 O wawar diwes putchan pendar kol menshe, kai atchan ap i wawar panjeskri rig, kai o Jesus hi. Jon dikan, kai taissar jek bero tchiddo his pash o pani, un kai leskre mala djan penge. Jon djinan, o Jesus his gar pash lende." 
John6:23 Koi wan wawar bere dran o foro Tiberias, un tchiwan pen kote, kai chans le ko maro, koleske o Jesus parkras pes pash o Debleste." 
John6:24 Har kol menshe haiwan, kai o Jesus buder gar koi hi, witar gar leskre mala, beshan pen jon an kol bere, uleran wergel o baro pani, un wan an o foro Kapernaum, te rodenn les le." 
John6:25 Kote hatsan le les, un putchan lestar: “Sikepaskro, kaana wal tu kate?”" 
John6:26 Penas o Jesus: “Tchatchepah, me penau tumenge: Tumer rodan man gar doleske, kai dikan i baro koowa, hoi krom an o Debleskri soor. Tumer chan ko maro, un wan tchalo. Doleske rodenn tumer man."
