John19:41 Kote, kai o Jesus ap o trushel dino was, his i baar. An koi baar his i newo mulengro kheer. Koi his kek mensho dren tchiddo." 
John19:42 Un har dikan le, kai ko mulengro kheer gar dur hi, tchiwan le kote o Jesuses sik dren. Len his kek tsiro. O Debleskro diwes wals sik." 
John20:1 Sik taissarlake, pal o Debleskro diwes, har gomme rati his, was i Maria Magdalena pash ko mulengro kheer, un dikas, kai ko bar buder gar glan o wudar hi." 
John20:2 Koi nashas joi pash o Simon Petreste un pash ko wawareste kol deesh-te-dujendar, koles, kai kamas o Jesus o djijestar, un penas ap lende: “Jon lan o rajes dran ko mulengro kheer win. Un mer djinah gar, kai jon les tchiwan.”" 
John20:3 Koi djas o Petro un ko wawar pash ko mulengro kheer. 
John20:4 Kol dui nashan khetne. Ko wawar nashas sikeder har o Petro. Jaake was job glan leste pash o mulengro kheer," 
John20:5 dikas koi dren, un dikas kol laintikre kotja kote tchiddo. Job djas gar dren." 
John20:6 Pal leste was o Simon Petro un djas an ko mulengro kheer dren, un dikas kol laintikre kotja kote tchiddo." 
John20:7 Ko diklo, kai trul o Jesuseskro shero pandlo his, his gar pash kol wawar laintikre kotja tchiddo. Kowa his khetne pandlo, un his kokres tchiddo." 
John20:8 Kanna djas ninna ko wawar o Jesuseskre malendar dren, kai glan leste pash ko mulengro kheer was. Un job dikas un patsas." 
John20:9 Jon haiwan gar, hoi an o Debleskro lab tardo hi, kai job hunte stella i mulendar pre." 
John20:10 Pal kowa djan kol dui pale khere. 
John20:11 I Maria his win glan o mulengro kheer tardo un rowas. Har joi jaake rowas, dikas li an o mulengro kheer dren." 
John20:12 Kote, kai o Jesus tchiddo his, dikas joi dui bolepangren an parne ripja beshdo. Ko jek his kote, kai leskro shero tchiddo his, un ko wawar, kai leskre herja his." 
John20:13 “Hoske roweh tu, romnija?” putchan kol bolepangre i Mariatar. “Jon lan miro rajes krik,” penas li, “un me djinau gar, kai jon les tchiwan.”" 
John20:14 Un har joi kowa penas, rissras pes li trujel, un dikas o Jesuses. Job his glan late tardo, un joi prindjras les gar." 
John20:15 Koi penas o Jesus ap late: “Romnija, hoske roweh tu? Kones rodeh tu?” I Maria patsas: Job hi kowa, kai budrell an i baar. Doleske penas li: “Romeha, te anal tu les krik, pen mange, kai tu les tchiwal, te djap koi, un lap les pale!”" 
John20:16 “Maria!” penas o Jesus. Koi rissras pes li trujel, un penas ap hebretikes: “Rabuni!” Kowa kharella Sikepaskro." 
John20:17 Penas o Jesus ap late: “Ma tape ap mande! Me djom gomme gar pash o dadeste pale. Dja pash mire phralende un pen lenge: Me djau pash miro dadeste un pash tumaro dadeste un pash miro Debleste un pash tumaro Debleste.” 
John20:18 Koi djas i Maria Magdalena pash o Jesuseskre malende, un penas lenge: “Me dikom maro rajes!” Un joi penas lenge, hoi job lake penas." 
John20:19 Har rati his ap kau diwes, – kowa his i kurko – his o Jesuseskre mala khetne. I darjatar kol biboldendar his lengro wudar klidedo. Ap jek kopo was o Jesus dren, un djas mashkral lende, un penas ap lende: “O Debleskri bacht tumentsa!”" 
John20:20 Har job kowa penas, sikras job lende peskre wasta, un peskri rig. Koi wan o Jesuseskre mala bachtelo, kai dikan le pengro rajes." 
John20:21 Pale penas o Jesus ap lende: “O Debleskri bacht tumentsa! Har miro dad man bitchras, jaake bitchrau me tumen.”" 
John20:22 Un har job kowa penas, phurdas job ap lende, un penas: “Lenn o Debleskro Ducho!" 
John20:23 Ap koneste tumer penenna: Tiri doosh hi krik lino, koleske well li krik lino. Un ap koneste tumer penenna: Tiri doosh atchell ap tute, ap koleste atchell li.”" 
John20:24 O Thomas, jek kol deesh-te-dujendar, koles dan le ninna Didimo gole, his gar koi pashel, har o Jesus pash lende was." 
John20:25 Ap leste penan i wawar kol deesh-te-dujendar: “Mer dikam maro rajes!” Job penas ap lende: “Te dikau me gar leskre wasta, kai saster dren dino was, un te tchiwau me gar miro gushto koi dren un miro wast an leskri rig, patsau me kowa gar.”" 
John20:26 Un pal ochta diwessa his o Jesuseskre mala pale khetne an ko kheer. Un o wudar his klidedo. Kau kopo his o Thomas pash lende. Ap jek kopo his o Jesus mashkral lende tardo, un penas: “O Debleskri bacht tumentsa!”" 
John20:27 Pal kowa penas job ap o Thomas: “Tchip tiro gushto ap mire wasta, un tchip tiro wast an miri rig. Atch gar har jek, kai patsell gar. Pats kanna!”" 
John20:28 Koi penas o Thomas ap leste: “Miro rai un miro Dewel!” 
John20:29 “Kanna, kai dikal man, patseh tu,” penas o Jesus. “Bachtele hi kolla, kai patsenna, ninna te dikenn le man gar.”" 
John20:30 Bud wawar baro koowa kras o Jesus an o Debleskri soor glan peskre malende, kai gar an kau liil tchinlo hi." 
John20:31 Kawa was tchinlo, te patsenn tumer, kai o Jesus ko baro rai hi, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job. Job hi o Debleskro tchawo. Un te patsenn ap leste, lenn tumer o tchatcho djipen lestar." 
John21:1 Pal kowa mukas pes o Jesus glan peskre malende pale te dikell, har jon pash o baro pani Tiberias his. Un kowa was jaake:" 
John21:2 O Simon Petro un o Thomas, kowa, kai dan le les Didimo gole, un o Natanael dran o gab Kana an o them Galilea, un kol Zebedeskre tchawe un wawar dui o Jesuseskre malendar his koi khetne." 
John21:3 Un o Simon Petro penas ap lende: “Me djau te matchrell.” “Mer kamah tuha te djal,” penan kol wawar. Jon djan win un djan an o bero dren. Un koi rati tapran le tchi." 
John21:4 Sik taissarlake his o Jesus pash o pani tardo, un leskre mala prindjran les gar." 
John21:5 Un o Jesus putchas lendar: “Tapran tumer tchi?” “Na-a,” penan le." 
John21:6 Penas o Jesus: “Witsrenn tumare matchengre gone tchatches win pash o bero! Un tumer taprenna i matche.” Koi witsran jon i matchengre gone win, un tapran jaake bud matche, kai tserdan le nai i matchengre gone buder gar dran o pani win." 
John21:7 Koi penas ko jek kol deesh-te-dujendar, koles o Jesus o djijestar kamas, ap o Petreste: “Kowa hi maro rai.” Har o Simon Petro kowa shunas, riwas lo peskro pralstuno ripen an, hoi riwas lo win, un witsras pes an o pani, te well lo sikeder ap o them." 
John21:8 Kol wawar mala wan an ko bero, un tserdan ko matchengro gono pal pende. Jon his gar dur o themestar, nai well sheel metarja." 
John21:9 Har jon dran o bero djan, dikan le i jag. Koi his pekle matche pre. Maro his ninna koi." 
John21:10 Un o Jesus penas ap lende: “Anenn kol matchendar, kai tumer kanna tapran!”" 
John21:11 Koi djas o Simon Petro pale an o pani dren, un tserdas ko matchengro gono ap o them. Koi his sheel-te-pantch-deesh-te-triin (153) bare matche dren. Ninna te his jaake bud matche koi dren, djas o matchengro gono gar paash." 
John21:12 “Awenn un chan!” penas o Jesus ap lende. Kek lendar putchas lestar: Koon hal tu? Halauter djinan, kai job lengro rai hi." 
John21:13 O Jesus was pash lende, las ko maro, un das les lende. Jaake kras job ninna kol matchentsa." 
John21:14 Kowa his o triinto kopo, kai mukas pes o Jesus glan peskre malende te dikell pal kowa, har job i mulendar djido was." 
John21:15 Pal o chapen penas o Jesus ap o Simon Petreste: “Simon, tu o Johanneskro tchawo, kameh tu man budeder har kal tsele wawar man kamenna?” “Awa, rai!” penas job ap leste. “Tu djineh, kai me kamau tut o djijestar.” “De mire tikne bakren te chal!” penas o Jesus." 
John21:16 I duito kopo putchas o Jesus lestar: “Simon, tu, o Johanneskro tchawo, kameh tu man o djijestar?” “Awa, rai!” penas job. “Tu djineh, kai me kamau tut o djijestar.” “De garda ap mire bakre!” penas o Jesus ap leste." 
John21:17 O Jesus putchas lestar o triinto kopo: “Simon, tu, o Johanneskro tchawo, kameh tu man o djijestar?” Koi was o Petreske ropaske pral kowa, kai job triin kope putchas: Kameh tu man o djijestar? Un job penas: “Rai, tu djineh halauter. Tu djineh, kai me tut kamau o djijestar.” Penas o Jesus: “De mire bakren te chal!" 
John21:18 Tchatchepah, me penau tuke: Har tu terno hals, pandal tu tiri dori kokres trul tiro ripen, un djal kote, kai tu kamal. Te wal tu phuro, rikreh tu tire wasta glan tute, un i wawar pandell tire wasta khetne, un anell tut kote, kai tu gar kameh te djal.”" 
John21:19 Jaake kamas o Jesus o Petreste te sikrell, har job merella un an peskro merepen o Debles bares un railes krella. Pal kowa penas o Jesus ap leste: “Am mantsa!”" 
John21:20 O Petro rissras pes trujel, un dikas koles kol deesh-te-dujendar, kai o Jesus les o djijestar kamas. Job his kowa, kai tchiwas pes ap o Jesuseskro betch an koi rati, har jon khetne chan, un putchas lestar: “Rai, koon mendar phukrella ap tute?”" 
John21:21 Har o Petro koles dikas, putchas job o Jesusestar: “Rai, hoi well dran koleste?”" 
John21:22 Penas o Jesus ap leste: “Te kamau me, te atchell job djido, bis te wau pale, palle hi kowa gar tiro koowa. Am tu mantsa!”" 
John21:23 Jaake was mashkral kol patslende penlo: Kowa merella gar. O Jesus penas gar, kai kowa gar merella. Job penas: “Te kamau me, te atchell job djido, bis te wau pale, palle hi kowa gar tiro koowa!”" 
John21:24 Kau maal o Jesusestar hi kowa, kai nai penell, kai kowa lauter tchatcho hi. Job dikas kowa un tchinas les an kau liil. Un mer djinah, kai kowa, hoi job penas, tchatcho hi." 
John21:25 Hi ninna bud wawar koowa, hoi o Jesus kras. Te wals kowa lauter an i lila tchinlo, jek pal o wawar, wals i phub gar baro doha kol tsele pesse lilenge, patsau me." 
Acts1:1 Latcho Theofilo, an miro ersto liil tchinom tuke lauter, hoi o Jesus kras, un i menshende sikras," 
Acts1:2 jaake rah har job gomme gar an o bolepen djas. Glan kowa, kai djas lo an o bolepen, rakras lo kolentsa, kolen job win rodas, te wenn le leskre bitchepangre, un penas lenge an i soor, hoi das les o Debleskro Ducho, hoi jon hunte krenna." 
Acts1:3 Pal peskro merepen, djiwas lo star-deesh (40) diwessa kate ap kai phub, un mukas pes lendar te dikell bud kope. Un tchatchepah jon dikan, kai hi job djido. Un job rakras lentsa pral o tsiro, kai hi o Dewel o rai pral i tsele menshende." 
Acts1:4 Har job lentsa khetne his, penas job lenge soreles: “Atchenn an o foro Jerusalem, un djan gar krik, jaake rah har bitchras miro dad an o bolepen gomme gar peskro Ducho ap tumende, jaake har penom les tumenge." 
Acts1:5 Har o Johanni taufras tumen, tchiwas lo tumen an o pani. O Dewel tchiwell o Debleskro Ducho ap tumende. Un o tsiro well sik, kai kowa wella.”" 
Acts1:6 Kolla, kai khetne wan, putchan lestar: “Rai, kreh tu an kau tsiro o them Israel pale baro un sorelo?”" 
Acts1:7 Koi penas o Jesus: “O tsiro, kai o dad kowa krella, hi leskro koowa. Tumer hunte djinenn kowa gar." 
Acts1:8 Ap tumende well o Debleskro Ducho un dell tumen i bari soor. Palle rakrenn tumer mandar an o foro Jerusalem, un an o tselo them Judea, un an o them Samaria, un ap i tseli phub.”" 
Acts1:8 Ap tumende well o Debleskro Ducho un dell tumen i bari soor. Palle rakrenn tumer mandar an o foro Jerusalem, un an o tselo them Judea, un an o them Samaria, un ap i tseli phub.”" 
Acts1:9 Har job kowa penas, was job glan lengre jaka an o bolepen hadedo, un i wolka las les pre." 
Acts1:10 Har jon leske palla dikan, har job an o bolepen djas, his dui mursha an bijale ripja pash lende tardo." 
Acts1:11 Kolla penan: “Murshale dran o them Galilea, hoske han tumer koi tardo, un dikenn an o bolepen? Kau Jesus, kai djas tumendar krik an o bolepen, kowa well jaake dran o bolepen pale, har dikan tumer les an o bolepen te djal.”" 
Acts1:12 Palle djan jon o djeteskri berga tele un pale an o foro Jerusalem. Koi berga his gar dur kau forestar krik. 
Acts1:13 An o foro Jerusalem djan le an ko kheer, an koi pralstuni isema, kai jon khetne atchan: O Petro, o Johanni, o Jakobo, o Andreas, o Filipo, un o Thomas, o Bartolomeo, un o Mateo, un o Jakobo, koleskro dad o Alfeo hi, un o Simon, kai hi kol menshendar, kai kharenna Zelotarja, un o Judas, o Jakobeskro tchawo." 
Acts1:14 Kalen lauteren his jek dji un jek djipen un mangan o Debles an. Pash lende his ninna djuwja, un i Maria, o Jesuseskri dai, un o Jesuseskre phrala." 
Acts1:15 An kolla diwessa wan bud patsle khetne, sheel-te-biish menshe. Mashkral lende stas o Petro pre un penas:" 
Acts1:16 Mire phrala, kowa, hoi an o Debleskro lab pral o Judas tchinlo hi, hunte was jaake. Glan rah tsiro penas o Debleskro Ducho o Davideske kowa, hoi wella pral o Judaseste. O Judas sikras o drom kolende, kai tapran o Jesuses." 
Acts1:17 Job his jek mendar. O Jesus rodas men khetne win, te was mer leskre bitchepangre." 
Acts1:18 O Judas ginas peske i kotar phub kol lowentsa, hoi job las, har job ap o Jesuseste phukras. Job peras o shereha glan tele ap koi phub, hoi job peske ginas, un leskre tsele buke wan dran leskro per win. Un job meras." 
Acts1:19 I tsele menshe an o foro Jerusalem shunan kowa. Doleske penenn jon ap ko kotar phub, kai o Judas meras: Hakeldamach. Kowa kharella ap lengro rakepen ratli phub." 
Acts1:20 An o Debleskre gilja hi tchinlo: Leskro kheer hunte djal paash, un kek mensho djiwella koi dren. Un leskri budi hunte krell i wawar." 
Acts1:21 Doleske hunte rodas i wawar murshes win. Kowa hunte well i mursh, kai ko tselo tsiro mentsa khetne his, har o rai Jesus mank mende his," 
Acts1:22 ko tsirestar, kai mukas job pes o Johannestar te taufrell, bis ap ko diwes, kai was lo mendar an o bolepen lino. Kau mursh hunte penell mentsa khetne i menshenge, kai o Jesus i mulendar pre stas." 
Acts1:23 Un jon rodan dui murshen win: o Matias un o Josef, koles dan le ninna Barsabas un Justo gole." 
Acts1:24 Palle mangan jon o Debles un penan: “Rai, tu prindjreh i tsele menshengre djia. Sike mende, kones tu kol dujendar win rodal," 
Acts1:25 te penell job i menshenge o latcho lab o Jesus Kristestar un krell koi budi, hoi o Judas mukas. Kowa mukas men un djas peske.”" 
Acts1:26 Un jon witsran i kashta, un jek kasht sikras ap o Matias. Un job was o Jesuseskro bitchepaskro jaake har i wawar deesh-te-jek Jesuseskre bitchepangre." 
Acts2:1 Ap i biboldengro baro diwes, hoi kharella Fingsta his jon lauter an jek kheer khetne." 
Acts2:2 Ap jek kopo phurdas i sorelo un diwjo ducho dran o bolepen an ko tselo kheer, kai jon khetne his." 
Acts2:3 Koi dikan le tchomone, hoi hi har jagakre tchipja. Un ap hakeneste tchiwas pes jek tchip." 
Acts2:4 Un jon wan lauter pherdo Debleskro Ducho, un rakran an wawar rakepen. Un jon rakran ko rakepen, hoi o Debleskro Ducho len das." 
Acts2:5 Ap ko tsiro his an o foro Jerusalem bibolde dran bud themma, kai mangan o Debles an." 
Acts2:6 Har jon ko baro un sorelo ducho shunan, wan jon lauter koi khetne, un kran bare jaka, har hakeno shunas len an leskro rakepen te rakrell." 
Acts2:7 “Kowa dell gar!” dan i bibolde gole. “Kolla, kai rakrenn kote, hi dran o them Galilea." 
Acts2:8 Har well kowa, kai jon an maro rakepen rakrenna, har te wans le an maro them boldo?" 
Acts2:9 Mer wah dran i themma Partia, Media, Elam, Mesopotamia, Judea, Kappadocia, Pontus, Asia, Frigia, Pamfilia, Egiptia, dran o foro Kirene, kai hi an o them Libia, un ninna dran o foro Rom." 
Acts2:9 Mer wah dran i themma Partia, Media, Elam, Mesopotamia, Judea, Kappadocia, Pontus, Asia, Frigia, Pamfilia, Egiptia, dran o foro Kirene, kai hi an o them Libia, un ninna dran o foro Rom." 
Acts2:10  
Acts2:11 Wawar mendar wan dran i themma Arabia un Kreta. Mer shunah len an maro rakepen te rakrell, hawo baro koowa o Dewel kras!”" 
Acts2:12 Un i bibolde dan i wasta pral o shero khetne, un djinan gar buder, hoi kowa hi. Un jek putchas i wawarestar: “Hoi well kowa?”" 
Acts2:13 Wawar san len win, un penan: “Kol mursha hi mato!”" 
Acts2:14 Koi stas o Petro un kol wawar deesh-te-jek Jesuseskre bitchepangre pre, un o Petro das gole, un penas ap i biboldende: “Murshale dran o them Judea, un tumer tsele wawar, kai djiwenn kanna an o foro Jerusalem, me kamau tumenge te penell, hoi kate lauter djala kolentsa, kai rakrenna an wawar rakepen. Shunenn, hoi tumenge penau!" 
Acts2:14 Koi stas o Petro un kol wawar deesh-te-jek Jesuseskre bitchepangre pre, un o Petro das gole, un penas ap i biboldende: “Murshale dran o them Judea, un tumer tsele wawar, kai djiwenn kanna an o foro Jerusalem, me kamau tumenge te penell, hoi kate lauter djala kolentsa, kai rakrenna an wawar rakepen. Shunenn, hoi tumenge penau!" 
Acts2:15 Kol mursha hi gar mato, har tumer penenna. Hi enjenge taissarlake." 
Acts2:16 Kowa, hoi tumer kate dikenna, penas o Debleskro rakepaskro Joel glan i rah tsiro:" 
Acts2:17 Ko tsiro wella, penell o Dewel, kai me tchiwau miro Debleskro Ducho ap i tsele menshende. Un tumare tchawe un tcha dikenn nai glan-wi, hoi wella. Un i terne mursha dikenn kowa, hoi o Dewel len sikrell, un i phure mursha denn suni." 
Acts2:18 Ninna ap mire budepangre, mursha har djuwja, tchiwau me miro Debleskro Ducho. Un jon penenn i menshenge mire laba." 
Acts2:19 Un me kamau baro un sorelo koowa te krap, an o bolepen un ap i phub. Tumer dikenn rat, un jag, un tampa." 
Acts2:20 O kham well kalo, un o tchon well lolo har o rat. Koi djinenn tumer, te well ko baro diwes sik, kai well o rai Jesus pale." 
Acts2:21 Un koon ap leste gole della, koles lell lo dran o tchilatchepen un o merepen win." 
Acts2:22 Murshale dran Israel, shunenn kal laba, hoi penau tumenge! O Dewel bitchras ko murshes, o Jesuses dran Nazaret, pash tumende. Kowa kras baro un sorelo koowa mank tumende, hoi kek wawar nai krella. Jaake sikras o Dewel, kai o Jesus lestar was. Tumer djinenn kowa, un dikan kowa lauter." 
Acts2:23 Tumer dan o Jesuses an i wasta kolendar, kai gar ap o Debleste patsenna. Un kolla dan les ap o trushel, un kote meras job. Un hoi tumer leha kran, kowa his jaake glan-diklo o Deblestar." 
Acts2:24 Ko Jesuses kras o Dewel djido. Job las les i mulendar win, un kek soor nai rikras les pash i mulende pale." 
Acts2:25 Ninna o David rakras o Jesusestar, har job penas: Me dikau hako tsiro ap o Debleste, miro rajeste. Job dell man soor, te rikrap man ap leste." 
Acts2:26 Doleske hom me bachtelo an o dji un me giwau. Ninna te merau, djinau:" 
Acts2:27 Tu mukeh man gar pash i mulende, un kameh gar, te merell miro mass tele." 
Acts2:28 Tu sikral mange ko drom, hoi dell man o djipen. Un pash tute hom me bachtelo.”" 
Acts2:29 Un o Petro penas dureder ap lende: “Murshale, mire phrala, mukenn man tumenge te penell, hoi man ap o dji hi. Maro baro rai David meras, un was paskedo. Leskro mulengro kheer nai dikenn tumer kau diwes." 
Acts2:30 O David his i Debleskro rakepaskro, kai nai dikas glan-wi, hoi wella. O David djinas, hoi o Dewel leske penas, te well jek pal leste, hoi well o baro rai. Un kowa wella leskre menshendar. O Dewel das pes sowel, te well kowa jaake." 
Acts2:31 Un o Dewel mukas o David glan-wi te dikell, kai o Jesus Kristo i mulendar pre stella. Lestar penas o David, te atchell job gar pash i mulende, un te ferdjal gar leskro mass." 
Acts2:32 Kau Jesuses mukas o Dewel i mulendar pre te stell. Kowa djinah mer. Mer halauter dikam les djido. 
Acts2:33 Un o Dewel kras les rai pral halauter, un tchiwas o Debleskro Ducho ap leste, jaake har job penas. Un ko Debleskro Duches tchiwas o Jesus ninna ap mende. Kawa shunenn un dikenn tumer kate." 
Acts2:34 O David djas gar pre an o bolepen. Jaake rakras job gar pral peste, har job penas: O Dewel penas ap miro rajeste: Besh tut ap miri tchatchi rig," 
Acts2:35 bis te tchiwau kolen tel tire pire, kai kamenn tut gar." 
Acts2:36 I tsele menshe an Israel hunte djinenna, o Dewel kras, te hi kau Jesus, koles tumer ap o trushel dan, o rai pral halauter. Job hi ko baro rai, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job.”" 
Acts2:37 Har kol menshe kowa shunan, djas lenge kowa an lengro dji. Un jon putchan o Petrestar un kol wawar Jesuseskre bitchepangrendar: “Murshale, mire phrala, hoi kras mer?”" 
Acts2:38 Koi penas o Petro ap lende: “Tumer anan doosh ap tumende. Mangenn tumen tele glan o Debleste! Un mukenn tumen ap o Jesus Kristeskro lab te taufrell, te lell o Dewel tumari doosh tumendar tele, un te lenn tumer o Debleskro Ducho!" 
Acts2:39 O Dewel penas, te dell lo peskro Ducho tumende, un tumare tchawende, ninna kolende lauterende, kai kanna dur lestar hi, un kai job pash peste gole della.”" 
Acts2:40 Un bud wawar labentsa rakras o Petro lentsa, un mangas len, un penas ap lende: “Mukenn tumen win te lell dran o tchilatchepen, te lenn gar koi phagi, hoi well pral kal tchilatche menshende, kai djiwenn an kau tsiro.”" 
Acts2:41 Kolla, kai lan leskre laba an pengro dji pre, mukan pen te taufrell. Un ap ko diwes wan triin serja menshe ap o Jesuseste patslo." 
Acts2:42 Un hako tsiro wan le khetne un shunan, hoi o Jesuseskre bitchepangre lenge penan. Un jon chan o maro khetne, un mangan o Debles an." 
Acts2:43 Un o Jesuseskre bitchepangre kran bud baro un sorelo koowa, hoi kek wawar nai krella. Un i traash was pral i menshende." 
Acts2:44 Kolla, kai patslo wan, atchan lauter khetne. Un jon tchiwan pengro tselo brawlepen khetne, un kowa his lauterenge koi." 
Acts2:45 Jon bikran kowa, hoi len his, i kotar phub un wawar kutch koowa, un dan les kol patslende, kai len tchi his." 
Acts2:46 Hako diwes wan le khetne an o Debleskro baro kheer. Jon chan o maro khetne an i khera. Un jon his bachtelo, te dan jon nai i phralen ninna te chal. Kowa kran le o djijestar." 
Acts2:47 Jon sharan o Debles, un i tsele menshe dikan latches ap lende. Un hako diwes wan wawar menshe koi pashel, hoi patslo wan." 
Acts3:1 His jek diwes, his trinenge, koi djan o Petro un o Johanni an o Debleskro baro kheer, te mangenn le o Debles an." 
Acts3:2 Kote his i mursh, kowa his bango jaake rah har djiwell lo. Leskre menshe beshan les hako diwes glan o shukar wudar glan o Debleskro baro kheer, te nai mangell lo lowe kolendar, kai djan an o Debleskro baro kheer dren." 
Acts3:3 Har job o Johannes un o Petres dikas, har jon an o Debleskro baro kheer kaman te djal, mangas job lendar lowe." 
Acts3:4 Jon dikan soreles ap leste, un o Petro penas ap leste: “Dik ap mende!”" 
Acts3:5 Un job dikas ap lende. Job patsas, te denn le les tchomone." 
Acts3:6 O Petro penas: “Rup un sonakai hi man gar. Hoi man hi, dau me tut. An o lab o Jesus Kristestar dran Nazaret penau me tuke: Ste pre un dja trujel!”" 
Acts3:7 Un o Petro tapras les pash o tchatcho wast, un har job les pre tserdas, wan leskre pire sorelo un sasto." 
Acts3:8 Job stas sik pre, nai djas, un djas lentsa an o Debleskro baro kheer, nashas un stas trujel un sharas o Debles." 
Acts3:9 Un i tsele menshe dikan, kai stas job trujel, un sharas o Debles." 
Acts3:10 Un jon prindjran les pale, kai job ko mangepaskro his, kai glan o Debleskro baro kheer beshdo his, glan ko wudar, kai kharell shukar wudar. Un jon kran bare jaka pral kowa, hoi jon dikan, hoi leha djas." 
Acts3:11 Un kau mursh djas buder gar lendar krik. Un i tsele menshe nashan pash lende khetne an koi isema, hoi kharell Salomeskri bari isema, un jon kran bare jaka." 
Acts3:12 Har o Petro kolen dikas, penas lo ap lende: “Murshale dran Israel, hoske krenn tumer sawe bare jaka, un dikenn ap mende? Kowa kras gar mari soor, witar gar maro patsepen, te nai nashell kawa mursh." 
Acts3:13 Na-a! O Dewel o Abrahamestar, un o Isaakestar un o Jakobestar, ko Dewel mare dadendar sikras tumende kate, hawi bari soor un railepen job peskro budepaskres, o Jesuses, das. Koles dan tumer an o Pilateskre wasta, un dan les buchoste, har o Pilato kamas les te djal mukell." 
Acts3:14 Tumer dan koles buchoste, kai was o Deblestar, un kai his kek tchilatchepen an leste. Un tumer mangan o Pilatestar, te mukell lo koles dran o stilepen te djal, kai maras jekes." 
Acts3:15 Ko rajes, kai o djipen della, maran tumer. Koles mukas o Dewel i mulendar pre te stell. Kowa djinah mer, mer dikam les." 
Acts3:16 Mer patsah ap leste. Doleske was kau mursh sasto. Tumer prindjrenn les lauter un djinenn, kai job nashas nai gar. Job patsas ap o Jesus Kristeste, un kowa kras les sasto." 
Acts3:17 Me djinau, mire phrala, kai tumer djinan gar, hoi tumer koi kran o Jesuseha. Un tumare pralstune djinan kowa witar gar." 
Acts3:18 Lauter was jaake, har o Dewel kowa penas. Leskre rakepangre penan glan i rah tsiro, kai hunte merell ko baro rai, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job un lell i menshen dran o tchilatchepen win." 
Acts3:19 Mukenn tumaro phuro djipen un awenn pash o Debleste, te lell job tumari doosh tumendar!" 
Acts3:20 Palle well ko latcho tsiro, kai dell tumen o Dewel newi soor. Job bitchrell tumenge koles, kai was tumenge glan i rah tsiro win rodedo. Kowa hi o Jesus Kristo." 
Acts3:21 Job atchell an o bolepen jaake rah, bis te well ko tsiro, kai wella lauter newes kerdo. Kowa penan menge o Debleskre rakepangre glan i rah tsiro. O Dewel penas les lenge." 
Acts3:22 O Mose penas: I Debleskro rakepaskro har me hom, sawes bitchrell o Dewel pash tumende. Kowa hi jek tumare menshendar. Shunenn ap hako lab, hoi job tumenge penella!" 
Acts3:23 Koon gar ap koleste shunella, koles hunte tchiwenn tumer pale, te nai well lo buder gar pash tumende." 
Acts3:24 Ninna o Samuel un kol wawar rakepangre, kai pal leste wan, rakran pral kal diwessa, kai mer kanna djiwah." 
Acts3:25 Kowa, hoi kol Debleskre rakepangre i menshenge penan, hi tumenge. Tumer han i tchawe kolendar. Un ko lab, hoi o Dewel tumare phurenge penas, un peskro wast pre das, hi ninna tumenge. Job penas ap o Abrahameste: Koi bacht, hoi dau tire menshende, djal dureder ap i tsele menshende, kai ap i phub hi." 
Acts3:26 Doleske bitchras o Dewel peskro budepaskres, o Jesuses, glanstunes pash tumende, te anell job tumenge o Debleskri bacht, te djal hakeno tumendar peskro tchilatcho dromestar tele.”" 
Acts4:1 Har o Petro un o Johanni kowa i menshenge penan, wan i rashaja pash lende, ninna ko pralstuno kol klistendar an o Debleskro baro kheer, un i Sadduzarja." 
Acts4:2 Jon his chojemen pral o Petreste un o Johanneste, te sikran kalla i menshende o Debleskro drom un penan, kai o Jesus i mulendar pre stas." 
Acts4:3 Doleske tapran le len un tchiwran len i rati an o stilepen. 
Acts4:4 Bud kolendar, kai shunan kol laba, hoi o Petro penas, wan patslo. Nai his pantch serja menshe." 
Acts4:5 O wawar diwes, taissarlake, wan i biboldengre pralstune un phureder un tchatchepangre an o foro Jerusalem khetne." 
Acts4:6 Ninna o Hannas, ko baro rashai, un o Kajafas, un o Johanno, un o Alexandro, un kol tsele wawar, kai his kol bare rashajengre menshendar, his koi pashel." 
Acts4:7 Un jon mukan o Jesuseskre bitchepangren glan pende te anell, un jon putchan lendar: “An koneskri soor un an koneskro lab kran tumer kowa?”" 
Acts4:8 Un o Petro, pherdo Debleskro Ducho, penas ap lende: “Tumer pralstune un tumer phureder, shunenn!" 
Acts4:9 Mer kram i latcho koowa ap i nasselo mensheste. Un doleske ham kanna glan tumende tardo. Tumer putchenn mendar, har job sasto was." 
Acts4:10 Jaake hunte djinenn tumer un i tsele menshe an o them Israel: O Jesus Kristo dran Nazaret, koles tumer ap o trushel dan, kras kau murshes sasto. Kau Jesuses mukas o Dewel i mulendar pre te stell." 
Acts4:11 Kowa hi ko bar, kai tumer ap i rig witsran. Kowa was i bar, kai hidjrell o tselo kheer." 
Acts4:12 Kek wawar har o Jesus kokres nai anell men pash o Debleste. Ap i tseli phub das o Dewel kek wawares, kai nai lell men dran o tchilatchepen un o merepen win.”" 
Acts4:13 Har jon dikan, har o Petro un o Johanni rakran, kai kek traash an lende his, kran le bare jaka. Un jon haiwan, kai kolla kek bare rakepangre un gosewe mursha hi, un djinan ninna, kai jon o Jesuseha khetne his." 
Acts4:14 Ninna dikan le ko murshes, kai sasto was, pash lende tardo, un nai penan buder tchi." 
Acts4:15 Koi bitchran le len win, un rakran mank pende un penan:" 
Acts4:16 “Hoi kras mer kal menshentsa? Hakeno an o foro Jerusalem djinell kanna, kai kran kolla i baro koowa, hoi kek wawar nai krella. Mer nai dah kowa gar buchoste." 
Acts4:17 Das len soreles trad, te penenn jon kekeske buder tchi o Jesusestar, te djal ko rakepen gar dureder pash i tsele menshende!”" 
Acts4:18 Un jon dan len gole, dan len trad, un penan ap lende: “Ma rakrenn buder tchi o Jesusestar! Ma penenn i menshenge tchi, hoi job tumenge penas!”" 
Acts4:19 O Petro un o Johanni penan ap lende: “Penenn menge, hi kowa mishto glan o Debleste, te shunas mer budeder ap tumende har ap o Debleste?" 
Acts4:20 Mer nai rikrah gar maro mui pral kowa, hoi dikam un shunam.”" 
Acts4:21 Koi dan le len soreles trad, un mukan len te djal. Jon hatsan tchi ap lende, kai nai dans jon lenge i phagi. I menshe sharan o Debles pral kowa, hoi koi djas." 
Acts4:22 Ko mursh, kai sasto was, his star-deesh bersha phuro." 
Acts4:23 Un har kolla mukan len te djal, wan jon pash i patslende, un penan lenge, hoi kol bare rashaja, un kol biboldengre phureder ap lende penan." 
Acts4:24 Har i patsle kowa shunan, mangan jon khetne o Debles an, un penan: “Rai, tu kral o bolepen un i phub, un o baro pani, un lauter, hoi djiwella." 
Acts4:25 O Debleskro Ducho rakras dran o Davideskro mui: Hoske hi i menshe ap kai phub tchilatcho? Hoske krenn jon kowa, hoi tchitcheske hi?" 
Acts4:26 I bare raja ap kai phub un i bare pralstune wan lauter khetne. Jon hi chojemen ap o Debleste un ap ko baro rajeste, kones o Dewel bitchras." 
Acts4:27 Tchatchepah, jon wan lauter an kau foro khetne: O Pilato, o Herodes, i Remarja, un i tsele bibolde dran bud themma. Jon hi chojemen ap tiro budepaskro Jesus, kai tutar was. Koles rodal tu win, maro Dewel, te well lo baro rai." 
Acts4:28 Jaake kran jon kowa, hoi tu glan i rah tsiro penal, te well kowa lauter jaake." 
Acts4:29 Rai, shuneh tu, kai jon men kanna trad denna? Mer ham tire budepangre. De men koi soor, te nai rakras tutar!" 
Acts4:30 Sike lende tiri soor! Kre i nasselen sasto, un kre bud baro un sorelo koowa an ko lab o Jesusestar, kai tutar was un tiro budepaskro hi!”" 
Acts4:31 Ap jek kopo, har jon o Debles an-mangan, trissas i phub kote, kai jon his. Un o Debleskro Ducho was ap lauterende. Un jon penan o Debleskro lab, un kek traash his an lende." 
Acts4:32 Kol tsele patslen his jek dji un jek djipen. Kek lendar penas: Ko brawlepen, hoi man hi, hi mange kokres. Na-a, kowa his lauterenge koi!" 
Acts4:33 Bari sorjah penan o Jesuseskre bitchepangre i menshenge, kai o Jesus i mulendar pre stas, un i menshe haiwan o Debleskro latchepen." 
Acts4:34 Hakenes his doha djipaske. Kolen, kai hi len i kotar phub, i kheer, un wawar koowa, bikran kowa," 
Acts4:35 un anan kol lowe pash i Jesuseskre bitchepangre. Un jon dan hakenes jaake bud, te his hakenes doha djipaske." 
Acts4:36 Jaake kras kowa ninna o Josef. Kowa his i Levitari un was dran o them Ciprus. O Jesuseskre bitchepangre dan les ninna Barnabas gole. Ko kharella ap lengro rakepen: O mursh, kai rakrell i menshentsa latcho, te hi lengro dji pharo." 
Acts4:37 Un koles his i kotar phub. Ko kotar phub bikras job, un anas kol lowe pash o Jesuseskre bitchepangre, te denn le kol lowe i patslende." 
Acts5:1 I mursh, kai kharas Ananias, leskri romni kharas Safira, jon khetne bikran i kotar phub." 
Acts5:2 Un job rikras lowe peske pale. Leskri romni djinas kowa. Un jon anan gar i tsele lowe glan o Jesuseskre bitchepangre. 
Acts5:3 O Petro penas ap o Ananias: “Hoske kral tu o bengeske tiro dji pre? Hoske chochral tu o Debleskro Duches, un rikral lowe tuke?" 
Acts5:4 Tu nai rikrals tiro kotar phub. Un har bikral les, nai rikrals kol lowe ninna. Har nai kral tu sawo koowa? Tu chochral gar i menshen. Tu chochral o Debles.”" 
Acts5:5 Har o Ananias kol laba shunas, peras job khetne un meras. Un i bari traash was ap kolende, kai shunan kowa." 
Acts5:6 Koi stan i terne mursha pre, un tchiwan pral leste i kotar plachta, hidjran les win un paskran les." 
Acts5:7 Pal i tsiro was leskri romni dren un djinas gar, hoi koi djas." 
Acts5:8 O Petro putchas latar: “Lan tumer jaake bud lowe, har tumer koi kotar phub bikran?” “Awa, jaake bud lowe lam,” penas li." 
Acts5:9 O Petro penas ap late: “Hoske kran tumer kowa win, un chochran o Debles? Kol mursha, kai paskran tiro romes, hi glan o wudar tardo, un hidjrenn ninna tut win.”" 
Acts5:10 Koi peras li khetne un meras. Un har i terne mursha dren wan, hatsan le lat mules, hidjran lat win, un paskran lat pash lakro romeste." 
Acts5:11 Koi was i bari traash pral i tsele patslende un pral kolende, kai shunan kowa." 
Acts5:12 Un o Jesuseskre bitchepangre kran bud baro un sorelo koowa an o Debleskri soor ap i menshende. Un i tsele patsle his an o Salomeskri bari isema an o Debleskro baro kheer khetne. 
Acts5:13 Kol wawar, kai gar patsle his, trashan, te beshenn le pen pash lende. Ninna te trashan le lendar, rakran le lendar mishto." 
Acts5:14 Bud mursha un djuwja patsan ap o Jesuseste un wan i patslentsa khetne. 
Acts5:15 Un i menshe hidjran pengre nasselen ap i dromma, un tchiwan len kote ap o tchiben. Jon penan penge, te well o Petro koi pashel un leskro shatto perell ap lende, wenn le sasto." 
Acts5:16 Ninna dran wawar forja, hoi trul o foro Jerusalem tchiddo his, anan jon i nasselen un kolen, kai an lende benga his. Un lauter wan sasto." 
Acts5:17 Ko baro rashai un kol Sadduzarja, kai pash leste his, kolla silweran ap o Jesuseskre bitchepangre," 
Acts5:18 un tapran len, un witsran len an o stilepen." 
Acts5:19 An i rati was i bolepaskro o Deblestar un kras kol wudja an o stilepen pre, un anas len win, un penas ap lende:" 
Acts5:20 “Djan an o Debleskro baro kheer, un penenn i menshenge halauter pral o djipen, hoi gar pre-herella.”" 
Acts5:21 Har jon kowa shunan, djan jon taissarlake an o Debleskro baro kheer un sikran i menshende o Debleskro drom. Ko baro rashai un kolla, kai pash leste his, dan i pralstune bibolden khetne gole, ninna i tsele phureden an o them Israel. Un jon bitchran i klisten an o stilepen, te anenn le len glan lende." 
Acts5:22 Un har jon an o stilepen djan, his jon buder gar kote. Un kol kliste wan pale un penan:" 
Acts5:23 “Ko stilepen his pandlo, un kol lurde his glan o wudar tardo. Un har i lurde menge pre pandan, his kek dren.”" 
Acts5:24 Har ko pralstuno klisto pral o Debleskro baro kheer un kol bare rashaja kowa shunan, djinan jon gar, hoi te patsenn le, un putchan pendar har kowa dureder djala." 
Acts5:25 Koi was jek un penas lenge: “Kol mursha, kai tumer stildo tchiwan, hi an o Debleskro baro kheer tardo, un penenn i menshenge o Debleskro lab.”" 
Acts5:26 Koi djas ko pralstuno klisto kol wawar klistentsa an o Debleskro baro kheer, un lan i Jesuseskre bitchepangre win. Kowa kran le kek sorjah. I kliste daran i menshendar, te marenn le len i barrentsa." 
Acts5:27 Un jon anan len glan kol tsele pralstunende, kai khetne wan. Un o baro rashai penas ap lende:" 
Acts5:28 “Mer dam tumen soreles trad, te rakrenn tumer tchi buder o Jesusestar. Un kanna well lestar rakedo an o tselo foro Jerusalem. Un tumer penenn, kai mer maram les. Kamenn tumer, te well leskro rat pral mende?”" 
Acts5:29 O Petro un i wawar Jesuseskre bitchepangre penan: “Mer hunte shunas ap o Debleste budeder har ap i menshende. 
Acts5:30 Ko Dewel mare phurendar mukas o Jesuses i mulendar pre te stell, koles, kai tumer ap o trushel dan un maran." 
Acts5:31 Koles hadas o Dewel un beshas les ap peskri tchatchi rig, te well lo rai un lell i menshen dran o tchilatchepen un o merepen win. Kowa kras o Dewel, te mukenn i menshe an o them Israel pengro phuro djipen, jaake te nai lell lo lengri doosh lendar krik." 
Acts5:32 Kowa dikam mer un penah nai tumenge, un o Debleskro Ducho ninna. Koles dell o Dewel kolende, kai shunenn ap leste.”" 
Acts5:33 Har jon kowa shunan, wan jon chojemen ap lende, un kaman len te marell." 
Acts5:34 Mank kol pralstunende his i Farisari, leskro lab his Gamalijel. Job his i biboldengro tchatchepaskro un an-diklo pash i tsele biboldende. Un kowa stas pre un penas: “Bitchrenn len i tikno tsiro win!”" 
Acts5:35 Un pale penas lo: “Murshale an Israel, denn garda un dikenn, hoi tumer kal menshentsa kamenn te krell!" 
Acts5:36 Glan i tsiro his i mursh, kowa kharas Thoidas. Job patsas pestar, te his lo i baro. Star-sheel mursha his pash leste, kai shunan ap leste. Palle was lo mulo dino. Un har job mulo his, atchan jon gar khetne. Un kek rakrell buder lendar." 
Acts5:37 Koi pal was i mursh dran o them Galilea, kowa kharas Judas. Kowa his an ko tsiro har i laba i biboldendar pre tchinlo wan. Kowa anas bud menshen ap peskri rig, te krenn le i kurepen i Remarjentsa. Ko Judas was ninna mulo dino, un kolla, kai pash leste his, hi gar buder koi. Un kek rakrell buder lendar." 
Acts5:38 Un kanna penau me tumenge: Mukenn tumare wasta kal menshendar! Mukenn len te djal! Te hi ko koowa i menshendar, palle atchella ko koowa gar." 
Acts5:39 Te hi ko koowa o Deblestar, palle nai phagenn les gar. Denn jak, te tchingrenn tumer gar ap o Debleste.” Un jon shunan ap o Gamalijel." 
Acts5:40 Palle dan jon o Jesuseskre bitchepangren gole, dan len dawa i tchupnijah, un dan len trad, te rakrenn le buder gar o Jesusestar. Un palle mukan le len te djal." 
Acts5:41 Koi djan jon penge i pralstunendar. Un jon his bachtelo, te hi le o Debleske jaake bud moldo, te rodas lo len win, te chan le dawa o Jesuseske." 
Acts5:42 Jon mukan gar tele, te penenn le o latcho lab o Jesus Kristestar. Hako diwes djan le an o Debleskro baro kheer un pash i menshende an i khera, un sikran len o Jesuseskro drom." 
Acts6:1 An kol diwessa, kai i patsle budeder wan, djas i tchingepen mashkral i patslende, kai rakran hebretikes, un kol patslende, kai rakran grichtikes. Mashkral kolla, kai rakran grichtikes, his djuwja, kolengre romma mulo his. Un kolla lan gar jaake bud chapaske har kolla, kai rakran hebretikes. Doleske his kolla, kai rakran grichtikes, chojedo ap kolende, kai rakran hebretikes." 
Acts6:2 Koi dan kol deesh-te-dui Jesuseskre bitchepangre kol tsele patslen khetne gole, un penan: “Hi gar mishto, te das mer o chapen win, un men wals buder kek tsiro, te penas i menshenge o Debleskro lab." 
Acts6:3 Doleske, mire phrala, rodenn mashkral tumende efta murshen win! Kolla hunte wenn mursha, kai hi pherdo Debleskro Ducho un goswepen. Kolla hunte lenn koi budi ap pende." 
Acts6:4 Mer kamah o Debles an-mangell, un i menshenge o Debleskro lab te penell.”" 
Acts6:5 Ko rakepen his i tsele patslenge mishto. Jon rodan o Stefanes win, koles his i sorelo patsepen un his i mursh pherdo Debleskro Ducho. Jon rodan ninna win o Filipo, o Prokoro, o Nikanor, o Timon, o Parmenas un o Nikolaus. Kowa his i gricho dran o foro Antiochia, kai las i biboldengro patsepen an un patsas kanna ap o Jesuseste." 
Acts6:6 Kol murshen anan le pash o Jesuseskre bitchepangre. Kolla tchiwan i wasta ap lende, un mangan o Debles, te dell lo len soor un goswepen an lengri budi." 
Acts6:7 O Debleskro lab was bud un budeder menshenge penlo, un bud wan patslo. An o foro Jerusalem wan ninna bud rashaja patslo." 
Acts6:8 O Stefano his i mursh pherdo Debleskro latchepen un Debleskri soor. Job kras bud baro un sorelo koowa an o Debleskri soor mank i biboldende. 
Acts6:9 Kote wan bibolde pash leste. Kolla wan dran bud biboldengre kangria. Jon his Libertarja, mursha dran i forja Kirene un Alexandria, un dran i themma Cilicia un Asia. Un jon rakran o Stefaneha un tchingran pen leha." 
Acts6:10 O Debleskro Ducho das les goswepen, te nai rakras kek lendar leske pale." 
Acts6:11 Palle anan le murshen ap lengri rig. Un kolla anan chochepen ap o Stefaneste pre. Jon penan: “Mer shunam, kai penas job djungele laba pral o Moseste un pral o Debleste.”" 
Acts6:12 Jon kran kol tsele menshen diwjo, ninna kol biboldengre phureden un tchatchepangren. Un jon wan ap leste pre, tapran les, un anan les glan i pralstune biboldende." 
Acts6:13 Kolla, kai chochepen ap leste pre anan, kolla penan: “Kau mursh mukell gar tele te rakrell lo djungele laba pral o Debleskro baro kheer un pral o Moseskre laba." 
Acts6:14 Mer shunam, har job penas: O Jesus dran Nazaret phagell o Debleskro baro kheer tele un krella, te hunte rikras mer buder gar ap kowa, hoi o Mose menge penas.”" 
Acts6:15 Un kol tsele pralstune dikan ap o Stefaneste, har leskro mui was jaake har i Debleskro bolepaskro." 
Acts7:1 Koi putchas ko baro rashai lestar: “Hi kowa tchatcho, hoi kolla penan?”" 
Acts7:2 Koi penas o Stefano: “Tumer phrala un dada, shunenn! Maro baro un railo Dewel mukas pes maro dadestar Abraham te dikell an o them Mesopotamia. Ap ko tsiro djiwas o Abraham gomme gar an o foro Haran." 
Acts7:3 Un o Dewel penas ap leste: Dja dran tiro them! Muk tire menshen, un dja an ko them, hoi me tuke sikrau!" 
Acts7:4 Koi djas o Abraham dran ko them Kaldea, un djiwas an o foro Haran. Un har leskro dad meras, anas o Dewel les an ko them, kai tumer kanna djiwenna." 
Acts7:5 O Dewel das les kek kotar phub an kau them, witar gar i tikno kotar. Un o Dewel das les peskro lab, te dell lo leskre tchawende i them. An ko tsiro his o Abrahames kek tchawo." 
Acts7:6 O Dewel penas ap leste: Tire tchawe, kai pal tute wenna, hi wi-themarja an i them, kai gar lengro hi. Star-sheel bersha hunte budrenn le i wawarenge tel duka un bare dawa." 
Acts7:7 Un kolla, kai len dan un dukran, kolen dau me i phagi. Un pal kowa djan le dran ko them win, un mangenn man kate an kau them an." 
Acts7:8 Un o Dewel das o Abrahameste peskro lab, te hi lo leskro Dewel un o Dewel lauterenge, kai pal leste wenna. Un job penas o Abrahameske, te mukell job pes ap peskro mass te tchinell. Ninna i tsele mursh tchawe, kai pal leste wenna, hunte wan tchinlo ap pengro mass. Un o Abraham las i tchawes, o Isaak. Un o Abraham tchinas les ap o mass, har job efta diwessa phuro his. Un o Isaak tchinas o Jakobes, un o Jakob peskre deesh-te-dui tchawen. Kolla hi mare phure dada, kolendar mer wam." 
Acts7:9 Mare phure dada silweran ap o Josefeste, un bikran les an o them Egiptia. Un o Dewel his pash leste," 
Acts7:10 un las les win dran halauter, hoi o Josefeske pharo his. Un o Dewel das les bud goswepen un kras, te dikas o baro rai pral o them Egiptia latcho ap o Josefeste. Ko baro rai kras, te was o Josef o rai pral o tselo them Egiptia un pral o tselo rajeskro kheer." 
Acts7:11 Un palle was i tsiro, kai bokan le an o tselo them Egiptia un an o them Kanaan. Un mare phure hatsan tchi te chal an o them Kanaan." 
Acts7:12 Har o Jakob shunas, kai an o them Egiptia djob della, bitchras job peskre tchawen an ko them, te ginenn le penge djob, un pal i tsiro bitchras lo len i duito kopo." 
Acts7:13 Har jon o duito kopo an o them Egiptia wan, prindjran le o Josefes. Koi djinas o baro rai pral o them, hawe menshendar o Josef his." 
Acts7:14 O Josef mukas peskro dades, un peskre tsele menshen an o them Egiptia te well. Kolla his efta-deesh-te-pantch menshe." 
Acts7:15 Jaake was o Jakob an o them Egiptia, un kote djiwas lo peskre tchawentsa. Kolla hi mare phure. Un kote meran le ninna." 
Acts7:16 Un lengre tchawe anan len an o them Kanaan un paskran len an o foro Sichem ap ko kotar phub, hoi ginas o Abraham kol menshendar, kolengro phuro dad o Hamor his." 
Acts7:17 Palle was ko tsiro, kai kowa was, hoi o Dewel o Abrahameske penas. I Israelitarja wan hako diwes budeder an o them Egiptia." 
Acts7:18 Koi was i wawar mursh baro rai pral o them Egiptia. Kowa djinas tchi o Josefestar," 
Acts7:19 un rodas i drom, har te rikrell lo mare menshen tele. Un jon hunte budran tel dawa, un hunte mukan pengre tikne tchawen, te merenn jon." 
Acts7:20 An ko tsiro was o Mose boldo. Un job his shukar an o Debleskre jaka. Triin tchon his job an peskro dadeskro kheer, un jon dan garda ap leste." 
Acts7:21 Un palle nai khatran le o Moses buder gar an o kheer. Un kote, kai tchiwan le les, hatsas les i tchai o baro rajestar pral o them Egiptia. Un joi las les pash peste un tserdas les pre, har te wals lo lakro tchawo." 
Acts7:22 Un gosewe Egiptarja sikran leste lauter, hoi jon djinan, jaake te was lo gosewo an lauter, hoi job rakras un kras." 
Acts7:23 Har o Mose star-deesh bersha phuro his, kamas lo pal peskre menshende, i Israelitarja, te dikell. Un job djas kote, kai budran le." 
Acts7:24 Un kote dikas job, kai jek leskre menshendar dawa chas. Un job djas koi, te well lo ap leskri rig, un das koi Egiptares pale un das les mulo." 
Acts7:25 O Mose patsas, kai peskre menshe haiwenna, kai o Dewel les bitchras, te lell lo len dran lengri bibacht win. Jon haiwan kowa gar." 
Acts7:26 O wawar diwes was job pash peskre menshende, har dui lendar tchingran. Un job das len trad, te tchingrenn le pen gar, un penas: Murshale, tumer han phrala, hoske tchingrenn?" 
Acts7:27 Kowa, kai kras ko tchingepen das les i spildini un penas: Hal tu i tchatchepaskro un i rai pral mende, te hunte shunas ap tute?" 
Acts7:28 Kameh tu man ninna mulo te dell, har tu taissar ko Egiptares mulo dal?" 
Acts7:29 Har o Mose kowa shunas, nashas job peske, un djas an ko them Midian. Koi wan leske dui tchawe boldo." 
Acts7:30 Star-deesh bersha pal kowa his o Mose an o mulo them pash koi berga Sinai. Koi mukas pes i Debleskro bolepaskro glan leste te dikell an i subjengro bur, hoi chatchas." 
Acts7:31 Hoi job kote dikas, nai patsas lo gar. Jaake djas lo pash ko bur, te nai dikell lo feteder, hoi kowa hi. Kote rakras o Dewel ap leste:" 
Acts7:32 Me hom o Dewel tire phurendar, o Dewel o Abrahamestar, o Isaakestar, un o Jakobestar. Un i bari traash was ap o Moseste, har job kowa shunas, un darjatar nai dikas lo gar kote pre." 
Acts7:33 Un o Dewel penas ap leste: Rib tire kircha win! Kote, kai tardo hal, hi o Debleskro them." 
Acts7:34 Me dikom, har mire menshe chan dawa an o them Egiptia. Un me shunom lengri gole un lengro ropen, un wom dran o bolepen tele, te lap len dran kau them win. Un me kamau, te djas tu an o them Egiptia." 
Acts7:35 O Dewel bitchras kau Moses, kai pash peskre menshende tchi moldo his. Kowa dikah mer koi pre, har jon penan: Koon kras tut pral mende tchatchepaskro un rai, te hunte shunas mer ap tute? O Dewel bitchras les, te well lo rai pral lende, un te anell lo len dran ko them win, kai jon pandle budepangre his. Kowa penas leske ko bolepaskro, kai dran i subjengro bur ap leste rakras." 
Acts7:36 Kau Mose anas i Israelitarjen win un kras baro un sorelo koowa an o Debleskri soor an o them Egiptia, un pash o lolo pani, un star-deesh bersha an o mulo them." 
Acts7:37 Kowa his o Mose, kai ap lende penas: O Dewel bitchrell tumenge i Debleskro rakepaskres har me hom. Kowa hi jek tumare menshendar." 
Acts7:38 Un har kol Israelitarja an ko mulo them pash koi berga Sinai glan o Debleste khetne wan, his o Mose ap i berga Sinai tardo mashkral o bolepaskro un mare phurende. Un o bolepaskro das les kol Debleskre laba, hoi denn o djipen, te anell o Mose len pash mende." 
Acts7:39 Mare phure kaman gar ap leste te shunell un kran, hoi jon kaman. Jon kaman te djiwell, har jon an o them Egiptia djiwan." 
Acts7:40 Ap o Aron penan le: Kre menge i dewel, kai dell garda ap mende un sikrell mende o drom! Mer djinah gar, hoi djas o Moseske, kai anas men dran o them Egiptia win." 
Acts7:41 An ko tsiro kran le i grumni dran sonakai, te well kaja lengro dewel. Un jon anan viechen, maran len un chatchran len lake, un wan bachtelo pral kowa, hoi jon kran." 
Acts7:42 O Dewel djas peske lendar un mukas len. Koi mangan jon i momlia an o bolepen an. Jaake was kowa, hoi tchinlo hi an o liil, kai o Debleskre rakepangre tchinan. Kote penell o Dewel: Murshale an Israel, mange chatchran tumer kek viechen, un anan kek chapen glan mande an kol star-deesh bersha, har hans an o mulo them." 
Acts7:43 Tumer hidjran ko kheer trujel, kai o Moloch dren hi. Ninna hidjran koi bolepaskri momeli tumentsa, kai Refan kharedo wella. Kol dujen kran tumer tumare wastentsa, te nai mangenn len an. Doleske tradau me tumen dran tumaro them win, un anau tumen pandlo an o them Babilonia, un dureder." 
Acts7:44 O Stefano penas dureder: Mare phuren his o Debleskro tikno kheer, hoi his kerdo dran viechengre balla, un hidjran les lentsa, har djan le an o mulo them trujel. Kau kheer kran le jaake, har o Dewel kowa o Moseste ap i berga sikras." 
Acts7:45 Mare phure hidjran kau kheer lentsa, bis te anas len o Josua an o them Kanaan. Kote djiwan wawar menshe, kai o Debles gar prindjrenna. Kolen tradas o Dewel win, un das ko them mare phurende. O Debleskro tikno kheer dran viechengre balla atchas an o them Kanaan un his gomme koi, har o David o baro rai was." 
Acts7:46 Ap koleste dikas o Dewel latches. Un o David mangas lestar, te nai krell lo leske i kheer dran barra, kai i tsele Israelitarja nai mangenn les an." 
Acts7:47 His gar o David, na-a, kowa his leskro tchawo, o Salomo, kai kras o Debleske i baro kheer dran barra." 
Acts7:48 O baro Dewel djiwell gar an khera, kai i menshe kran pengre wastentsa. Kowa penas glan rah tsiro o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Jesaja:" 
Acts7:49 O Dewel penas: O bolepen hi miro beshepaskro, un i phub hi tel mire pire tchiddo. Hawo kheer kamenn tumer mange te krell tumare wastentsa, kai djiwap dren?" 
Acts7:50 Me krom o bolepen un i phub mire wastentsa.” 
Acts7:51 Un o Stefano penas dureder ap lende: “Tumer kamenn tchi te haiwell. Tumaro dji hi har bar. Tumare kandentsa shunenn tchi, un kamenn gar ap o Debleskro Ducho te shunell. Jaake kran tumare phure. Jaake krenn ninna tumer." 
Acts7:52 Penenn mange: Dell jek Debleskro rakepaskro, kai lan tumare phure gar palla? Jon maran kolen, kai glan-wi penan, te well ko jek, kai hako tsiro o tchatchepen krella. Job was, un tumer phukran ap leste un maran les." 
Acts7:53 I bolepangre anan tumenge kol laba, kai penenna, hoi o Dewel tumendar kamella. Un tumer rikran tumen gar ap lende.”" 
Acts7:54 Har jon kowa shunan, hoi o Stefano lenge penas, djas lenge kowa an o dji, un i bari choli tapras len." 
Acts7:55 O Stefano, pherdo Debleskro Ducho, dikas an o bolepen pre, un dikas o Debleskro railepen un o Jesuses ap o Debleskri tchatchi rig tardo." 
Acts7:56 Un o Stefano penas: “Me dikau o bolepen pre, un o Menshengro Tchawes ap i tchatchi rig o Deblestar tardo.”" 
Acts7:57 Koi dan jon soreles gole, tchiwan pengre wasta ap i kanda, te shunenn le gar, un djan ap leste," 
Acts7:58 tradan les dran o foro win, un witsran barrentsa ap leste. Un kolla, kai witsran i barra, riwan pengre koola win, un i terno mursh, kai kharas Saulo, das ap lende jak." 
Acts7:59 Har jon ap leste i barrentsa witsran, das o Stefano gole: “Rai Jesus, le man pash tute!”" 
Acts7:60 Un job peras ap i phub tele, un das pale gole: “Rai, le koi doosh lendar!” Har job kowa penas, meras lo." 
Acts8:1 His mishto an o Sauleskre jaka, te maran le les. Pal ko diwes lan le i patslen soreles palla an o foro Jerusalem. Un i patsle nashan an o them Judea un an o them Samaria. I Jesuseskre bitchepangre atchan an o foro Jerusalem." 
Acts8:1 His mishto an o Sauleskre jaka, te maran le les. Pal ko diwes lan le i patslen soreles palla an o foro Jerusalem. Un i patsle nashan an o them Judea un an o them Samaria. I Jesuseskre bitchepangre atchan an o foro Jerusalem." 
Acts8:2 Un mursha, hoi ap o Debleskro drom djan, paskran o Stefanes un rowan bud pral leskro merepen." 
Acts8:3 O Saulo kras lauter, te nai marell lo i tsele patslen. Job djas an i khera, las len koi win, murshen har djuwjen, un witsras len an o stilepen." 
Acts8:4 Kol patsle, kai ap o naashepen his, djan trujel un penan o latcho lab o Jesus Kristestar." 
Acts8:5 O Filipo djas an ko foro Samaria un rakras kote o Jesus Kristestar. 
Acts8:6 Kol menshe dan jak ap kowa, hoi o Filipo penas un kras an o Debleskri soor." 
Acts8:7 Bud menshendar tradas lo bengen win. Kolla dan soreles gole, har jon lendar win djan. Un bud menshe, kai his bango un nai djan gar, wan sasto." 
Acts8:8 Un hakeno an kau foro his bachtelo pral kowa, hoi koi djas." 
Acts8:9 An ko foro Samaria his ninna i mursh, kowa his i durkepaskro. Leskro lab his Simon. Job penas pestar, te hi lo i baro mursh. Un i menshe an ko foro kran bare jaka pral kowa, hoi job kras." 
Acts8:10 Un halauter shunan ap leste, un penan: “Ap ko mursheste hi o Debleskri bari soor.”" 
Acts8:11 Peskro durkepah tserdas lo len lauter ap peste. Doleske rikran jon bud lestar. 
Acts8:12 Har kanna o Filipo lenge o Jesus Kristestar penas, koles o Dewel bitchras, te anell lo len pash o Debleste, patsan djuwja un mursha ap kowa, hoi o Filipo lenge penas. Un jon mukan pen te taufrell." 
Acts8:13 Koi was ninna o Simon patslo, un mukas pes te taufrell. Palle atchas lo pash leste. Un har o Simon ko baro un sorelo koowa dikas, hoi o Filipo an o Debleskri soor kras, atchas leske o rakepen krik." 
Acts8:14 Un kol Jesuseskre bitchepangre an o foro Jerusalem shunan, kai kol menshe an o them Samaria patslo wan. Un jon bitchran o Petres un o Johannes pash lende." 
Acts8:15 Kolla wan an o them Samaria, un mangan o Deblestar, te dell lo i patslende o Debleskro Ducho." 
Acts8:16 Kol patsle his kokres ap o lab maro rajestar Jesus taufedo. O Debleskro Ducho peras gomme gar ap lende. 
Acts8:17 Koi tchiwan o Petro un o Johanni i wasta ap lende, un o Debleskro Ducho peras ap lende." 
Acts8:18 Har o Simon dikas, kai o Debleskro Ducho ap lende was, har o Jesuseskre bitchepangre i wasta ap lende tchiwan, kamas job len lowe te dell," 
Acts8:19 un penas ap lende: “Denn man ninna koi soor, te lell hakeno, koneske me o wast pre tchiwau, o Debleskro Ducho!”" 
Acts8:20 O Petro penas ap leste: “Dja pash o bengeste, tu un tire lowe! Tu patseh tchatchepah, te nai gineh tu i lowentsa o Debleskri soor!" 
Acts8:21 Kau koowa, hoi mer krah, hi o Debleskro koowa un gar tiro koowa. Tiro dji hi gar tchatcho glan o Debleste." 
Acts8:22 Kanna, muk tiro tchilatcho drom, un pen o Debleske, te khaitell tut ko tchilatcho koowa, hoi tu kral. Un mange lestar, te lell lo koi doosh tutar!" 
Acts8:23 Me dikau, kai hal pherdo tchilatcho koowa, un ko tchilatchepen hi o rai pral tute.”" 
Acts8:24 Koi penas o Simon ap lende: “Mangenn o Deblestar, te well kowa gar pral mande, hoi tumer penan!”" 
Acts8:25 Har o Petro un o Johanni i menshenge penan, hoi o Jesus penas un kras, djan jon pale an o foro Jerusalem. Ap lengro drom pale wan le an bud gaba an ko them Samaria un sikran kote i menshende o Jesuseskro drom." 
Acts8:26 O Debleskro bolepaskro penas ap o Filipo: “Ste pre un dja ap ko drom, kai djal dran Jerusalem tele an ko foro Gaza. Ap ko drom hi gar bud menshe.”" 
Acts8:27 Koi stas lo pre un djas kote. Ap ko drom his ninna i mursh dran o them Etiopia. Ap kau tsiro his i bari rani i rajetsa pral o them Etiopia. Un ko mursh his i pralstuno an lakro them un das garda ap lakro tselo brawlepen. Kowa was an o foro Jerusalem, te mangell job o Debles an." 
Acts8:28 Har job pale ap o drom his, te djal lo khere, his job an peskro wurdin beshdo, un draweras ko liil, kai o Debleskro rakepaskro Jesaja tchinas." 
Acts8:29 Koi penas o Debleskro Ducho ap o Filipeste: “Dja pash ko wurdin un atch koi pashel!” 
Acts8:30 Un o Filipo nashas koi, un shunas, har kowa ko liil draweras, hoi o Debleskro rakepaskro Jesaja tchinas. Un o Filipo putchas lestar: “Haiweh tu, hoi tu drawereh?”" 
Acts8:31 “Na-a,” penas lo, “har nai haiwap, te penell mange kek, hoi koi tchinlo hi?” Un job mangas o Filipes, te well job pash leste an o wurdin, te beshell lo pes pash leste." 
Acts8:32 Kol laba, hoi job draweras, his kolla: Job his har i bakro, kai djal kote, kai well lo maredo. Job kras peskro mui gar pre har i terno bakro, koleske tchinenn le i balla tele." 
Acts8:33 Jon kran leha, har te wals lo tchi moldo un rakran gar o tchatchepen, har anan le les glan i tchatchepangre. Kek nai rakrell leskre tchawendar. Leskro djipen was kai phubjatar krik lino." 
Acts8:34 Har ko pralstuno kowa draweras, putchas lo o Filipestar: “Konestar rakrell o Debleskro rakepaskro? Rakrell job pestar? Rakrell job i wawarestar?”" 
Acts8:35 Koi penas o Filipo leske, hoi kol laba kamenn te penell, un penas leske o latcho lab o Jesusestar." 
Acts8:36 Koi wan le pash o pani, un ko pralstuno penas: “Koi hi pani. Hi mange tchomone an o drom tchiddo, te mukap man te taufrell?”" 
Acts8:37 “Te patseh tu o tselo djijestar ap o Jesus Kristeste, nai krau me kowa,” penas o Filipo. Penas ko pralstuno: “Me patsau, kai hi o Jesus Kristo o Debleskro tchawo.”" 
Acts8:38 Un job penas, te atchell ko wurdin tardo. Un kol dui, o Filipo un o pralstuno, djan khetne an o pani, un o Filipo taufras les." 
Acts8:39 Har jon dran o pani win djan, las o Debleskro Ducho o Filipes ap jek kopo kote krik. Un ko pralstuno dikas les buder gar. Un job djas bachteles peskro drom dureder." 
Acts8:40 O Filipes hatsan le an o foro Ashdod. Un job djas trujel, un penas o latcho lab o Jesusestar an kol tsele forja. Un jaake was lo an o foro Cesarea." 
Acts9:1 An ko tsiro his o Saules i bari choli ap kolende, kai djan o Jesuseskro drom, kamas len te marell, un djas pash ko baro rashajeste," 
Acts9:2 un mangas kolestar lila, te nai djal lo an i biboldengre kangria an o foro Damaskus, te nai taprell job kote kolen, murshen har djuwjen, kai ap o Jesuseskro drom djana, te anell lo len an o foro Jerusalem." 
Acts9:3 Har o Saulo ap ko drom his, kai djas an o foro Damaskus, was ap jek kopo i soreli momeli dran o bolepen trul leste." 
Acts9:4 Un job peras ap i phub un shunas i rakepen. Kowa penas ap leste: “Saulo, Saulo, hoske leh tu man palla?”" 
Acts9:5 Penas lo: “Rai, koon hal tu?” Kowa penas: “Me hom o Jesus, koles, kai tu palla leh." 
Acts9:6 Ste pre un dja an ko foro! Koi penenn le tuke, hoi te kress.”" 
Acts9:7 Kol mursha, kai pash leste his, kolenge atchas o rakepen krik. Jon shunan i rakepen un dikan kekes." 
Acts9:8 Har o Saulo pre stas un i jaka pre kras, his lo korelo. Jon lan les pash o wast un anan les an o foro Damaskus." 
Acts9:9 Triin diwessa nai dikas lo gar, un chas un pijas tchi." 
Acts9:10 An o foro Damaskus his i patslo mursh. Kowa kharas Anania. Kolestar mukas pes o rai Jesus an i suni te dikell. Un job penas: “Anania!” Un o Anania penas: “Ake, hom, mo rai.”" 
Acts9:11 Un o rai Jesus penas ap leste: “Ste pre un dja ap ko drom, kai kharell o tchatcho drom. Putch an ko kheer o Judasestar pal i mursheste, kai kharell Saulo dran Tarsus. Job mangell o Debles an," 
Acts9:12 un dikas tut, Anania, an i suni, har wal tu pash leste un tchiwal leske i wasta pre, te nai dikell lo pale.”" 
Acts9:13 O Anania penas: “Rai, me shunom bud pral ko mursheste, hawo tchilatcho koowa job kol patslenge an o foro Jerusalem kras." 
Acts9:14 Mer shunam ninna, kai las job lila kol bare rashajendar, te nai taprell job men un tchiwell men stildo, lauter kolen, kai tut an-mangenna.”" 
Acts9:15 Penas o rai Jesus leske: “Dja pash leste! Me rodom koles win, te well job mange koi, te djal lo pash kolende, kai kek bibolde hi, pash lengre bare rajende, un pash kol tsele biboldende, te penell lo lenge mandar." 
Acts9:16 Me kamau leste te sikrell, kai hunte lell job bud duka mange ap peste.”" 
Acts9:17 O Anania djas koi, was an ko kheer, tchiwas i wasta ap o Sauleste un penas: “Miro phraal Saulo, maro rai Jesus bitchras man, kowa, kai mukas pes ap ko drom tutar te dikell. Job kamell, te dikess tu nai pale, un te wess pherdo Debleskro Ducho.”" 
Acts9:18 Ap jek kopo, har te perals ko tamlepen leskre jakendar tele, dikas lo nai pale, stas pre un mukas pes te taufrell." 
Acts9:19 Palle chas un pijas o Saulo un was pale sorelo. Un o Saulo atchas i tsiro pash kol patslende an o foro Damaskus," 
Acts9:20 un rakras an i biboldengre kangria, un sikras len, kai o Jesus o Debleskro tchawo hi." 
Acts9:21 Lauter kolla, kai shunan kowa, atchas o rakepen krik, un jon penan: “Hi kowa gar ko mursh, kai las an o foro Jerusalem i tsele patslen palla, un kamas len te marell, kolen, kai denn o Jesuseskro lab an-gole? Was job gar kate, te anell job i patslen pandlo glan kol bare rashajende an o foro Jerusalem?”" 
Acts9:22 O Saulo rakras bari sorjah un sikras len, kai hi o Jesus o Kristo, kai was o Deblestar bitchedo, jaake te nai penan i bibolde, kai an o foro Damaskus djiwan, tchi buder." 
Acts9:23 Pal budeder diwessa wan kol bibolde khetne, rakran pral ko koowa, un penan: “Mer marah les.”" 
Acts9:24 Kowa was o Sauleske penlo. I rati un ap o diwes dan i bibolde jak glan kol foreskre wudja, te taprenn le les, un te marenn le les." 
Acts9:25 Doleske anan leskre mala les an i rati pash koi massuri, hoi trul o foro hi, un mukan les an i korba pral i massuri tele, te was lo dran o foro win." 
Acts9:26 Un job djas an o foro Jerusalem, un kote kamas lo pash kol patslende te djal. Kolla trashan lestar lauter un patsan gar, kai job ap o Jesuseskro drom djala." 
Acts9:27 O Barnabas las les pash peste un anas les pash kol Jesuseskre bitchepangre, un penas lenge, har o Saulo ap ko drom, kai djal an o foro Damaskus, o rai Jesuses dikas, un kowa leha rakras, un har job an o foro Damaskus i menshenge o Jesusestar penas, un les kek daar his, te rakrell lo lestar." 
Acts9:28 Un o Saulo atchas an o foro Jerusalem, un djas pash i patslende dren un win, un sikras i menshende o Jesuseskro drom un trashas gar, te rakrell lo o Jesusestar." 
Acts9:29 Job rakras ninna kol biboldentsa, kai rakrenn grichtikes, un tchingras lentsa pral kowa, hoi an o Debleskro lab tchinlo hi. Kal bibolde kaman les te taprell un te marell." 
Acts9:30 Har kol patsle kowa shunan, anan le les an o foro Cesarea, un bitchran les dureder an o foro Tarsus." 
Acts9:31 I patsle an i themma Judea, Galilea un Samaria, kolen his kanna i latcho tsiro, kek las len buder palla. Un o Debleskro Ducho kras len soreles an o patsepen. Un jon shunan ap o Debleste un bud un budeder menshe wan patslo." 
Acts9:31 I patsle an i themma Judea, Galilea un Samaria, kolen his kanna i latcho tsiro, kek las len buder palla. Un o Debleskro Ducho kras len soreles an o patsepen. Un jon shunan ap o Debleste un bud un budeder menshe wan patslo." 
Acts9:32 Har o Petro an o tselo them trujel djas, was job ninna pash kol patslende an o foro Lidda." 
Acts9:33 Koi hatsas lo i murshes, leskro lab hi Aneas. Kowa his ochta bersha ap o tchiben tchiddo, un nai nashas gar." 
Acts9:34 O Petro penas ap leste: “Aneas, o Jesus Kristo krell tut sasto. Ste pre un kre kokres tiro tchiben!” Koi stas job sik pre." 
Acts9:35 Koi dikan le les lauter, kai an i forja Lidda un Saron djiwenna. Un jon dan pengro djipen o Jesuseste, maro rajeste." 
Acts9:36 An o foro Joppe djiwas i patsli. Lakro lab his Tabita ap hebretikes un Dorkas ap grichtikes. Koja kras bud latcho koowa, un das bud lowe kol tchorwelende." 
Acts9:37 An ko tsiro was joi nasseli un meras. Koi thowan jon lat un tchiwan lat an koi pralstuni isema. 
Acts9:38 O foro Joppe his pash o foro Lidda tchiddo. Un har i patsle shunan, kai o Petro an ko foro his, bitchran jon dui murshen pash leste, un mangan les, te well job jaake sik har djala pash lende." 
Acts9:39 O Petro stas pre un djas lentsa. Har job kote was, anan jon les an koi pralstuni isema, kai koi muli djuwel tchiddo hi. Bud djuwja, kolengre romma mulo hi, his kote un rowan. Kolla wan pash leste un sikran leste kol ripja, kai i Tabita kras, har joi djiwas." 
Acts9:40 Un o Petro tradas len win, djas ap i tchanga glan o Debleste, mangas o Debles, un djas pash koi muli djuwjate un penas: “Tabita, ste pre!” Koi kras joi peskre jaka pre. Har joi o Petres dikas, beshas pes li pre." 
Acts9:41 Un job das lat o wast un hadas lat pre. Palle das job kol patslen gole, ninna kol djuwjen, kolengre romma mulo his. Un joi his djido glan lende tardo." 
Acts9:42 Kowa shunan i tsele menshe an o foro Joppe, un bud wan patslo ap o rai Jesuseste." 
Acts9:43 Un o Petro atchas bud diwessa an o foro Joppe pash ko mursheste, kai kharell Simon. Kowa his jek, kai budrell viechengre mortsi." 
Acts10:1 An o foro Cesarea djiwas i mursh, ko kharas Kornelio. Kowa his i Remarjengro pralstuno pral sheel lurdende. Kolen kharan le i lurde dran Italia." 
Acts10:2 Kowa his i latcho mursh un patsas ap o Debleste peskre tsele menshentsa. Job das bud i tchorwelende, un mangas o Debles hako diwes an." 
Acts10:3 His i diwes. His trinenge. Koi dikas ko mursh i Debleskro bolepaskres, har kowa pash leste dren was. Ko bolepaskro penas ap leste: “Kornelio!”" 
Acts10:4 Koles his daar, har job dikas les, un penas ap leste: “Hoi kameh tu mandar, rai?” Un kowa penas ap leste: “O Dewel shunas, har tu les an-mangal. Un job dikas ko latchepen, hoi tu kral i tchorwelenge. Un job bistras kowa gar." 
Acts10:5 Bitche kanna murshen an o foro Joppe, te anenn le o Simones pash tute. Kowa kharella ninna Petro." 
Acts10:6 Job hi an o kheer, kai ko Simon djiwella, kai budrell i viechengri mortsi. Leskro kheer hi pash o baro pani tchiddo.”" 
Acts10:7 Har o bolepaskro peske djas, kharas o Kornelio dui budepangren un i patslo lurdes pash peste kolendar, kai his hako tsiro pash leste." 
Acts10:8 Kolenge penas job lauter, hoi o bolepaskro penas, un bitchras len an o foro Joppe." 
Acts10:9 O wawar diwes, har jon pash o foro Joppe wan, djas o Petro ap o kheer pral pre, te mangell lo o Debles an. His chapaskro tsiro." 
Acts10:10 Koi las job bok un kamas te chal. Har kran le leske i chapen, mukas o Dewel les tchomone te dikell." 
Acts10:11 Job dikas, har o bolepen pre djas un tchomone pral tele was ap i phub. Kowa his har i bari plachta. Koja was ap hake star rigja rikedo." 
Acts10:12 Koi dren his bud vieche: vieche star herjentsa, sapa, un tchirkle." 
Acts10:13 Un o Petro shunas, har jek penas: “Petro, ste pre, kre len mulo un cha!”" 
Acts10:14 O Petro penas: “Na-a, miro rai! An miro tselo djipen chom me tchi, hoi pale-tchiddo hi.”" 
Acts10:15 Un job shunas i duito kopo, har jek leha rakras un penas: “Ma kre pale-tchiddo, hoi o Dewel erligo kras!”" 
Acts10:16 Kowa djas triin kope jaake. Palle djas koi plachta pale an o bolepen. 
Acts10:17 O Petro haiwas gar, hoske job kowa dikas, un putchas pestar, hoi kamas o Dewel leske te penell. Koi his i mursha, kai o Kornelio pal o Simoneskro kheer bitchras, glan o wudar tardo." 
Acts10:18 Jon dan gole un putchan: “Hi o Simon Petro pash tumende?” 
Acts10:19 Har djas o Petreske kowa an o shero trujel, hoi job dikas, koi penas o Debleskro Ducho ap leste: “Dik, triin mursha rodenn tut." 
Acts10:20 Ste pre, dja tele, un dja lentsa! Pats, hoi jon tuke penenn! Me bitchrom len.”" 
Acts10:21 Koi djas o Petro tele pash lende un penas: “Me hom kowa, kai tumer rodenna. Hoske han tumer kai?”" 
Acts10:22 Penan le: “O Kornelio, ko pralstuno i lurdendar, bitchras men. Kowa hi i latcho mursh, un patsell ap o Debleste. I tsele bibolde rakrenn latches pral leste. I Debleskro bolepaskro penas ap leste, te lell job tut an peskro kheer, un te shunell job, hoi tu leske kameh te penell.”" 
Acts10:23 Un o Petro mukas len an o kheer te well, un das len i isema, te atchenn le kote. O wawar diwes djas job lentsa an o foro Cesarea. Un wawar patsle dran o foro Joppe djan ninna leha." 
Acts10:24 O diwes koi pre was job an o foro Cesarea. Kote his o Kornelio peskre menshentsa un malentsa khetne. Job das len gole, te shunenn le halauter, hoi o Petro lenge penella." 
Acts10:25 Un har o Petro dren was, djas o Kornelio pash leste, witsras pes glan leskre pire tele, un mangas les an." 
Acts10:26 O Petro hadas les pre un penas: “Ste pre! Me hom i mensho har tu.” 
Acts10:27 Un har jon jaake rakran, djan jon an o kheer, un hatsan bud menshen kote, kai khetne wan." 
Acts10:28 Un o Petro penas ap lende: “Tumer djinenna, te hi kowa i biboldeske pale-tchiddo, te djal lo an o kheer dren, hoi gar i biboldeskro hi. Un kek wi-themari well pash i biboldeste an o kheer dren. Mande sikras o Dewel, te rikrap kekes pale-tchiddo." 
Acts10:29 Doleske rikrom man gar pale, te wap pash tumende, har tumer man kharan. Me putchau tumendar kanna, hoi kamenn mandar.”" 
Acts10:30 Koi penas o Kornelio: “Glan star diwessa, his trinenge, mangom o Debles an miro kheer an. Koi his ap jek kopo i mursh glan mande tardo. Koleskre koola his bijalo." 
Acts10:31 Un job penas ap mande: Kornelio, o Dewel shunas tut, un hoi tu dal kol tchorwelende, dikas o Dewel ninna." 
Acts10:32 Kanna bitche murshen an o foro Joppe, te anenn le o Petres pash tute. Kowa hi an o kheer, kai ko Simon djiwella, kai budrell i viechengri mortsi. Leskro kheer hi pash o baro pani tchiddo." 
Acts10:33 Un me bitchrom murshen pash tute. Un kowa his mishto, kai tu wal. Kanna ham mer lauter glan o Debleste khetne, te shunas lauter, hoi o Dewel, maro rai, tuke penas.”" 
Acts10:34 Un o Petro penas: “Kanna haiwau me tchatchepah: O Dewel dikell gar koi pre, hawe menshendar jek wella: te well lo i biboldendar, – te well lo kolendar, kai kek bibolde hi. Job dikell latches ap hakeneste, kai mangell les an, un kai krell o tchatchepen." 
Acts10:35  
Acts10:36 Job mukas i biboldenge o latcho lab te penell, te hi o Jesus Kristo kowa, kai anell len pash o Debleste. Job hi gar lengro rai kokres, na-a, job hi o rai pral halauter." 
Acts10:37 Tumer djinenna, hoi djas an o them Galilea, un palle an o tselo them Judea pal ko tsiro, har kharas o Johanni i menshen, te mukenn le pen te taufrell." 
Acts10:37 Tumer djinenna, hoi djas an o them Galilea, un palle an o tselo them Judea pal ko tsiro, har kharas o Johanni i menshen, te mukenn le pen te taufrell." 
Acts10:38 Tumer djinenn, har das o Dewel o Jesuseste dran Nazaret peskro Ducho un peskri soor. Un job djas trujel un kras latcho koowa, un kras lauteren sasto, kai o beng pandas. O Dewel his pash leste." 
Acts10:39 Mer dikam lauter, hoi job an o biboldengro them un an o foro Jerusalem kras. Koles dan le ap o trushel, un maran les." 
Acts10:40 Pal triin diwessa kras o Dewel les i mulendar djides. Un o Jesus mukas pes i menshendar te dikell. 
Acts10:41 Job mukas pes gar i tsele menshendar te dikell. Na-a. Men rodas o Dewel win, te dikas les. Un har job i mulendar djido was, cham un pijam mer leha. Kowa penah i menshenge, un kowa hi tchatcho." 
Acts10:42 Job penas menge, te penas mer i tsele menshenge, kai o Dewel rodas les win, te hi lo o tchatchepaskro rai, kai rakrell o tchatchepen win pral i tsele menshende, pral kolende, kai djiwenna, un ninna pral i mulende." 
Acts10:43 Kolestar rakrenn i tsele Debleskre rakepangre an pengre lila. Jon penenn, kai lell o Dewel i doosh hakenestar krik, koon ap o Jesus Kristeste patsella.”" 
Acts10:44 Har o Petro jaake rakras, peras o Debleskro Ducho ap lauterende, kai les shunan." 
Acts10:45 Kol patsle biboldenge, kai o Petreha wan, atchas o rakepen krik, har jon dikan, kai peras o Debleskro Ducho ninna ap kolende, kai kek bibolde hi." 
Acts10:46 Jon shunan, har kol menshe an i wawar rakepen rakran, un o Debles sharan. Koi penas o Petro ap lende:" 
Acts10:47 “Kolla lan o Debleskro Ducho jaake har mer. Nai rikrah mer len pale, te mukenn le pen te taufrell?”" 
Acts10:48 Un job penas: “Mukenn tumen te taufrell, te sikrenn tumer, kai patsenn ap o Jesus Kristeste!” Pal kowa mangan le o Petres, te atchell lo triin, star diwessa pash lende." 
Acts11:1 Kol Jesuseskre bitchepangre un kol wawar patsle an o them Judea shunan, kai ninna kolla, kai kek bibolde hi, ap o Debleskro lab patsan." 
Acts11:1 Kol Jesuseskre bitchepangre un kol wawar patsle an o them Judea shunan, kai ninna kolla, kai kek bibolde hi, ap o Debleskro lab patsan." 
Acts11:2 Har o Petro an o foro Jerusalem was, tchingran kol patsle bibolde leha." 
Acts11:3 Un jon penan ap leste: “Tu djal pash kolende, kai hi gar bibolde, un chal lentsa.”" 
Acts11:4 Koi penas o Petro lenge, jek pal o wawar, hoi koi djas:" 
Acts11:5 “Me homs an o foro Joppe,” penas job, “un mangom o Debles an. Koi mukas o Dewel man tchomone te dikell. Me dikom tchomone har i bari plachta. Koja was ap star rigja rikedo, un was tele dran o bolepen pash mande." 
Acts11:6 Har me dren dikom, dikom me bud vieche: star-herjengre vieche, sapa un tchirkle." 
Acts11:7 Un jek rakras ap mande: Petro, mare len un cha len!" 
Acts11:8 Penom me: Na-a, rai! An miro tselo djipen chom me tchi, hoi hi pale-tchiddo." 
Acts11:9 Ko rakepen dran o bolepen penas pale: Ma kre pale-tchiddo, hoi o Dewel erligo kras!" 
Acts11:10 Kowa djas triin kope. Un halauter djas pale an o bolepen. 
Acts11:11 Ap jek kopo his triin mursha tardo glan ko kheer, kai djiwom. Kolla wan dran o foro Cesarea pash mande." 
Acts11:12 Un o Debleskro Ducho penas ap mande: Pats, hoi jon tuke penenna! Dja lentsa! Un me djom shob phralentsa an o kheer ko murshestar, kai kol triin murshen pash mande bitchras." 
Acts11:13 Kowa penas menge, har dikas job i bolepaskres an peskro kheer, un kai kowa ap leste penas: Bitche murshen an o foro Joppe, te lenn le o Simones. Job kharella ninna Petro." 
Acts11:14 Kowa penell tuke, har leh tu un i menshe an tiro kheer o Debleskro djipen." 
Acts11:15 Har me, o Petro, lentsa rakrom, peras o Debleskro Ducho ap lende. Kowa his jaake har pash mende an o foro Jerusalem, har o Debleskro Ducho ap mende peras." 
Acts11:16 Koi djan kol laba an miro shero trujel, hoi menge maro rai Jesus penas: O Johanni tchiwas i menshen an o pani. Ap tumende tchiwell o Dewel peskro Debleskro Ducho." 
Acts11:17 Me dikom, o Dewel das lende ninna peskro Ducho, jaake har job mende das, har mer patsam ap o rajeste, o Jesus Kristeste. Koon hom me, te rikrap me o Debles pre?”" 
Acts11:18 Har jon kowa shunan, tchingran le buder gar ap o Petreste. Jon sharan o Debles un penan: “O Dewel sikras ninna kolende peskro drom an o newo djipen, kai hi kek bibolde. Jon nai mukenn pengro tchilatcho drom un wenn ap o Debleskro drom.”" 
Acts11:19 An ko tsiro, kai o Stefano maredo was, wan i patsle palla lino. Kolla nashan dran o foro Jerusalem, un djan an i themma Fenicia un Ciprus, un an o foro Antiochia. Un jon penan kote kokres i biboldenge o Debleskro lab, un kek wawarenge." 
Acts11:20 Mashkral kol patslende his ninna mursha dran Ciprus un Kirene. Kolla wan an o foro Antiochia, un penan ninna kolenge, kai kek bibolde hi, o latcho lab o rai Jesusestar." 
Acts11:21 Un o rajeskri soor his lentsa. Un bud kolendar, kai kek bibolde hi, wan patslo, un wan ap o Jesuseskro drom." 
Acts11:22 Un i patsle an o foro Jerusalem shunan kowa, un bitchran o Barnabes an o foro Antiochia." 
Acts11:23 Har job koi his un dikas, hoi o Dewel an peskro baro latchepen kote lauter kras, was lo bachtelo un mangas len, te atchenn le pengro tselo djijeha pash o Jesuseste." 
Acts11:24 O Barnabas his i latcho mursh. Job his pherdo Debleskro Ducho. Un les his i baro patsepen. Un bud wan patslo ap o rai Jesuseste. 
Acts11:25 Un o Barnabas djas an o foro Tarsus, te rodell lo o Saules." 
Acts11:26 Har o Barnabas les hatsas, anas lo les an o foro Antiochia. Un kol dui atchan i tselo bersh kote pash i patslende, un penan bud menshenge o Debleskro lab. Kote dan jon i patslen ko lab Kriste." 
Acts11:27 An kol diwessa wan Debleskre rakepangre dran o Jerusalem an o foro Antiochia. 
Acts11:28 Jek lendar his o Agabo. Job stas mashkral i patslende pre, un penas glan-wi, hoi o Debleskro Ducho leske penas, te well i bari bok pral i tseli phub. Un har o Klaudio o baro rai an o foro Rom his, was kowa jaake." 
Acts11:29 Koi penan kol patsle an o foro Antiochia: “Mer dah mare phralen an o them Judea jaake bud lowe, har hakeno nai della.”" 
Acts11:29 Koi penan kol patsle an o foro Antiochia: “Mer dah mare phralen an o them Judea jaake bud lowe, har hakeno nai della.”" 
Acts11:30 Un jon dan o Barnabes un o Saules kol lowe, te denn jon kol lowe kolende, kai hi i phureder mank i patslende an o them Judea." 
Acts11:30 Un jon dan o Barnabes un o Saules kol lowe, te denn jon kol lowe kolende, kai hi i phureder mank i patslende an o them Judea." 
Acts12:1 An ko tsiro mukas o baro rai Herodes i patslen te stilell, un mukas len dawa te dell." 
Acts12:2 Job maras o Johanneskro phrales, o Jakobes, o chareha." 
Acts12:3 Har o Herodes haiwas, kai kowa mishto his an i biboldengre jaka, mukas job ninna o Petres te taprell. Kowa his an ko tsiro, kai chan i bibolde kek shutlo maro." 
Acts12:4 Har jon les tapran, witsran le les an o stilepen. Un o Herodes penas, te denn star kope star lurde jak ap leste. Star lurde dan i paash diwes jak ap leste. Un pal i paash diwes dan wawar star lurde jak ap leste. Un ninna jaake djas kowa ratsjakro. Pal kol diwessa, kai Passa kharenna, kamas o Herodes les glan i menshende te anell, te dell lo les glan lende i phagi." 
Acts12:5 Har o Petro an o stilepen his, mangan i tsele patsle pengro tselo djijeha o Debles leske ap i rati un ap o diwes." 
Acts12:6 An i rat glan ko diwes, kai kamas o Herodes les win anell, te dell lo les i phagi, sowas o Petro mashkral dui lurdende. Job his pandlo dui sasterne shellentsa, un dui lurde dan jak glan o wudar." 
Acts12:7 Ap jek kopo his an ko stilepen i soreli momeli, un o Debleskro bolepaskro his koi tardo, un das o Petres an i rig, djangras les pre, un penas: “Ste sik pre!” Un kol sasterne shelle peran leskre wastendar tele." 
Acts12:8 Un ko bolepaskro penas ap leste: “Tchip tiri dori trul tiro ripen, un rib tire kircha, un tchip tiri plaashka trul tute, un am mantsa!” Un job kras kowa." 
Acts12:9 Un o Petro djas leha dran o stilepen win. Job djinas gar, kai kowa lauter tchatchepen hi. Job patsas, te dell lo suni." 
Acts12:10 Dui kope djan le pash kol lurdende pashel, kai jak dan. Un kolla dikan len gar. Un jaake wan jon pash i baro sasterno wudar. Kowa his ko wudar, hoi djas an o foro. Ko wudar djas kokres pre. Jon djan win, un wan ap o drom. Har djan le i kotar drom, his ap jek kopo ko bolepaskro gar buder koi." 
Acts12:11 Kanna djinas o Petro, kai kowa kek suni his, un job penas: “Kanna djinau tchatchepah, kai bitchras o rai Jesus peskro bolepaskres mange. Un kowa las man dran o Herodeskre wasta win, ninna dran halauter, hoi kaman i bibolde mantsa te krell.”" 
Acts12:12 Har kowa an leskro shero was, djas job pash i Mariakro kheer. Lakro tchawo his o Johanni, kai ninna Marko kharedo wella. Kote his bud patsle khetne un mangan o Debles." 
Acts12:12 Har kowa an leskro shero was, djas job pash i Mariakro kheer. Lakro tchawo his o Johanni, kai ninna Marko kharedo wella. Kote his bud patsle khetne un mangan o Debles." 
Acts12:13 O Petro das o wasteha ap o wudar, un i budepaskretsa was. Lakro lab his Roda. Joi kamas te shunell, koon koi hi." 
Acts12:14 Un har joi shunas, kai kowa o Petro hi, kras li i bachtjatar o wudar gar pre, nashas pale un penas: “O Petro hi glan o wudar tardo.”" 
Acts12:15 Koi penan jon ap late: “Hal tu dinelo?” Joi atchas koi pashel, kai kowa jaake hi. Koi penan jon: “Kowa hi o bolepaskro, kai dell jak ap leste.”" 
Acts12:16 O Petro mukas gar tele, te dell lo ap o wudar. Har jon kanna pre kran, dikan jon les. Koi atchas lenge o mui pre." 
Acts12:17 I wastentsa sikras lo len, te denn le kek gole, un penas lenge, har o rai Jesus les dran o stilepen win las. Un ninna penas o Petro lenge: “Penenn kowa o Jakobeske, un kol wawar phralenge!” Palle djas job win, un djas peske an i wawar foro." 
Acts12:18 Taissarlake dikan i lurde, kai his o Petro buder gar an o stilepen un putchan pendar, hoi leha djas. Un i bari daar was ap lende." 
Acts12:19 Har o Herodes penas, te well o Petro win anlo, un job buder gar koi his, mukas lo les te rodell. Un jon hatsan les gar. Koi putchas lo i lurdendar, kai dan jak glan o wudar, har was nai o Petro win. Un palle mukas job kolen te marell. Palle djas o Herodes dran o them Judea, un was an o foro Cesarea, un atchas i tsiro kote." 
Acts12:19 Har o Herodes penas, te well o Petro win anlo, un job buder gar koi his, mukas lo les te rodell. Un jon hatsan les gar. Koi putchas lo i lurdendar, kai dan jak glan o wudar, har was nai o Petro win. Un palle mukas job kolen te marell. Palle djas o Herodes dran o them Judea, un was an o foro Cesarea, un atchas i tsiro kote." 
Acts12:20 O Herodes was chojemen ap i menshende an i forja Tirus un Sidon. Kolla lan pengro chapen dran o Herodeskro them. Doleske bitchran le khetne murshen pash leste, te well lo pale latcho lenge. Kolla rakran koleha, kai das jak ap o Herodeskro kheer, leskro lab his Blasto, un penan leske, te kamenn le buder kek tchingepen, un mangan lestar, te penell job kowa o Herodeske." 
Acts12:21 I diwes was win kerdo, kai kamas o Herodes lentsa te rakrell. Ap ko diwes riwas o Herodes peskre rajengre koola an, beshas pes ap peskro railo beshepaskro, un rakras i baro rakepen." 
Acts12:22 Kol menshe dan gole: “Jaake rakrell kek mensho. Jaake rakrell i dewel!” 
Acts12:23 Jaake mukas pes o Herodes i menshendar te sharell, har te wals job o Dewel. Un har job kowa kras, das les o Debleskro bolepaskro i nasslepen, te chan i kirme les pre, un job meras." 
Acts12:24 An bud gaba un forja was o Debleskro lab penlo. Un budeder un budeder menshe patsan ap o rai Jesuseste. 
Acts12:25 O Barnabas un o Saulo anan kol lowe i patslenge an o foro Jerusalem. Palle wan le pale an o foro Antiochia. Lentsa djas o Johanni Marko. 
Acts12:25 O Barnabas un o Saulo anan kol lowe i patslenge an o foro Jerusalem. Palle wan le pale an o foro Antiochia. Lentsa djas o Johanni Marko.
