Hebrews7:1 O Melchisedek his o baro rai pral o foro Salem, ninna o baro rashai o baro Deblestar. An ko tsiro djas o Abraham an o kurepen, un maras i bare rajen pengre lurdentsa. Har job pale was, djas o Melchisedek pash leste, un rakras o Debleskri bacht pral leste win." 
Hebrews7:2 Un o Abraham das les o deshto kotar lauterestar, hoi las job an o kurepen. Ko lab Melchisedek kharella Tchatcho Rai. Un job his ninna o rai pral o foro Salem. O lab Salem kharella Bacht." 
Hebrews7:3 An o Debleskro lab hi tchi tchinlo pral leskro dadeste un leskri date. Tchi hi koi tchinlo pral leskre phurende, witar gar pral ko diwes, kai job boldo was, un kai job meras. Jaake atchell lo o baro rashai hako tsireske, har o Debleskro tchawo." 
Hebrews7:4 Kowa sikrell tumen, har baro o Melchisedek his! Koles das maro kamlo dad, o Abraham, o deshto kotar lauterestar, hoi las job an o kurepen." 
Hebrews7:5 Ninna an o them Israel lan i rashaja o deshto kotar lauterestar, hoi i Israelitarja penge khetne anan. Jaake his tchinlo an o Moseskre lila. Kol rashaja, – lengro dad his o Levi, – lan o deshto kotar kolendar, kai lengre phrala his. Kolla lauter wan pal o Abraham." 
Hebrews7:6 Koleste das o Dewel peskro lab, te krell lo les baro, un te dell lo les bud bacht. Ninna te hi o Abraham jaake baro, hi o Melchisedek bareder har job. Job las o deshto kotar o Abrahamestar un rakras o Debleskri bacht pral leste win, ninna te his lo gar leskre menshendar." 
Hebrews7:7 Un hakeno djinella: O bareder rakrell i bacht win pral o tikneder. 
Hebrews7:8 I rashaja an o them Israel, kolende i menshe pengro deshto kotar denna, kolla hi menshe, kai hunte merenna. O Melchisedek, kolestar hi penlo, te djiwell lo." 
Hebrews7:9 I rashaja an o them Israel wenna pal o Levi. Kolla lenn o deshto kotar, hoi pengre phrala khetne anan. Un o Levi was pal o Abraham. Jaake nai penah: Har das o Abraham o deshto kotar, das kowa ninna leskro tchaweskro tchawo, o Levi," 
Hebrews7:10 ninna te his o Levi gomme gar boldo, har o Melchisedek pash o Abrahameste djas." 
Hebrews7:11 Mer djinah, har das o Dewel peskre menshende o Moseskre lila, koi penas job ap o Leviteskre tchawe, te wenn le rashaja. Ninna te kran jon pengri budi jaake, har lengro dad, o rashai Aron, nai tchiwan le i menshen gar an o tchatchepen glan o Debleste. Doleske rodas o Dewel i wawar rashajes win, jek, kai krell peskri budi jaake har o Melchisedek, un buder gar jaake har o Aron." 
Hebrews7:12 Mer djinah: Te lell o Dewel peske i wawar rashai, kai gar o Leviteskre tchawendar hi, palle sikrell o Dewel ninna i wawar drom, kai wenn nai i menshe pash leste." 
Hebrews7:13 Maro baro rashai, kolestar kate rakedo wella hi o Jesus Kristo. Job well gar o Leviteskre menshendar. Mer lauter djinah, leskre menshe wenna pal o Juda. Un kek kolendar his i rashai. Lenge penas o Mose gar, te wenn le rashaja." 
Hebrews7:14  
Hebrews7:15 Mer haiwah mishto, ko wawar rashai, kai hi jaake har o Melchisedek, koles hi kek dad, koon ninna rashai his. Na-a. Les hi o Debleskro djipen, kai hako tsiro atchella. Doleske was lo maro rashai." 
Hebrews7:16  
Hebrews7:17 O Dewel penell pral leste: Tu hal i rashai hako tsireske har o Melchisedek. 
Hebrews7:18 Jaake tchiwas lo kol phure laba, hoi o Mose i menshenge penas, ap i rig. An kol laba his kek soor. Un jon his tchi moldo." 
Hebrews7:19 O Moseskre laba nai kran i menshen gar tchatcho glan o Debleste. Doleske sikras men o Dewel i newo un feteder drom, kai anell men pash leste." 
Hebrews7:20 Job tchiwas o Jesuses an leskri budi un penas: Tu hal i baro rashai hako tsireske, un job das peskro wast koi pre. Un kal laba nai khaitenn les kek tsireske. Har job o Leviteskre tchawen lengri budi das, te wenn le rashaja, das job gar peskri wast koi pre." 
Hebrews7:21  
Hebrews7:22 Jaake was o Jesus kowa, kai nai anell men tchatchepah pash o Debleste. Kowa nai kras o Mose gar." 
Hebrews7:23 An ko tselo tsiro his bud rashaja. Kolla lauter hunte meran. Har jek meras, was pale i wawar." 
Hebrews7:24 O Jesus atchell o rashai hako tsireske. Job merella gar, un kek wawar well pal leste." 
Hebrews7:25 Doleske nai krell lo, te djal kek kolendar nashedo, koon job pash o Debleste anas. Job djiwell hako tsireske, un mangell o Debles lenge." 
Hebrews7:26 O Jesus hi o baro rashai, kai hunte well men. Job hi latcho glan o Debleskre jaka. Kek tchilatchepen, witar kek doosh hi ap leste. Na-a, job hi gar jaake har mer tchilatche menshe ham, kai ham pale-tchiddo glan o Debleste. Un o Dewel kras les bareder har hako wawar an o bolepen." 
Hebrews7:27 Job hi gar har kol wawar bare rashaja, un hunte anell gar hako diwes i maredo vieches o Debleske, te well peskri doosh krik lino. Ninna hunte anell lo gar i wawar menshenge marede viechen o Debleske, te well lengri doosh krik lino. Na-a, job kokres das peskro djipen an o merepen jek kopo hako tsireske." 
Hebrews7:28 Kol wawar bare rashaja hi menshe un gar sorelo, un nai krenn gar mishto kowa, hoi o Dewel lendar kamella. Jon wan rashaja jaake, har o Mose an peskre lila tchinas. Bud tsiro palla, das o Dewel peskro lab, un das peskro wast koi pre, te well leskro tchawo i baro rashai hako tsireske. Job krell lauter mishto, hoi o Dewel lestar kamella." 
Hebrews8:1 Kowa hunte djinenn tumer: Men hi i baro rashai, kowa hi o Jesus Kristo. An o bolepen hi lo beshdo ap i tchatchi rig o Deblestar." 
Hebrews8:2 Kote budrell lo o Debleske an o tchatcho Debleskro kheer, hoi kras o Dewel, un kek mensho." 
Hebrews8:3 Hako baro rashai ap i phub hunte anell o Debleske marede viechen, un wawar latcho koowa. Ninna maro rashai, o Jesus, hunte anell tchomone o Debleske." 
Hebrews8:4 Kate ap kai phub wals lo kek rashai. Ap i phub hi kol rashaja, kai anenn o Debleske latcho koowa jaake, har an o Moseskre lila tchinlo hi." 
Hebrews8:5 Ko kheer, kai jon budrenna, un kowa, hoi jon krenna, sikrell men i tikno kotar dran koi tseli budi, hoi krell maro baro rashai, o Jesus Kristo, an o bolepen. Kowa dikah kanna gomme gar lauter. Har kras o Mose o Debleske i kheer dran viechengre balla an o mulo them, penas o Dewel leske, har te krell lo les un penas: Kowa lauter, hoi tu kreh, kre jaake, har me sikrom les tute ap i berga!" 
Hebrews8:6 Maro baro rashai hi o Jesus. Koleste das o Dewel i feteder budi har kol rashajende ap i phub. Job hi ninna maro rakepaskro, kai kras menge i newo drom, kai nai wah pash o Debleste. Kau newo drom hi feteder har o phuro drom, hoi o Mose sikras. Ap kau newo drom djiwah nai tchatchepah o Debleha khetne, jaake har job kowa menge penas." 
Hebrews8:7 Te nai wams ap o phuro drom pash o Debleste, hunte rodals o Dewel kek newo drom." 
Hebrews8:8 Job dikas, kai kol menshe, kolengre phure o Israel un o Juda his, gar jaake djiwan, har job lenge penas. Koi penas lo: Ko tsiro wella, kai sikrau len i newo drom, te wenn le mantsa khetne." 
Hebrews8:9 Kau newo drom hi gar jaake, har ko phuro drom, hoi sikrom lende ap ko diwes, kai taprom lengre phuren ap i wasta, te anap len dran o them Egiptia win. Har atchan le gar ap miro drom, mukom len." 
Hebrews8:10 Ap ko tsiro, hoi wella, penell o Dewel, rakrau pale lentsa, un anau len ap o newo drom. Me tchiwau miro tchatchepen an lengre shere, un tchinau mire laba an lengre djia. Un me hom lengro Dewel, un jon hi mire menshe." 
Hebrews8:11 Kek hunte penell ap peskro phraleste, witar gar ap koleste, kai djiwell pash leste: Tu hunte hatsess o Debles! Hakeno djinella, koon me hom. I tikne un i bare prindjrenn man." 
Hebrews8:12 Un me bistrau lengri doosh, hoi jon ap pende anan. Ko tchilatchepen, hoi jon kran, well buder gar an miro shero." 
Hebrews8:13 Te penell o Dewel kate: Me krau i newo drom, jaake hi kowa, hoi job o Moseha win kras, i phuro drom. Un kowa, hoi hi phuro un buder tchi moldo, well krik lino." 
Hebrews9:1 An ko phuro tsiro, har o Mose i menshenge penas, har djan le ap o Debleskro drom, koi penas lo lenge ninna, har te budrenn le o Debleske an leskro kheer, un ninna, har te krenn le leske i kheer ap i phub, kai mangenn le les an." 
Hebrews9:2 Ko Debleskro kheer his i tikno kheer, kerdo dran viechengre balla, hoi hidjran le nai. Koles his dui iseme. I glanstuni isema kharella: O Debleskri isema. I palstuni isema kharella: O Debleskri kutch isema. An i glanstuni isema his i momelengri un i chapaskri tardo. Ap i chapaskri his kol mare tchiddo, hoi dan le o Debleste. Mashkral kol dui iseme his i wudar dran kutch pesso than." 
Hebrews9:3  
Hebrews9:4 An i palstuni isema his o sonakaskro bob tardo, kai kutch gudlo kasht pral pre chatchedo was, hoi mishto sungella. Koi his ninna o sonakaskro mochton. An leste his o sonakaskro khoro, kai his ko maro dren tchiddo, hoi Manna kharella. An ko mochton his ninna o Aroneskro kasht, hoi senelo was, ninna kol dui tchinle barra. Ap kolende his i deesh Debleskre laba tchinlo, hoi o Dewel peskre menshentsa win kras." 
Hebrews9:5 Pral pre ap o sonakaskro mochton his dui raile bolepangre dran sonakai tardo. Kolen his mussja har bare tchirklen hi. Pengre mussja rikran le pral o sonakaskro mochton. Kote well i menshengri doosh krik lino. Kanna kamah gar te rakras pral hako tikno koowa an o Debleskro tikno kheer. 
Hebrews9:6 Kanna sikrau tumende, hoi an o Debleskro tikno kheer kerdo was. Hako diwes djan i rashaja an i glanstuni isema, te krenn le pengri budi o Debleske." 
Hebrews9:7 Jek kopo an o bersh djas o baro rashai kokres an i palstuni kutch isema. Har djal lo dren, lell lo o rat peha i viechestar, hoi maras lo o Debleske, te lell o Dewel leskri doosh lestar, ninna i doosh kol menshendar, kai anan doosh ap pende, ninna te djinan le gar, kai kowa, hoi jon kran, i tchilatcho koowa his." 
Hebrews9:8 Jaake sikrell men o Debleskro Ducho, kai kek nai djal an koi palstuni kutch isema, jaake rah, har hi koi glanstuni isema koi." 
Hebrews9:9 I glanstuni isema sikrell mende ko tsiro, an hoi mer kanna djiwah. I menshe anenn viechen, un wawar koowa o Debleske. Kowa lauter nai krell lengro dji gar djudjo. An lengro dji haiwenn le, te hi le gomme tchilatcho." 
Hebrews9:10 Ninna rikrenn pen i menshe ap laba, kai penenna, hoi te chan le gar, un hoi te pijenn le gar, un har te thowenn le pen. Kol laba hi menshengre laba. Kowa lauter his mishto jaake rah, har sikras len o Dewel gomme gar o feteder drom, te nai wenn jon pash leste." 
Hebrews9:11 Kanna was o Jesus Kristo. Job hi maro baro rashai un anas men o bolepaskro brawlepen. O Debleskro kheer an o bolepen, kai job dren djas, hi bareder un feteder har ko Debleskro kheer ap i phub. O Debleskro kheer an o bolepen hi gar i menshendar kerdo." 
Hebrews9:12 Har o Jesus an o Debleskro kheer an o bolepen djas, anas lo gar i bakrengro rat peha, witar gar i grumjengro rat. Na-a. Peskro rat anas lo glan o Debleste. Kowa kras lo jek kopo un gar bud kope. Un jaake las lo mari doosh hako tsireske mendar." 
Hebrews9:13 An o phuro tsiro tchoras o rashai o bakrengro rat, un o grumjengro rat, un o jagakri tchik i chatchedi grumjatar ap kolende, kai hi pale-tchiddo glan o Debleste, te wenn le pale erligo kerdo. Te hi o viecheskro rat jaake sorelo," 
Hebrews9:14 kitse sorleder hi o Jesus Kristeskro rat. O Debleskro Ducho, kai djiwella hako tsiro, das o Jesus Kristeste i soor, te nai das lo peskro djipen an o merepen. Un job meras o Debleske jaake har i bakro, ap koleste kek doosh hi. Kowa kras lo, te lell lo mari doosh mendar, jaake te djiwas mer buder gar pal kol laba, hoi tchi moldo hi un i menshe an o merepen anenna. Kanna hi maro dji djudjo, un mer nai wah tchatchepah o djido Debleske koi." 
Hebrews9:15 Har o Jesus Kristo meras, las lo i doosh kol menshendar krik, kai djan ap o phuro drom, un kras lenge i newo drom, kai nai wenn le pash o Debleste, te djiwenn lauter kolla, kai o Dewel peske gole das, leha khetne hako tsiro, un te lenn le ko shukar brawlepen pash leste an o bolepen, jaake har job penas." 
Hebrews9:16 Te hi jekes i shukar brawlepen, hoi kamell lo i wawares te dell pal peskro merepen, palle tchinell lo kowa an i liil. Pal leskro merepen lell ko wawar ko brawlepen, jaake har an ko liil tardo hi. Job nai lell kowa gar jaake rah, har ko wawar gomme djiwella. Na-a, kowa hunte meras." 
Hebrews9:17  
Hebrews9:18 Jaake wan ninna an o phuro tsiro vieche maredo, har das o Dewel i menshen i tsillo, kai penas lo lenge, har jon leha khetne nai wenna. Un i viechengro rat sikras, te rikrenn le pen ap kol Debleskre laba." 
Hebrews9:19 Kowa lauter djas jaake: O Mose penas i menshenge kol laba, hoi an ko liil tardo hi, kai tchinlo hi, har te djiwenn le. Palle las lo i grumjengro rat un i bakrengro rat, das pani pashel, un las i kasht, hoi kharella Ysop, pandas lole bakrengre balla pral pre, un tchiwas ko kasht i ballentsa an o rat, un tchoras ko rat ap ko liil un ap kol menshende," 
Hebrews9:20 un penas ap lende: Ko rat sikrell tumende: Tumer han o Debleskre menshe, un djiwenn pal kol laba, hoi job tumenge penas." 
Hebrews9:21 Un ap o Debleskro tikno kheer tchoras lo ninna o rat, ninna ap i tsele tchare un khore, kai kote dren hi." 
Hebrews9:22 Hi gar bud koowa, hoi well gar o rateha djudjo un erligo kerdo. Jaake hi an o Moseskre lila tchinlo. Un te well kek rat win tchoredo, nai well kek doosh krik lino." 
Hebrews9:23 O Debleskro tikno kheer ap i phub un lauter, hoi kote dren hi, sikrell mende i tikno kotar ko Debleskro kherestar, hoi hi an o bolepen. O Debleskro tikno kheer ap i phub hunte was i viechengro rateha djudjo un erligo kerdo. An o Debleskro kheer an o bolepen djas jek, koleskro rat hi latcheder har i viechengro rat." 
Hebrews9:24 Kowa hi o Jesus Kristo. Job djas gar an o Debleskro kheer, hoi i menshe kran, un hoi sikrell mende kokres i tikno kotar ko tchatcho Debleskro kherestar an o bolepen. Na-a, job djas an o bolepen glan o Debleste, te mangell lo les menge." 
Hebrews9:25 O menshengro baro rashai djal hako bersh o viechengro rateha an o Debleskro kutch isema. O Jesus Kristo meras jek kopo, un anas peskro rat jek kopo glan o Debleste, un gar bud kope." 
Hebrews9:26 Te wals kowa gar jaake, hunte merals lo bud kope jaake rah, har i phub koi hi. Job was kanna an kau tsiro, kai mer djiwah, te merell lo, un te lell lo jek kopo hako tsireske i doosh i menshendar." 
Hebrews9:27 Un jaake har i tsele menshe hunte merenna jek kopo, un palle rakrell o Dewel o tchatchepen pral lende win," 
Hebrews9:28 jaake hunte meras o Jesus Kristo jek kopo i menshenge, te lell lo i doosh bud lendar ap peste. Ap ko tsiro, kai well lo i duito kopo, well lo gar, te lell lo i doosh i menshendar krik. Na-a. Palle well lo kolenge, kai tchiwan pengro dji ap leste, te lell lo len pash peste, un te dell lo len lauter kowa, hoi hi lenge an o bolepen." 
Hebrews10:1 Kowa, hoi an o Moseskre lila tchinlo hi, sikrell men gar o tselo bolepaskro brawlepen, hoi kamell o Dewel i menshende te dell. Na-a, i tikno kotar kolestar. Kolla, kai anenn marede viechen glan o Debleste, wenn gar doleske tchatcho un erligo glan leskre jaka. Te wans le tchatcho un erligo, hunte anans le gar hako bersh pale viechen glan leste." 
Hebrews10:2 Te krals kol viechengro rat len jek kopo hako tsireske tchatcho un erligo, palle hunte anans le buder gar pale te pale marede viechen glan o Debleste. Lengre djia wans djudjo, un jon nai bistrans ko tchilatchepen, hoi jon kran." 
Hebrews10:3 Tchatchepah, kol tsele marede viechen, hoi jon o Debleske hako bersh anan, kowa anas lenge pale te pale lengri doosh an o shero." 
Hebrews10:4 Della kek drom, kai lell nai o grumjengro rat un o bakrengro rat i doosh i menshendar krik." 
Hebrews10:5 Doleske penas o Jesus Kristo, har job ap i phub was, ap o Debleste: Mo Dewel, marede viechen un wawar koowa kamal gar. Na-a. Man mukal i mensho te well." 
Hebrews10:6 Tu dikeh gar latches ap i viechende, hoi chatchran le tuke, te well lengri doosh lendar krik lino." 
Hebrews10:7 Koi penom: Dik, mo Dewel, kate hom, te krap, hoi tu mandar kameh, jaake har was mandar glan i rah tsiro an o Debleskro lab tchinlo." 
Hebrews10:8 Ninna te hi tchinlo an o Moseskre lila, te marenn le viechen o Debleske, penas o Jesus Kristo: Tu, mo Dewel, kamal gar, te anenn le tuke marede viechen un wawar koowa, witar kek viechen, hoi jon tuke chatchrenna, te less tu lengri doosh lendar. Tu dikeh gar latches ap kowa." 
Hebrews10:9 Palle penas job: Dik, me wau, te krap, hoi tu kameh. Kanna dikah: Har o Jesus Kristo was, te dell lo pes o Debleske, koi was ko phuro drom buder tchi moldo." 
Hebrews10:10 Har o Jesus Kristo ap o trushel menge meras, kras lo kowa, hoi o Dewel kamas. Un mari doosh las lo jek kopo hako tsireske mendar, un job kras men jaake djudjo un erligo glan o Debleste." 
Hebrews10:11 Hako rashai krell hako diwes peskri budi, un marell bud kope viechen o Debleske. Kal vieche nai lenn gar i doosh i menshendar." 
Hebrews10:12 O Jesus Kristo das pes jek kopo an o merepen, te lell lo i doosh i menshendar krik, un beshas pes hako tsireske ap o Debleskri tchatchi rig. Kote dikell lo ap ko diwes, kai wenn kolla tel leskre pire tchiddo, kai kaman les gar." 
Hebrews10:13  
Hebrews10:14 Jek kopo meras o Jesus Kristo kolenge, kai wenna pash o Debleste, un kras len hako tsiro tchatcho un erligo glan leste." 
Hebrews10:15 Ninna o Debleskro Ducho penell menge kowa. An o Debleskro lab hi tchinlo: 
Hebrews10:16 Ap ko tsiro, hoi wella, penell o Dewel, sikrau me i menshende i newo drom, har nai wenn le pash mande: Me tchiwau miro tchatchepen an lengre shere un tchinau mire laba an lengre djia." 
Hebrews10:17 Un me bistrau lengri doosh. Un lengro tchilatchepen well buder gar an miro shero. 
Hebrews10:18 Kote, kai o Dewel i doosh krik las, kote hunte merell kek viecho buder gar, te lell lo i doosh krik." 
Hebrews10:19 Mire phrala, shunenn! Har o Jesus Kristo menge meras, un peskro rat ratas, kras lo menge i wudar pre, te nai wah glan o Debleste. Men hunte well buder kek traash." 
Hebrews10:20 Har o Jesus Kristo peskro djipen an o merepen das, his kowa jaake, har te krals lo menge ko wudar dran kutch pesso than pre, hoi hi glan o Debleskri kutch isema. Jaake kras lo menge i newo drom, hoi anell men an o djipen o Debleha." 
Hebrews10:21 Men hi i baro rashai. Kowa hi i tsele patslenge koi. 
Hebrews10:22 Leskro rat thowas mari doosh mendar, un kras mare djia djudjo. Un mer wam an o djudjo pani tele thodo. Doleske djas kanna o latcho un tchatcho djijeha glan o Debleste an i sorelo patsepen!" 
Hebrews10:23 Mer nai patsah o Debles, te krell lo kowa, hoi job penas. Job rikrell peskro lab. Doleske rikras soreles maro patsepen ap leste!" 
Hebrews10:24 Das jak jek ap o wawareste, te kamell jek o wawares o djijestar, un te krell hakeno latcho koowa!" 
Hebrews10:25 Das jak, te atchas gar krik, te wenn i patsle khetne. Hi sawe mashkral i patslende, kai wenn buder gar khetne. Kowa hi gar mishto. Tumer dikenna, te hi o diwes gar dur, kai well o rai Jesus pale. Doleske djan kote, kai wenn i patsle khetne, te krell jek o wawares soreles an o dji." 
Hebrews10:26 Te kamell jek ap i tchilatcho drom te djal, un krell kowa ninna, ninna te prindjrell lo o tchatchepen, koleske hi buder kek koi, kai nai merals, te lell lo leskri doosh krik." 
Hebrews10:27 Na-a, job hunte trashell ko diwes, kai well o Debleskri choli pral i phub un i soreli jag pral kolende, kai kaman lestar tchi te djinell." 
Hebrews10:28 An o phuro tsiro his jaake: Ko mensho hunte meras, kai djiwas gar jaake, har an o Moseskre lila tchinlo hi. Te dikan dui, triin menshe ko tchilatcho koowa, hoi ko mensho kras, hunte meras job. Un kekes hunte khaitas job." 
Hebrews10:29 Te his kowa jaake koleha, kai kras gar, hoi o Mose penas, kitse sorleder well o Debleskri choli pral koleste, kai o Debleskro tchawes pestar stakrella, un krella, har te wals o Jesus Kristeskro rat tchi moldo. Un kau rat lals peskri doosh krik, un krals les erligo glan o Debleste. O Debleskro Ducho his leske latches, un job dukras les." 
Hebrews10:30 Mer djinah, kai o Dewel penas: Me dau len ko tchilatchepen pale, hoi jon kran. Miri choli well ap lende. Un pale hi tchinlo: O Dewel rakrell o tchatchepen pral peskre menshende win." 
Hebrews10:31 Hawi bari phagi well pral kolende, ap lende o djido Dewel chojedo hi!" 
Hebrews10:32 Ma bistrenn ko tsiro, kai o Debleskro kamlepen har i momeli an tumare djia was! Ap ko tsiro kran i menshe tumenge o djipen phares. Un tumer lan bud duka ap tumende, un witsran tumaro patsepen gar ap i rig." 
Hebrews10:33 Bud tumendar wan glan lauterende praassedo un dino. I wawar tumendar wan ap i rig kolendar, kai praassedo un dino wan." 
Hebrews10:34 Tumer rowan kolentsa, kai an o stilepen hi. Kolla, kai gar patslo his, lan tumendar kowa krik, hoi tumaro his. Un i bachtelo djijeha mukan tumer len kowa te krell. Tumer djinan, kai hi tumen i feteder brawlepen an o bolepen, hoi kek nai lell tumendar." 
Hebrews10:35 Doleske penau tumenge: Ma witsrenn tumaro patsepen tumendar! Tumer djinenn, hawi bacht lell kowa, kai ap o Debleste rikrella." 
Hebrews10:36 Tumer hunte wenn gar khino an tumare djia, te krenn kowa lauter, hoi o Dewel kamella! Palle dell lo tumen peskro brawlepen jaake, har job penas." 
Hebrews10:37 An o Debleskro lab hi tchinlo: Ko tsiro wella sik, kai well kowa, kai hunte wella. Job mukell pes gar ap o drom pale te rikrell. O Dewel penas: Koon ap mande patsella, kowa hi tchatcho glan mire jaka. Un job lell o djipen. Koon miro drom mukella, ap koleste dikau gar latches." 
Hebrews10:38  
Hebrews10:39 Tchatchepah, mer ham gar kolendar, kai mukenn leskro drom un djan nashedo. Na-a. Mer ham kolendar, kai atchah an o patsepen, un lah o djipen, hoi gar pre-herella." 
Hebrews11:1 Te patsah ap o Debleste, patsah mer ninna, te dell men o Dewel kowa, hoi job penas. Kowa patsah soreles. Ninna te dikah kowa gomme gar, hi maro dji sorelo un djinell, te well kowa jaake, har job penas." 
Hebrews11:2 Sawo patsepen his an mare phurende, un o Dewel dikas latches ap lende." 
Hebrews11:3 Dran maro patsepen haiwah, te was o bolepen un i phub kerdo dran o Debleskro rakepen. Lauter, hoi kanna dikah, kowa kras o Dewel dran kowa, hoi nai dikah gar." 
Hebrews11:4 An o phuro tsiro patsas o Abel ap o Debleste, un maras leske i viecho. Har dikas o Dewel, hoi o Abel leske anas, dikas lo latches ap kowa. Jaake was o Abel an o tchatchepen tardo glan leste. Kowa, hoi leskro phraal, o Kain, o Debleske anas, kowa his gar jaake latcho glan o Debleskre jaka har kowa, hoi o Abel leske anas. Ninna te meras o Abel, sikrell men leskro djipen gomme kau diwes leskro patsepen." 
Hebrews11:5 Ninna o Henoch patsas, hoi o Dewel penas. Un o Dewel las les djides pash peste. Job hunte meras gar. Kek nai hatsas les buder. Glan kowa was lestar penlo, te kras lo kowa, hoi his latcho glan o Debleskre jaka." 
Hebrews11:6 Te hi jekes kek patsepen, nai krell lo gar, hoi hi latcho glan o Debleskre jaka. Koon kamell pash o Debleste te well, kowa hunte patsell, te hi o Dewel djido, un te hi lo latcho ap koleste, koon rodell les." 
Hebrews11:7 Ninna o Noah patsas, hoi o Dewel penas, har job leha rakras, un leste sikras, hoi pral i tsele menshende wella. Ninna te dikas o Noah kowa gomme gar, shunas lo ap o Debleste, un kras i baro panjeskro kheer. Jaake hunte meras job peskre menshentsa gar. Har o Noah ko panjeskro kheer kras, was diklo, te patsas job, hoi o Dewel penas. Ninna was diklo, i wawar menshe patsan gar, hoi o Dewel penas. Doleske hunte meran le. Ap o Noah penas o Dewel: Tu patsal man. Tu hal kanna an o tchatchepen tardo glan mande." 
Hebrews11:8 Ninna o Abraham patsas, hoi o Dewel penas. Har job leske penas: Dja an ko them, hoi me dau tute un tire tchawende, koi shunas o Abraham ap leste, un djas dran peskro them win, un djinas gar, kai job djala." 
Hebrews11:9 Ap ko tsiro djiwan wawar menshe an ko them, hoi kamas les o Dewel te dell. Un o Abraham djas kate un kote an ko them trujel, un djiwas an plachtene khera. Ninna leskro tchawo, o Isaak, un koleskro tchawo, o Jakob, djiwan jaake. Kolenge penas o Dewel ninna: Tumende dau ko them." 
Hebrews11:10 O Abraham dikas ap ko tsiro, kai nai djiwell lo an ko foro, hoi o Dewel krella, un hoi hako tsiro atchella." 
Hebrews11:11 Ninna o Abrahameskri romni, i Sara, patsas, te nai kras o Dewel kowa, hoi job lenge penas. An lakro tselo djipen nai las li kek ternepen. Un kanna, kai his li phuri, penas o Dewel, te lell li i tchawes. Joi patsas les, un las i soor, te lell li i tchawes." 
Hebrews11:12 Har o tchawo boldo was, his o Abraham ninna jaake phuro, te nai wals lo buder gar o dad i tchawestar. Un job was o dad bud bud menshendar. Leskre tchawe, tchawengre tchawe un lauter, kai pal leste wan, wan jaake bud har i bolepangre momlia, un har i tikne barra pash o baro pani, kai kek djinell, har bud kolla hi." 
Hebrews11:13 Kol phure patsle meran lauter. Ninna te lan le kowa gar, hoi kamas o Dewel len te dell, patsan le, te lenn le les. Jon dikan kowa dur glan pende, un his bachtelo pral kowa. Jon penan pendar, te hi len kek them ap i phub, un te hi le kate gar khere." 
Hebrews11:14 Kolla, kai jaake rakrenna, rodenn i wawar them, hoi lengro hi, un kai jon khere hi." 
Hebrews11:15 Te rakrans le pral ko them, hoi jon mukan, palle nai djans le kote pale." 
Hebrews11:16 Kowa kran le gar. Na-a. Lengro dji das gole pal i latcheder them. Kowa hi an o bolepen. Doleske ladjell o Dewel lenge gar, te penenn le: “Maro Dewel!” ap leste. Un job kras lenge i foro." 
Hebrews11:17 Tumer djinenna: An o phuro tsiro kamas o Dewel te dikell, har baro o Abrahameskro patsepen hi. Un o Dewel penas ap leste, te marell job peskro tchawes har i bakro, hoi o Debleske maredo wella. Un o Abraham shunas ap o Debleste, un las peskro tchawes, kai leske kokres boldo was, te marell lo les glan o Debleste. Glan kau tsiro penas o Dewel ap o Abrahameste: Tiro tchawo, o Isaak, hi o dad kolendar, kai pal tute wenna." 
Hebrews11:18  
Hebrews11:19 Kolla laba wan o Abrahameske an o shero un job penas peske: O Dewel nai krell les i mulendar djido. Jaake baro his leskro patsepen ap o Debleste. Doleske das les o Dewel o tchawes pale, un job hunte maras les gar. Kowa his leske jaake, har te wals lo i mulendar djido." 
Hebrews11:20 Ninna o Isaak patsas, te well kowa tchatcho, hoi o Dewel penas. Un o Isaak tchiwas peskre wasta ap peskre tchawende, ap o Jakob un ap o Esau, un rakras i bacht pral lende win, hoi o Dewel len della an ko tsiro, hoi wella." 
Hebrews11:21 Ninna o Jakob patsas, te well kowa tchatcho, hoi o Dewel leske penas. Har job ap o merepen tchiddo his, tchiwas lo peskre wasta ap o Josefeskre tchawende, un rakras o Debleskri bacht pral lende win, un tchiwas peskro shero glan tele ap peskro kasht, un sharas o Debles." 
Hebrews11:22 Ninna o Josef patsas, te well kowa tchatcho, hoi o Dewel penas. Har job ap o merepen tchiddo his, penas lo peskre phralenge, te well ko tsiro, kai djan i Israelitarja dran o them Egiptia win. Palle hunte lenn le leskre kokale lentsa." 
Hebrews11:23 Ninna o Moseskro dad un peskri dai patsan ap o Debleste. Doleske trashan le gar o baro rajestar pral o them Egiptia, har kowa penas, te wenn i tikne tchawe maredo, hoi i Israelengre djuwja lan. Har o Moseskro dad un peskri dai dikan, har shukar lengro tchawo hi, khatran le les triin tchon." 
Hebrews11:24 Ninna o Mose patsas ap o Debleste. Har job baro was pash o baro rajeste pral o them Egiptia, kamas lo buder gar, te kharenn le les: O baro rajeskri tchakro tchawo. Feteder kamas lo duka ap peste te lell, khetne i wawar Debleskre menshentsa, har te djiwell lo i tikno tsiro i shukar djipen an o rajeskro kheer, kai djiwan le jaake, har o Dewel gar kamas." 
Hebrews11:25  
Hebrews11:26 O Mose kamas feteder, te lell lo ko praassepen ap peste, hoi ninna o Jesus Kristo ap peste las, har te lell lo o tselo brawlepen an o them Egiptia. Leske his o brawlepen an o bolepen budeder moldo." 
Hebrews11:27 Dran peskro patsepen djas o Mose win dran o them Egiptia, un daras gar o baro rajestar pral o them Egiptia, te well job chojedo ap leste. Na-a. Job rikras jaake ap o Debleste, koles kek nai dikella, har te dikals les lo peskre jakentsa." 
Hebrews11:28 O Dewel penas leske, hawi bibacht pral o them Egiptia wella. Un job penas leske ninna, hoi i Israelitarja hunte krenn, te well koi bibacht gar pral lende. Koi patsas o Mose, te well kowa tchatcho, hoi o Dewel penas. Un o Mose penas ap i Israelitarja, te marenn le bakren, un te chan le len – kau chapen was kharedo Passa – un te makenn le i viechengro rat ap pengre wudja. Har palle o bolepaskro was, te marell lo i tsele phureder tchawen, koi atchan i Israeleskre tchawe djido. Jon his an i khera, kai o rat ap i wudja hi." 
Hebrews11:29 I tsiro koi pre djan le mashkral o baro pani, hoi kharella Lolo Pani, har te djans le ap o drom. Kowa nai kran le doleske, kai patsan le, hoi o Dewel lenge penas. I Egiptarja kaman ninna mashkral o baro pani te djal, un jon tassan." 
Hebrews11:30 I Israelitarja patsan ninna kowa, hoi o Dewel lenge penas, har his le glan o foro Jericho tardo. Un jon djan efta kope trul o foro. Palle peran i tsele barra khetne, hoi trul o foro pre-tchiddo his." 
Hebrews11:31 Ninna i lubni Rahab patsas ap o Debleste, un las kol murshen an lakro kheer dren, kolen o Mose bitchras, te dikenn le, har sorelo o foro Jericho hi. Jaake was i Rahab gar maredo khetne kol wawar menshentsa an ko foro, kai prindjran o Debles gar." 
Hebrews11:32 Hoi te penap tumenge budeder? Jaake bud tsiro hi man gar, te rakrap kol murshendar Gideon, Barak, Simson, Jefta, David, Samuel un kolendar, kai his o Debleskre rakepangre." 
Hebrews11:33 Kol tsele mursha patsan, hoi o Dewel lenge penas. Mashkral lende his ninna kolla, hoi kuran pen kol bare rajentsa un kol rajengre lurdentsa. Un jon his sorleder har kol bare raja un lengre lurde. Wawar kran o tchatchepen un dikan pengre jakentsa, har kowa tchatcho was, hoi o Dewel lenge penas. Wawar wan glan bare un diwje margodje witsedo, un kolla dandran len gar." 
Hebrews11:34 Wawar wan an i jag witsedo, un i jag nai chatchan len gar. Wawaren kaman i menshe i chareha te marell, un jon nai nashan penge. Kolla, kai kek soor buder an lende his, kolen kras o Dewel soreles. An o kurepen lan le i soor, te tradan le i wawar lurden krik." 
Hebrews11:35 Mashkral kolende, kai patsan, hoi o Dewel lenge penas, his ninna djuwja, kolengre tchawe meran. Kolen das o Dewel lengre tchawen djides pale. Wawar patsle wan phares dino an o stilepen. Lenge was penlo, te mukans le pengro patsepen, nai wans le dran o stilepen win. Un jon mukan gar pengro patsepen, un mukan pen te marell. Pengro tselo djijeha dikan le ap ko tsiro, kai krell o Dewel len i mulendar djido. Kowa his lenge budeder moldo, har o djipen ap kai phub." 
Hebrews11:36 Wawar wan praassedo, un wan i tchupnijah dino. Wawar wan i sasterne shellentsa pandlo, un an o stilepen witsedo." 
Hebrews11:37 Wawar wan i barrentsa mulo witsedo, an kotja tchinlo, un o chareha maredo. Wawar wan palla lino. Len his kek kheer un tchi te chal. Lengre koola his dran bakrengre balla un busjengre balla. Un te wan le tapedo, wan le dino." 
Hebrews11:38 Jon nashan an o mulo them trujel, ninna an i berge un djinan gar, kai te djan le. Mashkral i bare barra khatran le pen, ninna tel i phub. Kolla lauter his latche menshe. I wawar menshe ap kai phub his gar moldo, te djiwan kol latche menshe mashkral lende." 
Hebrews11:39 Kolla lauter patsan ap o Debleste, un job dikas latches ap lende. Fothe latches job ap lende dikas, las gomme kek lendar kowa, hoi o Dewel kamell peskre tchawende te dell." 
Hebrews11:40 O Debles his an peskro dji i feteder drom menge. Job kamas gar, te wenn kol phure patsle glan maro tsiro pash leste. Job kamell, te was mer lauter khetne pash leste an o bolepen." 
Hebrews12:1 Kanna dikah, bud bud menshe patsan, te hi kowa tchatcho, hoi o Dewel penas. Mer ham gar kokres, kai patsah. Doleske hunte kras har jon kran, un mukas gar tele te nashas ap o Debleskro drom, hoi glan mende hi. Te tchiwas lauter tele, hoi kamell men pale te rikrell! Ninna hunte tchiwas o tchilatchepen tele, hoi kamell men te taprell." 
Hebrews12:2 Te dikas ap o Jesus Kristeste! Kowa anas men ap o Debleskro drom, un djal glan mende, bis te wah pash leste. O Jesus Kristo meras ap o trushel. Ninna te his kowa i ladj leske, las lo kau merepen ap peste. Job djinas, pal kowa well i bari bacht ap leste. Un kanna hi lo beshdo ap o Debleskri tchatchi rig." 
Hebrews12:3 Dikenn, hawo tchilatcho koowa i tchilatche menshe ap leste kran, te wenn tumer gar khino an tumare djia, un te atchenn soreles an o patsepen!" 
Hebrews12:4 Me djinau, tumer kamenn gar, te well o tchilatchepen o rai pral tumende. Ninna te was tumenge pharo, te penenn ‘na-a’ ap o tchilatchepen, meran doleske gomme gar." 
Hebrews12:5 Ma bistrenn kol laba, hoi rakras o Dewel peskre tchawenge an o dji: Dikenn mire tchawe, kowa hi tumenge mishto, te dap tumen i phagi. Te tchingrau ap tumende, ma nashenn mandar!" 
Hebrews12:6 Kones o Dewel o djijestar kamella, kowa lell ninna lestar i phagi. Un koon well leskro tchawo, koles dell lo ninna dawa." 
Hebrews12:7 Hi mishto tumenge, te lenn lestar i phagi. Rikrenn kowa win! O Dewel krell tumentsa har i dad peskre tchawentsa. Prindjrenn tumer jekes, koon gar peskro dadestar i phagi las?" 
Hebrews12:8 I tsele Debleskre tchawe djinenn i tsiro, kai lan le lestar i phagi. Tumer te djinenn kowa gar, palle han gar leskre tchatche tchawe." 
Hebrews12:9 Har tchawe hams, dan men mare dada i phagi. Un mer hunte shunam ap lende. Kitse budeder hunte shunas ap maro dadeste an o bolepen, te djiwas." 
Hebrews12:10 Mare dada ap i phub dan men i phagi, hoi dukas men i tikno tsiro, jaake har jon penan penge, te hi kowa menge mishto. O Dewel, te dell lo men i phagi, hi kowa tchatchepah menge mishto. Job kamell, te was mer latcho un tchatcho, jaake har job hi." 
Hebrews12:11 Ap ko tsiro, kai lah i phagi, kamah kowa gar. Na-a, kowa dukell men. Pal ko tsiro haiwah, kowa his menge mishto. Un mare djia wenna pale bachtelo, un mer djiwah budeder an o tchatchepen glan o Debleste, har glan ko tsiro." 
Hebrews12:12 Doleske awenn pale soreles! Hadenn tumare wasta pale pre, hoi khino wan! Krenn tumare herja pale soreles, an lende buder kek soor hi!" 
Hebrews12:13 Atchenn ap o tchatcho drom, te wenn kolla, kai gar sorelo hi, sasto an o patsepen, un te perenn le gar ko dromestar tele!" 
Hebrews12:14 Krenn lauter, te well tumen kek tchingepen i wawar menshentsa! Tchiwrenn o tselo tchilatchepen dran tumende win! Kek mensho dikell o Debles, te mukell lo o tchilatchepen an peste te djiwell." 
Hebrews12:15 Denn jak, te tchiwell kek o Debleskro latchepen ap i rig! Denn jak, te djal kek tchilatcho rakepen mashkral tumende trujel, un krell o patsepen bud patslendar paash! Sawo rakepen hi har i tchilatcho chuchur, hoi krell kolen nasselo, kai les chana." 
Hebrews12:16 Denn garda, te krell kek tumendar wi-ladjedo koowa, witar gar, te djiwell jek har o Esau, koleske o Debleskro latchepen tchi moldo his! Job his o phureder tchawo, un les hi o tchatchepen, te lell lo peskro dadeskro brawlepen pal koleskro merepen. Was i diwes, kai was les bok, un job bikras ko tchatchepen, te lell lo i tcharo latcho chapen." 
Hebrews12:17 Tumer djinenn, hoi pal kowa was. O Esau nai kras buder tchi wawartchandes. Ninna te rowas lo soreles glan peskro dadeste, was lo ap i rig tchiddo. Leskro dad nai rakras buder gar koi bacht pral leste win, hoi hunte lals lo." 
Hebrews12:18 Shunenn, mire phrala! Tumaro tsillo, kai wenn khetne o Debleha, hi gar ko emligo har pash i Israelitarja. Jon djan pash i berga Sinai, un pash i jag, hoi dikan le nai. Trul lende his kali rat un i sorelo ducho phurdas." 
Hebrews12:19 Jon shunan i bashepaskri, kai jek dren phurdas. Ninna shunan le i sorelo rakepen, hoi penas: Hakeno, kai taprell koi berga i wastentsa, hunte well i barrentsa maredo. Ninna ko viecho hunte merella, hoi kote djala. Har jon kol laba shunan, djas kowa lenge jaake an o dji, te mangan le o Mosestar, te wenn kol sorele laba buder gar ap lende rakedo." 
Hebrews12:20  
Hebrews12:21 Kowa lauter, hoi i menshe kote dikan un shunan, kras len jaake dareno, te penas ninna o Mose: Man hi sawi daar, te trissenn mire herja." 
Hebrews12:22 Kowa lauter dikan tumer gar. Na-a. Tumaro tsillo, kai wenn khetne o Debleha, hi ap i berga Zion an o bolepen. Kote hi o foro o djido Deblestar tardo, o newo foro Jerusalem. Kote hi bud bud serja bolepangre, kai sharenn o Debles." 
Hebrews12:23 Kote wenna o Debleskre tchawe khetne. Lengre laba hi an o bolepen pre tchinlo. Kote hi o Dewel, kai rakrell o tchatchepen win pral i tsele menshende. Kote hi ninna kol tsele patsle, kai meran un kolen o Dewel pash peste las." 
Hebrews12:24 Kote hi ninna o Jesus, maro rakepaskro, kai kras menge o newo drom, te djiwas khetne o Debleha. Job meras menge, un leskro rat las mari doosh mendar. O Jesuseskro rat hi feteder har o Abeleskro rat. Har o Abel maredo was, das leskro rat gole pal i phagi pral o Kain. O Jesuseskro rat lell mari doosh mendar." 
Hebrews12:25 Denn jak, te shunenn ap o Debleste, kai ap tumende rakrella! Har job ap i phub ap i phure Israelitarja rakras, kaman le gar ap leste te shunell, un leskri choli was pral lende. Kitse budeder well o Debleskri choli pral mende, te shunah gar ap leste, kai dran o bolepen rakrella." 
Hebrews12:26 An o phuro tsiro trissas i phub, har o Dewel rakras. Kanna penell lo: An ko tsiro, hoi wella, trissell i phub i wawar kopo, un gar i phub kokres, na-a, ninna o bolepen trissella." 
Hebrews12:27 Kol laba i wawar kopo sikrenn men: Kowa, hoi kerdo was, – o bolepen un i phub, – kowa atchell gar soreles tardo un well krik lino. Palle atchell kowa, hoi soreles tardo hi, un hako tsiro atchella." 
Hebrews12:28 O Debleskro them an o bolepen, kai khere ham, atchell soreles tardo, un kote djah mer. Doleske parkras men pash o Debleste, shunas ap leste, daras lestar un kras, hoi job kamella!" 
Hebrews12:29 Ma bistrenn, maro Dewel hi jaake har i soreli jag!" 
Hebrews13:1 Mukenn gar tele, te kamenn i phralen un i phenjen o tselo djijestar!" 
Hebrews13:2 Te well jek pash tumende, ma bistrenn, te lenn les an tumaro kheer! His menshe koi, kai lan bolepangre an pengro kheer, un djinan les gar." 
Hebrews13:3 Ma bistrenn kolen, kai hi an o stilepen. Denn lende kowa, hoi len hunte well djipaske, jaake har te wans tumer kolla, kai stildo hi! Awenn ninna kolenge koi, kai wan palla lino un lan dawa. Awenn lenge jaake koi, har wans tumer kolla, kai wan palla lino un lan dawa." 
Hebrews13:4 Kolla, kai romedino hi, hunte bistrenn gar, te hi jon romedino. O rom hunte well gar khetne i wawar djuwjah, un i romni hunte well gar khetne i wawar mursheha. Djinenn, o Dewel dell i phagi kol murshende, kai chochenn pengri romjat, un kol djuwjende, kai chochenn pengro romes, ninna lauterende, kai lubrenn trujel." 
Hebrews13:5 Ma nashenn i lowe palla! Kowa, hoi tut hi, kowa muk tuke doha te well! O Dewel penas: Me bistrau tut gar, un mukau tut kek tsireske!" 
Hebrews13:6 Jaake hunte daras gar un nai penah: O Dewel hi ap miri rig, me hunte darap gar. Hoi nai krell i mensho ap mande?" 
Hebrews13:7 Ma bistrenn, har kolla pengro djipen djiwan, kai penan tumenge o Debleskro lab, un sikran tumen leskro drom! Dikenn, har jon djiwan un meran, un soreles an o patsepen tardo his! Djan jaake ap o Jesuseskro drom har jon djan!" 
Hebrews13:8 O Jesus Kristo atchell har job hi: taissar, kau diwes, un hako tsireske." 
Hebrews13:9 Te hi menshe koi, kai sikrenn tumen wawar dromma un kamenn tumen o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell, palle patsenn lenge gar! Har shukar hi kowa, te wenn tumer sorelo an o dji! Kowa krell o Dewel, kai hi jaake latcho ap tumende. Kolla, kai penenn tumenge, hoi te chan un hoi te chan gar, kolla nai krenn gar tumaro patsepen soreles. Lengre laba hi tchi moldo." 
Hebrews13:10 Mer djah ap o newo drom. Menge meras o Jesus Kristo ap o trushel. Kolla, kai djan ap o phuro drom, marenn viechen an o Debleskro kheer ap kai phub. Koon gomme viechen marella un glan o Debleste anella, koleske hi o Jesus Kristo gar koi." 
Hebrews13:11 I mule vieche, kolengro rat o baro rashai an o Debleskri kutch isema anas, te lell o Dewel i doosh i menshendar krik, kol vieche wenn win glan o foro an i jag chatchedo." 
Hebrews13:12 Jaake meras o Jesus ninna win glan o foro, te krell lo peskro rateha i menshen erligo glan o Debleste." 
Hebrews13:13 Doleske djas pash leste win glan o foro, te las o praassepen ap mende jaake, har job o praassepen ap peste las!" 
Hebrews13:14 Ap kai phub hi men kek foro, kai nai atchenna. Na-a. Mer dikah ap ko tsiro, kai djiwah an o Debleskro foro, hoi wella." 
Hebrews13:15 Dran kowa parkras men pash o Debleste, sharas les hako tsiro, un kras o Jesuseskro lab bares." 
Hebrews13:16 Ma bistrenn te krenn o latchepen! Denn i wawaren tchomone, te well len ninna tchomone! Kowa, hoi tumer i menshenge krenna, hi har te krans tumer les o Debleske. Un job dikell latches ap kowa." 
Hebrews13:17 Shunenn ap kolende, kai sikrenn tumen, har te djan ap o Debleskro drom! Krenn kowa, hoi jon tumenge penenna! Lengri budi hi, te denn le jak ap tumende. Un jon hunte penenn o Debleske, har jon kran pengri budi. Djiwenn jaake, te krenn le pengri budi i bachtelo djijeha! Te rowenn jon pral tumende, palle wals kowa tumenge gar mishto." 
Hebrews13:18 Mangenn o Debles menge! Maro dji hi djudjo. Kowa djinah mer. Hako tsiro kamah kowa te krell, hoi latcho hi." 
Hebrews13:19 O tselo djijestar mangau tumendar, te mangenn o Deblestar, te nai wap sik pash tumende." 
Hebrews13:20 O Dewel kras i drom, te nai wah pash leste. Job kras o Jesuses, maro rajes, i mulendar djido. Kowa ratas peskro rat menge, te nai wah pash o Debleste, un djiwah hako tsiro leha khetne. O Jesus was maro baro bakrengro. Kowa dell jak ap mende, har i bakrengro dell jak ap peskre bakre." 
Hebrews13:21 Mangau o Deblestar, te dell lo tumen i soor, te krenn lauter kowa, hoi latcho hi, jaake har job kamella. Mu dell lo men i soor, te djiwas jaake, har mishto hi glan leskre jaka. O Jesus Kristo nai krell kowa. Sharas o Jesus Kristes kanna un hako tsiro! Amen." 
Hebrews13:22 Mire phrala, me mangau tumen, shunenn ap kol laba, hoi me tumenge an kau tikno liil tchinom!" 
Hebrews13:23 Djinenn, maro phraal Timoteo was dran o stilepen win. Te well lo sik pash mande, wau leha pash tumende." 
Hebrews13:24 Penenn latche laba mendar kolenge, kai denn garda ap tumende, un ninna ap i tsele patslende! I patsle dran o them Italia penenn tumenge “Atchenn o Debleha!”" 
Hebrews13:25 O Debleskro latchepen tumenge lauterenge! 
James1:1 Kau liil tchinau me, o Jakobo, kowa, kai budrell o Jesus Kristeske un o Debleske. Me penau latche laba kolenge, kai patsenn ap o Jesus Kristeste un djiwenn mashkral kolende, kai gar patslo hi." 
James1:2 Mire phrala, te well pharo koowa ap tumende, palle dikenn koi pre, har te well kowa i bacht tumenge." 
James1:3 Te well sawo koowa ap tumende, un tumer mukenn gar tele te patsenn ap o Jesus Kristeste, palle wenn tumer sorleder an o patsepen un denn gar sik pre." 
James1:4 Rikrenn win, un djan dureder an o patsepen! Ma atchenn tardo! Jaake wenn tumer sawe menshe, har kamell o Dewel dran tumende te krell. Un tumer krenna lauter, hoi mishto un latcho hi. Un kek doosh hi ap tumende." 
James1:5 Te djinell jek tumendar gar, hoi o Dewel lestar kamella, palle nai mangell lo o Debles, te sikrell job leste kowa. O Dewel hi latcho, un job dell o djijestar, ninna te weh tu bud kope pash leste." 
James1:6 Tu te mangeh, hunte patsess, kai leh kowa ninna. Te patseh tu kowa gar, hal tu har i pani, kai phurdell i sorelo ducho pral un tradell les kate te kote." 
James1:7 Tu te hal jaake, djiness, kai leh tu tchi o Deblestar." 
James1:8 Palle hi tut dui djia, un djineh gar, hoi kameh, witar gar, hoi hunte kress." 
James1:9 I tchorwelo patslo, kai pash i menshende tchi molella, kowa nai sharell pes, kai job pash o Debleste bud molella." 
James1:10 I brawelo hunte sharell pes gar pral peskro brawlepen. Job hunte djinell, te atchell lo gar. Har i bluma an o senlepen merell lo." 
James1:11 O kham djal pre un chatchrell o senlepen. Un koi bluma perell tele, un nashrell peskro shukapen. Jaake har koi bluma, jaake merella ninna ko brawelo ap peskro drom." 
James1:12 Bachtelo hi kowa, koon mukell gar peskro patsepen, ninna te well i pharo koowa ap leste. Job hi moldo, te lell lo ko djipen, hoi gar pre-herella. Kawa djipen dell o Dewel kolen, kai les kamenna." 
James1:13 Te well jek an sawo koowa, hoi kamell les o tchatcho dromestar tele te anell, hunte penell lo gar: “Ko koowa well o Deblestar.” Kek nashte anell o Debles o tchatcho dromestar tele. Un ninna o Dewel anell kekes o tchatcho dromestar tele." 
James1:14 Te mukah mer o tchatcho drom, hi men kokres doosh. Ko tchilatcho koowa, hoi an maro shero trujel djal, kowa well mendar." 
James1:15 Te shunah ap maro shero, krah mer ko tchilatcho koowa. Un te was ko tchilatcho koowa baro, anell kowa menge o merepen." 
James1:16 Mire kamle phrala! Ma chochenn tumen kokres! 
James1:17 Lauter, hoi hi mishto un latcho, wella o Deblestar an o bolepen. Job kras o kham un o tchon un i bolepangre momlia. Kolla krenn, te well diwes un rat, un jon wenn jek tsiro diklo un i wawar tsiro gar diklo. O Dewel hi gar jaake. Job atchell, har job hi." 
James1:18 Job kamas, te wam mer leskre tchawe. Kolla wam, har menge leskro tchatcho lab penlo was. Jaake wam mer o feteder mank lauter, hoi o Dewel kras." 
James1:19 Mire kamle phrala, djinenn: Hako mensho hunte lell peske tsiro, te shunell lo. Job te kamell te rakrell, palle hunte putchell lo pestar, te hi kowa mishto, hoi job kamell te penell. Un job hunte well witar gar sik chojedo." 
James1:20 Kek krell an i choli kowa, hoi o Dewel kamella." 
James1:21 Doleske mukenn hako djunglepen un tchilatchepen! Un patsenn ko lab, hoi o Dewel an tumende tchiwas! Krenn kowa i latcho djijeha! An o Debleskro lab hi koi soor, te lell lo tumen dran o tchilatchepen un o merepen win." 
James1:22 Hi gar doha, te shunenn leskro lab. Tumer hunte krenn, hoi ko lab penella. Tumer te krenn kowa gar, palle chochenn tumen kokres." 
James1:23 Kowa, kai shunell o Debleskro lab, un krell gar, hoi ko lab penella, kowa hi har i mensho, kai dikell pes an i dikepaskri." 
James1:24 Job dikell jek kopo dren, un djal peske, un bistras sik, har job wi-dikella." 
James1:25 Koon dikell pale un pale an o Debleskro latcho lab, hoi i menshen win lella dran lengro phuro djipen, ko mensho bistrell gar, hoi job dikas un shunas. Un kowa krella, hoi ko lab penella. Koles dell o Dewel peskri bacht an lauter, hoi job krella." 
James1:26 Te penell i mensho: “Me djiwau pal o Debleskro lab,” un job rikrell peskro mui nai gar, kowa chochell pes kokres. Un kowa, hoi job o Debleske krella, hi tchi moldo." 
James1:27 Kanna penau tumenge, hoi o Dewel, maro dad, kamella, un hoi hi latcho glan leskre jaka: Krenn latchepen i tchorwele djuwjenge, kolen kek rom buder hi! Krenn ninna latchepen kol tchorwele tchawenge, kolen kek dad un dai buder hi! Ma mukenn tumen dren an ko tchilatcho koowa, hoi i menshe ap kai phub krenna." 
James2:1 Mire phrala, tumer patsenn ap maro rajeste, o Jesus Kristeste. Job hi o rai pral i tsele rajende. Doleske, ma dikenn ap i menshende, koon jon hi, un har brawelo jon hi!" 
James2:2 Hoi krans tumer, te wals jek pash tumende an i kangri, un les wals i sonakaskri gustri ap peskro wast un raile ripja ap peste, un koi wals ninna i tchorwelo an tchorwele ripja dren?" 
James2:3 Un tumer penans ap koleste, kai railo rido hi: “Besh tut kai ap ko shukar beshepaskro,” un ap ko tchorweleste penans: “Atch koi tardo! Tu nai besheh tut ninna ap kai phub!”" 
James2:4 Kowa wals jaake, har te penans: “Ko railo hi feteder har ko tchorwelo.” Te dikenn tumer jaake ap tumare phralende, hi kowa tchilatcho." 
James2:5 Shunenn, mire kamle phrala! O Dewel rodas kolen win, kai hi tchorwelo ap kai phub, te wenn le brawelo an o patsepen. Ko tsiro wella, kai djiwenn le leha khetne an o bolepen un lenn leskro brawlepen. Kowa lenna kolla, kai kamenn les o djijestar. Jaake penas les o Dewel." 
James2:6 Har hi kowa pash tumende? I tchorwele hi tumenge tchi moldo. I brawele hi tumenge budeder moldo. Un jon hi kolla, kai rikrenn tumen tele, un anenn tchilatcho koowa ap tumende un anenn tumen glan i tchatchepangre." 
James2:7 Un pral koleste, koon tumaro rai hi, rakrenn le djungeles." 
James2:8 O Jesus Kristo hi maro baro rai un penell menge: Tu hunte wess jaake latches ap o wawareste har hal latcho ap tute kokres! Jaake hi tchinlo an o Debleskro lab. Te djiwenn jaake, palle krenn tumer, hoi mishto hi." 
James2:9 Tumer te dikenn ap jekeste, koon job hi un har brawelo job hi, palle lenn tumer doosh ap tumende. Un o Debleskro lab penell tumenge, kai mukan tumer o Debleskro drom." 
James2:10 Te rikreh tut ap i tsele laba, hoi an o Moseskre lila tchinlo hi, un te kreh tu jek tchilatcho koowa, palle hi kowa, har te rikrals tu tut ap tchi, un tu leh doosh ap tute." 
James2:11 O Dewel penella: Romeha, ma choche tiri romjat i wawar djuwjah! Romnija, ma choche tiro romes i wawar mursheha! Un job penell ninna: Ma mare kekes! Tu te chocheh gar tiri romjat, un tu mareh jekes, palle mukal tu o Debleskro drom." 
James2:12 Rakrenn un djiwenn pal o Debleskro tchatchepen! Kau tchatchepen lell i menshen dran kowa win, hoi len pandas." 
James2:13 Ma bistrenn! Well jek diwes, kai rakrell o Dewel o tchatchepen win pral tumende. Te hi jekes kek dji i wawareske, koleske hi o Debles witar kek dji. Kones hi i dji i wawarenge, koles hunte well kek daar ap ko diwes, kai rakrell o Dewel o tchatchepen pral i menshende win." 
James2:14 Mire phrala, te penell jek, kai job ap o Jesus Kristeste patsella, un krell tchi leske, koleskro patsepen hi tchi moldo ap ko diwes, kai job glan o Debleste tardo hi." 
James2:15 Hoi molell kowa, te well pash tumende i phraal, i pheen, kai hi len gar doha ripaske, chapaske un pipaske," 
James2:16 un tumer denn len gar, hoi len hunte well djipaske? Palle hi lenge tchi moldo, te penell jek ap lende: “O Dewel hi tumentsa. Job dell tumen chapaske un ripaske.”" 
James2:17 Tchatchepah, te krenn tumer kek latcho koowa, hi tumaro patsepen mulo." 
James2:18 Kanna nai well jek, kai penella: “Jekes hi patsepen un i wawar krell latcho koowa.” Koleske penau me: Sike mande o patsepen kolestar, kai krell kek latcho koowa. Miro patsepen sikrau tute dran kowa, hoi me krau." 
James2:19 Tu patseh, kai dell jek Dewel kokres. Mishto, kre kowa! Ninna kol benga patsenn kowa un trashenna." 
James2:20 Hoske haiweh tu kowa gar? Dikeh tu gar, kai o patsepen ap o Debleste tchi molella, te kreh tu gar, hoi job kamella?" 
James2:21 Ninna pash maro phuro dadeste, o Abrahameste, his kowa jaake: Job was latcho un tchatcho glan o Debleste, har job kras, hoi o Dewel lestar kamas: Job tchiwas peskro tchawes ap i pre-tchidde barra, te marell lo les o Debleske." 
James2:22 Tu dikeh, har job kras, hoi o Dewel lestar kamas, koi sikras lo, kai leskro patsepen ap o Debleste baro his." 
James2:23 Kote was tchatcho, hoi an o Debleskro lab tchinlo hi: O Abraham patsas o Debles. Doleske tchiwas les o Dewel an o tchatchepen glan peste. Ninna i menshe penan lestar, kai hi job o Debleskro maal." 
James2:24 Tumer dikenn kanna, o patsepen kokres hi gar doha. O mensho hunte krell ninna, hoi o Dewel kamella, te well lo tchatcho un erligo glan leste." 
James2:25 Ninna koi lubni Rahab was tchatcho un erligo glan o Debleste, har joi ko latcho koowa kras. Joi phukras gar ap kol dui bitchepangre dran Israel, kai wan an lakro foro, te dikenn le, har sorelo o foro hi. Joi khatras len, un anas len ap i wawar drom dran ko foro win." 
James2:26 Jaake har o mensho mulo hi, te hi les kek ducho, jaake hi maro patsepen mulo, te krah kek latcho koowa." 
James3:1 Mire phrala, hi gar mishto, te wenn bud tumendar sikepangre. Tumer djinenna, kai o Dewel rakrell o tchatchepen pral i menshende win. Ap ko tsiro dikell lo ap kol sikepangren budeder har ap kol wawarende." 
James3:2 Mer halauter krah bud kope, hoi gar mishto hi. Koon rakrell an kek tsiro tchilatcho koowa, kowa hi i latcho mensho, kai nai rikrell pes khetne." 
James3:3 Dikenn ap i graja! Te tchiwah mer lenge ko kotar saster an o mui, jaake nai anah mer len kote, kai mer kamah." 
James3:4 Dikenn ninna ap kol bare shiffe, kolen i sorelo ducho pral o baro pani tradell. Lengro rai anell len o tikno kashteha kote, kai job kamella." 
James3:5 Jaake hi ninna mari tchip tikno un krell nai bare laba. Tumer djinenna, i tikni jag nai chatchrell i tselo weesh tele." 
James3:6 I tchip hi har i jag. Lat hi i soor, te krell li bud tchilatcho koowa. I tchip nai krell o tselo menshes djungeles un tchilatches. Koi jag, hoi i tchip krell, chatchrell o tselo djipen, un well o bengestar." 
James3:7 I menshe hi i raja pral i tsele diwje viechende, ninna pral i tchirkle, pral i bare sapa un pral i bare matche. Un kolla hunte krenn, hoi i menshe kamenna." 
James3:8 Kek mensho hi o rai pral peskri tchip. I tchip hi diwjo un tchilatcho. I tchip hi har i midjak sap, hoi anell o merepen." 
James3:9 I tchipjah sharah mer o Debles, kai hi maro rai un dad. Un i tchipjah praassah mer i menshen, kai o Dewel kras jaake har job hi." 
James3:10 Dran ko emligo mui wella sharepen un praassepen. Kowa hi gar mishto, mire phrala!" 
James3:11 Dran jek pani nai well gar jek kopo latcho pani un o wawar kopo londo pani. 
James3:12 Mire phrala, i ruk, hoi hidjrella phabja, nai hidjrell kek brola. I ruk, kai hidjrell drake, nai hidjrell kek kirjasse. Jaake nai well kek londo pani dran o latcho pani win." 
James3:13 Koon gosewo hi mank tumende un djinell bud, kowa hunte sikrell dran peskro latcho djipen, kai haiwas lo, hoi mishto un tchatcho hi. Un job sharell pes gar pral ko latcho koowa, hoi job kras." 
James3:14 Te silwerenn tumer un hadenn tumen pre pral i wawarende, ma penenn, kai han gosewo! Kowa wals i chochepen un gar o tchatchepen." 
James3:15 Sawo goswepen well gar o Deblestar. Kowa well o menshestar un o bengestar. 
James3:16 Kote, kai i menshe silwerenna, un hadenn pen pre pral i wawarende, kote hi tchingepen un hako tchilatcho koowa." 
James3:17 Ko goswepen, hoi o Deblestar wella, hi wawartchandes. I mensho, kai hi les kau goswepen, kowa djiwell i djudjo djipen. Job kamell te djiwell lo latches i wawarentsa khetne. Job hi kamlo un latcho. Les hi i dji i wawarenge, un krell bud latcho koowa. Job mukell pes gar ap jekeskri rig te tserdell. Les hi gar dui tchipja." 
James3:18 Kolla, kai lenn o tchingepen mank i menshende krik, kolendar well latcho koowa, kai atchell hako tsiro." 
James4:1 Kai well o kurepen un o tchingepen mashkral tumende? Kowa wella dran tumare tchilatche djia. Hakeno kamell o feteder koowa peske kokres. 
James4:2 Tumer kamenn bud te lell, un len tchi. Doleske nai marans i menshen. Tumer silwerenn ap i wawarende, un tumer nai lenn gar, hoi kamenna. Doleske tchingrenn un kurenn tumen. O Deblestar mangenn tumer tchi. Doleske hi tumen tchi." 
James4:3 Te mangell jek tumendar tchomone o Deblestar, mangell lo sawo koowa, hoi gar mishto hi, un hoi dran leskro tchilatcho dji wella. Doleske dell les o Dewel kowa gar." 
James4:4 Tumer chochran un mukan o Debles! Djinenn tumer gar, kai kolla, kai tchiwenn pengre djia ap i phubjakro koowa, kolla hi gar o Debleskre mala? Koon kamell ko drom te djal, hoi i menshe ap kai phub djana, kowa kamell o Debles gar." 
James4:5 O Debleskro lab penell gar tchitcheske: O Debleskro Ducho, kai an mende khere hi, kamell men peske kokres." 
James4:6 Un ninna budeder latchepen kamell men o Dewel te dell. An o Debleskro lab hi tchinlo: Kolla, kai krenn pen bares, kolen bitchrell job pestar. Un kolen, kai krenn pen gar bares, kolen dell job bud latchepen." 
James4:7 Doleske, shunenn ap o Debleste! Krenn lauter, hoi job kamella! Ma krenn, hoi o beng kamella! Jaake nashell o beng tumendar." 
James4:8 Awenn pash o Debleste! Jaake well job ninna pash tumende. Ap tumende, kai kran tchilatcho koowa, penau me: Krenn tumare wasta djudjo! Ap tumende, kai djan ap dui dromma, penau me: Mukenn ko tchilatcho drom, un djan ap o Debleskro drom!" 
James4:9 Denn gole pral tumaro tchilatcho djipen! Rowenn koi pral! Ma san gar buder! Awenn bibachtelo un buder gar bachtelo! 
James4:10 Witsrenn tumen tele glan o Debleste! Un job krell tumen bares. 
James4:11 Mire phrala! Ma rakrenn djungeles pral o wawareste! Koon pral peskro phraleste djungeles rakrella un o gushteha ap leskri doosh sikrella, kowa tchiwell pes pral kowa, hoi o Dewel penas. Tu te kreh kowa, hal tu buder gar jek, hoi o Debleskro tchatchepen krella. Na-a, tu tchiweh tut pral o tchatchepen." 
James4:12 O Dewel kokres hi o tchatchepaskro rai. Job nai dell jekes i phagi, un mukell i wawares te djal. Koon hal tu, te sikreh tu ap o wawareskri doosh?" 
James4:13 Mashkral tumende hi kolla, kai penenna: “Kau diwes kamah mer an ko foro te djal, un kamah jek bersh koi te atchell, te ginas un te bikras, un te anas bud lowe khetne.”" 
James4:14 Jaake rakrenn tumer un djinenn gar, hoi taissar hi! Tumaro djipen hi har i ducho, hoi atchella gar. Tumer han i tikno tsiro djido. Un ap jek kopo han tumer buder gar koi." 
James4:15 Doleske hunte penas jaake: “Te kamell o Dewel, djiwah mer un krah kawa te kowa.”" 
James4:16 Kowa penenn tumer gar. Tumer krenn tumen bares, un sharenn tumen pral kowa, hoi tumer krenna. Tumaro sharepen hi gar mishto." 
James4:17 Koon djinell o latchepen, un krell les gar, kowa anell doosh ap peste." 
James5:1 Kanna penau ap tumende, kai brawelo han: Rowenn un denn gole pral koi bibacht, hoi pral tumende wella!" 
James5:2 Tumer nashrenn tumaro brawlepen. Un tumare ripja chan i kirme. 
James5:3 Tumaro sonakai un rup molell buder tchi. Tumer rikran les tumenge. Kowa anell tumen glan o tchatchepaskro rai un chal tumen pre har i jag. I phub atchell buder gar rah. Ninna te djinan kowa, anan tumenge bud brawlepen khetne!" 
James5:4 Shunenn! Tumer chochran tumare budepangren, kai budran ap tumaro them, un dan len kek lowe. Kolla denn gole ap o bolepen. Lengri gole shunell o Dewel, ko rai pral o bolepen un i phub." 
James5:5 Tumenge djas mishto ap kai phub, tumer chan un pijan, un wan pesso, jaake har i vieche, kai wenn maredo." 
James5:6 Koles, kai his kek doosh ap leste, anan tumer glan i tchatchepangre, te well lo mulo dino. Kowa kamas pes gar tumentsa te tchingrell." 
James5:7 Mire phrala, dikenn ap o diwes, kai well maro rai Jesus pale, un awenn gar khino an tumare djia, jaake har i hacho dikell ap ko diwes, kai peskro kutch djob bares was. Job djinell, o brishin hunte well un krell i phub sapeno, un pal i tsiro hunte dell pale brishin, te well o djob bares. O tselo tsiro well o hacho gar khino an peskro dji." 
James5:8 Ninna tumer, ma awenn khino an tumare djia! Atchenn soreles an o patsepen! Hi buder gar rah, kai well maro rai Jesus pale." 
James5:9 Mire phrala, ma rakrenn chojemen jek pral o wawareste, te lenn kek phagi o Deblestar! O Dewel, kai rakrell o tchatchepen win pral i menshende, hi kanna glan o wudar tardo." 
James5:10 Mire phrala, dikenn ap o Debleskre rakepangre, kai penan i menshenge o Debleskro lab. Jon wan gar khino an lengre djia, ninna gar, har wan bud duka ap lende. Awenn har jon!" 
James5:11 Kolla hi tchatchepah bachtelo, kai rikran soreles ap o Debleste. Tumer shunan, har rikras pes o Hiob soreles ap o Debleste, un tumer djinenna, hawo brawlepen o Dewel les lauter das. O Debles hi i baro dji i menshenge un hi lenge latches." 
James5:12 Mire phrala, ma denn tumen sowel, gar ap o bolepen, witar gar ap i phub un witar gar ap wawar koowa. Te penenn tumer: “Awa,” jaake hunte well kowa ninna awa. Un te penenn tumer: “Na-a,” jaake hunte well kowa ninna na-a, te lenn kek phagi o Deblestar." 
James5:13 Te hi jekes tumendar i pharo tsiro, penell lo o Debleske, hoi leske phares hi! Te hi jek bachtelo, giwell lo o Debleske gilja!" 
James5:14 Te hi jek tumendar nasselo, kharell lo kolen, kai hi i phureder mank i patslende, te mangenn le o Debles leske, un te makenn le les o djeteha dren an o Jesuseskro lab." 
James5:15 Te mangenn i phureder o Debles un patsenn ap leskri soor, well ko nasselo sasto. Un o Dewel krell les pale soreles. Te hi doosh ap leste, palle lell o Dewel koi doosh lestar." 
James5:16 Doleske penenn tumenge tumari doosh, un mangenn o Debles jek o wawareske, te wenn tumer sasto. I mensho, kai djiwell jaake, har o Dewel kamella, job te mangell i tselo djijeha tchomone o Deblestar, nai krell o Dewel bud leske." 
James5:17 O Elija his i mensho har mer. Job mangas o Deblestar, te dell kek brishin. Un koi das kek brishin ap i phub triin bersha un shob tchon." 
James5:18 Un job mangas o Debles pale. Un koi das brishin. Un lauter was senelo un baro ap i phub. 
James5:19 Mire phrala, djinenn: Te peras jek tumendar o tchatcho dromestar tele, un jek wawar anell les pale ap o tchatcho drom," 
James5:20 palle las kawa les dran o merepen win, te djal job gar nashedo. Un leskri bud doosh hi lestar krik lino." 
1Peter1:1 Me, o Petro, tchinau kau liil. Me hom o Jesus Kristeskro bitchepaskro, un tchinau kau liil tumenge, kai djiwenn an i themma Pontus, Galatia, Kappadocia, Asia un Bitinia. Tumer han o Jesuseskre menshe un djiwenn mashkral kolende, kai patsenn gar ap o Jesus Kristeste." 
1Peter1:2 O Dewel, maro dad an o bolepen, rodas tumen win, un das tumen peskro Ducho, te wenn tumer o Debleskre tchawe, un krenn, hoi o Jesus Kristo tumendar kamella. Un job thowas tumari doosh peskro rateha tumendar tele. Mu well tumen bud latchepen un bacht an o dji!" 
1Peter1:3 Mer sharah o Debles, ko dades maro rajestar, o Jesus Kristestar. O Dewel kamas men jaake bud, te was job maro dad un das men o newo djipen. Un an mare djia djinah soreles, jaake har job o Jesus Kristes i mulendar djido kras," 
1Peter1:4 jaake lah mer ninna ko djipen, hoi buder gar pre-herella. Ko shukar koowa, hoi lah an o bolepen, atchell hako tsiro. Kowa well gar tchiklo un phuro. Kau brawlepen hi tumenge," 
1Peter1:5 kai patsenn ap leste. O Dewel rikrell tumen an peskro sorelo wast, bis te well ko diwes, kai lell tumen o Jesus Kristo dran i tseli bibacht win. Palle dikenn tumer har shukar kowa hi, hoi les tumenge hi." 
1Peter1:6 Doleske awenn bachtelo, ninna te hunte djan i tikno tsiro ap i drom, kai well bud pharo koowa ap tumende." 
1Peter1:7 Kowa wella pral tumende, te well tumaro patsepen sorelo. Jaake har o sonakai an i jag djudjo un kutch kerdo wella, jaake hunte well tumaro patsepen ninna djudjo un kutch kerdo. Tumaro patsepen hi budeder moldo har o sonakai, hoi atchell gar. Te atchell tumaro patsepen sorelo, palle sharell tumen o Dewel un krell tumen bares un railes ap ko diwes, kai well o Jesus Kristo pale." 
1Peter1:8 Koles kamenn tumer o djijestar, ninna te dikan les gar. Ap leste patsenn tumer, ninna te dikenn les kanna nai gar. Tumaro patsepen anell tumen pash o Debleste an o bolepen. Kote hi tumari bacht jaake baro, hoi i labentsa nai gar penenna." 
1Peter1:9  
1Peter1:10 Kol Debleskre rakepangre rakran glan i rah tsiro pral ko latchepen, hoi o Dewel tumen della. Jon kaman te djinell, har nai lenn i menshe o Debleskro djipen an o bolepen." 
1Peter1:11 Jon kaman ninna ko tsiro te djinell, kai kowa wella. O Jesuseskro Ducho his an lende. Un kowa sikras len kol duka, hoi wenna pral o Jesuseste, un ko railepen, hoi lell lo pal kowa." 
1Peter1:12 Kol Debleskre rakepangre haiwan, kai kowa gar lenge kokres hi, hoi len o Dewel sikras. Kowa hi tumenge, kai kanna djiwenna. Tumenge was o latcho lab o Jesus Kristestar penlo. Kolla, kai penan les tumenge, rakran kowa, hoi penas lenge o Debleskro Ducho. Koles bitchras o Dewel dran o bolepen. Ninna i bolepangre kamenn o Jesuseskro railepen te dikell." 
1Peter1:13 Doleske awenn gar khino an tumare djia, un denn garda, te atchenn ap o Debleskro drom! Dikenn ap ko baro latchepen, hoi o Dewel dell tumen ap ko diwes, kai well o Jesus Kristo pale." 
1Peter1:14 Tumer han o Debleskre tchawe. Doleske shunenn ap leste, un djiwenn buder gar jaake har an ko tsiro, kai prindjran tumer o Debles gar un kran o tchilatchepen, hoi an tumende his." 
1Peter1:15 O Dewel das tumen gole, te wenn tumer leske koi. An leste hi kek tchilatchepen, jaake hunte well ninna kek tchilatchepen an tumende." 
1Peter1:16 An o Debleskro lab hi tchinlo, kai o Dewel penella: An mande hi kek tchilatchepen. Doleske hunte well kek tchilatchepen an tumende." 
1Peter1:17 O Dewel hi o tchatchepaskro rai, kai rakrell o tchatchepen win pral hakeneste pal kowa, hoi job kras. Un o Dewel dikell gar koi pre, koon ko mensho hi. Ap leste penenn tumer: “Tata!” Doleske djiwenn jaake, har job kowa kamella, jaake rah har tumer kate ap i phub djiwenna." 
1Peter1:18 Tumer djinenna, o Jesus Kristo plaissras kek sonakai un kek rup, – kowa lauter atchell gar, – te lell lo tumen win dran tumaro phuro djipen, hoi tchi moldo his, har djan ap ko drom, kai tumare phure djan." 
1Peter1:19 Job plaissras peskro kutch rateha, hoi job ratas, har meras lo ap o trushel. O Jesus Kristo his har i bakro, hoi maredo was o Debleske. Ap leste his kek doosh un kek tchilatchepen." 
1Peter1:20 Har i phub gar koi his, rodas o Dewel les win, te merell lo i menshenge. Un an kau tsiro, kai djiwah, was lo tumenge ap i phub." 
1Peter1:21 Job anas tumen ap o Debleskro drom. O Dewel kras les i mulendar djido, un das les peskro railepen. Doleske tchiwenn tumaro tselo patsepen ap leste!" 
1Peter1:22 Tumer shunan ap o tchatcho lab, un tchiwan o tchilatchepen dran tumaro djipen krik. Kanna nai kamenn tumen tchatchepah har phrala un phenja. Mukenn gar tele, te kamenn tumen o tselo djijestar!" 
1Peter1:23 Tumer wan newes boldo un han tchawe jekestar, kai merell gar. Ko newo djipen lan tumer, har patsan ap o Debleskro lab, hoi hi djido un atchella hako tsiro." 
1Peter1:24 An o Debleskro lab hi tchinlo: I tsele menshe hi har o senlepen un har shukar blume. O senlepen merella, un i blume perenn tele." 
1Peter1:25 O Debleskro lab atchell hako tsiro. Kowa hi ko lab, hoi was tumenge penlo." 
1Peter2:1 Doleske mukenn hako tchilatcho koowa! Ma chochenn! Ma rakrenn dui tchipjentsa! Ma silwerenn! Rakrenn kek djungelo koowa pral kekeste! 
1Peter2:2 Har i ternepen pal o thud gole della, jaake hunte well tumen bok pal o Debleskro lab. Palle wenn tumer sorelo an o patsepen un djan mishto ap ko drom kai anell tumen pash o Debleste." 
1Peter2:3 Tumer haiwan, har latcho maro rai Jesus hi." 
1Peter2:4 Awenn pash leste! Job hi ko djido bar, hoi o Dewel win rodas. O Debleske hi lo o kutch bar, ninna te witsran les i menshe ap i rig." 
1Peter2:5 Ninna tumer han sawe djide barra. Tumentsa kamell o Dewel peskro kheer pre te tchiwell. Job rodas tumen win, te wenn tumer leskre rashaja, un te wenn leske koi. An tumende das o Jesus Kristo peskro Ducho. Doleske nai sharenn o Debles jaake, har job kowa kamella." 
1Peter2:6 An o Debleskro lab hi tchinlo: Me rodom jek kutch bar win, un tchiwom les an o foro Zion tele, jaake te well miro kheer ap leste soreles tardo. Un koon ap koleste patsella, atchell djido." 
1Peter2:7 Kau bar hi kutch tumenge, kai patsenna. Kau bar hi gar kutch kolenge, kai gar patsenna. Jon perenn pral kau bar, un choirenn pen koi pral, jaake har tchinlo hi an o Debleskro lab: Ko bar, hoi kol budepangre ap i rig witsran, kowa was ko bar, ap koleste ko tselo kheer tardo hi; pral ko bar perenn i menshe, un choirenn pen koi pral. Kolla kai patsenn gar ap o Debleskro lab, perenn pral leste. Jaake hunte djal lenge." 
1Peter2:8  
1Peter2:9 Tumer han kolla, kai o Dewel peske win rodas. Tumaro baro rai hi o Jesus Kristo. Koleskre rashaja han tumer, te wenn leske koi. Tumer han o Debleskre menshe, kolen job khetne gole das, te penenn tumer i menshenge, hawo baro un latcho koowa o Dewel kras. Job las tumen dran i rati win, un anas tumen pash peste, kai hi lauter shukar un djudjo." 
1Peter2:10 Glan i rah tsiro hans tumer gar leskre menshe. Kanna han tumer o Debleskre menshe. Glan i rah tsiro djinan tumer gar, kai hi les i baro dji tumenge. Kanna kras lo peskro dji tumenge pre." 
1Peter2:11 Kamle mala, tumer djinenn, kai han gar khere ap kai phub. Me mangau tumen, awenn sorelo! Te well o djungelo koowa an tumare djia pre, palle penenn: “Na-a!” ap kowa un krenn les gar!" 
1Peter2:12 Tumer djiwenn mank i menshende, kai o Debles gar prindjrenna. Doleske djiwenn jaake, te hatsenn le kek tchilatchepen ap tumende! Un kolla, kai rakrenna djungeles pral tumende, kolla hunte dikenn o latcho koowa ap tumende, jaake te sharenn le o Debles ap ko diwes, kai job wella." 
1Peter2:13 Shunenn ap kowa, hoi kol pralstune ap kai phub penenna! Kowa kamell o Dewel, maro rai, jaake. Shunenn ap o baro rajeste pral o them!" 
1Peter2:14 Shunenn ninna ap i moskre! Kolen das o themeskro rai i budi, te denn le kolen i phagi, kai kran tchilatcho koowa, un te sharenn le kolen, kai krenn latcho koowa." 
1Peter2:15 O Dewel kamell, te krenn tumer o latchepen. Jaake pandenn tumer kol dinele menshenge o mui, kai haiwan gar o tchatchepen un rakrenn djungeles pral tumende." 
1Peter2:16 Tumer han buder gar pandlo ap o tchilatchepen. Doleske penenn gar: “Mer nai krah halauter, hoi kamah.” Un pal sawo rakepen khatrenn tumer tumaro tchilatchepen. Ma bistrenn, kai han pandlo ap o Debleste!" 
1Peter2:17 Awenn latches ap hako mensheste! Kamenn i patslen o djijestar! Sharenn o Debles, un krenn, hoi job kamella! Shunenn ap o baro rajeste pral o them!" 
1Peter2:18 Tumer budepangre, shunenn ap tumare rajende, ap kolende, kai latcho un kamlo hi un ninna ap kolende, kai tchilatcho hi." 
1Peter2:19 Te krenn tumer, hoi o Dewel kamella, un doleske dukrenn le tumen un tchingrenn ap tumende, ninna te kran tumer kek tchilatchepen, palle sharell tumen o Dewel." 
1Peter2:20 Te krenn tumer tchilatcho koowa un wenn doleske dino, hi kowa gar mishto, ninna te rikrenn tumer i duka win. Te krenn tumer latcho koowa, un jon dukrenn tumen dran kowa, palle sharell tumen o Dewel." 
1Peter2:21 Job das tumen pash peste gole, te krenn o latchepen, un te rikrenn i duka win. Ninna o Jesus Kristo las tumenge duka ap peste. Job kras kowa, te sikrell lo tumenge, har te djan leske palla." 
1Peter2:22 Job kras kek tchilatcho koowa. Un dran leskro mui was kek chochepen. 
1Peter2:23 Te tchingran le ap leste, tchingras job gar pale. Te dan le les, das lo len gar trad. Na-a, job tchiwas pes an o Debleskre wasta. Un o Dewel hi o tchatchepaskro rai, kai djal pal o tchatchepen." 
1Peter2:24 O tchilatchepen, hoi mer kram, las o Jesus Kristo ap peste, un hidjras les ap o trushel. Har job menge meras, hi kowa jaake, har te meram mer leha. Kanna hi o tchilatchepen an mende mulo. Un mer djiwah nai i latcho un tchatcho djipen. Kol duka, hoi o Jesus ap peste las, kran maro djipen sasto." 
1Peter2:25 Tumer hans har bakre, kai nashran pen. Kanna anas tumen o Jesus Kristo pale ap o tchatcho drom. Job hi tumenge har i bakrengro, un dell garda ap tumende." 
1Peter3:1 Tumer djuwja, ma hadenn tumen pral tumare romende, ninna te shunenn jon gar ap o Debleskro lab! Jaake dikenn jon, har tumer i djudjo djipen djiwenna, un ap o Debleste shunenna. Un tumaro djipen sikrell len o tchatcho drom pash o Debleste, ninna te krenn tumer kek bare laba." 
1Peter3:2  
1Peter3:3 Tumaro shukapen hunte well gar diklo an kowa, hoi i menshe dikenna: har tumer tumare balla hidjrenna, witar gar an o sonakai un kutch ripja!" 
1Peter3:4 Tumaro shukapen hunte well dran tumaro dji un sikrell pes an o latchepen, kai kek tchingepen dren hi. Sawo shukapen atchella, un hi bud moldo glan o Debleskre jaka." 
1Peter3:5 Jaake djiwan ninna kol patsle djuwja an ko phuro tsiro. Jon dikan ap o Debleste, un hadan pen gar pral pengre romende." 
1Peter3:6 Jek lendar hi i Sara. Joi shunas ap o Abrahameste, un penas ap leste Rai. Te krenn tumer, hoi latcho hi, un te mukenn tumen kekestar daar te krell, palle han tumer har lakre tcha." 
1Peter3:7 Murshale, djiwenn tumare romjentsa latches khetne! Jon hi gar jaake sorelo har tumer. Awenn latches ap lende! Ma bistrenn, i djuwja lenn o Debleskro djipen har tumer! Te djiwenn tumer jaake, palle well tchi mashkral tumende tardo ap ko tsiro, kai rakrenn o Debleha." 
1Peter3:8 Ap tumende lauterende penau: Rikrenn khetne! Hakenes te well i dji o wawareske! Tumer lauter han phrala un phenja. Awenn latches jek ap o wawareste! Ma krenn tumen bares! 
1Peter3:9 Krenn kekeske tchilatchepen, kai kras ap tumende tchilatchepen! Jek te tchingrell ap tumende, ma tchingrenn pale! Rakrenn latche laba leha! O Dewel das tumen gole, te lenn tumer leskro latchepen." 
1Peter3:10 An o Debleskro lab hi tchinlo: Koon kamell i latcho djipen un bachtele diwessa te dikell, kowa dell garda ap peskri tchip. Kek chochepen, kek tchilatchepen hunte well dran leskro mui!" 
1Peter3:11 Job mukell o tchilatcho koowa, un krell o latcho koowa. Peskri tseli sorjah krell lo, te djal kek tchingepen mashkral i menshende!" 
1Peter3:12 O Dewel, maro rai, dikell latches ap koleste, kai djiwell pal o tchatchepen. Un te mangell job o Debles, shunell lo les. Ap kolende, kai djiwenn an o tchilatchepen, dikell o Dewel gar latches." 
1Peter3:13 Tumer te kamenn i tseli sorjah latcho koowa te krell, koon krell tumenge tchilatchepen? Kek, patsau." 
1Peter3:14 Tumer krenn, hoi o Dewel tumendar kamella. Nai well, te lenn le tumen doleske palla. Palle han bachtelo. Te denn le tumen trad, ma darenn! Ma trashenn lendar!" 
1Peter3:15 O Jesus Kristo kokres te well o rai an tumare djia! Un te putchenn le tumendar tchomone pral tumaro patsepen, ma darenn kek tsiro, te penenn lenge, ap koneste tumer patsenna." 
1Peter3:16 Rakrenn lentsa latchepah, un krenn tumen gar bares pral lende! Rakrenn dran i djudjo dji, te well i ladj ap kolende, kai rakrenn djungeles pral tumaro djipen o Jesus Kristeha!" 
1Peter3:17 Te krenn tumer latcho koowa, un dran kowa krenn le tumentsa tchilatcho koowa, palle hi kowa feteder, har te krans tumer tchilatcho koowa. Jon nai dukrenn tumen gar, te mukals len o Dewel gar." 
1Peter3:18 Ninna o Jesus Kristo las jek kopo duka ap peste, har job ap o trushel meras, un mari doosh ap peste las. Job his i latcho, un meras i tchilatchenge. Kowa kras lo, te anell lo len pash o Debleste. I menshe maran les. O Debleskro Ducho kras les djido." 
1Peter3:19 Har job mulo his, djas lo ninna pash i mulende an o mulengro them tele, un penas lenge o Debleskro latcho lab." 
1Peter3:20 Job djas pash kol mulende, kai djiwan an ko tsiro, kai o Noah djiwas. Har o Noah ko panjeskro kheer kras, das o Dewel i menshen i rah tsiro, te wenn le pash leste. Un jon wan gar. His gar budeder har ochta menshe, kai djan an o panjeskro kheer. Un kolla tassan gar an o pani." 
1Peter3:21 Jaake har wan kol ochta menshe win lino dran o merepen, jaake djas tumenge kanna ninna, har wan tumer taufedo. Kote was gar koi tchik tumendar tele thodo. Na-a! Koon mukell pes te taufrell, kowa mangell o Debles, te dell lo les i djudjo dji. Kowa nai dell o Dewel leste doleske, kai stas o Jesus Kristo i mulendar pre un djas an o bolepen. Kanna hi lo beshdo ap i tchatchi rig o Deblestar, un hi o rai pral i tsele bolepangre, un pral i tsele pralstune un sorele an o bolepen." 
1Peter3:22  
1Peter4:1 O Jesus Kristo las bare duka ap peste, har job ap i phub his. Doleske, ma darenn, te wenn ninna duka ap tumende. Koon an peskro djipen duka haiwas, kowa mukell o tchilatchepen." 
1Peter4:2 Jaake rah, har kau mensho ap kai phub hi, krell lo kowa, hoi o Dewel kamella, un djiwell buder gar pal peskro shero." 
1Peter4:3 I rah tsiro djiwan tumer har kol menshe, kai o Debles gar prindjrenna. Tumer kran wi-ladjedo koowa. Un tumaro dji nashas pal tchilatcho koowa. Tumer pijan tumen mato, chan tumen nasselo, un mangan wawar koowa an har o Debles. Kowa hi tchilatcho glan o Debleskre jaka." 
1Peter4:4 Kanna djiwenn tumer buder gar ko djungelo djipen har kol tchilatche. Kowa djal kolenge gar an o shero. Doleske tchingrenn le ap tumende. 
1Peter4:5 Well i diwes, kai wenn jon anlo glan o Debleste. Kowa rakrell o tchatchepen win pral i djidende, ninna pral i mulende. Un jon hunte penenn o Debleske, hoske jon ko tchilatcho koowa kran." 
1Peter4:6 Doleske was ninna i mulenge o latcho lab o Jesus Kristestar penlo, te nai lenn le o Debleskro djipen, ninna te meran le, har i tsele menshe hunte merenn." 
1Peter4:7 Ko tsiro wella sik, kai tchi atchella, hoi kanna koi hi. Doleske denn garda, har tumer djiwenna, te rikrell tumen tchi pale, te rakrenn o Debleha!" 
1Peter4:8 Rikrenn khetne an o kamlepen! Kowa hi feteder har lauter wawar. O kamlepen tchakrell bud tchilatchepen. 
1Peter4:9 Lenn jek o wawares kamles an peskro kheer! Un choirenn tumen gar pral koi budi, hoi tumen hi!" 
1Peter4:10 Hakeno tumendar las i budi o Deblestar, te nai krell lo i wawarengro patsepen soreles. Krenn koi budi! Awenn jek o wawareske koi! Jaake han tumer latche budepangre o Debleske." 
1Peter4:11 Das tut o Dewel gole, te rakress o Debleskro lab, palle rake o Debleskro lab! Das tut o Dewel i soor, te budress i patslenge, palle kre kowa an o Debleskri soor! Jaake sharah mer o Debles an halauter, hoi o Jesus Kristo men das. Les hi o railepen un i soor kanna un hako tsiro. Amen!" 
1Peter4:12 Kamle mala, tumaro dji well gar dareno, te wenn tumer soreles palla lino. Sawo koowa djal kolenge, kai patsle hi. Kote well diklo, har tumaro patsepen hi." 
1Peter4:13 Te wenn duka ap tumende, djinenn: sawe duka wan ninna ap o Jesus Kristeste. Doleske awenn bachtelo! Ap ko diwes, kai leskro railepen diklo wella, giwenna un bashrenna tumare djia i bachtjatar." 
1Peter4:14 Te praassenn le tumen doleske, kai patsenn tumer ap o Jesus Kristeste, nai wenn tumer bachtelo. Palle nai djinenn: O Debleskro railo Ducho hi ap tumende tchiddo." 
1Peter4:15 Kek tumendar hunte well i marepaskro, i tchorepaskro, i tchingepaskro, i phukepaskro! Kalla menshe lenn i phagi i menshendar un hunte ladjenn." 
1Peter4:16 Jek, kai patsell ap o Jesus Kristeste un lell doleske i phagi, kowa hunte ladjell gar. Na-a, job te parkrell pes pash o Debleste, te hi o Jesus Kristo leskro rai." 
1Peter4:17 Kanna was ko tsiro, kai wenna i tchilatche diwessa pral o Debleskre tchawende. Pal kowa wella bari bibacht pral kolende, kai patsan gar ap o Debleskro latcho lab!" 
1Peter4:18 Kolla, kai hi tchilatcho, un kamenn o Deblestar tchi te djinell, kolenge djal bud djungleder har kolenge, kai kran, hoi o Dewel kamas, ninna te well kolengro djipen ninna phares an ko tchilatcho tsiro." 
1Peter4:19 Doleske penau tumenge: Te mukell o Dewel ap tumende i pharo tsiro te well, palle denn tumen tseles an o Debleskro wast, kai das tumen o djipen! Un mukenn gar tele, te krenn o latchepen!" 
1Peter5:1 Kanna rakrau ap kolende, kai hi i phureder mank tumende. Me hom ninna i phureder, un dikom mire jakentsa, har o Jesus Kristo ap o trushel meras. Un ap ko diwes, kai well peskro tselo railepen diklo, hom me ninna pash leste. Tumenge penau soreles:" 
1Peter5:2 Denn garda ap i patslende, kai o Dewel peske khetne anas! Tumer han har i bakrengre. Un o Debleskre tchawe hi har bakre, hoi o Dewel an tumare wasta das. Denn len kowa, hoi len hunte wella, te atchell lengro patsepen djido! Krenn kowa o tselo djijestar! Jaake kamell les o Dewel. Krenn kowa gar, har te wals i phari budi, hoi hunte krenn! Krenn koi budi dran o kamlepen un gar, te wenn tumer plaissedo!" 
1Peter5:3 Ma awenn raja pral i patslende! Sikrenn lende, har tumer djiwenna, te djiwenn jon ninna jaake!" 
1Peter5:4 Un ap ko diwes, kai well o pralstuno bakrengro, lenn tumer leskro railepen, hoi atchella hako tsireske." 
1Peter5:5 Kol terne menshenge penau me: Krenn kowa, hoi kol phureder phrala tumenge penenna! Hakeneske penau: Kek te krell, har te well lo bareder har ko wawar! O Dewel hi gar ap i rig kolendar, kai krenn pen bares. Na-a, job hi latches kolenge, kai krenn pen gar bares." 
1Peter5:6 Doleske krenn tumen tikno tel o Debleskro sorelo wast! O Debleskro tsiro wella, kai job tumen bares krella." 
1Peter5:7 Lauter, hoi hi tumen phares ap o dji, witsrenn ap leste! Job krell lauter mishto." 
1Peter5:8 Denn garda, un awenn gar khino! O beng kamell tumen te marell. Un job djal trujel har i diwji bari margodja, hoi hi lat bok, un rodella, kones joi nai chal pre." 
1Peter5:9 Ma krenn, hoi o beng tumendar kamella! Atchenn soreles an o patsepen! Tumer hunte djinenna, kai lenn le tumare phralen un phenja ap i tseli phub ninna jaake palla har tumen." 
1Peter5:10 I tikno tsiro well pharo koowa ap tumende. An kau tsiro lenn tumer i soor, te atchenn ap o Debleskro drom. O Dewel, kolestar well o tselo latchepen, job das tumen gole, te djiwenn hako tsiro khetne o Jesus Kristeha un lenn leskro railepen.
