Job dell tumen ninna i soor, te atchenn soreles an o patsepen un an o djipen." 
1Peter5:11 I tseli soor hi leske kanna un hako tsiro! Amen! 
1Peter5:12 Maro latcho phraal, o Silwano, was mange ap i rig, te tchinell lo kau tikno liil. An kau liil kamoms te penap tumenge an o dji, te djinenn tchatchepah: O Dewel hi tumenge latcho. Atchenn pash leste!" 
1Peter5:13 I patsle, kai wenn khetne an o foro Babilon, penenn tumenge latche laba. Jon wan o Deblestar win rodedo har tumer. Ninna miro tchawo Marko penell tumenge latche laba." 
1Peter5:13 I patsle, kai wenn khetne an o foro Babilon, penenn tumenge latche laba. Jon wan o Deblestar win rodedo har tumer. Ninna miro tchawo Marko penell tumenge latche laba." 
1Peter5:14 Te wenn tumer khetne, denn tumen i tchum, te dikell hakeno, kai tumer phrala un phenja han! O Debleskri bacht tumenge lauterenge, kai djan ap o Jesus Kristeskro drom!" 
2Peter1:1 Me, o Simon Petro, tchinau kau liil. Me budrau o Jesus Kristeske un hom leskro bitchepaskro. Me tchinau ap lauterende, kai lan ninna ko patsepen har mer. Ko kutch patsepen, kai tchiwas men an o tchatchepen glan o Debleste, das men maro Dewel un o Jesus Kristo, kai las men dran o tchilatchepen win." 
2Peter1:2 Me mangau o Deblestar, te dell lo tumen peskro latchepen un peskri bacht an o dji, te prindjrenn les un o Jesuses, maro rajes, feteder!" 
2Peter1:3 Job hi baro un railo, un his menge latcho, un das men pash peste gole. Har lam les an maro dji pre, das men o Dewel an peskri soor halauter, hoi men hunte well, te djiwas maro djipen jaake, har job kamella." 
2Peter1:4 Glan i rah tsiro penas o Dewel i menshenge, te bitchrell lo lenge jekes, kai lell len dran o merepen win, un dell len o Debleskro djipen. Ko baro un kutch koowa kras lo kanna menge. Mer lam o Debleskro djipen un hunte kras buder gar ko djungelo koowa, hoi i menshe ap kai phub jaake kamenna, un hoi anell lenge o merepen." 
2Peter1:5 Doleske tchiwenn tumaro tselo dji koi pre, te well pash tumaro patsepen ninna i djudjo djipen. Koon i djudjo djipen djiwella, haiwell, hoi o Dewel lestar kamella." 
2Peter1:6 Koon haiwas, hoi o Dewel lestar kamella, kowa rikrell pes lauterestar pale, hoi leske gar mishto hi. Koon rikrell pes lauterestar pale, hoi leske gar mishto hi, kowa rikrell soreles ap kowa, hoi latcho hi. Koon kowa krella, kamell o Debles." 
2Peter1:7 Koon o Debles kamella, koles hi ninna i dji peskre phralenge un phenjenge. Kones i dji hi peskre phralenge un phenjenge, kowa kamell ninna i tsele menshen ap kai phub." 
2Peter1:8 Te krenn tumer kowa lauter, un djan dureder ap kau drom, palle prindjrenn tumer maro rajes, o Jesus Kristes, budeder un feteder." 
2Peter1:9 I patslo, kai krell kowa gar, kowa hi korelo, un djiwell an o tamlepen. Job bistras, kai was leskri tseli doosh lestar krik lino, hoi job kras." 
2Peter1:10 Mire phrala, o Dewel das tumen gole, un rodas tumen win, te wenn tumer leskre tchawe. Doleske djiwenn jaake tumari tseli sorjah, te atchenn pash leste! Te djiwenn tumer jaake, perenn tumer gar o Debleskro dromestar tele." 
2Peter1:11 Un o Dewel lell tumen latches pash peste an o bolepen pre, kai hi maro rai, o Jesus Kristo, o rai hako tsiro, – job, kai las men dran i tseli bibacht win." 
2Peter1:12 Ninna te djinenn kowa lauter, un han sorelo tardo an o tchatcho patsepen, penau tumenge kowa pale te pale." 
2Peter1:13 Me patsau, hi mishto tumenge, te penap tumenge kowa jaake rah, har me djiwau, te bistrenn tumer kowa gar, un te wenn gar khino, te krenn kowa lauter." 
2Peter1:14 Me djinau, kai merau an i tikno tsiro. Maro rai, o Jesus Kristo, penas kowa mange." 
2Peter1:15 Doleske tchinau me lauter pre, te bistrenn gar, hoi me tumenge penom." 
2Peter1:16 Mer penam tumenge, te well maro rai, o Jesus Kristo, i bari sorjah pale. Kowa hi kek gosewi parmissa. Na-a. Mer dikam leskro baro railepen mare jakentsa." 
2Peter1:17 O Dewel, leskro dad, das les peskro baro railepen un sharas les, har job dran o bolepen ap leste penas: “Kawa hi miro tchawo, koles me o djijestar kamau. Job krell man bachtelo.”" 
2Peter1:18 Ko rakepen shunam mer dran o bolepen, har hams leha khetne ap koi Debleskri berga." 
2Peter1:19 Doleske djinah mer tchatchepah, kai kowa tchatcho hi, hoi o Debleskre rakepangre penan. Tumer krenna mishto, te denn garda koi pre. Ko lab hi har i momeli, hoi chatchella an i rat, bis te well o diwes. Palle djal i raili momeli an tumare djia pre." 
2Peter1:20 Un kowa hunte djinenn tumer: Kek Debleskro rakepaskro rakras nai pestar Debleskre laba. 
2Peter1:21 An kek tsiro was o Debleskro lab i menshendar. Kol Debleskre rakepangre rakran, hoi o Dewel lenge penas. Kowa tchiwas lenge o Debleskro Ducho an o dji." 
2Peter2:1 Glan i rah tsiro his chochene rakepangre an o them Israel, kai kran, har te bitchras len o Dewel. Jaake wenna ninna mashkral tumende chochene sikepangre, kai sikrenn tumen i chocheno drom, kai anell tumen krik o Deblestar. Kol sikepangre denn o Jesuses, maro rajes, buchoste, kai plaissras peskro rateha lenge, te lell lo len dran o tchilatchepen win. Jon nashenn an pengri bibacht." 
2Peter2:2 Bud wawar dikenn lengro wi-ladjedo djipen, un krenn jaake har jon, un djiwenn ninna i wi-ladjedo djipen. Doleske rakrenn kolla, kai gar patslo hi, djungeles pral o Debleskro drom." 
2Peter2:3 Kol chochene sikepangre kamenn tumen chochene labentsa ap pengri rig te anell, te lenn le lowe tumendar. O Debleskri choli well tchatchepah pral lende, un lengri bibacht wella sik." 
2Peter2:4 O Debleskri choli was ninna pral kol bolepangre, kai kran o tchilatchepen. O Dewel witsras len an o telstunepen. Kote hi le pandlo an i kali rat, bis te well ko diwes, kai dell lo len lengri phagi." 
2Peter2:5 Un o Debleskri choli was pral kol menshende, kai djiwan an ko tsiro, kai o Noah djiwas. Jon kaman o Deblestar tchi te djinell, un shunan gar ap o Noah, har job lenge penas, te hunte djan le ap o Debleskro drom. Un o Dewel bitchras o baro pani pral lende. O Noah kokres un efta wawar tassan gar." 
2Peter2:6 Un o Debleskri choli was pral kol forja Sodom un Gomorra. Un job chatchras kol forja jaake te atchas tchi har barra un jagakri tchik. Jaake sikras job kolende, kai pal lende wenna, hoi djal kolentsa, kai gar ap leste shunenna." 
2Peter2:7 O Lot kokres was win lino dran o foro Sodom, har i jag tele peras. Job djiwas jaake, har o Dewel kamas. Un leske dukas ko djungelo djipen, hoi kol tchilatche menshe djiwan." 
2Peter2:8 Hako diwes dikas un shunas lo, hoi jon tchilatches kran. Un lengro tchilatcho koowa dukras les an leskro dji." 
2Peter2:9 O Dewel, maro rai, haiwell garda te dell ap kolende, kai les kamenna, te perenn le gar o tchatcho dromestar tele. Job haiwell ninna kol tchilatchen pandlo te rikrell, te lenn le pengri phagi ap ko diwes, kai well o tchatchepen wi-rakedo pral i tsele menshende." 
2Peter2:10 Palle well i phagi soreles pral kolende, kai djiwan i fullo djipen, un kaman kek rajes pral pende. Kolla chochene sikepangre hi pre-phurdo, un krenn pen bares. Jon darenn gar, te rakrenn le djungeles pral kolende, kai hi an o bolepen." 
2Peter2:11 I bolepangre hi sorleder har kol chochene sikepangre. Un jon praassenn i chochene sikepangren gar glan o Debleste. 
2Peter2:12 Kol chochene sikepangre rakrenn djungeles pral kowa, hoi jon gar prindjrenna. Jon hi har diwje vieche, kai wenn boldo, te wenn le tapedo un maredo. Jaake merenn jon ninna." 
2Peter2:13 Jon kran tchilatchepen, un tchilatchepen well pral lende. Jon chan pen nasselo, un pijenn pen mato ninna ap o diwes. Lenge hunte ladjenn tumen, te chan le pen pash tumende tchalo, un rakrenn lengro chochepen." 
2Peter2:14 An lengre jaka dikeh, kai dikenn le pal haki djuwjate. Hako tsiro hi len bok pal tchilatcho koowa. Un jon anenn kolen o tchatcho dromestar tele, kai hi gar sorelo an o patsepen. Lengro dji hi pherdi bok pal i lowe. Praassedo hi le!" 
2Peter2:15 O tchatcho drom mukan le, un nashran pen. Jon djan ap ko tchilatcho drom, kai djas ninna o Bileam, – leskro dad hi o Beor. O Bileam kamas i tchilatcho koowa te krell, te lell lo lowe." 
2Peter2:16 Koi rakras leha leskri esla har i mensho. Jaake was leske siklo, har tchilatcho kowa his, hoi kamas lo te krell. Un koi esla rikras les pale, te krell job kek dinelo koowa." 
2Peter2:17 Kol menshe hi har i brunna, kai hi kek pani dren. Jon hi har o bolepen, kai dell kek brishin. Ap ko diwes, kai lenn jon pengri phagi, wenn le an i kali rat witsedo." 
2Peter2:18 Jon rakrenn bare laba, kai tchi moldo hi. Lengro wi-ladjedo djipen tserdell kolen ap o tchilatcho drom, kai dan glan i tikno tsiro pengro phuro djipen pre." 
2Peter2:19 Kolenge penenn le, te nai krenn jon, hoi jon kamenna. Kol chochene sikepangre hi pandlo ap o tchilatchepen, hoi krell lengro djipen paash. I mensho hi pandlo ap kowa, hoi sorleder hi har job." 
2Peter2:20 Jon haiwan, kai maro rai, o Jesus Kristo, lenge meras, un dan pengro phuro djipen pre. Un palle wan le ap ko djungelo drom pale. Kanna hi lengro djipen djungleder har glan ko tsiro." 
2Peter2:21 Jon prindjran o tchatcho drom, un mukan les. Jon kamenn buder tchi te shunell o Debleskro lab, hoi lenge penlo was. Lenge wals feteder, te djinans jon o Debleskro drom gar." 
2Peter2:22 Kol menshenge djal jaake, har penlo well: “Ko djuklo chal pale kowa, hoi job win tchadas. Un ko balo witsrell pes pal o thopen pale an i tchik.”" 
2Peter3:1 Latche phrala un phenja, kawa hi o duito liil, hoi me tumenge tchinau. Kalla lila tchinau, te wenn tumer gar khino an tumaro patsepen. Ma bistrenn," 
2Peter3:2 hoi penan o Debleskre rakepangre glan i rah tsiro! Bistrenn witar gar kol laba, hoi tumenge kolla penan, kolen maro rai Jesus pash tumende bitchras, – job, kai las men dran o tchilatchepen win." 
2Peter3:3 Me kamau, te djinenn tumer, glan ko tsiro, kai o Jesus Kristo pale wella, wenna menshe pash tumende, kai san pral tumaro patsepen. Kolla djiwenn jaake har jon kamenna," 
2Peter3:4 un penenn ap tumende: “Kai hi tumaro Jesus? Job penas, kai job pale wella. Mare phure meran, un lauter atchas jaake har his, har i phub kerdo was.”" 
2Peter3:5 Kol menshe kamenn gar te haiwell, kai kras o Dewel o bolepen un i phub glan i rah tsiro. Jaake har job penas, djas i phub win dran o pani un atchas ap jek rig tchiddo, un o pani ap i wawar rig." 
2Peter3:6 Koi phuri phub djas tele an o baro pani. 
2Peter3:7 Pral o bolepen un i phub, hoi kanna kai hi, penas o Dewel, te atchenn le jaake rah, bis te wenn le chatchedo an i jag. Jon atchenn jaake rah tardo, bis te well ko diwes, kai well o Debleskri choli pral i menshende ap kai phub, un job kolen i phagi della, kai gar ap leste shunan." 
2Peter3:8 Latche phrala un phenja, jek koowa hunte djinenn tumer: Pash o Debleste hi jek diwes har i sero bersha, un i sero bersha hi har jek diwes." 
2Peter3:9 Hi menshe, kai penenna: “O rai Jesus lell pes bud tsiro, te well lo pale.” Kowa hi gar tchatcho. Les hi i baro dji tumenge, un kamell, te djal kek tumendar nashedo. Job kamella, te mukell hakeno peskro tchilatcho drom un well ap o Debleskro drom." 
2Peter3:10 Kek djinell o diwes, kai maro rai Jesus pale wella. Ko diwes wella jaake har i dre-phagepaskro wella. Palle djal o bolepen krik bari goljah. I bolepangre momlia chatchrenna krik. Ninna i phub un ko tselo koowa, hoi ap i phub hi, chatchrella pre." 
2Peter3:11 Mer djinah, kai lauter jaake paash djala. Doleske hunte kras mer lauter, te atchas o Debleha, un djiwas jaake, har job kamella." 
2Peter3:12 Djiwenn jaake, te well o Debleskro baro diwes sikeder! Ap ko diwes chatchrell o bolepen pre, un djal paash an i jag. Un i bolepangre momlia chatchrenna ninna pre." 
2Peter3:13 Mende das o Dewel peskro lab, te krell lo i newo bolepen un i newi phub. Kote della buder kek tchilatchepen. Ap kowa dikah mer." 
2Peter3:14 Latche phrala un phenja, tumer kamenna, te well ko diwes sik. Doleske krenn lauter, te well tchi mank tumende un o Debleste tardo! Djiwenn jaake, te hi tumen i djudjo dji, un te hatsell o Dewel kek doosh ap tumende ap ko diwes, kai wenna glan leste tardo!" 
2Peter3:15 Dikenn, te well maro rai Jesus gar jaake sik pale, krell lo kowa, te dell lo i menshen gomme i tsiro, te wenn le pash leste. Kowa tchinas tumenge ninna maro kamlo phraal Paulo, koles o Dewel bud goswepen das." 
2Peter3:16 Pral ko koowa tchinell lo an peskre tsele lila. Koi hi ninna laba dren tchinlo, hoi hi pharo te haiwell. Un kol menshe, kai haiwenn kowa gar, kolengro patsepen gar sorelo hi, kolla rissrenn kol laba trujel, jaake har jon ninna krenna kol wawar Debleskre labentsa, hoi tchinlo hi. Un jaake djan le nashedo." 
2Peter3:17 Latche phrala un phenja, kanna djinenn tumer, kai tchilatche menshe wenna, kai shunenn gar ap o Debleste. Doleske denn garda, te patsenn gar o chochepen, hoi jon rakrenna! Ma djan lentsa, te perenn tumer gar o tchatcho dromestar tele! Atchenn soreles an o patsepen tardo!" 
2Peter3:18 Djiwenn bud un budeder dran o latchepen, hoi maro rai, o Jesus Kristo, tumen della! Job las men win dran o tchilatchepen. Prindjrenn les bud un budeder! Sharedo well job kanna un hako tsiro. Amen." 
1John1:1 Mer tchinah tumenge pral koleste, kai his hako tsiro koi. Mer shunam les, un dikam les. Awa, mer dikam les mare jakentsa, un tapram les mare wastentsa. Job hi ko lab, hoi o djipen della." 
1John1:1 Mer tchinah tumenge pral koleste, kai his hako tsiro koi. Mer shunam les, un dikam les. Awa, mer dikam les mare jakentsa, un tapram les mare wastentsa. Job hi ko lab, hoi o djipen della." 
1John1:2 Awa, ko djipen was pash mende, un sikras pes mende. Mer dikam les. Doleske rakrah mer kolestar, kai dikam un shunam. Un mer penah tumenge, koon ko djipen della, hoi gar pre-herella. Kowa his pash peskro dadeste an o bolepen, un was pash mende." 
1John1:2 Awa, ko djipen was pash mende, un sikras pes mende. Mer dikam les. Doleske rakrah mer kolestar, kai dikam un shunam. Un mer penah tumenge, koon ko djipen della, hoi gar pre-herella. Kowa his pash peskro dadeste an o bolepen, un was pash mende." 
1John1:3 Kowa, hoi mer dikam un shunam, penah mer tumenge, te nai was mer tumentsa khetne an o tchatchepen. Un tchatchepah, mer ham khetne o Debleha, kai hi maro dad an o bolepen, un leskro tchaweha, o Jesus Kristeha." 
1John1:3 Kowa, hoi mer dikam un shunam, penah mer tumenge, te nai was mer tumentsa khetne an o tchatchepen. Un tchatchepah, mer ham khetne o Debleha, kai hi maro dad an o bolepen, un leskro tchaweha, o Jesus Kristeha." 
1John1:4 Kowa lauter tchinah tumenge, te wenn mare djia un tumare djia pherdo bacht." 
1John1:4 Kowa lauter tchinah tumenge, te wenn mare djia un tumare djia pherdo bacht." 
1John1:5 Kowa, hoi tumenge penah, shunam o Jesus Kristestar. Lestar shunam, kai hi lauter latchepen an o Debleste. Un kek tchilatchepen hi an leste. O Dewel hi har o diwes un kek tamlepen hi an leste." 
1John1:5 Kowa, hoi tumenge penah, shunam o Jesus Kristestar. Lestar shunam, kai hi lauter latchepen an o Debleste. Un kek tchilatchepen hi an leste. O Dewel hi har o diwes un kek tamlepen hi an leste." 
1John1:6 Mer te penah, te ham khetne o Debleha, un djiwah an o tchilatchepen, palle ham chochene, un djiwah gar pal o tchatchepen." 
1John1:6 Mer te penah, te ham khetne o Debleha, un djiwah an o tchilatchepen, palle ham chochene, un djiwah gar pal o tchatchepen." 
1John1:7 Mer te djiwah khetne o Debleha an o tchatchepen, jaake har o Dewel an o tchatchepen tardo hi, palle nai ham mer ninna lauter khetne an o tchatchepen. Un o rat leskro tchawestar thowell mari tseli doosh mendar tele." 
1John1:7 Mer te djiwah khetne o Debleha an o tchatchepen, jaake har o Dewel an o tchatchepen tardo hi, palle nai ham mer ninna lauter khetne an o tchatchepen. Un o rat leskro tchawestar thowell mari tseli doosh mendar tele." 
1John1:8 Mer te penah: “Men hi kek doosh an maro djipen”, jaake chochah men kokres, un mer ham gar an o tchatchepen tardo." 
1John1:8 Mer te penah: “Men hi kek doosh an maro djipen”, jaake chochah men kokres, un mer ham gar an o tchatchepen tardo." 
1John1:9 Mer te mangah men tele glan o Debleste, un penah leske, hawi doosh mer ap mende lam, palle krell lo, hoi job penas un lell i doosh mendar krik. Job hi latcho un tchatcho un thowell o tselo tchilatchepen mendar tele." 
1John1:9 Mer te mangah men tele glan o Debleste, un penah leske, hawi doosh mer ap mende lam, palle krell lo, hoi job penas un lell i doosh mendar krik. Job hi latcho un tchatcho un thowell o tselo tchilatchepen mendar tele." 
1John1:10 Mer te penah, kai lam kek doosh ap mende, palle krah, har te wals o Dewel i chocheno. Un mer djiwah gar pal leskro lab." 
1John1:10 Mer te penah, kai lam kek doosh ap mende, palle krah, har te wals o Dewel i chocheno. Un mer djiwah gar pal leskro lab." 
1John2:1 Mire tchawe, me tchinau tumenge kowa, te krenn tumer kek tchilatchepen! Un jek te kras i tchilatcho koowa, jaake hi men i rakepaskro, kai well ap mari rig un rakrell mishto menge pash maro dadeste an o bolepen. Kowa hi o Jesus Kristo, kai an o tchatchepen glan o Debleste tardo hi." 
1John2:1 Mire tchawe, me tchinau tumenge kowa, te krenn tumer kek tchilatchepen! Un jek te kras i tchilatcho koowa, jaake hi men i rakepaskro, kai well ap mari rig un rakrell mishto menge pash maro dadeste an o bolepen. Kowa hi o Jesus Kristo, kai an o tchatchepen glan o Debleste tardo hi." 
1John2:2 Job kokres las mari doosh mendar, un las lat ap peste, har job menge ap o trushel meras. Gar mari doosh kokres las lo ap peste. Na-a, job las ninna i doosh i tsele menshendar ap kai phub ap peste." 
1John2:2 Job kokres las mari doosh mendar, un las lat ap peste, har job menge ap o trushel meras. Gar mari doosh kokres las lo ap peste. Na-a, job las ninna i doosh i tsele menshendar ap kai phub ap peste." 
1John2:3 Mer te krah kowa, hoi o Dewel menge penas, te kras, djinah mer, te prindjrah les." 
1John2:3 Mer te krah kowa, hoi o Dewel menge penas, te kras, djinah mer, te prindjrah les." 
1John2:4 Koon penella: “Me prindjrau o Debles”, un krell gar, hoi job penas, kowa hi i chocheno, un djiwell gar pal o tchatchepen." 
1John2:4 Koon penella: “Me prindjrau o Debles”, un krell gar, hoi job penas, kowa hi i chocheno, un djiwell gar pal o tchatchepen." 
1John2:5 Koon krella, hoi o Dewel penella, an koleste hi tchatchepah o Debleskro tselo kamlepen. Un ap kowa dikah mer, te atchah o Debleha." 
1John2:5 Koon krella, hoi o Dewel penella, an koleste hi tchatchepah o Debleskro tselo kamlepen. Un ap kowa dikah mer, te atchah o Debleha." 
1John2:6 Koon penella, te atchell lo o Debleha khetne, kowa hunte djiwella jaake, har o Jesus Kristo djiwas." 
1John2:6 Koon penella, te atchell lo o Debleha khetne, kowa hunte djiwella jaake, har o Jesus Kristo djiwas." 
1John2:7 Kamle phrala, ko lab, hoi me tumenge kate tchinau, te krenn kowa, hi tumenge tchi newo. Na-a, kowa hi i phuro lab. Tumer shunan ko lab, har tumer patslo wan, un djinenn les." 
1John2:7 Kamle phrala, ko lab, hoi me tumenge kate tchinau, te krenn kowa, hi tumenge tchi newo. Na-a, kowa hi i phuro lab. Tumer shunan ko lab, har tumer patslo wan, un djinenn les." 
1John2:8 Ko phuro lab hi ninna newo. O Jesus djiwas pal ko lab un tumer djiwenna ninna jaake. Ap kowa dikenn le, kai i rat pale djala, un o diwes wella." 
1John2:8 Ko phuro lab hi ninna newo. O Jesus djiwas pal ko lab un tumer djiwenna ninna jaake. Ap kowa dikenn le, kai i rat pale djala, un o diwes wella." 
1John2:9 Koon penella: “Me djiwau o Debleha,” un krell peskro phraleske tchilatchepen, kowa djiwell gomme an o tchilatchepen. Kowa hi jaake, har te djiwell lo an i kali rat." 
1John2:9 Koon penella: “Me djiwau o Debleha,” un krell peskro phraleske tchilatchepen, kowa djiwell gomme an o tchilatchepen. Kowa hi jaake, har te djiwell lo an i kali rat." 
1John2:10 Koon peskro phrales o tselo djijestar kamella, kowa atchella o Debleha. An leste hi kek tchilatchepen, hoi les o Debleskro dromestar tele nai anell." 
1John2:10 Koon peskro phrales o tselo djijestar kamella, kowa atchella o Debleha. An leste hi kek tchilatchepen, hoi les o Debleskro dromestar tele nai anell." 
1John2:11 Koon peskro phraleske tchilatchepen krella, kowa djiwell har an i kali rat, un djal i drom, kai dikell lo nai gar. Job djinell gar, kai job djala. An i rat hi lo, har te wals lo korelo." 
1John2:11 Koon peskro phraleske tchilatchepen krella, kowa djiwell har an i kali rat, un djal i drom, kai dikell lo nai gar. Job djinell gar, kai job djala. An i rat hi lo, har te wals lo korelo." 
1John2:12 Tchowale, me tchinau tumenge kau lab, te bistrenn tumer gar, kai o Jesus Kristo meras tumenge. O Dewel las tumari doosh tumendar." 
1John2:12 Tchowale, me tchinau tumenge kau lab, te bistrenn tumer gar, kai o Jesus Kristo meras tumenge. O Dewel las tumari doosh tumendar." 
1John2:13 Phure murshale, tumenge tchinau kau lab, te bistrenn gar o Jesuses, kai hako tsiro koi hi. Terne murshale, tumenge tchinau kau lab: Tumer hans sorleder har o beng un kran gar, hoi job tumendar kamas." 
1John2:13 Phure murshale, tumenge tchinau kau lab, te bistrenn gar o Jesuses, kai hako tsiro koi hi. Terne murshale, tumenge tchinau kau lab: Tumer hans sorleder har o beng un kran gar, hoi job tumendar kamas." 
1John2:14 Tchowale, tumenge tchinom kau lab, te bistrenn gar, kai hi o Dewel tumaro dad. Phure murshale, tumenge tchinom kau lab, te bistrenn gar o Jesuses, kai hako tsiro koi hi. Terne murshale, tumenge tchinom kau lab, te han tumer soreles. Un o Debleskro lab atchell an tumende. Un tumer kran gar, hoi o beng tumendar kamas." 
1John2:14 Tchowale, tumenge tchinom kau lab, te bistrenn gar, kai hi o Dewel tumaro dad. Phure murshale, tumenge tchinom kau lab, te bistrenn gar o Jesuses, kai hako tsiro koi hi. Terne murshale, tumenge tchinom kau lab, te han tumer soreles. Un o Debleskro lab atchell an tumende. Un tumer kran gar, hoi o beng tumendar kamas." 
1John2:15 Ma kamenn ko koowa, hoi i menshe ap kai phub kamenna! Ma kamenn ko koowa, hoi i menshe ap kai phub krenna! Te kamell jek ko koowa, hoi i menshe ap kai phub kamenna, kowa kamell gar o Debles, maro dades an o bolepen." 
1John2:15 Ma kamenn ko koowa, hoi i menshe ap kai phub kamenna! Ma kamenn ko koowa, hoi i menshe ap kai phub krenna! Te kamell jek ko koowa, hoi i menshe ap kai phub kamenna, kowa kamell gar o Debles, maro dades an o bolepen." 
1John2:16 Pash i menshende ap kai phub djal lauter pal jek koowa: chapen un pipen, romedinepen un khelepen, brawlepen un sharepen. Kowa lauter well gar o Deblestar, maro dadestar. Kowa lauter hi phubjakro koowa." 
1John2:16 Pash i menshende ap kai phub djal lauter pal jek koowa: chapen un pipen, romedinepen un khelepen, brawlepen un sharepen. Kowa lauter well gar o Deblestar, maro dadestar. Kowa lauter hi phubjakro koowa." 
1John2:17 Kai phub atchella gar, witar gar kowa, hoi i menshe ap kai phub kamenna. Koon krella, hoi o Dewel kamella, kowa atchella hako tsiro." 
1John2:17 Kai phub atchella gar, witar gar kowa, hoi i menshe ap kai phub kamenna. Koon krella, hoi o Dewel kamella, kowa atchella hako tsiro." 
1John2:18 Tchowale, mer djiwah an ko tsiro, kai i phub buder gar rah atchella. Un tumer shunan, kai ko chocheno wella, kai hadell pes pral o Jesus Kristeste. Shunenn, bud chochene hi kanna kai, kai hadenn pen pral o Jesus Kristeste. Ap kowa dikah mer, kai i phub buder gar rah atchella." 
1John2:18 Tchowale, mer djiwah an ko tsiro, kai i phub buder gar rah atchella. Un tumer shunan, kai ko chocheno wella, kai hadell pes pral o Jesus Kristeste. Shunenn, bud chochene hi kanna kai, kai hadenn pen pral o Jesus Kristeste. Ap kowa dikah mer, kai i phub buder gar rah atchella." 
1John2:19 Kolla wan mendar. Jon his gar tchatchepah mendar. Te wans jon mendar, atchans le pash mende. Un har jon penge djan, nai dikas hakeno, te his le gar mendar." 
1John2:19 Kolla wan mendar. Jon his gar tchatchepah mendar. Te wans jon mendar, atchans le pash mende. Un har jon penge djan, nai dikas hakeno, te his le gar mendar." 
1John2:20 Tumer lan o Debleskro Ducho, un lestar djinenn tumer kowa lauter." 
1John2:20 Tumer lan o Debleskro Ducho, un lestar djinenn tumer kowa lauter." 
1John2:21 Me tchinom tumenge gar, har te prindjrans tumer o tchatchepen gar. Tumer prindjrenn les, un djinenn, kai kek chochepen dran o tchatchepen wella." 
1John2:21 Me tchinom tumenge gar, har te prindjrans tumer o tchatchepen gar. Tumer prindjrenn les, un djinenn, kai kek chochepen dran o tchatchepen wella." 
1John2:22 Kowa hi i chocheno, kai dell buchoste, kai o Jesus o baro rai hi, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job. Hakeno, kai dell buchoste, te hi o Jesus o Debleskro tchawo, un te hi o Dewel leskro dad, hi har ko chocheno, kai hadell pes pral o Jesus Kristeste." 
1John2:22 Kowa hi i chocheno, kai dell buchoste, kai o Jesus o baro rai hi, kolestar o Dewel penas, te well job. Hakeno, kai dell buchoste, te hi o Jesus o Debleskro tchawo, un te hi o Dewel leskro dad, hi har ko chocheno, kai hadell pes pral o Jesus Kristeste." 
1John2:23 Hakeno, kai o Debleskro tchawes buchoste della, prindjrell witar gar o Debles, kai leskro dad hi. Koon ap o Jesuseste patsella, un i menshenge penella, te hi o Jesus o Debleskro tchawo, kowa prindjrella ninna o Debles, leskro dades." 
1John2:23 Hakeno, kai o Debleskro tchawes buchoste della, prindjrell witar gar o Debles, kai leskro dad hi. Koon ap o Jesuseste patsella, un i menshenge penella, te hi o Jesus o Debleskro tchawo, kowa prindjrella ninna o Debles, leskro dades." 
1John2:24 Tumenge penau: Rikrenn kol laba an tumare djia, hoi shunan, har tumer patslo wan! Te atchenn kol laba an tumende, hoi tumer shunan, har patslo wan, jaake atchenn tumer khetne o Debleskro tchaweha un o Debleha, maro dadeha." 
1John2:24 Tumenge penau: Rikrenn kol laba an tumare djia, hoi shunan, har tumer patslo wan! Te atchenn kol laba an tumende, hoi tumer shunan, har patslo wan, jaake atchenn tumer khetne o Debleskro tchaweha un o Debleha, maro dadeha." 
1John2:25 Un tumer lenn ko djipen, hoi gar pre-herella. Kowa penas o Jesus Kristo menge." 
1John2:25 Un tumer lenn ko djipen, hoi gar pre-herella. Kowa penas o Jesus Kristo menge." 
1John2:26 Kawa tchinom tumenge, te mukenn tumen gar o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell." 
1John2:26 Kawa tchinom tumenge, te mukenn tumen gar o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell." 
1John2:27 O Jesus Kristo das tumen o Debleskro Ducho. Kowa atchell an tumende. Doleske hunte well tumen kek wawar sikepaskro. O Debleskro Ducho sikrell tumende o tselo Debleskro drom. Un lauter, hoi job tumende sikrell, kowa hi tchatcho un kek chochepen. Krenn kowa, hoi o Debleskro Ducho tumende sikrella! Jaake atchenn tumer o Jesus Kristeha khetne." 
1John2:27 O Jesus Kristo das tumen o Debleskro Ducho. Kowa atchell an tumende. Doleske hunte well tumen kek wawar sikepaskro. O Debleskro Ducho sikrell tumende o tselo Debleskro drom. Un lauter, hoi job tumende sikrell, kowa hi tchatcho un kek chochepen. Krenn kowa, hoi o Debleskro Ducho tumende sikrella! Jaake atchenn tumer o Jesus Kristeha khetne." 
1John2:28 Un kanna, mire tchawe, atchenn pash leste, te well men kek traash, te well job pale. Jaake hunte ladjas men gar glan leste." 
1John2:28 Un kanna, mire tchawe, atchenn pash leste, te well men kek traash, te well job pale. Jaake hunte ladjas men gar glan leste." 
1John2:29 Tumer djinenna: O Jesus Kristo kras, hoi tchatcho hi glan o Debleste. Jaake djinenn tumer ninna: Kolla, kai krenn, hoi tchatcho hi glan o Debleste, kolla hi o Debleskre tchawe." 
1John2:29 Tumer djinenna: O Jesus Kristo kras, hoi tchatcho hi glan o Debleste. Jaake djinenn tumer ninna: Kolla, kai krenn, hoi tchatcho hi glan o Debleste, kolla hi o Debleskre tchawe." 
1John3:1 Dikenn, har baro o Debleskro kamlepen menge hi. O Dewel, maro dad, penell ap mende: “Mire tchawe.” Un tchatchepah, kolla ham mer. Dran kowa haiwenn men kol menshe gar, kai o Debles gar prindjrenna. Jon haiwenn gar, koon job hi." 
1John3:1 Dikenn, har baro o Debleskro kamlepen menge hi. O Dewel, maro dad, penell ap mende: “Mire tchawe.” Un tchatchepah, kolla ham mer. Dran kowa haiwenn men kol menshe gar, kai o Debles gar prindjrenna. Jon haiwenn gar, koon job hi." 
1John3:2 Latche phrala un phenja, kanna ham Debleskre tchawe. Un hoi mer wah an ko tsiro, hoi wella, djinah gomme gar. Jek djinah: Ap ko tsiro, kai well o Jesus Kristo pale, dikah les har job hi, un mer wah jaake, har job hi." 
1John3:2 Latche phrala un phenja, kanna ham Debleskre tchawe. Un hoi mer wah an ko tsiro, hoi wella, djinah gomme gar. Jek djinah: Ap ko tsiro, kai well o Jesus Kristo pale, dikah les har job hi, un mer wah jaake, har job hi." 
1John3:3 Un hakeno, kai kowa patsella, rikrell peskro dji djudjo, te well kek doosh ap leste, jaake har ap o Jesus Kristeste kek doosh hi." 
1John3:3 Un hakeno, kai kowa patsella, rikrell peskro dji djudjo, te well kek doosh ap leste, jaake har ap o Jesus Kristeste kek doosh hi." 
1John3:4 Hakeno, kai o tchilatchepen krella, djiwell gar pal o Debleskro tchatchepen. Un kowa, kai djiwell gar pal o Debleskro tchatchepen, anell doosh ap peste." 
1John3:4 Hakeno, kai o tchilatchepen krella, djiwell gar pal o Debleskro tchatchepen. Un kowa, kai djiwell gar pal o Debleskro tchatchepen, anell doosh ap peste." 
1John3:5 Tumer djinenna, kai o Jesus Kristo was, te lell lo ko tchilatcho koowa krik, hoi kram. Tumer djinenn ninna, kai an leste kek tchilatchepen hi." 
1John3:5 Tumer djinenna, kai o Jesus Kristo was, te lell lo ko tchilatcho koowa krik, hoi kram. Tumer djinenn ninna, kai an leste kek tchilatchepen hi." 
1John3:6 Hakeno, kai atchell o Jesus Kristeha khetne, djiwell gar an o tchilatchepen. Koon an o tchilatchepen djiwella, kowa djinell tchi o Jesus Kristestar, un haiwas les gar." 
1John3:6 Hakeno, kai atchell o Jesus Kristeha khetne, djiwell gar an o tchilatchepen. Koon an o tchilatchepen djiwella, kowa djinell tchi o Jesus Kristestar, un haiwas les gar." 
1John3:7 Tchowale, mukenn tumen kekestar o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell! Tumer hunte djinenna, kolla, kai krenna, hoi tchatcho hi glan o Debleskre jaka, kolla hi an o tchatchepen tardo glan o Debleste jaake har o Jesus an o tchatchepen tardo hi glan o Debleste." 
1John3:7 Tchowale, mukenn tumen kekestar o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell! Tumer hunte djinenna, kolla, kai krenna, hoi tchatcho hi glan o Debleskre jaka, kolla hi an o tchatchepen tardo glan o Debleste jaake har o Jesus an o tchatchepen tardo hi glan o Debleste." 
1John3:8 Kolla, kai djiwenn an o tchilatchepen, kolla hi o bengestar. O beng krella o tchilatchepen jaake rah, har job koi hi. Doleske was o Debleskro tchawo ap kai phub, te phagell lo o bengeskri soor." 
1John3:8 Kolla, kai djiwenn an o tchilatchepen, kolla hi o bengestar. O beng krella o tchilatchepen jaake rah, har job koi hi. Doleske was o Debleskro tchawo ap kai phub, te phagell lo o bengeskri soor." 
1John3:9 Kolla, kai o Debleskre tchawe hi, djiwenn gar an o tchilatchepen. O Debleskre tchawen hi o Debleskro djipen an lende. Un jon nai djiwenn gar an o tchilatchepen." 
1John3:9 Kolla, kai o Debleskre tchawe hi, djiwenn gar an o tchilatchepen. O Debleskre tchawen hi o Debleskro djipen an lende. Un jon nai djiwenn gar an o tchilatchepen." 
1John3:10 Hakeno, kai gar kowa krella, hoi hi tchatcho glan o Debleskre jaka, kowa hi gar o Deblestar. Witar gar hi kowa o Deblestar, kai peskro phrales gar o djijestar kamella. Ap kowa dikell hakeno, koon o Debleskre tchawe hi, un koon o bengeskre tchawe hi." 
1John3:10 Hakeno, kai gar kowa krella, hoi hi tchatcho glan o Debleskre jaka, kowa hi gar o Deblestar. Witar gar hi kowa o Deblestar, kai peskro phrales gar o djijestar kamella. Ap kowa dikell hakeno, koon o Debleskre tchawe hi, un koon o bengeskre tchawe hi." 
1John3:11 Ko lab, hoi tumer shunan, har patslo wan, hi kowa: Mer patsle hunte kamas men jek o wawares o djijestar." 
1John3:11 Ko lab, hoi tumer shunan, har patslo wan, hi kowa: Mer patsle hunte kamas men jek o wawares o djijestar." 
1John3:12 Mer hunte was gar har o Kain. Kowa his o bengestar un maras peskro phrales. Hoske maras lo les? Leskro phraal kras, hoi latcho his. Un o Kain kras, hoi tchilatcho his. Doleske maras o Kain peskro phrales." 
1John3:12 Mer hunte was gar har o Kain. Kowa his o bengestar un maras peskro phrales. Hoske maras lo les? Leskro phraal kras, hoi latcho his. Un o Kain kras, hoi tchilatcho his. Doleske maras o Kain peskro phrales." 
1John3:13 Mire phrala, krenn kek bare jaka, te hi i menshe ap kai phub chojedo ap tumende!" 
1John3:13 Mire phrala, krenn kek bare jaka, te hi i menshe ap kai phub chojedo ap tumende!" 
1John3:14 Mer hams mulo, kanna djiwah. Hoske djinah kowa? Mer kamah i patslen o djijestar. Kowa sikrell mende, kai wam dran o merepen an o djipen. Koon o wawar patsles gar kamella, kowa hi mulo un atchell mulo." 
1John3:14 Mer hams mulo, kanna djiwah. Hoske djinah kowa? Mer kamah i patslen o djijestar. Kowa sikrell mende, kai wam dran o merepen an o djipen. Koon o wawar patsles gar kamella, kowa hi mulo un atchell mulo." 
1John3:15 Djinenn, hakeno, kai krell peskro phraleske tchilatchepen, kowa hi har jek, kai marell peskro phrales. Un kowa, kai marell peskro phrales, koles hi gar ko djipen an leste, hoi gar pre-herella." 
1John3:15 Djinenn, hakeno, kai krell peskro phraleske tchilatchepen, kowa hi har jek, kai marell peskro phrales. Un kowa, kai marell peskro phrales, koles hi gar ko djipen an leste, hoi gar pre-herella." 
1John3:16 O Jesus sikras mende, har o Debleskro kamlepen hi. Job mukas peskro djipen menge. Jaake mukas mer ninna maro djipen i patslenge." 
1John3:16 O Jesus sikras mende, har o Debleskro kamlepen hi. Job mukas peskro djipen menge. Jaake mukas mer ninna maro djipen i patslenge." 
1John3:17 Te hi jek brawelo, un dikell, kai peskro phrales gar doha djipaske hi, un job dell les tchi, jaake nai atchell gar o Debleskro kamlepen an leste." 
1John3:17 Te hi jek brawelo, un dikell, kai peskro phrales gar doha djipaske hi, un job dell les tchi, jaake nai atchell gar o Debleskro kamlepen an leste." 
1John3:18 Mire tchawe, mer te kras gar bare laba te penah, kai kamah i menshen i djijestar. Na-a, o tchatcho kamlepen dikenn le ap kowa, hoi jek o wawareske krella." 
1John3:18 Mire tchawe, mer te kras gar bare laba te penah, kai kamah i menshen i djijestar. Na-a, o tchatcho kamlepen dikenn le ap kowa, hoi jek o wawareske krella." 
1John3:19 Te kamah i menshen jaake, djinah, kai ham an o tchatchepen. Jaake hunte trashas gar o Deblestar." 
1John3:19 Te kamah i menshen jaake, djinah, kai ham an o tchatchepen. Jaake hunte trashas gar o Deblestar." 
1John3:20 Ninna te penell menge maro dji: “Tu djiwal gar jaake, har hunte wess,” palle hi o Dewel bareder har maro dji, un djinell lauter." 
1John3:20 Ninna te penell menge maro dji: “Tu djiwal gar jaake, har hunte wess,” palle hi o Dewel bareder har maro dji, un djinell lauter." 
1John3:21 Latche phrala un phenja, te penell menge maro dji gar, te lam doosh ap mende, hi men kek traash, te was glan o Debleste." 
1John3:21 Latche phrala un phenja, te penell menge maro dji gar, te lam doosh ap mende, hi men kek traash, te was glan o Debleste." 
1John3:22 Un lauter, hoi mer lestar mangah, kowa lah mer, te rikrah men ap kowa, hoi job menge penas, un djiwah jaake, har job kamella." 
1John3:22 Un lauter, hoi mer lestar mangah, kowa lah mer, te rikrah men ap kowa, hoi job menge penas, un djiwah jaake, har job kamella." 
1John3:23 Un kawa kamell o Dewel mendar: te patsas mer ap leskro tchaweste, o Jesus Kristeste, un te kamas men, jek o wawares o djijestar, jaake har o Jesus Kristo les menge penas." 
1John3:23 Un kawa kamell o Dewel mendar: te patsas mer ap leskro tchaweste, o Jesus Kristeste, un te kamas men, jek o wawares o djijestar, jaake har o Jesus Kristo les menge penas." 
1John3:24 Koon kowa krella, hoi job menge penas, kowa atchell o Debleha khetne. Un o Dewel atchell leha khetne. O Dewel das men peskro Ducho. Un kowa sikrell mende, te hi o Dewel mentsa." 
1John3:24 Koon kowa krella, hoi job menge penas, kowa atchell o Debleha khetne. Un o Dewel atchell leha khetne. O Dewel das men peskro Ducho. Un kowa sikrell mende, te hi o Dewel mentsa." 
1John4:1 Latche phrala un phenja, ma patsenn hakenes, koon penella, te hi les o Debleskro Ducho! Dikenn ap leskro rakepen, te djinenn tumer, te well kowa tchatchepah o Deblestar! Bud chochene rakepangre nashenn ap i phub trujel. Kolla penenna i menshenge, te well lengro rakepen o Deblestar. Kowa hi gar tchatcho." 
1John4:1 Latche phrala un phenja, ma patsenn hakenes, koon penella, te hi les o Debleskro Ducho! Dikenn ap leskro rakepen, te djinenn tumer, te well kowa tchatchepah o Deblestar! Bud chochene rakepangre nashenn ap i phub trujel. Kolla penenna i menshenge, te well lengro rakepen o Deblestar. Kowa hi gar tchatcho." 
1John4:2 Har nai djinah, te hi o Debleskro Ducho an jekeste? Hakeno, kai penell glan i menshende, kai o Jesus Kristo was i mensho dran mass un rat, koles hi o Debleskro Ducho." 
1John4:2 Har nai djinah, te hi o Debleskro Ducho an jekeste? Hakeno, kai penell glan i menshende, kai o Jesus Kristo was i mensho dran mass un rat, koles hi o Debleskro Ducho." 
1John4:3 Koon kowa buchoste della, an koleste hi gar o Debleskro Ducho. Jaake rakrell o chocheno, kai hadell pes pral o Jesus Kristeste. Tumer shunan, kai kowa wella. Job hi kanna ap kai phub." 
1John4:3 Koon kowa buchoste della, an koleste hi gar o Debleskro Ducho. Jaake rakrell o chocheno, kai hadell pes pral o Jesus Kristeste. Tumer shunan, kai kowa wella. Job hi kanna ap kai phub." 
1John4:4 Mire tchawe, tumer han o Deblestar, un han sorleder har kol chochene rakepangre. O Debleskro Ducho, kai an tumende hi, hi sorleder har o beng, kai an i menshende hi, kai o Debles gar prindjrenna." 
1John4:4 Mire tchawe, tumer han o Deblestar, un han sorleder har kol chochene rakepangre. O Debleskro Ducho, kai an tumende hi, hi sorleder har o beng, kai an i menshende hi, kai o Debles gar prindjrenna." 
1John4:5 I chochene rakepangre hi menshe kai phubjatar. Doleske rakrenn le har i menshe, kai prindjrenn o Debles gar. Un i menshe shunenn ap lende." 
1John4:5 I chochene rakepangre hi menshe kai phubjatar. Doleske rakrenn le har i menshe, kai prindjrenn o Debles gar. Un i menshe shunenn ap lende." 
1John4:6 Mer ham o Deblestar, un hakeno, koon o Debles prindjrella, shunell ap mende. Koon hi gar o Deblestar, kowa shunell gar ap mende. Doleske djinah mer, kones o Debleskro Ducho hi, kai rakrell o tchatchepen, un kones o chocheno ducho hi." 
1John4:6 Mer ham o Deblestar, un hakeno, koon o Debles prindjrella, shunell ap mende. Koon hi gar o Deblestar, kowa shunell gar ap mende. Doleske djinah mer, kones o Debleskro Ducho hi, kai rakrell o tchatchepen, un kones o chocheno ducho hi." 
1John4:7 Latche phrala un phenja, o djijeskro kamlepen wella o Deblestar. Doleske hunte well men i dji mare phralenge un phenjenge an o patsepen. Kolen, kai hi i dji i wawarenge, kolla hi o Debleskre tchawe, un prindjrenn o Debles." 
1John4:7 Latche phrala un phenja, o djijeskro kamlepen wella o Deblestar. Doleske hunte well men i dji mare phralenge un phenjenge an o patsepen. Kolen, kai hi i dji i wawarenge, kolla hi o Debleskre tchawe, un prindjrenn o Debles."

1John4:13 O Dewel das men peskro Ducho. Ap kowa haiwah mer, kai o Dewel mentsa hi, un mer leha ham." 
1John4:14 Mer dikam, kai o Dewel, maro dad, peskro tchawes bitchras. Doleske penah mer i menshenge, kai job kowa hi, kai lell len win dran o tchilatchepen un o merepen." 
1John4:14 Mer dikam, kai o Dewel, maro dad, peskro tchawes bitchras. Doleske penah mer i menshenge, kai job kowa hi, kai lell len win dran o tchilatchepen un o merepen."

1John4:15 Koon glan i menshende penella, kai o Jesus o Debleskro tchawo hi, koleha atchell o Dewel, un job atchell o Debleha."

1John4:16 Mer haiwam ko tchatcho kamlepen, hoi o Debles menge hi. Un mer patsah, te kamell men o Dewel tchatchepah! O Dewel hi pherdo kamlepen. Koon an o Debleskro kamlepen atchella, kowa atchella o Debleha, un o Dewel atchell leha." 
1John4:17 Mer te ham pherdo Debleskro kamlepen, palle hi men buder kek daar glan o Debleste ap ko diwes, kai o Dewel o tchatchepen wi-rakrella pral i tsele menshende. Ninna te ham mer kanna ap kai phub, ham mer o Debleha khetne, jaake har o Jesus Kristo o Debleha khetne hi." 
1John4:17 Mer te ham pherdo Debleskro kamlepen, palle hi men buder kek daar glan o Debleste ap ko diwes, kai o Dewel o tchatchepen wi-rakrella pral i tsele menshende. Ninna te ham mer kanna ap kai phub, ham mer o Debleha khetne, jaake har o Jesus Kristo o Debleha khetne hi."

Un kolla, kai kamenn len pash pende pre te lell, kolenge penell lo, te krenn le kowa gar, un witsrell len dran i kangri win."

3John1:11 Latcho phraal, ma kre o tchilatchepen palla! Kre o latchepen! Kowa, kai krell latcho koowa, well o Deblestar. Kowa, kai o tchilatchepen krella, kowa prindjrell o Debles gar." 
3John1:11 Latcho phraal, ma kre o tchilatchepen palla! Kre o latchepen! Kowa, kai krell latcho koowa, well o Deblestar. Kowa, kai o tchilatchepen krella, kowa prindjrell o Debles gar." 
3John1:12 O Demetrio krell o latchepen. Lauter rakrenn mishto pral leste. Un leskro djipen sikrella, te hi lo an o tchatchepen tardo. Mer ninna penah, kai kowa, hoi job krella, mishto hi. Un tu djineh, kai kowa, hoi mer penah, tchatcho hi." 
3John1:12 O Demetrio krell o latchepen. Lauter rakrenn mishto pral leste. Un leskro djipen sikrella, te hi lo an o tchatchepen tardo. Mer ninna penah, kai kowa, hoi job krella, mishto hi. Un tu djineh, kai kowa, hoi mer penah, tchatcho hi." 
3John1:13 Me hunte penoms tuke jaake bud. Kowa kamau gar lauter an i liil te tchinell. 
3John1:13 Me hunte penoms tuke jaake bud. Kowa kamau gar lauter an i liil te tchinell. 
3John1:14 Wals mishto, te dikams men jaake sik, har djala. Koi rakrams nai pral lauter." 
3John1:14 Wals mishto, te dikams men jaake sik, har djala. Koi rakrams nai pral lauter." 
3John1:15 O Debleskri bacht tuke! Kol mala pash mande penenn tuke “Atch maro Debleha!” Pen latche laba mandar mire malenge, kai pash tute hi, pen kowa hakeneske peskro labeha!" 
3John1:15 O Debleskri bacht tuke! Kol mala pash mande penenn tuke “Atch maro Debleha!” Pen latche laba mandar mire malenge, kai pash tute hi, pen kowa hakeneske peskro labeha!" 
Jude1:1 Me, o Judas, tchinau kau liil ap tumende, kolen o Dewel peske win rodas. Job hi tumaro dad un kamell tumen o djijestar. Un o Jesus Kristo dell garda ap tumende. Me hom o Jesus Kristeskro budepaskro un o Jakobeskro phraal." 
Jude1:2 O Debleskro kamlepen, bacht un latchepen well bud un budeder pral tumende!" 
Jude1:3 Mire phrala un phenja, his i tsiro, kai kamoms tumenge an i liil te tchinell, har latcho o Dewel ap mende hi, te las lo men dran o tchilatchepen win. Pral kowa kamau me kanna buder gar te tchinell. Kanna dikau, hi feteder, te tchinap tumenge, te atchenn soreles an o patsepen. Ma mukenn tumen o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell! Leskro lab, hoi tumenge penlo was, atchell tchatcho hako tsiro." 
Jude1:4 Me shunom, hi menshe koi, hoi tchorchanes mank tumende wan. Kolla kamenn o Deblestar tchi djinell. Jon penenn, te hi o Dewel latcho, un te nai krenn le lauter, hoi jon kamenna. Jaake djiwenn le i wi-ladjedo djipen, un denn maro rajes, o Jesus Kristes, buchoste. Kowa kokres hi maro rai. Glan i rah tsiro hi tchinlo, te lenn jon pengri phagi." 
Jude1:5 Ninna te djinenn tumer kowa lauter, kamau, te bistrenn gar, har o Dewel, maro rai, peskre menshen dran o them Egiptia win las. Un ap i wawar tsiro maras lo kolen, hoi gar patsan." 
Jude1:6 Ma bistrenn witar gar kol bolepangren, kai dan gar garda ap koi budi, hoi o Dewel len das, un mukan pengro kheer an o bolepen. Kolen pandas lo i shellentsa, hoi kek tsireske buder pre kerdo wenn. Un job rikrell len stildo an i kali rat, bis te well ko baro diwes, kai i phagi pral lende wi-rakedo wella." 
Jude1:7 Jaake lan ninna kol menshe i phagi, kai djiwan an i forja Sodom un Gomorra un an kol forja trul lende. Jon kran wi-ladjedo koowa har kol bolepangre un djan wawar mass palla. I phagi, hoi pral kol menshende was, sikrell mende, hoi kolenge djal, kai sawo koowa krenna. Jon djan an i jag, hoi hako tsiro chatchella." 
Jude1:8 Un jaake hi ninna kolla, kai dikenn sunja, un krenn wi-ladjedo koowa, un kamenn kek rajes pral pende, un rakrenn djungeles pral kolende an o bolepen." 
Jude1:9 O Debleskro baro bolepaskro, leskro lab hi Michael, las peske gar win, te praassell lo o benges, har job tchingras pes o bengeha, koon lendar lals o mulo Moses. Job penas leske kokres: “O Dewel, maro rai, dell tut i phagi!”" 
Jude1:10 Kolla menshe praassenn lauter, hoi le gar prindjrenna. Kowa, hoi lengro mass kamella, kowa krenn le jaake har i vieche, kai tchi djinenna. Un jaake djan le nashedo." 
Jude1:11 Bibacht well ap lende! Jon djan ap o tchilatcho drom, kai ninna o Kain djas. Un i lowenge anenn le doosh ap pende, jaake har o Bileam kras. Un jaake har o Korach merenn le. O Korach hadas pes peskre menshentsa pral o Debleskre murshende." 
Jude1:12 Kol menshenge hunte ladjenn tumen. Te wenn tumer khetne, te pijenn un te chan, palle chan jon pen thulles pash tumende un ladjenn pen gar. Jon dikenn ap pende kokres, te djal lenge kokres mishto. Jon krenn bare laba, hoi tchi moldo hi. Jon hi har ruka, ap kolende tchi baro wella, witar kek patria, un kai hi tseles mulo un wenn tele dino." 
Jude1:13 Jon hi har diwje panja, hoi witsrenn pengro tchik, hoi an lende hi, win ap i phub glan lende. Jon hi har bolepangre momlia, hoi dran pengro drom win djan, un hunte djan kanna hako tsireske an i kali rat." 
Jude1:14 Glan i rah tsiro penas pral lende o Henoch, kowa his o eftato dad pal o Adam: Dikenn, o Dewel, maro rai, well dran o bolepen. Un bud serja bolepangre hi pash leste." 
Jude1:15 Job well, te rakrell lo o tchatchepen win pral i tsele menshende, un te dell lo kolen i phagi, kai djan gar ap o Debleskro drom un kran gar, hoi job kamas, un tchingran ap leste tchilatche labentsa." 
Jude1:16 Kolla hi sawe menshe, kolenge kowa gar mishto doha hi, hoi o Dewel len das. Un jon choirenn pen, kai lenge gar feteder djal. Jon djiwenn pal pengro shero. Jon hi sharede, kai rakrenn shukar labentsa i menshentsa, te lenn le lendar latcho koowa." 
Jude1:17 Tumer, mire phrala un phenja, ma bistrenn kol laba, hoi tumenge kolla penan, kolen maro rai, o Jesus Kristo, bitchras, te penenn le i menshenge leskre laba." 
Jude1:18 Jon penan: Glan ko tsiro, kai maro rai Jesus pale wella, wenna sawe menshe, hoi san pral o Debleskro koowa, un djiwenn jaake, har jon kamenna un krenn, hoi o Dewel gar kamella." 
Jude1:19 An lengro shero hi phubjakro koowa. Un an lengro dji hi gar o Debleskro Ducho. Kolla anenn tchingepen un krenn, te rikrenn i patsle buder gar khetne." 
Jude1:20 Tumer, mire phrala un phenja, atchenn soreles an tumaro patsepen, hoi das tumen o Dewel. Un mangenn les jaake, har leskro Ducho an tumende kamell." 
Jude1:21 Un rikrenn tumen an o Debleskro kamlepen! Un dikenn ap maro rajeste, o Jesus Kristeste! Kowa hi jaake latcho ap mende, te dell lo men o djipen, hoi gar pre-herella." 
Jude1:22 Awenn latches ap kol menshende, kai djinenn gar, hoi te patsenn, un jek kopo kawa patsenn un ko wawar kopo kowa. Krenn lengre djia soreles!" 
Jude1:23 Wawar nashran pen. Kolen anenn ap o tchatcho drom! Kowa hi jaake har te tserdans len dran i jag win. Wawar djiwenn i djungelo djipen. Rakrenn ninna kolenge latches an o dji! Un denn garda, te krenn gar kowa, hoi jon krenna. Lengro djipen hi har i tchiklo ripen ap lende." 
Jude1:24 Maro Debles hi i soor, te rikrell lo tumen ap leskro drom, te hatsell lo kek doosh ap tumende ap ko diwes, kai han glan leste tardo, un dikenn leskro railepen, un han bachteles." 
Jude1:25 Sharas koles, kai kokres o Dewel hi! Job las men dran o tchilatchepen win, har maro rai, o Jesus Kristo, menge meras. Maro Dewel hi o baro rai. Les hi i tseli soor kanna un glan kau tsiro un an ko tsiro, hoi wella. Amen." 
Revelation1:1 An kau liil hi kowa tchinlo, hoi o Dewel mukas o Jesus Kristes te dikell, te sikrell job peskre budepangren, hoi an i tikno tsiro hunte wella. Un o Jesus Kristo bitchras peskro bolepaskres pash mande, te sikrell lo mande kawa lauter. Me, o Johanni, hom leskro budepaskro" 
Revelation1:2 un tchinom kowa, hoi o Jesus Kristo mande sikras, an kau liil. Kol laba wenna o Deblestar. Lauter, hoi dikom, tchinom pre." 
Revelation1:3 Bachtelo hi kowa, kai drawerell kal laba. Un bachtele hi kolla, kai shunenn kal laba, un rikrenn len an pengre djia. O tsiro hi gar dur, kai kawa lauter wella." 
Revelation1:4 Me, o Johanni, tchinau kau liil ap i tsele patslende, kai an i efta forja an o them Asia khetne wenna. Latchepen un bacht tumenge! Kowa dell tumen o Dewel! Job djiwella hako tsiro: kanna un an ko tsiro, hoi his un hoi wella! Latchepen un bacht tumenge! Kowa dell tumen o Debleskro Ducho! Kowa hi har efta jaga glan o Debleskro beshepaskro tardo." 
Revelation1:5 Latchepen un bacht tumenge! Kowa dell tumen o Jesus Kristo! Job sikrell i menshende o tchatcho drom pash o Debleste. Un job hi o glanstuno lauterendar, kai stenn i mulendar pre un wenn djido. Un job hi ninna o rai pral i tsele raja ap kai phub! Job kamell men o tselo djijestar, un las men dran mari doosh win, un plaissras menge peskro rateha." 
Revelation1:6 Job kras men raja un rashaja o Debleske, peskro dadeske. Leske hi o railepen un i soor kanna un hako tsireske! Amen." 
Revelation1:7 Dikenn, job wella dran o bolepen, un hakeno dikell les, ninna kolla, kai les ap o trushel dan. Un an hake themma rowenn le pral leste, un penenn le: “Patsams mer ap leste!” Awa, jaake hunte well kowa. Amen." 
Revelation1:8 O baro Dewel penella: “Mandar was lauter. Un lauter wella pale glan mande. Man hi i tseli soor, un djiwau hako tsireske: kanna un an ko tsiro, hoi his un hoi wella.”" 
Revelation1:9 Me, o Johanni, hom tumaro phraal an o patsepen ap o Jesuseste. Job hi miro baro rai, har job tumaro baro rai hi. Jaake har tumer wenn leske palla lino, wom me ninna leske palla lino, un dom miro patsepen gar pre. Me penom i menshenge o Debleskro lab, un sikrom lende o Jesuseskro drom. Doleske wom stildo un anlo ap ko them Patmos, kai an o baro pani tchiddo hi." 
Revelation1:10 Ap o Debleskro diwes was o Debleskro Ducho soreles pral mande. Un me shunom pal mande i sorelo rakepen. Kowa his har i gole, hoi dell i phurdepaskri." 
Revelation1:11 Un ko rakepen penas: “Tchin an i liil, hoi tu dikeh! Un bitche ko liil ap kol patslende, kai an kol efta forja khetne wenna: Efesus, Smirna, Pergamon, Tiatira, Sardes, Filadelfia un Laodicea!”" 
Revelation1:12 Un me rissrom man trujel, te dikap koles, kai ap mande rakras. Un har rissrom man trujel, dikom efta sonakangre momlia." 
Revelation1:13 Un mashkral lende his jek tardo, hoi wi-dikas har i mensho. Les his i lengsto ripen ap leste, un i sonakaskri dori trul leskro betch." 
Revelation1:14 Leskre balla ap o shero his parno har i bakrengre balla, har gib. Un leskre jaka chatchan har i jag." 
Revelation1:15 Un leskre herja his har dran sonakai, hoi an o bob chatchedo un thodo wella. Un leskro rakepen his har i gole i baro panjestar, hoi dur tele perella." 
Revelation1:16 Un an leskro tchatcho wast his les efta bolepangre momlia. Un dran leskro mui was i charo, hoi ap dui rigja nai tchinella. Un leskro mui his har o kham." 
Revelation1:17 Un har dikom les, perom glan leskre herja khetne, har woms mulo. Un job tchiwas peskro tchatcho wast ap mande, un penas: “Ma dare! Mandar was halauter. Un lauter wella pale glan mande." 
Revelation1:18 Me hom o djido. Un me homs mulo, un kanna hom djido un djiwau hako tsireske. Man hi i soor pral o merepen. Un man hi o klidepaskro an o mulengro them." 
Revelation1:19 Tchin lauter, hoi dikal, an i liil: kowa, hoi kanna hi, un kowa, hoi pal kowa lauter wella." 
Revelation1:20 Me kamau te haiwess, hoi kol efta bolepangre momlia hi, hoi tu an miro tchatcho wast dikal. Te haiwess ninna, hoi kol sonakangre momlia hi! Kol efta bolepangre momlia hi o Debleskre budepangre, kai denn jak ap i patslende, kai an i efta forja khetne wenna. Un i efta sonakangre momlia hi i patsle, kai wenna khetne an i efta forja.”" 
Revelation2:1 “Tchin kau liil ap o Debleskro budepaskro, kai dell jak ap i patslende an o foro Efesus: Kawa penell kowa, kai rikrell kol efta bolepangre momlia an peskro tchatcho wast, un kai djal mashkral kol efta sonakangre momlia trujel." 
Revelation2:2 Me prindjrau lauter, hoi tumer mange kran, tumari tseli phari budi. Tumer dan tumaro patsepen gar pre. Un tumer mukenn gar tchilatche menshe mashkral tumende te well. Un tumer lan kolen an o jak, kai penan, te hi le o Jesuseskre bitchepangre, un jon hi kowa gar. Un tumer haiwan, te chochran le." 
Revelation2:3 Tumer dan tumaro patsepen gar pre, un lan i pharo djipen mange ap tumende, un tumer wan gar khino an tumari budi mange." 
Revelation2:4 Jek koowa hi pash tumende, hoi hi gar mishto: Tumer kamenn man buder gar o tselo djijestar, jaake har kowa his ap ko tsiro, har tumer patslo wan. Tumaro dji mukas man." 
Revelation2:5 Mukenn tumenge kowa an o shero te djal, har dur tumer mandar tele peran. Awenn pale o tselo djijeha pash mande! Djiwenn ko djipen, hoi djiwan, har tumaro patsepen ap mande terno his. Te krenn kowa gar, palle wau, un lau tumari momeli krik, un tchiwrau lat ap i rig." 
Revelation2:6 Kate hi tchomone, hoi tumer krenn latches. Tumer kamenn gar, hoi kol Nikolarja krenna, jaake har me kowa witar gar kamau." 
Revelation2:7 Shunenn halauter mishto, hoi o Debleskro Ducho penella ap i patslende! Kowa, kai soreles an o patsepen atchas, un gar pre das, koles dau te chal ko rukestar, hoi o djipen della, kowa, hoi tardo hi an o Debleskri shukar baar.”" 
Revelation2:8 “Tchin kau liil ap o Debleskro budepaskro, kai dell jak ap i patslende an o foro Smirna: Kawa penell kowa, hoi hi o glanstuno un o palstuno, hoi mulo his, un djido was." 
Revelation2:9 Me djinau, te lenn le tumen palla. Ninna djinau, har tchorwelo han. Tchatchepah han tumer brawelo! Me djinau ninna, te rakrenn kolla djungeles pral tumende, kai penenn pendar, te hi le Debleskre menshe. Jon hi kek Debleskre menshe. Na-a, jon hi bengeskre menshe." 
Revelation2:10 Ma darenn kol duka, hoi ap tumende wenna! O beng mukell menshen tumendar an o stilepen te witsrell, te well diklo, har sorelo tumaro patsepen ap mande hi. Un tumer wenn deesh diwessa palla lino. Atchenn soreles an tumaro patsepen ap mande, ninna te marenn le tumen! Palle dau tumen o djipen, hoi atchella. Jaake baro hi tumaro plaissepen!" 
Revelation2:11 Shunenn halauter mishto, hoi o Debleskro Ducho penella ap i patslende! Kowa, kai soreles an o patsepen atchas, un gar pre das, kowa merell gar o duito kopo.”" 
Revelation2:12 “Tchin kau liil ap o Debleskro budepaskro, kai dell jak ap i patslende an o foro Pergamon: Kawa penell kowa, koles o charo hi, hoi ap dui rigja tchinella." 
Revelation2:13 Me djinau, tumer djiwenn kote, kai o beng o rai pral i menshende hi. Tumer rikrenn soreles ap mande, un mukan o patsepen gar, ninna an kol diwessa, har was o Antipas maredo, har job i menshenge mandar penas an tumaro foro, kai o beng djiwella." 
Revelation2:14 I tikno koowa pash tumende hi gar mishto. Mashkral tumende hi sawe menshe, kai djan ap ko drom, koles o Bileam glan i rah tsiro i menshende sikras. Job sikras o baro rajeste pral o them Moab, – leskro lab his Balak, – har te anell lo nai i Israelitarja ap i tchilatcho drom. Jaake chan i Israelitarja ko mass kol viechendar, hoi kol wawar menshe glan pengro debleste anan. Ninna djan le pash wawar djuwjende." 
Revelation2:15 Jaake hi ninna mashkral tumende sawe menshe, kai ap kowa patsenna, hoi kol Nikolarja penenn." 
Revelation2:16 Krenn kanna ko tchilatcho koowa buder gar! Te mukenn tumer kowa gar, palle wau an i tikno tsiro, un tchingrau ap kolende, kai shunan gar ap mande. Un miro rakepen tchinella har i charo." 
Revelation2:17 Shunenn halauter mishto, hoi o Debleskro Ducho penella ap i patslende! Kowa, kai soreles an o patsepen atchas, un gar pre das, koles dau ko maro dran o bolepen te chal, hoi kharella Manna. Ninna dau les i parno bar. Ap koleste hi o newo lab tchinlo, koles kek prindjrell, har kowa, kai les lella.”" 
Revelation2:18 “Tchin kau liil ap o Debleskro budepaskro, kai dell jak ap i patslende an o foro Tiatira: Kawa penell o Debleskro tchawo, koles hi jaka har i jag, un herja har sonakai." 
Revelation2:19 Me prindjrau lauter, hoi tumer mange krenn. Tumer kamenn man o djijestar, un rikrenn soreles ap mande. Me prindjrau lauter, hoi tumer tumare phralenge krenna. Un tumer wan gar khino an tumaro patsepen. Kowa, hoi tumer kanna krenna, hi ninna budeder har kowa, hoi kran, har patslo wan." 
Revelation2:20 Jek koowa hi gar mishto pash tumende. Tumer mukenn koi djuwel Isebel te rakrell, hoi joi kamella, koja, hoi penell, te hi li o Debleskri rakepaskretsa. Joi tserdell mire budepangren o Debleskro dromestar tele un penell lenge, te nai djan i mursha pash wawar djuwjende, un i djuwja pash wawar murshende. Ninna penell li lenge, te nai chan le ko mass, hoi wawar menshe glan pengro debleste anan." 
Revelation2:21 Me dom lat tsiro, te nai mukell li peskro tchilatcho drom. Un joi kamell gar peskro djungelo koowa te mukell." 
Revelation2:22 Doleske witsrau lat ap o nasslengro tchiben. Un kolla, kai lah sowan, jon te mukenn kowa gar, palle anau bare duka ap lende." 
Revelation2:23 Un kolakre tchawen dau mulo. Palle haiwenn i tsele patsle, te hom me kowa, kai halauter prindjrella, hoi i menshen an o shero un an o dji hi. Un hakeno, kai tchilatcho koowa kras, kowa lell mandar koi phagi pal kowa, hoi job kras." 
Revelation2:24 Tumer wawar patsle an o foro Tiatira, kai gar pal kol chochene laba djiwan, un ko bengeskro drom gar prindjrenna, ap tumende penau me: Me penau tumenge tchi wawar koowa, hoi tumer hunte krenna," 
Revelation2:25 har kowa, te rikrenn mire laba soreles an tumare djia, jaake rah bis te wau pale." 
Revelation2:26 Kowa, kai soreles an o patsepen atchas, un gar pre das, un krell lauter, hoi me kamau, jaake rah har djiwell lo, koleste dau i soor, te well lo rai pral i menshende an i wawar themma." 
Revelation2:27 Job anell len i sasterno wasteha un dell lauteren paash, kai gar ap leste shunenna, jaake har tchare paash dino wenna." 
Revelation2:28 Jaake har das man miro dad peskri soor, jaake dau koles miri soor. Ninna dau les ko bolepaskri momeli, hoi djal pre taissarlake ap o bolepen." 
Revelation2:29 Shunenn halauter mishto, hoi o Debleskro Ducho penella ap i patslende!”" 
Revelation3:1 “Tchin kau liil ap o Debleskro budepaskro, kai dell jak ap i patslende an o foro Sardes: Kawa penell kowa, koles o Debleskro Ducho hi, un koles i efta bolepangre momlia an o wast hi. Me djinau lauter, hoi tumer kran. Tumer han mulo, ninna te penenn le pral tumende, te han djido." 
Revelation3:2 Stenn pre o sopastar! Mashkral tumende hi gomme menshe, kai patsenn ap mande. Kolla hi gar bud. Un lengro patsepen hi tikno. Krenn lengro patsepen pale soreles! Glan miro Debleste hi kowa gar mishto doha, hoi tumer mange krenn." 
Revelation3:3 Ma bistrenn, hoi tumenge penlo was un hoi shunan! Un rikrenn ap kal laba! Un awenn pale ap o tchatcho drom! Te krenn kowa gar, un stenn gar pre o sopastar, palle wau pral tumende har i tchorepaskro. Un tumer djinenn gar, hawo tsireske pale wau." 
Revelation3:4 Ninna te hi gar bud patsle an o foro Sardes, kai djan ap miro drom, hi sawe patsle mank tumende, kai kran pengre koola gar tchiklo. Kolla hi moldo, te wenn le rido an parne koola, un djiwenn mantsa an o bolepen." 
Revelation3:5 Kowa, kai soreles an o patsepen atchas, un gar pre das, kowa lella parne ripja. Un leskro lab lau me gar win dran o liil, kai i djide dren tchinlo hi. Ninna penau glan miro dadeste un glan leskre bolepangre, kai job hi miro." 
Revelation3:6 Shunenn halauter mishto, hoi o Debleskro Ducho penella ap i patslende!”" 
Revelation3:7 “Tchin kau liil ap o Debleskro budepaskro, kai dell jak ap i patslende an o foro Filadelfia: Kawa penell o Debleskro tchatchepaskro. Koles hi o Davideskro klidepaskro an o wast. Job te krell o wudar pre, palle nai krell les kek pale pandlo. Job te krell o wudar pandlo, palle nai krell les kek pre." 
Revelation3:8 Me prindjrau lauter, hoi tumer mange kran. Dikenn, me krom i wudar glan tumende pre, hoi kek nai pandell. Tumen hi i tikni soor, un rikran miro lab an tumare djia, un dan man gar buchoste." 
Revelation3:9 Shunenn, hoi me kol bengeskre menshentsa krau, kai chochenn un penenn pendar, te hi le o Debleskre menshe, un jon hi kek Debleskre menshe. Me krau, te wenn le pash tumende, te witsrenn le pen glan tumende ap i phub, un te haiwenn le, te kamau tumen o tselo djijestar." 
Revelation3:10 Tumer rikran ko lab, hoi tumenge penom, un wan gar khino an o patsepen ap mande. Doleske rikrau mire wasta pral tumende an ko pharo tsiro, kai i bibacht wella pral i tsele menshende ap kai phub, te well diklo, hoi an lengre djia hi." 
Revelation3:11 Me wau an i tikno tsiro pale. Rikrenn tumaro patsepen soreles, te lell kek wawar ko shukar koowa tumendar, hoi tumenge an o bolepen hi, un hoi kolla lenna, kai dan pengro patsepen gar pre." 
Revelation3:12 Kowa, kai soreles an o patsepen atchas, un gar pre das, dran koleste krau me jekes, kai hi har i baro bar, hoi rikrell miro Debleskro kheer. Un kowa atchell koi tardo hako tsireske. Un me tchinau o lab miro Deblestar ap leste, un o lab o Debleskro forestar. Kowa hi o newo Jerusalem, hoi dran o bolepen tele wella. Un miro newo lab tchinau ninna ap leste." 
Revelation3:13 Shunenn halauter mishto, hoi o Debleskro Ducho penella ap i patslende!”" 
Revelation3:14 “Tchin kau liil ap o Debleskro budepaskro, kai dell jak ap i patslende an o foro Laodicea: Kawa penell kowa, kai kharell Amen, un penell hako tsiro o tchatchepen, un sikrell i menshende o tchatcho drom pash o Debleste. Job his koi pashel, har o Dewel lauter kras." 
Revelation3:15 Me djinau halauter, hoi tumer kran. Tumer han har i pipen, hoi hi gar shila, witar gar tato. Kamaus, te wenn tumer jek kolendar." 
Revelation3:16 Tumer han paash tato. Doleske tchungrau tumen win dran miro mui. 
Revelation3:17 Tumer penenna: Mer ham brawelo, un men hi halauter; tchi hunte well men buder. Me penau tumenge: Tumer djinenn gar, te han an i bibacht, jaake te khaitenn tumer man. Tumer han tchorwelo un nango un korelo." 
Revelation3:18 Doleske penau tumenge: Ginenn mandar sonakai, sawo sonakai, hoi an i jag thodo was, jaake te wenn tumer tchatchepah brawelo. Ginenn mandar ninna parne ripja, un riwenn kolla ap tumende, te han buder gar nango, un hunte ladjenn tumen buder gar. Un ginenn kutch djet, un makenn tumare jaka, te nai dikenn pale!" 
Revelation3:19 Lauteren, kai kamau o djijestar, kolende sikrau lengri doosh, un penau lenge dawentsa, te shunenn le ap mande. Mukenn kanna tumaro tchilatcho drom, un awenn pale ap miro drom!" 
Revelation3:20 Dikenn, me hom glan o wudar tardo, un dau ap ko wudar. Koon shunell, hoi me penau, un krell mange o wudar pre, pash koleste djau me dren, un chau leha, un job chal mantsa." 
Revelation3:21 Kowa, kai soreles an o patsepen atchas, un gar pre das, kowa nai beshell pes mantsa ap miro rajeskro beshepaskro, jaake har me ninna soreles tardo homs, un me beshom man miro dadeha ap leskro rajeskro beshepaskro." 
Revelation3:22 Shunenn halauter mishto, hoi o Debleskro Ducho penella ap i patslende!”" 
Revelation4:1 Pal kowa dikom i wudar an o bolepen, hoi pre hi. Un kowa, kai ap mande rakras, un leskri gole sorelo har i phurdepaskri his, kowa penas ap mande: “Ab kate pre! Me sikrau tut, hoi pal kawa wella.”" 
Revelation4:2 Un ap jek kopo was o Debleskro Ducho soreles ap mande, un me dikom i rajeskro beshepaskro an o bolepen tardo. Un ap koleste his jek beshdo." 
Revelation4:3 Leskro mui dikas jaake shukar win har kol kutch shukar barra Jaspis un Karneol. Un trul o rajeskro beshepaskro his i brishineskro bogo, kai dikas jaake win har ko shukar bar Smaragdo." 
Revelation4:4 Un trul o rajeskro beshepaskro his biish-te-star wawar rajengre beshepangre tardo. Un ap kolende his biish-te-star tchatchepangre phure beshdo. Kolen his parne ripja ap lende, un i shereskro sonakai ap lengre shere." 
Revelation4:5 Un kotar, kai ko rajeskro beshepaskro hi, das jag karje pral un tele, un was i bari gole win, har koi gole, hoi o bolepen krella, te dell baro brishin un te djal jag tele ap i phub. Un glan o rajeskro beshepaskro chatchan efta jaga. Kol efta jaga hi o Debleskro Ducho." 
Revelation4:6 Glan o rajeskro beshepaskro his tchomone har i baro pani dran wali. Kowa his jaake djudjo, te dikenn le nai dren, har dikenn le an i wali. Trul o rajeskro beshepaskro his star sorele bolepangre, jek ap haki rig. Kolla his pherde jaka glan un palla." 
Revelation4:7 Un ko glanstuno sorelo bolepaskro his har i bari margodja. Un ko duito sorelo bolepaskro his har i terni murshkani grumni. Un ko triinto sorelo bolepaskres his i mui har i menshes hi. Un ko starto sorelo bolepaskro his har i baro tchirklo an o bolepen. 
Revelation4:8 Un hakenes lendar his shob tchirklengre mussja. Kolla his dren un win pherde jaka. Un jon giwenn o tselo diwes un i tseli rat: Latcho - un tchatcho - har kek wawar - hi o Dewel, ko rai pral halauter. Hako tsiro djiwell lo, kanna, un an ko tsiro, hoi his, un hoi wella." 
Revelation4:9 Un jaake sharenn kol star sorele bolepangre koles, kai ap o rajeskro beshepaskro beshdo hi, un jon hadenn les un krenn les baro, un parkrenn pen pash leste, kai djiwell hako tsireske." 
Revelation4:10 Hako kopo, kai krenn le kowa, witsrenn pen kol biish-te-star tchatchepangre phure glan koleste tele, kai ap o rajeskro beshepaskro beshdo hi, un sharenn koles, koleskro djipen gar pre-herella. Un jon tchiwenn pengro sherengro sonakai glan o rajeskro beshepaskro tele, un penenna:" 
Revelation4:11 “Tu, o Dewel, maro rai, tu hal moldo, te less o railepen, un o sharepen, un i soor. Tu kral o bolepen un i phub. Jaake, har tu kamal, jaake kral tu kowa, un was kowa.”" 
Revelation5:1 Un me dikom i liil an o tchatcho wast kolestar, kai ap o rajeskro beshepaskro beshdo hi. Ap ko liil his dren un win tchomone tchinlo. Un ko liil his khetne pandlo efta dorjentsa." 
Revelation5:2 Un me dikom i sorelo bolepaskres, kowa das soreles gole: “Koon hi moldo, te nai krell lo ko liil pre, te dikell lo dren?”" 
Revelation5:3 Un an o bolepen, un ap i phub, un tel i phub his kek koi, kai hi moldo, te krell lo ko liil pre, te dikell lo dren." 
Revelation5:4 Un har dikom, te his kek moldo, te krell lo ko liil pre, te dikell lo dren, koi rowom soreles." 
Revelation5:5 Un jek kol tchatchepangre phurendar penas ap mande: “Ma rob! Dik, jek las i soor o Deblestar pral o tchilatchepen un o merepen, un hi moldo, te krell lo ko liil pre, te dikell lo dren. Job hi kowa, kai kharenn le lewo, kai well dran o them Juda. Job hi o Davideskro tchawo.”" 
Revelation5:6 Un me dikom i terno bakres pash o rajeskro beshepaskro, hoi wi-dikas, har wals lo maredo. Kowa hi tardo mashkral kol star sorele bolepangre un kol tchatchepangre phurende. Les hi efta shinga un efta jaka. Kol efta jaka hi o Debleskro Ducho, hoi pral i tseli phub win bitchedo was." 
Revelation5:7 Un o terno bakro was pash koleste, hoi ap o rajeskro beshepaskro beshdo his, un las ko liil dran leskro tchatcho wast." 
Revelation5:8 Un har las job o liil, peran kol star sorele bolepangre un kol biish-te-star tchatchepangre phure glan o terno bakro tele. Un hakenes lendar his i bashepaskri. Un jon bashran i shukar bashepen. Len his ninna sonakangre tchare pherdo gudlo kasht, hoi o Debleske chatchedo wella, un mishto sungella. Ko gudlo kasht hi o mangepen, hoi o Debleskre menshe pengro Deblestar mangan." 
Revelation5:9 Un jon giwenn i newi gili, un penenn: Tu hal moldo, te less ko liil, un te kress ko liil pre. Tu wal maredo, un plaissral tiro rateha, te giness menshen tiro Debleske. Kolla wenna dran hako them, haki natsjona, haki harmenatsjona un hako rakepen." 
Revelation5:10 Un tu kreh lendar raja un rashaja maro Debleske. Un jon wenn raja pral i tseli phub. 
Revelation5:11 Un me dikom un shunom bud bolepangren tardo trul o rajeskro beshepaskro, un trul kol star sorele bolepangre, un trul kol tchatchepangre phurende. Jon his jaake bud har deesh serja (10.000) kope deesh serja un jek sero kope jek sero." 
Revelation5:12 Un jon giwenn soreles: O terno bakro, hoi was maredo, kowa hi moldo, te well les i bari soor, ninna o brawlepen, un o goswepen, un o sharepen, un o railepen, un i gilja, hoi les hadenna, un bares krenna." 
Revelation5:13 Un me shunom i gili, hoi lauter giwan, kai an o bolepen hi, un ap i phub, un tel i phub, un an o baro pani. Un jon giwenn: “Koleske, kai ap o rajeskro beshepaskro beshdo hi un ko terno bakreske, kolenge hi i gilja, un o sharepen, un o railepen, un i soor pral lauter, kanna un hako tsireske.”" 
Revelation5:14 Un kol star sorele bolepangre penan: Amen! Un kol tchatchepangre phure witsran pen glan o Debleste un glan o bakro tele, un sharan len." 
Revelation6:1 Un me dikom, har ko terno bakro jek kol efta dorjendar pre pandas, hoi ko liil khetne rikrenna. Un me shunom, har jek kol star sorele bolepangrendar soreles penas: “Ab!”" 
Revelation6:2 Un me dikom i parno grajes. Un kowa, kai pre beshdo hi, koles hi i bogo an o wast. Un les was i shereskro sonakai dino, hoi sikrella, te hi job sorleder har bud wawar bare raja. Un job djas win an o kurepen, un was sorleder har jon halauter." 
Revelation6:3 Un o bakro pandas o duiti dori pre, hoi ko liil khetne rikras. Un me shunom, har ko duito sorelo bolepaskro penas: “Ab!”" 
Revelation6:4 Un i wawar grai was win. Ko grai his lolo har i jag. Un kowa, hoi pre beshdo his, koles was i soor dino, te anell lo o kurepen ap i phub, jaake te marenn pen i menshe. Un les was i baro charo dino." 
Revelation6:5 Un o terno bakro pandas i triinti dori pre, hoi ko liil khetne rikras. Un me shunom, har o triinto sorelo bolepaskro penas: “Ab!” Un me dikom i kalo grajes. Un kowa, kai pre beshdo his, koles his jek koowa an peskro wast, hoi sikrella, har pharo tchomone hi." 
Revelation6:6 Un me shunom i rakepen, hoi was mashkral kote win, kai kol star sorele bolepangre tardo hi, un penas: “Jek diwes hunte budrenn le, te ginenn le jek tcharo gib. Un jek diwes hunte budrenn le, te ginenn le triin tchare djob. O djet un i mool atchenna, har jon hi. Kolenge hunte plaissrenn le gar budeder.”" 
Revelation6:7 Un o terno bakro pandas i starti dori pre, hoi ko liil khetne rikras. Un me shunom, har o starto sorelo bolepaskro penas: “Ab!”" 
Revelation6:8 Un me dikom i grajes. Kowa his parno har i mulo. Un kowa, kai pre beshdo his, koleskro lab his “Mulo.” Un o merepen was pal leste. Un les was i soor dino, te marell lo i menshen ap o starto kotar i phubjatar. O charo, i diwje vieche, i bok un o nasslepen marenn len." 
Revelation6:9 Un o terno bakro pandas i pantchti dori pre, hoi rikras ko liil khetne. Un me dikom kol tsele menshen, kai rikran soreles ap o Debleskro lab, un sikran i menshende o Debleskro drom, un wan doleske maredo. Jon his tardo pash o Debleskri chatchepaskri." 
Revelation6:10 Un dan soreles gole un penan: “Baro Dewel un tchatcho rai, ab sik un rake i phagi win pral kolende ap i phub, kai maran men. De len ko tchilatchepen pale, hoi jon ap mende kran!”" 
Revelation6:11 Un hakenes lendar las i parno ripen. Un jek penas ap lende: “Mukenn tele i tikno tsiro! Tumare phrala, kai budrenn o Debleske har tumer budran, kolendar wenna ninna maredo, jaake bud har o Dewel mukell, te wenn le maredo.”" 
Revelation6:12 Un me dikom, har o terno bakro i shobti dori pre pandas, hoi ko liil khetne rikras. Koi trissas i phub soreles. Un o kham was kalo har i kalo gono. Un o tselo tchon was lolo har o rat." 
Revelation6:13 Un i bolepangre momlia peran ap i phub, jaake har perenn i brola ap i phub tele, te phurdell i sorelo ducho an i broleskro ruk." 
Revelation6:14 Un o bolepen tserdas pes khetne, har i liil, hoi khetne lino wella. Un kek berga atchas, kai his li tardo, witar gar kek them, hoi an i pani tchiddo hi." 
Revelation6:15 Un i tsele menshe khatran pen: i raja pral i themma ap i phub, i bare un i brawele, i lurdengre pralstune un wawar pralstune, ninna i budepangre un lengre raja. Jon khatran pen an i phub, un mashkral i bare barra," 
Revelation6:16 un penan ap kol berge un ap kol bare barra: “Perenn ap mende, un khatrenn men kolestar, kai ap o rajeskro beshepaskro beshdo hi, un koi bari choljatar, hoi ko terno bakres hi!" 
Revelation6:17 Ko baro diwes was, kai lengri choli ap mende wella. Un kek nashte nashell lengri choljatar krik.”" 
Revelation7:1 Un pal kowa dikom me star bolepangren. Kolla his tardo ap kol star rigja i phubjatar, un rikran ko sorelo ducho pale, hoi phurdell dran hake star rigja pral i phub. Jon rikran les pale, te phurdell lo gar pral i phub, witar gar pral o baro pani, witar gar pral i tsele ruka." 
Revelation7:2 Un me dikom i wawar bolepaskres. Kowa was kol rigjatar, kai o kham pre djala. Un job kras i sikepen ap kolende, kai o djido Debleske koi hi. Un job das soreles gole ap kol star bolepangre, kolen i soor dino was, te dukrenn le i phub un o baro pani." 
Revelation7:3 Un job penas ap lende: “Ma dukrenn i phub un o baro pani, witar gar i ruka, jaake rah har mer kram gar i sikepen glan ap i shere kolendar, kai maro Debleske budran.”" 
Revelation7:4 Un me shunom kitse menshe ko sikepen lan. Kolla his 144.000 (jek-sheel-te-star-deesh-te-star serja) menshe, kai wan dran i tsele menshende, kai wenna pal o Israeleskre deesh-te-dui tchawende." 
Revelation7:5 Deesh-te-dui serja wenna dran o Juda. Deesh-te-dui serja wenna dran o Ruben. Deesh-te-dui serja wenna dran o Gad. Deesh-te-dui serja wenna dran o Asser. Deesh-te-dui serja wenna dran o Naftali. Deesh-te-dui serja wenna dran o Manasse. Deesh-te-dui serja wenna dran o Simeon. Deesh-te-dui serja wenna dran o Levi. Deesh-te-dui serja wenna dran o Issachar. Deesh-te-dui serja wenna dran o Sebulon. Deesh-te-dui serja wenna dran o Josef. Deesh-te-dui serja wenna dran o Benjamin. 
Revelation7:6  
Revelation7:7  
Revelation7:8  
Revelation7:9 Pal kowa dikom me bud menshen, jaake bud, te nai penell kek, kitse jon hi. Kolla wenna dran hako them, haki natsjona, haki harmenatsjona un hako rakepen. Un jon his khetne tardo glan o rajeskro beshepaskro un glan ko terno bakro. Len his parne ripja ap lende un bare patria an lengre wasta." 
Revelation7:10 Un jon dan soreles gole: “Mer sharah maro Debles, kai ap o rajeskro beshepaskro beshdo hi un ko terno bakres! Jon lan men win dran o tchilatchepen un o merepen.”" 
Revelation7:11 Un i tsele bolepangre his tardo trul o rajeskro beshepaskro un trul i tchatchepangre phurende un trul i star sorele bolepangre. Un jon witsran pen glan o rajeskro beshepaskro tele o mujeha ap i phub, un sharan o Debles." 
Revelation7:12 Un jon penan: “Hi mishto, te giwas mer gilja maro Debleske, hoi les hadenna, un hoi les bares krenna. Leskro railepen un goswepen hi baro. Un les hi bari soor. Hi mishto, te parkras men pash leste, un te sharas les, kanna un hako tsireske. Amen!”" 
Revelation7:13 Un jek kol tchatchepangre phurendar putchas mandar: “Koon hi kolla, kai hi len parne ripja ap lende? Kai wan le?”" 
Revelation7:14 Un me penom ap leste: “Miro rai, tu djineh les.” Un job penas ap mande: “Kolla wan soreles palla lino, un wan win dran ko pharo tsiro. Un jon thowan pengre ripja, un kran len parno an o terno bakreskro rat.”" 
Revelation7:15 Doleske hi le tardo glan o Debleskro beshepaskro un hi leskre rashaja an leskro kheer, un hi leske koi o tselo diwes un i tseli rat. Un kowa, kai ap o Debleskro beshepaskro beshdo hi, djiwell pash lende, un dell jak ap lende." 
Revelation7:16 Un jon hunte bokenn buder gar, witar gar trushenn le buder. Un o kham chatchrell len buder gar, witar kek wawar tatepen." 
Revelation7:17 O terno bakro, hoi mashkral o Debleskro beshepaskro hi, kowa dell jak ap lende, har i bakrengro rai ap peskre bakre jak della, un anell len pash o pani, hoi o djipen della. Un o Dewel khossell hake swa ap lengre jaka tele." 
Revelation8:1 Un har o terno bakro i eftati dori pre pandas, hoi ko liil khetne rikras, rakras kek buder an o bolepen. I tikno tsiro rakran le tchi buder." 
Revelation8:2 Un me dikom kol efta bolepangren, kai glan o Debleskro beshepaskro tardo hi. Kolla lan efta phurdepangren." 
Revelation8:3 Un i wawar bolepaskro was, un djas pash o Debleskri chatchepaskri. Les his i sonakaskro tcharo an o wast, an koleste gudlo kasht chatchedo wella, hoi mishto sungella. Un ko bolepaskro las bud gudlo kasht, te chatchrell lo les ap o Debleskro sonakaskro bob, hoi glan o Debleskro beshepaskro tardo hi, te well o latcho sungepen khetne o mangepah, hoi o Debleskre tchawe o Deblestar mangan." 
Revelation8:4 Un ko latcho sungepen hadas pes pre dran leskro wast, un djas glan o Debleste khetne o mangepah kol Debleskre menshendar." 
Revelation8:5 Un ko bolepaskro las ko tcharo, an koleste ko gudlo kasht chatchedo wella, un kras les pherdi jag, hoi job dran o Debleskri chatchepaskri las, un tchoras o tcharo win ap i phub. Koi das jag karje pral un tele, un das bari soreli gole, har koi gole, hoi o bolepen krella, te dell baro brishin, un te djal jag tele ap i phub. Un i phub trissas soreles." 
Revelation8:6 Un kol efta bolepangre, kai his len kol efta phurdepangre, lan len an i wasta, te phurdenn le dren." 
Revelation8:7 Un o glanstuno phurdas an peskri phurdepaskri. Koi das brishin, hoi his har barra, un jag o rateha mashkral ap i phub. Un o triinto kotar i tseli phubjatar chatchras, un o triinto kotar i tsele rukendar chatchras, ninna o tselo senlepen." 
Revelation8:8 Un o duito bolepaskro phurdas an peskri phurdepaskri. Koi was i bari kotar bar, hoi chatchella, an o baro pani witsedo. Un o triinto kotar o tselo baro panjestar was har o rat." 
Revelation8:9 Koi meras o triinto kotar lauterestar, hoi an o baro pani djiwas. Ninna hako triinto shiffo djas paash." 
Revelation8:10 Un ko triinto bolepaskro phurdas an peskri phurdepaskri: Un i bolepaskri momeli chatchas har jag, un peras tele ap i phub. Un koja peras ap o triinto kotar hako lengsto panjestar, ninna ap ko pani, hoi wella dran i phub win." 
Revelation8:11 Un ko bolepaskri momeli kharella shut. Un o triinto kotar kol panjestar was shutlo. Un bud kol menshendar, kai pijan ko pani, meran lestar." 
Revelation8:12 Un o starto bolepaskro phurdas an peskri phurdepaskri. Un o kham las i dap, un o triinto kotar lestar was kalo. Ninna o tchon un i wawar bolepangre momlia lan i dap. Un o triinto kotar lendar was kalo. Jaake chatchas o kham gar ap o triinto kotar ap o diwes, witar gar chatchan o tchon un i bolepangre momlia ap o triinto kotar an i rat." 
Revelation8:13 Un me dikom dur pral ap o bolepen i baro tchirkles, un shunom, har job gole das: Bibacht, bibacht, bibacht! Te phurdenn i wawar triin bolepangre an pengre phurdepangren, palle wella i bari bibacht ap kolende, kai ap i phub djiwenna." 
Revelation9:1 Un o pantchto bolepaskro phurdas an peskri phurdepaskri. Un me dikom i bolepaskri momeli, hoi tele ap i phub peras. Un koja kras o telstunepen pre." 
Revelation9:2 Koi was i jagakri khand dran o telstunepen win, har i jagakri khand dran i baro bob win wella. Un koi jagakri khand hadas pes pre, un tchakras o kham un o bolepen, jaake te was rat." 
Revelation9:3 Dran koi jagakri khand wan stepangre win ap i phub. Kolla lan i soor, te denn le tchurje, jaake har i skorpione denn tchurje." 
Revelation9:4 Un lenge was penlo, te dukrenn le gar o senlepen ap i phub, witar gar i ruka. Jon hunte dukrenn kol menshen kokres, kai kek Debleskro sikepen glan ap lengre shere hi." 
Revelation9:5 Kol menshen hunte dukrenn le pantch tchon, un hunte marenn len gar. Lengre duka wenn jaake baro, har te dans len i skorpione tchurje." 
Revelation9:6 Un an ko tsiro kamenn i menshe te merell, un nashte merenn gar. Lengro dji nashell pal o merepen, un o merepen nashell lendar." 
Revelation9:7 Un kol stepangre his har graja, kai djan an o kurepen. Un hakenes his ap leskro shero tchomone har i shereskro sonakai, jaake har bare rajen hi. Un lengre muja his jaake, har wans le menshengre muja." 
Revelation9:8 Un lengre balla his har djuwjengre balla. Un len his danda har i bari diwji margodja. 
Revelation9:9 Un ap lengro betch his len sasterne gada. Un koi gole, hoi lengre mussja kran, his har koi gole, hoi bud wurdja pengre grajentsa krenn, kai an o kurepen nashenna."
